subject: I was hesitant to send this

body:
| | | Peter,

I’m not going to lie - I was hesitant to send this email...

Today, anyone who speaks out against our two-tiered justice system could be dragged though the mud and smattered with charges by the radical Biden Administration.****

_**But enough is enough.** _

**I’ll say it loud and I’ll say it clear - Joe Biden’s Democratic Party uses the justice system to bury Donald Trump in bogus lawsuits in an attempt to keep him out of the White House.**

This isn’t about trying to find “truth” or “justice,” Peter - it’s about Joe Biden trying to win an election he knows he can’t win on his own.

What the Biden Administration is doing is wrong, disgusting, and un-American.****

The President should use his power to keep the American people safe, not to attack his political opponents.

**[EVERYONE in America has to take a stand if we’re going to defend our democracy. Will you sign our “Keep 2024 Free” petition today and DEMAND an end to the bogus legal charges?](http://links.voterickscott.com/u/click?_t=24d1692d4ad14657a18af9ad6ea13243&_m=be65eababfbb43138114a25d67f0ba4a&_e=SXBeQC6cDX2CC0RgIeB3uB2u0KvRdIZ52IoqleRDv9iSZPwQzFX7mh89rMkLazBJBTS_vGYrgxwOwv6qti7bbw4srGDiiySpPd4sW5abuAWsAJJL70EZ4oeW2Fi4aDLGmgaosEubStbHCgS1qeL0QStRsW0M75PEFUGnck3pDsC6u3p-PhpEmcYxx7rL5HcDj3rqGf_2chkYaczCQNVzaQdius4rM6b-UoncSXxhNP1nhfHWjLhvYMCuEpr3HQcJvmoFzVGW4KFVWFwuWhXcCC-ikREoUh8iKMAq5jrOCv0-I-jl7zf1Q6Ia2jPFufqZ6_2RxVsp3ExikSTcYWCh1VR6IeUVj_M5lCMauyH_S5zpBuJ6cy-TgmGwpvDUYuhA)**

name: Lucas Kunce HQ
subject: Choose your fighter…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
13-year Marine veteran Lucas Kunce or January 6th coward Josh Hawley?
#
Josh Hawley is the corrupt politician who raised his fist in support of rioters outside the U.S. Capitol on January 6, 2021 — then ran out the back door like a coward the moment things got real.
Lucas Kunce is the 13-year Marine veteran, antitrust expert, and Democrat building a grassroots campaign to replace Josh Hawley in the U.S. Senate.
**It’s time to choose your fighter, Peter:**
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/38738?refcode=em20231028-4076&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=4076%2E614464%2EYJiFqY)
**[ELECT LUCAS KUNCE: CHIP IN NOW →](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/38738?refcode=em20231028-4076&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=4076%2E614464%2EYJiFqY)**
**Missouri’s U.S. Senate race is one of our best and only chances to flip a GOP-held Senate seat in 2024** — and Lucas Kunce is gaining more and more momentum every day.
From outraising Hawley to earning endorsements from statewide labor organizations like the Missouri AFL-CIO + the Missouri Fire Fighters, Lucas has proved that this grassroots movement to defeat Josh Hawley will be a serious force to be reckoned with in this election cycle.
But after a slew of approval polls found Hawley’s numbers tanking among Missourians, national GOP insiders and corporate mega-donors stepped in to prop up his scattered campaign. **They’ve already spent MILLIONS to make Hawley look strong and fund attacks against Lucas — and they aren’t going to stop anytime soon.**
That’s why we need to be prepared every day between now and November 5, 2024. We need to continue fighting back against their desperate attacks AND getting Lucas’ unifying vision for Missouri in front of voters. And we need your support to make it happen. **So we’re coming directly to you, Peter.**
**[Will you help Missourians choose their fighter in 2024 by adding a donation of $10, $25, or whatever you can afford today? Lucas isn’t taking a cent from corporate PACs in this race, so we’re counting on help from real people like you every step of the way.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/38738?refcode=em20231028-4076&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=4076%2E614464%2EYJiFqY)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/38739?refcode=em20231028-4076&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=4&akid=4076%2E614464%2EYJiFqY) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/38739?refcode=em20231028-4076&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=5&akid=4076%2E614464%2EYJiFqY) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/38739?refcode=em20231028-4076&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=6&akid=4076%2E614464%2EYJiFqY) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/38739?refcode=em20231028-4076&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=7&akid=4076%2E614464%2EYJiFqY) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/38739?refcode=em20231028-4076&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=8&akid=4076%2E614464%2EYJiFqY) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/38739?refcode=em20231028-4076&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=9&akid=4076%2E614464%2EYJiFqY) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/38738?refcode=em20231028-4076&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=10&akid=4076%2E614464%2EYJiFqY)
---
Missourians deserve a real warrior for working people representing them in the U.S. Senate, not another fraud + coward like Josh Hawley — and Lucas is ready to serve.
Thanks for all your help,
— Team Lucas Kunce

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lk-email-footer?refcode=em20231028-4076-footer&t=11&refcode2=4076_614464_YJiFqY&akid=4076%2E614464%2EYJiFqY)**

---
Hey,

Last week, we sent you our urgent petition to abolish the Electoral College.

**But our records indicate that you didn’t sign.** Without your signature, we’re still [7] signatures short of our signature goal.

So we’re giving you a second chance to add your signature now. **[_Click HERE or use the button below to sign »_](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/POLL20230608_EC?source=FFR_20231028_EMPET_E4_T0_NS_RS&t=7&akid=20344%2E4449941%2E26tDNJ)** | [ADD MY NAME NOW »](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/POLL20230608_EC?source=FFR_20231028_EMPET_E4_T0_NS_RS&t=8&akid=20344%2E4449941%2E26tDNJ)

Andrew

Fight for Reform

Sign on now to abolish the Electoral College »](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/POLL20230608_EC?source=FFR_20231028_EMPET_E4_T0_NS_RS&t=10&akid=20344%2E4449941%2E26tDNJ)
---
Look, Jamie Raskin is 100% right — the Electoral College is eroding our Democracy election by election!

_**Donald Trump would NEVER have been President if it wasn’t for the Electoral College.**_

Republicans have only won the popular vote ONCE since 1988.

_But they’ve won the Presidency three times during that period thanks to the Electoral College – it’s SO UNFAIR and COMPLETELY undemocratic!!_

**[_So we’re launching a MASSIVE petition to stand with Jamie Raskin & demand Congress to pass a Constitutional Amendment to ABOLISH the Electoral College IMMEDIATELY! Add your name right away!_](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/POLL20230608_EC?source=FFR_20231028_EMPET_E4_T0_NS_RS&t=11&akid=20344%2E4449941%2E26tDNJ)**

name: Team Brandon
subject: This is a real tough email to write
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Brandon Presley Campaign
body:
We’re taking a look at our fundraising numbers. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72379223/435135387/17860314?refcode=ea.95dd1d01-f375-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&ms=ea.95dd1d01-f375-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzMTAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOTVkZDFkMDEtZjM3NS1lZTExLWIwMDQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=udXuJfkOjkOiyu_C-LKTtsF-boXRQF8WgvAgX8WghbI=)
---
Hi, Peter. This is a tough email for us to send. We’re currently facing a massive gap between our campaign budget through Election Day and fundraising projections. If we don’t raise $130,000 by the end of the month, we’re going to have to start taking a look at potential budget cuts. **With Election Day just 10 days away, we’re asking you to help us close this gap so that we can fire Tate Reeves and move Mississippi forward.** **[Whether you can donate $25 or a little bit more, every single donation makes a real difference. With voters already casting their ballots, there’s never been a more important moment to chip in.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72379224/435135388/-935144756?amount=25&refcode=ea.95dd1d01-f375-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&ms=ea.95dd1d01-f375-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzMTAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOTVkZDFkMDEtZjM3NS1lZTExLWIwMDQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=udXuJfkOjkOiyu_C-LKTtsF-boXRQF8WgvAgX8WghbI=)** | **[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72379225/435135389/-935144756?amount=25&refcode=ea.95dd1d01-f375-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&ms=ea.95dd1d01-f375-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzMTAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOTVkZDFkMDEtZjM3NS1lZTExLWIwMDQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=udXuJfkOjkOiyu_C-LKTtsF-boXRQF8WgvAgX8WghbI=)**
---
This is the most expensive gubernatorial election in Mississippi history — and the most competitive in decades. New polling released this week shows Brandon and Tate statistically tied, so we need an outpouring of support NOW to surge to victory on November 7.
We know that some people see us as underdogs. And that’s how hard we’re working. **But if we have the resources to fully fund our voter outreach efforts over the next 10 days,_we will overcome the odds and win_.**
That’s not hyperbole. In 2019, Democrats came within striking distance of winning — and our polling says this year is going to be even closer. We have a real path to victory, but only if we can finish this election strong.

clean_body: We’re taking a look at our fundraising numbers. | = Hi, Peter. This is a tough email for us to send. We’re currently facing a massive gap between our campaign budget through Election Day and fundraising projections. If we don’t raise $130,000 by the end of the month, we’re going to have to start taking a look at potential budget cuts. With Election Day just 10 days away, we’re asking you to help us close this gap so that we can fire Tate Reeves and move Mississippi forward. = | = This is the most expensive gubernatorial election in Mississippi history — and the most competitive in decades. New polling released this week shows Brandon and Tate statistically tied, so we need an outpouring of support NOW to surge to victory on November 7. We know that some people see us as underdogs. And that’s how hard we’re working. But if we have the resources to fully fund our voter outreach efforts over the next 10 days,we will overcome the odds and win. That’s not hyperbole. In 2019, Democrats came within striking distance of winning — and our polling says this year is going to be even closer. We have a real path to victory, but only if we can finish this election strong. = With your support, we can win. name: Speaker Mike Johnson
subject: The cornerstone of leadership
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MIKE JOHNSON FOR LOUISIANA
body:
I believe to my core that the most important things in life are God, family, and pride in our country. These are the values that guide me and shape my life. | [Unsubscribe](http://links.bestamericanow.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_s=376a3c8eff8f439cb3614ec83e9448c7&_t=9qBUxetl0P0aLq38i4azas2aN5rLaYgqZVVqUrSF7EaOC2zLFCQ_bmmO2ft4qUUEXcUsbQozqg6vzFtl5HY3ZmcmdSq03Sng4Ycs9-Li3pc%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.bestamericanow.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_s=376a3c8eff8f439cb3614ec83e9448c7&_t=9qBUxetl0P0aLq38i4azas2aN5rLaYgqZVVqUrSF7EaOC2zLFCQ_bmmO2ft4qUUEXcUsbQozqg6vzFtl5HY3ZmcmdSq03Sng4Ycs9-Li3pc%3D)
[ ](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=376a3c8eff8f439cb3614ec83e9448c7&_e=wRtgxxIPVVgZCjV71JGoLQgULrMuPnPAbHJJOrrzZWp2nsTZ_ea7ju6y3_cSeob8TwJOQ484lMGJEJi1bjEDoayT9uYOANjgRcFUmEJ2XFAziN8c6GuV4DbYgOrGSymocv-_jW700HiLmVe9r61Y1FvZvmDz75H-DxlwnU7aTnT2rNc6eQJblh_OYj6dxzkGCFPyixlZ8fZkelcYmQF9TGRKQMzgaWAEi1OXNX2W_HFJ29-CbEAhoKac3mox33WM7wooD5NP9_1zn04DITpz3ur1e_Hjp4bnxk2YTRcrSxi8dlaDqzNMmT7Aepwsmk3ZuaKwYACpY-YGmvwnUmZE8KDU0Ii1ReXM3T9Ia4gz8eNxOq8LWcJzOu_LcFKXZ4pBHXxc7898AFiMElInFAup8g%3D%3D)

Peter,

The most important things in life are faith, family, and freedom. That's not just a slogan, these happen to be the foundations of our great country. That is why I am fighting every day to preserve them.

**Faith.** Our nation began with the bold declaration that all men are created equal by God, and that our rights derive from Him and not the government. The founders insisted that faith must remain central to our national identity because, as George Washington summarized, "religion and morality are indispensable supports" of our republic. Like so many American households through the generations, in our house we instill faith in the hearts of our children, serve God, and serve people.

**Family.** Stable, happy families are the basis of any thriving society, and public policy should always acknowledge this obvious truth. Strengthening the nuclear family should be a top priority, and government should get out of the way and respect parental rights. Kelly and I have been very intentional about passing along the values of hard work, honor, and sacrifice to our children, just as our parents passed them along to us. For nearly two and a half centuries, this has been the American way.

**Freedom.** It is a self-evident truth that God endows all of us with inherent freedoms, such as the natural and unalienable rights to life, liberty, conscience, and the ability to pursue happiness, own property, build wealth and defend ourselves and our families. The purpose of government is to secure these rights, and the ideas we advance should always aim to maintain and increase the liberty of the American people. I’ve devoted my life and career to fighting for those fundamental freedoms and traditional values, first in the courts as a constitutional law attorney, and now in the Congress.

[**This is a simple truth:**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=376a3c8eff8f439cb3614ec83e9448c7&_e=wRtgxxIPVVgZCjV71JGoLQgULrMuPnPAbHJJOrrzZWp2nsTZ_ea7ju6y3_cSeob8TwJOQ484lMGJEJi1bjEDoayT9uYOANjgRcFUmEJ2XFAziN8c6GuV4DbYgOrGSymocv-_jW700HiLmVe9r61Y1FvZvmDz75H-DxlwnU7aTnT2rNc6eQJblh_OYj6dxzkGCFPyixlZ8fZkelcYmQF9TGRKQMzgaWAEi1OXNX2W_HFJ29-CbEAhoKac3mox33WMwS7S9u5narBmxi2ZYm8LQOMhgFiHeCLBUKcYtXaSGYyy3jf_DDIIwGrpIMroDzrvn25z4JfsYl5m-bBpGwzb5DUXK8nVglidOb1Ki7IL_BAhKc5p0t9GvJ73l9v0AP3I9Ce1nq6wApXeW1IioYv1PA%3D%3D) America is the freest, most powerful, most successful nation in the history of world - but we cannot maintain that status if we are led by politicians who hate the very foundations that made us who we are!

[** SUPPORT MIKE JOHNSON > **](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=376a3c8eff8f439cb3614ec83e9448c7&_e=wRtgxxIPVVgZCjV71JGoLQgULrMuPnPAbHJJOrrzZWp2nsTZ_ea7ju6y3_cSeob8TwJOQ484lMGJEJi1bjEDoayT9uYOANjgRcFUmEJ2XFAziN8c6GuV4DbYgOrGSymocv-_jW700HiLmVe9r61Y1FvZvmDz75H-DxlwnU7aTnT2rNc6eQJblh_OYj6dxzkGCFPyixlZ8fZkelcYmQF9TGRKQMzgaWAEi1OXNX2W_HFJ29-CbEAhoKac3mox33WM_byDtE--0V9MFqJ4SB8w1ZTXGSXETzT5rSVeupHhocAFou8HjlLV7jxk7prVGy_kh1YZNrASgW5QlVkoFh_nAE7Y2or0iZa-pHKyHLWgS8lFZYlB5gxB7vFCSqujR6CL-DV_X5rUK7byo6EPot0iTw%3D%3D)

Right now in America, children are being taught in many schools to be ashamed of their country and themselves. The pledge is being taken out of school because it mentions God. Free speech is being censored and silenced right before our eyes. Democrats are fighting for the right to elective abortion right up to the moment of birth. Unelected, unaccountable bureaucrats are seeking control of almost every aspect of our lives.

**This is simply un-American, and we must stop the madness.**

We must elect more leaders who make decisions based on American values with an emphasis on God, family, and country. It’s the only way to preserve the blessings we have been given here.

[**Today, to continue to help lead this critical fight, I need your financial support – to restore our country and defend our values. Can you make a donation immediately?**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=376a3c8eff8f439cb3614ec83e9448c7&_e=wRtgxxIPVVgZCjV71JGoLQgULrMuPnPAbHJJOrrzZWp2nsTZ_ea7ju6y3_cSeob8TwJOQ484lMGJEJi1bjEDoayT9uYOANjgRcFUmEJ2XFAziN8c6GuV4DbYgOrGSymocv-_jW700HiLmVe9r61Y1FvZvmDz75H-DxlwnU7aTnT2rNc6eQJblh_OYj6dxzkGCFPyixlZ8fZkelcYmQF9TGRKQMzgaWAEi1OXNX2W_HFJ29-CbEAhoKac3mox33WMd8GotQU93pBzsSiVFXTU4pMBMGAoAxud1tnN1npvBYVlY5Y6PrZ14ork2PrgRVwur1Ln9uXQx9xoUoVc-Q1EaOTaIpeuOhfJLX1v_UyERRznzNHdYRQNEmFIvjNxUmBIVEfSQkfMy4WF6WN5Db4eow%3D%3D)

[** DONATE TO SAVE AMERICA > **](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=376a3c8eff8f439cb3614ec83e9448c7&_e=wRtgxxIPVVgZCjV71JGoLQgULrMuPnPAbHJJOrrzZWp2nsTZ_ea7ju6y3_cSeob8TwJOQ484lMGJEJi1bjEDoayT9uYOANjgRcFUmEJ2XFAziN8c6GuV4DbYgOrGSymocv-_jW700HiLmVe9r61Y1FvZvmDz75H-DxlwnU7aTnT2rNc6eQJblh_OYj6dxzkGCFPyixlZ8fZkelcYmQF9TGRKQMzgaWAEi1OXNX2W_HFJ29-CbEAhoKac3mox33WM66kwYLmeI0t0r3hfUiQEPEyQsKKz3LCbatLyc3zgc3MAba3zh9a26SGo7nPidHaby9i45KJXSEpaulOaCRCxXuy2EEgIrRTHa7KINU3MoA0RdJ-aWQFES_uPiScliUFquijroU-q4Aq8PSoc6RB_OQ%3D%3D)

Peter, we have a chance to save our country from the radical Left that is aiming to destroy it, but we’re running out of time. I’m not sure what version of America we will leave to our kids if we continue down this path. [**We simply must make a change before it’s too late.**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=376a3c8eff8f439cb3614ec83e9448c7&_e=wRtgxxIPVVgZCjV71JGoLQgULrMuPnPAbHJJOrrzZWp2nsTZ_ea7ju6y3_cSeob8TwJOQ484lMGJEJi1bjEDoayT9uYOANjgRcFUmEJ2XFAziN8c6GuV4DbYgOrGSymocv-_jW700HiLmVe9r61Y1FvZvmDz75H-DxlwnU7aTnT2rNc6eQJblh_OYj6dxzkGCFPyixlZ8fZkelcYmQF9TGRKQMzgaWAEi1OXNX2W_HFJ29-CbEAhoKac3mox33WM4o12ZkU---I2dvSJo6byGm-4X9QzPl6WA0K2FOB32NHWF-GOtLa7JFQ87JuSl58eQP42VGHV0JIpSf1MSMC0BdfyzDeyTuCQZC3fMzA59QeypFc9IqCypO4JvhUcMVga6bm9TqeevmOr5V67p_ikvQ%3D%3D)

I made a promise when I was first elected to do what is best for our country, and for Louisiana, and I intend to keep that promise. It’s why I have been a trusted ally of President Donald Trump, who selected me for critical positions and endorsed all of my campaigns. It’s also why I was elected by my colleagues to serve as Vice Chairman of the House Republican Conference – one of seven elected leadership positions for Republicans in the House – and to chair the Subcommittee on the Constitution and Civil Liberties in the prestigious Judiciary Committee.

We are working in Congress every day to defend our conservative way of life and lead the fight for freedom, [**but we cannot do it alone.**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=376a3c8eff8f439cb3614ec83e9448c7&_e=wRtgxxIPVVgZCjV71JGoLQgULrMuPnPAbHJJOrrzZWp2nsTZ_ea7ju6y3_cSeob8TwJOQ484lMGJEJi1bjEDoayT9uYOANjgRcFUmEJ2XFAziN8c6GuV4DbYgOrGSymocv-_jW700HiLmVe9r61Y1FvZvmDz75H-DxlwnU7aTnT2rNc6eQJblh_OYj6dxzkGCFPyixlZ8fZkelcYmQF9TGRKQMzgaWAEi1OXNX2W_HFJ29-CbEAhoKac3mox33WMlk8oX3xVffoW3JhtQHY49JaQSXnPZHcOiy0ajXjcZ0B81tirQzkK15_NEXFtDzzprJQy_wSvOHa4quAFF59WiLnBec_imjvuVd5sb29CbitLazTab363-rMN9AWS5aZsQLAGVlmZl_K1dPduFndKWQ%3D%3D)

[**If you are committed to taking back the House from the radical Democrats who are self-serving and want to turn America into a socialist country, then I need your support today.**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=376a3c8eff8f439cb3614ec83e9448c7&_e=wRtgxxIPVVgZCjV71JGoLQgULrMuPnPAbHJJOrrzZWp2nsTZ_ea7ju6y3_cSeob8TwJOQ484lMGJEJi1bjEDoayT9uYOANjgRcFUmEJ2XFAziN8c6GuV4DbYgOrGSymocv-_jW700HiLmVe9r61Y1FvZvmDz75H-DxlwnU7aTnT2rNc6eQJblh_OYj6dxzkGCFPyixlZ8fZkelcYmQF9TGRKQMzgaWAEi1OXNX2W_HFJ29-CbEAhoKac3mox33WMWvMqwi8dfvPycqy-TCdUFsP1dfQtkLfvlsBCRkAHP8JYzTTGxD5ZDI6I-aZ806LGgPvZT3YkJPKnmfn8m5vrwd_IrxEmHvABsfbUyKVXxI0YoxBsz5lMkGv-TI4s_AnYKfIZ_H8PZLUEr7o8OLyqPQ%3D%3D)

[** CHIP IN > **](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=376a3c8eff8f439cb3614ec83e9448c7&_e=wRtgxxIPVVgZCjV71JGoLQgULrMuPnPAbHJJOrrzZWp2nsTZ_ea7ju6y3_cSeob8TwJOQ484lMGJEJi1bjEDoayT9uYOANjgRcFUmEJ2XFAziN8c6GuV4DbYgOrGSymocv-_jW700HiLmVe9r61Y1FvZvmDz75H-DxlwnU7aTnT2rNc6eQJblh_OYj6dxzkGCFPyixlZ8fZkelcYmQF9TGRKQMzgaWAEi1OXNX2W_HFJ29-CbEAhoKac3mox33WMLP-xnsckcsBtXb4ZPIXsswepZhqkpqw_6Pc7AzZ44N6gkWO8XaC6fCd8qNIlowIZyfgnVOpMCBXaCVdS2ePO-PuG_gOx8eSfGaGwGXqlAENI_NYYYzHbBkdFKpXj1OiRlGzOzpv36iPLcxas-wjnsA%3D%3D)

The path we’re on currently will lead us to destruction. But that outcome is not inevitable. We still have the ability to turn this country around-- IF conscientious conservatives across America will stand up RIGHT NOW.

We MUST act, and we must do so today.

[**Can you pitch in right now to help save our country, Peter?**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=376a3c8eff8f439cb3614ec83e9448c7&_e=wRtgxxIPVVgZCjV71JGoLQgULrMuPnPAbHJJOrrzZWp2nsTZ_ea7ju6y3_cSeob8TwJOQ484lMGJEJi1bjEDoayT9uYOANjgRcFUmEJ2XFAziN8c6GuV4DbYgOrGSymocv-_jW700HiLmVe9r61Y1FvZvmDz75H-DxlwnU7aTnT2rNc6eQJblh_OYj6dxzkGCFPyixlZ8fZkelcYmQF9TGRKQMzgaWAEi1OXNX2W_HFJ29-CbEAhoKac3mox33WMLicVm9gYgpOBfLXpH4-V0jf2PL7JwrbNNup5CW9aFltnzQuARdMhPl1SBAug8GwYm5RQ7aR6OQXD0NLpZMRIB7ndKSZRLB9s3DaaI2k3fHnnsGNdFfF7t4WRe0ycD2TVLPIh6-c5b-kOx3MUzF5k8Q%3D%3D)

Thank you for all you do, and God bless.

[ ](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=376a3c8eff8f439cb3614ec83e9448c7&_e=wRtgxxIPVVgZCjV71JGoLQgULrMuPnPAbHJJOrrzZWp2nsTZ_ea7ju6y3_cSeob8TwJOQ484lMGJEJi1bjEDoayT9uYOANjgRcFUmEJ2XFAziN8c6GuV4DbYgOrGSymocv-_jW700HiLmVe9r61Y1FvZvmDz75H-DxlwnU7aTnT2rNc6eQJblh_OYj6dxzkGCFPyixlZ8fZkelcYmQF9TGRKQMzgaWAEi1OXNX2W_HFJ29-CbEAhoKac3mox33WMrc3erSaBMpxuPkXBtCslx0zfTLtAiRs_ME1QUxz2k4qn4i1_SsX30BMta0a0g2nOvb9ny_dZ178Jm2QNXW3Q4HBg2coqj1-wF8-GBT39pf-lcu8gZX7iFA-rDXo1yvttdgkWvN0LlpqDFCZSXS0-ng%3D%3D)

Mike Johnson
Speaker of the House

| **_MIKE JOHNSON_**
* * *
Mike is a dedicated husband and father of four, as well as a constitutional law attorney who has devoted his life and career to fighting for the fundamental freedoms and traditional values that have always been a priority to the people of Louisiana.

clean_body: You might not know me very well – probably because I have been heads down working for the past seven years in Congress. | | Peter, The most important things in life are faith, family, and freedom. That's not just a slogan, these happen to be the foundations of our great country. That is why I am fighting every day to preserve them. Faith. Our nation began with the bold declaration that all men are created equal by God, and that our rights derive from Him and not the government. The founders insisted that faith must remain central to our national identity because, as George Washington summarized, "religion and morality are indispensable supports" of our republic. Like so many American households through the generations, in our house we instill faith in the hearts of our children, serve God, and serve people. Family. Stable, happy families are the basis of any thriving society, and public policy should always acknowledge this obvious truth. Strengthening the nuclear family should be a top priority, and government should get out of the way and respect parental rights. Kelly and I have been very intentional about passing along the values of hard work, honor, and sacrifice to our children, just as our parents passed them along to us. For nearly two and a half centuries, this has been the American way. Freedom. It is a self-evident truth that God endows all of us with inherent freedoms, such as the natural and unalienable rights to life, liberty, conscience, and the ability to pursue happiness, own property, build wealth and defend ourselves and our families. The purpose of government is to secure these rights, and the ideas we advance should always aim to maintain and increase the liberty of the American people. I’ve devoted my life and career to fighting for those fundamental freedoms and traditional values, first in the courts as a constitutional law attorney, and now in the Congress. America is the freest, most powerful, most successful nation in the history of world - but we cannot maintain that status if we are led by politicians who hate the very foundations that made us who we are! Right now in America, children are being taught in many schools to be ashamed of their country and themselves. The pledge is being taken out of school because it mentions God. Free speech is being censored and silenced right before our eyes. Democrats are fighting for the right to elective abortion right up to the moment of birth. Unelected, unaccountable bureaucrats are seeking control of almost every aspect of our lives. This is simply un-American, and we must stop the madness. We must elect more leaders who make decisions based on American values with an emphasis on God, family, and country. It’s the only way to preserve the blessings we have been given here. Peter, we have a chance to save our country from the radical Left that is aiming to destroy it, but we’re running out of time. I’m not sure what version of America we will leave to our kids if we continue down this path. I made a promise when I was first elected to do what is best for our country, and for Louisiana, and I intend to keep that promise. It’s why I have been a trusted ally of President Donald Trump, who selected me for critical positions and endorsed all of my campaigns. It’s also why I was elected by my colleagues to serve as Vice Chairman of the House Republican Conference – one of seven elected leadership positions for Republicans in the House – and to chair the Subcommittee on the Constitution and Civil Liberties in the prestigious Judiciary Committee. We are working in Congress every day to defend our conservative way of life and lead the fight for freedom, The path we’re on currently will lead us to destruction. But that outcome is not inevitable. We still have the ability to turn this country around – IF conscientious conservatives across America will stand up RIGHT NOW. We MUST act, and we must do so today. Thank you for all you do, and God bless. Mike Johnson Speaker of the House | MIKE JOHNSON * Mike is a dedicated husband and father of four, as well as a constitutional law attorney who has devoted his life and career to fighting for the fundamental freedoms and traditional values that have always been a priority to the people of Louisiana. | PAID FOR BY MIKE JOHNSON FOR LOUISIANA Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but .

body:
You know me. And you know that I wouldn’t be asking for your help unless there were a sincere need. | [](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=82f506799bd04a54b2c11625fb89884e&_e=zJP6PzPrXXsuSdde1nIJjdo5fv1sDzUez37cOAa8Bfe-vZiLHjTSg9hT0i6rVTAUfaJ8joA3NOssLU-t34S2FdAWKNJ6utwIMS-1Xm6XPoTQlp8yjjLAnpR0XzsOozMP2LIxsGbEdy-6CnMWSA09e-HNwoVEpD_XKY3MAHfs-dMplGz6zMbEiBt00DdASelGZQ6XNMHKzi9S-fb9ipvUEtnE9AFn9vR3G0bmFqpT2hYkQH-im9rvGI28L_YQBX81OtekAgcsplXmVaCwyrW-hO0CtfR4JNlaYmKS2euHg6vrRD9yiDnLuWJqLgbJPyPoWLtfDu7pTBja1nfzfN8QRZFRJWWRWicq4KVhiPfe4u1rm378N5EbaYfP3D-UHo1KSvowUsq-IKE9Oih2PfSHErb2x_7f9NSjOOjAmTzC4SboCLPNu8NrkdzTjJcY1zFY)
Peter,

We’ve known one another for a long time, so you know by now that when I ask for favors there is a reason.

I’ll be straight with you: my campaign needs your immediate financial support. A lot of folks around the country don’t think that my seat is at risk, but the truth is that no one knows that for sure.

You know that Democrats HATE ME.

I know that Democrats HATE ME.

But I bet you didn’t know that they hate me to the tune of $52,000 per day, did you?

When my opponent announced his fundraising numbers for the third quarter earlier this month, it shocked me. From July 1st to September 30th, he raised more than $4.7 million from the liberal coasts that he’s going to use to smear my good name ahead of next year’s election.

**Texans know me; Americans know me.** It’s no secret what I stand for. But I’ll tell you this: if Democrats are allowed to vastly outspend us on the airwaves, there is no telling what kind of twisted lies they’ll try to spin to make my supporters flip sides.

**We cannot – WE WILL not allow them to win. name: 4Patriots
subject: Important Food Shortage Notice
body:
This might be your only warning.

**The Truth About The Coming Food Crisis** **This might be your only warning.** According to official reports, dangerous global events have reached America, putting the entire nation in harm's way. Despite this imminent crisis, mainstream media remains silent... And our own government ignores dire warnings of industry experts like fourth-generation American farmers who warn: **_“Food shortages are coming.”_** Imagine the panic of seeing empty grocery store shelves, not for a few days, but for several weeks or even months. The loss will be beyond what you can imagine. **As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever.** If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to go hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like...
* Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life - depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired...
* Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick...
* Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means you risk becoming malnourished...

**Well, no need to worry anymore.** Obviously, waiting for the government to give me a handout in a disaster just wasn't an option for me. And I was completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by some companies. That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of these best-selling [**Survival Food Kits**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c671499%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=5UGfTdrn4lmNacAS9A7JBg&sysid=1). When you secure your own food stockpile, you will have the peace of mind and security knowing that when a crisis hits... You will be able to calmly reassure your family that they're safe and they will have plenty to eat. [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of these best-selling survival food kits while you still can.**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c671490%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Wp4SswamvT67dW0TiSaNBQ&sysid=1) When a crisis hits, the masses begin to panic, and grocery stores are wiped out. It quickly becomes every man for himself. Don't make the mistake of waiting until it is too late. [**Stock up now**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c671491%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=fgNdm2Q134ufAqWIuwmkkA&sysid=1) on these survival food kits while you can.
---

American Update

name: Mike Johnson
subject: America is the greatest country on earth
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MIKE JOHNSON FOR LOUISIANA
body:
I believe to my core that the most important things in life are God, family, and pride in our country. These are the values that guide me and shape my life.

|
[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z0km30t8ul50ctqmu2vjos20ba0avl3e9tbclnm8_)
---
Fellow American,

The most important things in life are faith, family, and freedom. That's not just a slogan, these happen to be the foundations of our great country. That is why I am fighting every day to preserve them.

**Faith.** Our nation began with the bold declaration that all men are created equal by God, and that our rights derive from Him and not the government. The founders insisted that faith must remain central to our national identity because, as George Washington summarized, "religion and morality are indispensable supports" of our republic. Like so many American households through the generations, in our house we instill faith in the hearts of our children, serve God, and serve people.

**Family.** Stable, happy families are the basis of any thriving society, and public policy should always acknowledge this obvious truth. Strengthening the nuclear family should be a top priority, and government should get out of the way and respect parental rights. Kelly and I have been very intentional about passing along the values of hard work, honor, and sacrifice to our children, just as our parents passed them along to us. For nearly two and a half centuries, this has been the American way.

**Freedom.** It is a self-evident truth that God endows all of us with inherent freedoms, such as the natural and unalienable rights to life, liberty, conscience, and the ability to pursue happiness, own property, build wealth and defend ourselves and our families. The purpose of government is to secure these rights, and the ideas we advance should always aim to maintain and increase the liberty of the American people. I’ve devoted my life and career to fighting for those fundamental freedoms and traditional values, first in the courts as a constitutional law attorney, and now in the Congress.

[**This is a simple truth:**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zf692eagv91tpvg1oqtfemrlh253ng6lnvt9ibo8_rp22sh2s8i66p70sljmcor5chh238h5e8he485he5o7csn7kuj7adhle9qj79rkmep7ac9jkorrbdt5mirbaclnm2prcttjmuh39dtlk1q3b8jnspr3boj0c9j68o32cdjtb4kni29pclsjivaha5ugagbt454niv95a4qnqib19lckicin2tdnq5r3bp4m2jap95d2c1h6cp30c9ie69bhemrtcttle9r3adf2ekpn69bhemrtbd9h6iqnbdf56mq39cdj4lonbdum6gqr0t1kmsprbohkmuot7ch5u) America is the freest, most powerful, most successful nation in the history of world - but we cannot maintain that status if we are led by politicians who hate the very foundations that made us who we are!

[** SUPPORT MIKE JOHNSON > **](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zvb3qkgmjohs2c2vl81fu9iisl39baacel7qa900_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgeppef9t6ekr3asjl6ejn9ctiekoj79hnmmrqbd5mmkpbfc5jmprr7dt26irrb83k6mh7fpjm6nh60oj6chg64or7qm99f44jipbp75ul2kbt0l0nq8a9f5uiak9lfl4m2jap94p5e5qrfkbm6ni9c56liiaq4o32cpi60oj4scin2tdnqprrasjm6kqu4t9jecin2tdnqmqj2d5lemquaddk6ior69bhemrtcd1lm1q39dpjmnh39dthqep238h1e8he4933cjgeapr6cdim8oh5u)

Right now in America, children are being taught in many schools to be ashamed of their country and themselves. The pledge is being taken out of school because it mentions God. Free speech is being censored and silenced right before our eyes. Democrats are fighting for the right to elective abortion right up to the moment of birth. Unelected, unaccountable bureaucrats are seeking control of almost every aspect of our lives.

**This is simply un-American, and we must stop the madness.**

We must elect more leaders who make decisions based on American values with an emphasis on God, family, and country. It’s the only way to preserve the blessings we have been given here.

[**Today, to continue to help lead this critical fight, I need your financial support – to restore our country and defend our values. Can you make a donation immediately?**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zjncpavp93b5ro9hqu3ptjtd9gb5n8tt5bvkpb50_rp22sh2s8i66p70sljmcor5chh238h5e8he485he5o7csn7kuj7adhle9qj79rkmep7ac9jkorrbdt5mirbaclnm2prcttjmuh39dtlk1q3b8jnspr3boj0c9j68o32cdjtb4kni29pclsjivaha5ugagbt454niv95a4qnqib19lckicin2tdnq5r3bp4m2jap95d2c1h6cp30c9ie69bhemrtcttle9r3adf2ekpn69bhemrtbd9h6iqnbdf56mq39cdj4lonbdum6gqr0t1kmsprbohkmuot7ch5u)

[** DONATE TO SAVE AMERICA > **](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zn1jdsifuh8ku706pi9id74d1vkk19mj26aa0d28_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgeppef9t6ekr3asjl6ejn9ctiekoj79hnmmrqbd5mmkpbfc5jmprr7dt26irrb83k6mh7fpjm6nh60oj6chg64or7qm99f44jipbp75ul2kbt0l0nq8a9f5uiak9lfl4m2jap94p5e5qrfkbm6ni9c56liiaq4o32cpi60oj4scin2tdnqprrasjm6kqu4t9jecin2tdnqmqj2d5lemquaddk6ior69bhemrtcd1lm1q39dpjmnh39dthqep238h1e8he4933cjgeapr6cdim8oh5u)

Fellow American, we have a chance to save our country from the radical Left that is aiming to destroy it, but we’re running out of time. I’m not sure what version of America we will leave to our kids if we continue down this path. [**We simply must make a change before it’s too late.**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zjs414rko9eub8ns869tjltvbjhcr69nt85vspo0_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgeppef9t6ekr3asjl6ejn9ctiekoj79hnmmrqbd5mmkpbfc5jmprr7dt26irrb83k6mh7fpjm6nh60oj6chg64or7qm99f44jipbp75ul2kbt0l0nq8a9f5uiak9lfl4m2jap94p5e5qrfkbm6ni9c56liiaq4o32cpi60oj4scin2tdnqprrasjm6kqu4t9jecin2tdnqmqj2d5lemquaddk6ior69bhemrtcd1lm1q39dpjmnh39dthqep238h1e8he4933cjgeapr6cdim8oh5u)

I made a promise when I was first elected to do what is best for our country, and for Louisiana, and I intend to keep that promise. It’s why I have been a trusted ally of President Donald Trump, who selected me for critical positions and endorsed all of my campaigns. It’s also why I was elected by my colleagues to serve as Vice Chairman of the House Republican Conference – one of seven elected leadership positions for Republicans in the House – and to chair the Subcommittee on the Constitution and Civil Liberties in the prestigious Judiciary Committee.

We are working in Congress every day to defend our conservative way of life and lead the fight for freedom, [**but we cannot do it alone.**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zfpgr4hr4q3v4ehm2gfh30tivp03tup6bicivm70_rp22sh2s8i66p70sljmcor5chh238h5e8he485he5o7csn7kuj7adhle9qj79rkmep7ac9jkorrbdt5mirbaclnm2prcttjmuh39dtlk1q3b8jnspr3boj0c9j68o32cdjtb4kni29pclsjivaha5ugagbt454niv95a4qnqib19lckicin2tdnq5r3bp4m2jap95d2c1h6cp30c9ie69bhemrtcttle9r3adf2ekpn69bhemrtbd9h6iqnbdf56mq39cdj4lonbdum6gqr0t1kmsprbohkmuot7ch5u)

[**If you are committed to keeping the House from the radical Democrats who are self-serving and want to turn America into a socialist country, then I need your support today.**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zb7gmfihsvpn558v823g16t1fvikkc8g2on97fdg_rp22sh2s8i66p70sljmcor5chh238h5e8he485he5o7csn7kuj7adhle9qj79rkmep7ac9jkorrbdt5mirbaclnm2prcttjmuh39dtlk1q3b8jnspr3boj0c9j68o32cdjtb4kni29pclsjivaha5ugagbt454niv95a4qnqib19lckicin2tdnq5r3bp4m2jap95d2c1h6cp30c9ie69bhemrtcttle9r3adf2ekpn69bhemrtbd9h6iqnbdf56mq39cdj4lonbdum6gqr0t1kmsprbohkmuot7ch5u)

[** CHIP IN > **](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z97mq1kltd0fru579oq71ifntin4udmdpchh78l8_rp22sh2s8i66p70sljmcor5chh238h5e8he485he5o7csn7kuj7adhle9qj79rkmep7ac9jkorrbdt5mirbaclnm2prcttjmuh39dtlk1q3b8jnspr3boj0c9j68o32cdjtb4kni29pclsjivaha5ugagbt454niv95a4qnqib19lckicin2tdnq5r3bp4m2jap95d2c1h6cp30c9ie69bhemrtcttle9r3adf2ekpn69bhemrtbd9h6iqnbdf56mq39cdj4lonbdum6gqr0t1kmsprbohkmuot7ch5u)

The path we’re on currently will lead us to destruction. But that outcome is not inevitable. We still have the ability to turn this country around-- IF conscientious conservatives across America will stand up RIGHT NOW.

We MUST act, and we must do so today.

[**Can you pitch in right now to help save our country, Fellow American?**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zph5sbk5sora868jnjo3n286vsg1fr9pbct90qto_rp22sh2s8i66p70sljmcor5chh238h5e8he485he5o7csn7kuj7adhle9qj79rkmep7ac9jkorrbdt5mirbaclnm2prcttjmuh39dtlk1q3b8jnspr3boj0c9j68o32cdjtb4kni29pclsjivaha5ugagbt454niv95a4qnqib19lckicin2tdnq5r3bp4m2jap95d2c1h6cp30c9ie69bhemrtcttle9r3adf2ekpn69bhemrtbd9h6iqnbdf56mq39cdj4lonbdum6gqr0t1kmsprbohkmuot7ch5u)

Thank you for all you do, and God bless.

name: GOP Presidential
subject: The decline of American Citizenship
body:
This sponsored message from GOP Presidential is on behalf of Hillsdale College
My name is Kyle Murnen and I am the Director of Online Learning at Hillsdale College

[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z30adfpngqbg199ps730u0hh34erunih93fturk8_rp22sh2s8i66p70sljmcor6c3h2bs) Dear Friend,

My name is Kyle Murnen and I am the Director of Online Learning at Hillsdale College, where we offer free online courses to anyone who wishes to learn.

**One of our top-rated courses, "American Citizenship and Its Decline," is taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson and is based on his book _The Dying Citizen_.**

This course argues that at the heart of America's current crises are symptoms of a far larger problem that afflicts the West: the loss of freedom and political power of the citizen.

Dr. Hanson frames this problem by first explaining the history of citizenship in the West and by reminding us how rare it is in human history to have governments that are created and controlled by the people.

To maintain this type of government requires a robust and self-reliant middle class, clearly defined and enforced borders, national autonomy, and confidence in our way of life.

Yet today, the middle class is disappearing under enormous economic strains, the distinction between citizen and resident is being blurred by open borders, and pre-civilizational tribalism is dividing Americans into a variety of identity groups.

These problems are being aggravated by top-down pressures from an unelected bureaucratic class that uses judicial, executive, and legislative powers to overwhelm the citizen.

Finally, globalism poses a historic challenge to national sovereignty, as many of today's elites seek to replace American laws and independence with international bodies, often without the consent of our elected representatives or the people they serve.

The course, however, concludes on a hopeful note: Citizens still hold the key to revitalizing our traditions of empowered citizenship and regaining control over our government.

So, enroll today in this free course, "American Citizenship and Its Decline," with Victor Davis Hanson. You can embark on this journey with us to learn about these threats to our rights as citizens and how to combat them.

Click the secure link below to start today.

**[https://online.hillsdale.edu/register/american-citizenship-and-its-decline](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z09s3d7k1ob1aov8ii69929p4s4jqqr4ssiqrh3o_rp22sh2s8i66p70sljmcor6c3h2bs)
**

Best regards,
Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College |

| GOP Presidential
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zgkb38bqj0igph539ea06fsnkoble48dssfium08_rp22sh2s8i66p70sljmcor6c3h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kuo72ttle5pqedtge1p7adjkm4qj7cbkmgor79hnmmrqastmelp3cthieip3adt7skqu2c3neior3d5medjm05plmgqb3ct66uqr695lshi61or0s3im49fg)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z8b0sfdlgh7c804qv7klt7kkrdg183jlh0pgl56o_rp22sh2s8i66p70sljmcor6c3h2bs)_

name: 4Patriots
subject: Important Food Shortage Notice
body:
This might be your only warning.

**The Truth About The Coming Food Crisis** **This might be your only warning.** According to official reports, dangerous global events have reached America, putting the entire nation in harm's way. Despite this imminent crisis, mainstream media remains silent... And our own government ignores dire warnings of industry experts like fourth-generation American farmers who warn: **_" Food shortages are coming."_** Imagine the panic of seeing empty grocery store shelves, not for a few days, but for several weeks or even months. The loss will be beyond what you can imagine. **As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever.** If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to go hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like...
* Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life - depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired...
* Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick...
* Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means you risk becoming malnourished...

**Well, no need to worry anymore.** Obviously, waiting for the government to give me a handout in a disaster just wasn't an option for me. And I was completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by some companies. That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of these best-selling [**Survival Food Kits**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zdjdlo8bh2gpathjd8e532sdghhutqm1j5nmkjt0_rp22sh2s8i66p70sljmcor5chh2bs). When you secure your own food stockpile, you will have the peace of mind and security knowing that when a crisis hits... You will be able to calmly reassure your family that they're safe and they will have plenty to eat. [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of these best-selling survival food kits while you still can.**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zar1gs97cd5rb5s9uj6sjbdrg07c6hnad92988oo_rp22sh2s8i66p70sljmcor5chh2bs) When a crisis hits, the masses begin to panic, and grocery stores are wiped out. It quickly becomes every man for himself. Don't make the mistake of waiting until it is too late. [**Stock up now**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zvnm3th7cdc37igpnh79f1agbslqktuhi0oq29to_rp22sh2s8i66p70sljmcor5chh2bs) on these survival food kits while you can.

name: Harmeet Dhillon
subject: We're suing Karine Jean-Pierre and we need your help
body:
Friend, Joe Biden’s White House just changed the requirements for a journalist to obtain hard-pass credentials.

| |
---
| | Friend, Joe Biden’s White House just changed the requirements for a journalist to obtain hard-pass credentials.The result... ...effectively banning our client, Simon Ateba, and more than 440 reporters from the White House Briefing Room.The White House is sending a loud, clear message: if you don’t work for CNN, _The New York Times_ , or another legacy media outlet, and if you refuse to mindlessly lob soft balls to Karine Jean-Pierre about Joe Biden’s ice cream du jour, you don’t belong in the White House Press Corps. Because this White House doesn’t respect the freedom of the press.**[Which is why I’m asking you for an urgent donation of $35 or more today to help fund Simon’s lawsuit against the White House and Press Secretary Karine Jean-Pierre.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zlv46q6u5shmlv7qj3th0ep91vrg4s4fr7i5ep7o_rp22sh2s8i66p70sljmcor6c3h2bs)** This White House has a terrible record of censoring journalists whose stories make the White House look bad.We all remember how the Biden Administration pressured “Big Tech” to censor journalists questioning the efficacy of the COVID-19 vaccine.Now, the White House is shifting its attention to our client, Simon Ateba. Simon Ateba is a journalist and White House correspondent with Today News Africa, a small a news organization focusing on ties and interactions between Africa and the United States.Simon frequently challenges Karine Jean-Pierre’s non-answers, inaccurate information, and demands transparency and the truth. In response to Simon’s insistence on getting the truth, the White House and Jean-Pierre changed the rules, I believe, to specifically target Simon and other journalists like him who want nothing more than to do their job as _real_ journalists.**That’s right – the White House rewrote the rules to shut out hundreds of hardworking reporters.** And that’s why we’re suing the White House and Press Secretary Karine Jean-Pierre on behalf of reporter Simon Ateba. **[Will you send an urgent donation $35 or more to the Center for American Liberty today to support our lawsuit on behalf of Simon Ateba and his fight for justice?](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zampn6691k4pe8rn9pq3mbf8ilh8iogdmjok937o_rp22sh2s8i66p70sljmcor6c3h2bs)** You and I know the White House’s actions here are a clear violation of the freedom of the press.This is bigger than Simon or any one journalist, Friend.Because the Biden Administration doesn’t just want to shut up Simon...... it wants to censor every journalist who challenges the White House’s lies, corruption, or abuse of power.We need your help right away.**[Which is why I’m asking you for an urgent donation of $35 or more today to help fund Simon’s lawsuit against the White House and Press Secretary Karine Jean-Pierre.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z03otims8innrgicf4o632btnv74c9vpnlbh81t0_rp22sh2s8i66p70sljmcor6c3h2bs)****That’s why we’ve taken on Simon Ateba’s legal battle – and why I hope you will step up and help us win this important battle.** Simon needs you, our attorneys need you, and your country needs you.Thank you in advance for your support.

name: Speaker Mike Johnson
subject: In case you didn’t know what I stand for
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MIKE JOHNSON FOR LOUISIANA
body:
We must elect more leaders who make decisions based on American values with an emphasis on God, family, and country. It's the only way to preserve the blessings we have been given here.

| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zfqbc2cumjslp9jsasa8g1erg7oikep14kqj44p8_rp22sh2s8i66p70sljmcor5chh2bs)
---
Fellow American,

To my core, I believe the most important things in life are **faith, family, and freedom** - _but those foundations of our great country are under attack._

Right now, in America, children are being taught in many schools to be ashamed of their country and themselves. The pledge is being taken out of school because it mentions God. Free speech is being censored and silenced right before our eyes. Democrats are fighting for the right to elective abortion right up to the moment of birth. Unelected, unaccountable bureaucrats are seeking control of almost every aspect of our lives.

**_This is simply un-American, and we must stop the madness._**

We must elect more leaders who make decisions based on American values with an emphasis on God, family, and country. It's the only way to preserve the blessings we have been given here.

[**Today, to continue to help lead this critical fight, I need your financial support - to restore our country and defend our values. Will you please stand with me immediately?**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zv9h0nib2006shfbinqtkkfra7tvb9s372el4cfg_rp22sh2s8i66p70sljmcor5chh2bs)

[** CHIP IN > **](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zpu8u5q0hml4p7uack5hee0nj5rudodrr68mrci8_)

Fellow American, we have a chance to save our country from the radical Left that is aiming to destroy it, but we're running out of time. I'm not sure what version of America we will leave to our kids if we continue down this path. [**We simply must make a change before it 's too late.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z47905lp8egq9f8opvd5s1vprcjtbtenbgj0kgao_rp22sh2s8i66p70sljmcor5chh2bs)

The path we're on currently will lead us to destruction. But that outcome is not inevitable. We still can turn this country around - _**IF**_ conscientious conservatives across America stand up RIGHT NOW.

We MUST act, and we must do so today.

[**Can you pitch in right now to help save our country?**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zta6osahogr0al7mjlk3dkd16q29edtf4bdi7t1g_rp22sh2s8i66p70sljmcor5chh2bs)

[** STAND WITH SPEAKER JOHNSON > **](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z7e8fd1r8t17mcc5u6focbv2belqm2t1ts1t46m8_rp22sh2s8i66p70sljmcor5chh2bs)

Thank you for all you do, and God bless.

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zrpq73bv1hg22i0r7u9s5nakodq34tumog6k88bo_rp22sh2s8i66p70sljmcor5chh2bs)

Mike Johnson
Speaker of the House

| **_MIKE JOHNSON_**
* * *
Mike is a dedicated husband and father of four, as well as a constitutional law attorney who has devoted his life and career to fighting for the fundamental freedoms and traditional values that have always been a priority to the people of Louisiana.

[**WILL YOU STAND WITH MIKE?**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z36oocri5ih6pvaodt31cnqnac0903vb6th65bo0_)

---

| PAID FOR BY MIKE JOHNSON FOR LOUISIANA

name: 4Patriots
subject: Important Food Shortage Notice
body:
This might be your only warning.

**The Truth About The Coming Food Crisis** **This might be your only warning.** According to official reports, dangerous global events have reached America, putting the entire nation in harm's way. Despite this imminent crisis, mainstream media remains silent... And our own government ignores dire warnings of industry experts like fourth-generation American farmers who warn: **_" Food shortages are coming."_** Imagine the panic of seeing empty grocery store shelves, not for a few days, but for several weeks or even months. The loss will be beyond what you can imagine. **As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever.** If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to go hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like...
* Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life - depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired...
* Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick...
* Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means you risk becoming malnourished...

**Well, no need to worry anymore.** Obviously, waiting for the government to give me a handout in a disaster just wasn't an option for me. And I was completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by some companies. That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of these best-selling [**Survival Food Kits**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z5t1of4pti36b84ob48hvq7g8qvr5hk3cu4t9fg8_rp22sh2s8i66p70sljmcor5chh2bs). When you secure your own food stockpile, you will have the peace of mind and security knowing that when a crisis hits... You will be able to calmly reassure your family that they're safe and they will have plenty to eat. [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of these best-selling survival food kits while you still can.**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2za3bn1r2jvqf6l5bjkc5cdiod31qsqnr29h8oul0_rp22sh2s8i66p70sljmcor5chh2bs) When a crisis hits, the masses begin to panic, and grocery stores are wiped out. It quickly becomes every man for himself. Don't make the mistake of waiting until it is too late. [**Stock up now**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zo863i0c5tls092nr53ovop0ur6bu1u2put5djn8_rp22sh2s8i66p70sljmcor5chh2bs) on these survival food kits while you can.

The loss will be beyond what you can imagine. **As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever.** If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to go hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like...
* Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life - depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired...
* Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick...
* Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means you risk becoming malnourished...

**Well, no need to worry anymore.** Obviously, waiting for the government to give me a handout in a disaster just wasn't an option for me. And I was completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by some companies. That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of these best-selling [**Survival Food Kits**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zjvc7obh5cumikfka4rfaaqklkgcn8o27j9b04ho_rp22sh2s8i66p70sljmaob2c3h2bs). When you secure your own food stockpile, you will have the peace of mind and security knowing that when a crisis hits... You will be able to calmly reassure your family that they're safe and they will have plenty to eat. [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of these best-selling survival food kits while you still can.**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zlm9n21d3lhd4av8rg11s1v182ho06cbd4i73bcg_rp22sh2s8i66p70sljmaob2c3h2bs) When a crisis hits, the masses begin to panic, and grocery stores are wiped out. It quickly becomes every man for himself. Don't make the mistake of waiting until it is too late. [**Stock up now**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z2dootrru5vefna0mgilq165f0oqr9shtltto10o_rp22sh2s8i66p70sljmaob2c3h2bs) on these survival food kits while you can.

name: Your America
subject: The decline of American Citizenship
body:
This sponsored message from Your America News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
My name is Kyle Murnen and I am the Director of Online Learning at Hillsdale College

[](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c35770%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=m%2bvNhGws%2bPohCFRWf%2bQmzg&sysid=1) Dear Friend,

My name is Kyle Murnen and I am the Director of Online Learning at Hillsdale College, where we offer free online courses to anyone who wishes to learn.

**One of our top-rated courses, “American Citizenship and Its Decline,” is taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson and is based on his book _The Dying Citizen_.**

This course argues that at the heart of America’s current crises are symptoms of a far larger problem that afflicts the West: the loss of freedom and political power of the citizen.

Dr. Hanson frames this problem by first explaining the history of citizenship in the West and by reminding us how rare it is in human history to have governments that are created and controlled by the people.

To maintain this type of government requires a robust and self-reliant middle class, clearly defined and enforced borders, national autonomy, and confidence in our way of life.

Yet today, the middle class is disappearing under enormous economic strains, the distinction between citizen and resident is being blurred by open borders, and pre-civilizational tribalism is dividing Americans into a variety of identity groups.

These problems are being aggravated by top-down pressures from an unelected bureaucratic class that uses judicial, executive, and legislative powers to overwhelm the citizen.

Finally, globalism poses a historic challenge to national sovereignty, as many of today’s elites seek to replace American laws and independence with international bodies, often without the consent of our elected representatives or the people they serve.

The course, however, concludes on a hopeful note: Citizens still hold the key to revitalizing our traditions of empowered citizenship and regaining control over our government.

So, enroll today in this free course, “American Citizenship and Its Decline,” with Victor Davis Hanson. You can embark on this journey with us to learn about these threats to our rights as citizens and how to combat them.

Click the secure link below to start today.

**[https://online.hillsdale.edu/register/american-citizenship-and-its-decline](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c35771%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=VKPdr3nsRs%2bvjlRvu%2fqLew&sysid=1)
**

Best regards,
Kyle Murnen, ’09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College |

| Your America News

name: Speaker Mike Johnson
subject: Introducing myself
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MIKE JOHNSON FOR LOUISIANA
body:
We must elect more leaders who make decisions based on American values with an emphasis on God, family, and country. It's the only way to preserve the blessings we have been given here.

| [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zio0ug0ll45v8g2mo7puutctesv80mpief0rr1ao_rp22sh2s8i66p70sljmeoj1c5h2bs)
---
Fellow American,

To my core, I believe the most important things in life are **faith, family, and freedom** - _but those foundations of our great country are under attack._

Right now, in America, children are being taught in many schools to be ashamed of their country and themselves. The pledge is being taken out of school because it mentions God. Free speech is being censored and silenced right before our eyes. Democrats are fighting for the right to elective abortion right up to the moment of birth. Unelected, unaccountable bureaucrats are seeking control of almost every aspect of our lives.

**_This is simply un-American, and we must stop the madness._**

We must elect more leaders who make decisions based on American values with an emphasis on God, family, and country. It's the only way to preserve the blessings we have been given here.

[**Today, to continue to help lead this critical fight, I need your financial support - to restore our country and defend our values. Will you please stand with me immediately?**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zm29bvgjg8v70psr4s1fckr84v7mgrc1rlj66h2g_rp22sh2s8i66p70sljmeoj1c5h2bs)

[** CHIP IN > **](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z4atm8d39j7qstdkdjg0ud6k5mosearhbdtgukh0_)

Fellow American, we have a chance to save our country from the radical Left that is aiming to destroy it, but we're running out of time. I'm not sure what version of America we will leave to our kids if we continue down this path. [**We simply must make a change before it 's too late.**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zc80bvfgbnf5tmnh0ldlhftlpmoc28bcjb6e67oo_rp22sh2s8i66p70sljmeoj1c5h2bs)

The path we're on currently will lead us to destruction. But that outcome is not inevitable. We still can turn this country around - _**IF**_ conscientious conservatives across America stand up RIGHT NOW.

We MUST act, and we must do so today.

[**Can you pitch in right now to help save our country?**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zra56bgktl1gc25d9fuf35hkemc2nmfosh4ca818_rp22sh2s8i66p70sljmeoj1c5h2bs)

[** STAND WITH SPEAKER JOHNSON > **](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zevpgidsumbovcnm3nj8ge5dbi0n6073mhombtf8_rp22sh2s8i66p70sljmeoj1c5h2bs)

Thank you for all you do, and God bless.

[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zdnfn451533g46arhieb5c3db3vfc4am49n5tnp8_rp22sh2s8i66p70sljmeoj1c5h2bs)

Mike Johnson
Speaker of the House

| **_MIKE JOHNSON_**
* * *
Mike is a dedicated husband and father of four, as well as a constitutional law attorney who has devoted his life and career to fighting for the fundamental freedoms and traditional values that have always been a priority to the people of Louisiana.

[**WILL YOU STAND WITH MIKE?**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z12a3pf0o3kjnln84vep2he74js046e09bvug7go_)

name: ICYMI News

body:
This sponsored message from ICYMI News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
My name is Kyle Murnen and I am the Director of Online Learning at Hillsdale College

[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zbalb0ujhemtt173p61vigkp4dgb3l2moo0penv0_rp22sh2s8i66p70sljmeoj1c5h2bs) Dear Friend,

My name is Kyle Murnen and I am the Director of Online Learning at Hillsdale College, where we offer free online courses to anyone who wishes to learn.

**One of our top-rated courses, "American Citizenship and Its Decline," is taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson and is based on his book _The Dying Citizen_.**

This course argues that at the heart of America's current crises are symptoms of a far larger problem that afflicts the West: the loss of freedom and political power of the citizen.

Dr. Hanson frames this problem by first explaining the history of citizenship in the West and by reminding us how rare it is in human history to have governments that are created and controlled by the people.

To maintain this type of government requires a robust and self-reliant middle class, clearly defined and enforced borders, national autonomy, and confidence in our way of life.

Yet today, the middle class is disappearing under enormous economic strains, the distinction between citizen and resident is being blurred by open borders, and pre-civilizational tribalism is dividing Americans into a variety of identity groups.

These problems are being aggravated by top-down pressures from an unelected bureaucratic class that uses judicial, executive, and legislative powers to overwhelm the citizen.

Finally, globalism poses a historic challenge to national sovereignty, as many of today's elites seek to replace American laws and independence with international bodies, often without the consent of our elected representatives or the people they serve.

The course, however, concludes on a hopeful note: Citizens still hold the key to revitalizing our traditions of empowered citizenship and regaining control over our government.

So, enroll today in this free course, "American Citizenship and Its Decline," with Victor Davis Hanson. You can embark on this journey with us to learn about these threats to our rights as citizens and how to combat them.

Click the secure link below to start today.

**[https://online.hillsdale.edu/register/american-citizenship-and-its-decline](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zbs6j1vmkgbuu2d3rg93fugb2jfjlfurundln220_rp22sh2s8i66p70sljmeoj1c5h2bs)

Best regards,
Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College |

Fellow American,

To my core, I believe the most important things in life are **faith, family, and freedom** - _but those foundations of our great country are under attack._

Right now, in America, children are being taught in many schools to be ashamed of their country and themselves. The pledge is being taken out of school because it mentions God. Free speech is being censored and silenced right before our eyes. Democrats are fighting for the right to elective abortion right up to the moment of birth. Unelected, unaccountable bureaucrats are seeking control of almost every aspect of our lives.

**_This is simply un-American, and we must stop the madness._**

We must elect more leaders who make decisions based on American values with an emphasis on God, family, and country. It's the only way to preserve the blessings we have been given here.

[**Today, to continue to help lead this critical fight, I need your financial support - to restore our country and defend our values. Will you please stand with me immediately?**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zskoljh56cr95ip699q9gggfm8ajtrfa7f2e7thg_rp22sh2s8i66p70sljmeoj6c9h2bs)

[** CHIP IN > **](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zpncn9u8nopkgfl5hqiqorri1ck8g02jqhom7t6o_)

Fellow American, we have a chance to save our country from the radical Left that is aiming to destroy it, but we're running out of time. I'm not sure what version of America we will leave to our kids if we continue down this path. [**We simply must make a change before it 's too late.**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zekbl5h3bmpn8gcl28ba7mgchm5apkiqls9bhhc0_rp22sh2s8i66p70sljmeoj6c9h2bs)

The path we're on currently will lead us to destruction. But that outcome is not inevitable. We still can turn this country around - _**IF**_ conscientious conservatives across America stand up RIGHT NOW.

We MUST act, and we must do so today.

[**Can you pitch in right now to help save our country?**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z5hq5jthev9q8etnuk5qicg3f12ou8pkrf2pkvn8_rp22sh2s8i66p70sljmeoj6c9h2bs)

[** STAND WITH SPEAKER JOHNSON > **](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zi1k376c9h1tpljco09vqku5t5e73n6pccbbsooo_rp22sh2s8i66p70sljmeoj6c9h2bs)

Thank you for all you do, and God bless.

[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zljnd9omv3n778d05nh89icf5gkunred68be5ni8_rp22sh2s8i66p70sljmeoj6c9h2bs)

Mike Johnson
Speaker of the House

| **_MIKE JOHNSON_**
* * *
Mike is a dedicated husband and father of four, as well as a constitutional law attorney who has devoted his life and career to fighting for the fundamental freedoms and traditional values that have always been a priority to the people of Louisiana.

[**WILL YOU STAND WITH MIKE?**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zi6dkeua4kbueeigr76i0auv75l35moq3isptep0_)

---

| PAID FOR BY MIKE JOHNSON FOR LOUISIANA

name: Nikki Haley
subject: Moment to talk?
body:
I’m hoping you’ll consider pitching in a generous gift today!

| |
---
| | | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z04vvmfcd0lna74b03ndmh4a2eu3c3mmgifbiuv0_rp22sh2s8i66p70slge0o71cth2bs)
---

Hi Friend,

Whether you've been with me from the start or just heard from me for the first time at the debate, I couldn't be more grateful to have a chance to connect with you.

Now, I think it's important to take a few minutes to talk with you about the journey I have been on. **[Once you've finished reading this, please consider making a contribution of any amount to help me fund my campaign so I can get my message out to every voter!](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zj5f0hk6ioi9i0ajq14rmh8jp1602mlctga581b8_rp22sh2s8i66p70slge0o71cth2bs "Once youâ€TMve finished reading this, please consider making a contribution of any amount to help me keep my campaign momentum STRONG!")**

Ever since I launched my campaign for President, I have read and heard my life described in every way imaginable. _**Today, I want you to hear my story in MY words.**_
| | | | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zgn3evrnhg1i6s33imne8u47s614cbgcacuo9b6o_rp22sh2s8i66p70slge0o71cth2bs)
---
| I am the daughter of legal immigrants from a small, rural town in South Carolina. We were the only Indian family in our town. My father wore a turban as he still does to this day, and my mother wore a sari. No one knew who we were, what we were, or why we were there. But with each passing day, the community began to look beyond our skin color. They began to see my family for who we are: hard working people who held the same values they cherished. Gradually, those initial stares transformed into smiles and we shifted from being excluded to embraced. Not every day was perfect. But every day was better than the one before it.
---

After graduating from Clemson and working in the corporate world, I decided to take a job working for my family's business that my mother started in our living room when I was a child. I was frustrated when I saw how hard it was to make a dollar and how easy it was for government to take it away. When I voiced these frustrations to my mom, she gave me some wise advice which was: _" Don't complain. Do something about it." _

---
| | | So, that's exactly what I did and I decided to run for state legislature. But it wasn't easy. I ran against the longest-serving legislator in the state and no one believed I had a chance. I was polling at a mere 15 percent a week before the primary. **But the people of South Carolina took a chance on me, and we won.**
---
| | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z7osodfs35cccdmg9nakvc5aebjigqb5svfoak3o_rp22sh2s8i66p70slge0o71cth2bs)
---
It was an honor to serve the people as a state legislator. I fought against the status quo and stood up for the people of my district. When I fought for government transparency by pushing to make sure important votes were on the record, my colleagues retaliated. They stripped me of my committees. So I decided to run for governor.

When I campaigned for governor, people didn't know who I was. I was polling in fourth place, with limited time until Election Day. I was the least funded and least known GOP candidate. But together, we defied expectations and won. Then, we made a difference in South Carolina by cutting taxes, creating thousands of jobs, and revitalizing our economy.

When I was nominated as Ambassador to the United Nations, people said I didn't have the experience. I proved them wrong. When I got to the UN, I took the "kick-me" sign off our back. I told the world that America would have the backs of our allies, and for those who did not have our backs, we were taking names! The dictators, murderers, and thieves at the UN didn't know what hit them.

---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2znqne0qh3006vjenftvn77u6t6pj9d34hl7sh348_rp22sh2s8i66p70slge0o71cth2bs)
---

I launched my campaign for President because our country is heading down a path of doubt, division, and self-destruction. We need a leader who will rise to the occasion, offer solutions, and prioritize serving the people over the political class.

Now, I just completed my **SECOND** debate, and I need a **SURGE** of support to keep the momentum strong in order to continue sharing this message across America! **[It would mean a lot to me if every single person reading this could send a donation of just $5 to help me keep my campaign momentum STRONG!>>](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ziecc10l3mi4lmav53h1pb6bgraidabf8cr4vn30_rp22sh2s8i66p70slge0o71cth2bs "It would mean a lot to me if every single person reading this could send a donation of just $5 to show the strength of my campaign post-debate.")**

Your donation will not only show that my campaign is a force to be reckoned with, but it will showcase the tremendous momentum we have gained since last quarter!

**I 'm hoping you'll consider pitching in a generous gift today!**

**[Will you consider making a one-time donation of any amount today to show the power of OUR movement?>>](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zuj4nnjv3o7i1eba055b1tc7sodg6gc7suqqps28_rp22sh2s8i66p70slge0o71cth2bs "It would mean a lot to me if every single person reading this could send a donation of just $5 to show the strength of my campaign post-debate.")**

****
---
| | [CHIP IN $5](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z4rje2aa1s5u8teellgqn8md25m9hajps58n94j0_rp22sh2s8i66p70slge0o71cth2bs)
---
| | [CHIP IN $25](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z5bftaiurvbhn0lk7hq9860n715q2plnenokgki8_rp22sh2s8i66p70slge0o71cth2bs)
---
| | [CHIP IN $50](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zm8bmctdapln4urb62h5skm5t0i893d04d5avs20_rp22sh2s8i66p70slge0o71cth2bs)
---
| | [CHIP IN $150](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zm344shck0otekv2kgca70qdqp48r49brv8vhjk8_rp22sh2s8i66p70slge0o71cth2bs)
---
| | [CHIP IN ANY OTHER AMOUNT](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zgtt51e4595je1e01aiictntvjvj6vun3scick48_rp22sh2s8i66p70slge0o71cth2bs)
---

Friend, throughout my life, I've been shaking up the status quo. I'm hoping to do the same as your next President. But in order to get there, **[I need your help to make it across the finish line- starting right now.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z7kk4tpq8kobjdaf8kd4eki1p6lf5dl0c4fuv4h8_rp22sh2s8i66p70slge0o71cth2bs "I need your help â€“ starting right now. ")**

Your support is what keeps our movement thriving, so thank you for standing with me.

My very best,

---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zridd0hgl584i58t7kme0vljrfbrtr57jlb1c6qg_rp22sh2s8i66p70slge0o71cth2bs)
---
Nikki Haley
---
| | | | |
---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zj5csq3o10nfd043lhun53ksek3hl405b8tbdbv8_rp22sh2s8i66p70slge0o71cth2bs "NikkiHaley_Merch")
---
| | [GET YOUR HAT NOW](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z8qoeoaht6i8h7oraia99gd7fdokfgkmdf0ti980_rp22sh2s8i66p70slge0o71cth2bs "Claim Your Mug")
---
---
| | **More About Nikki Haley**

---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ze0d7c723cetg14n1rc99vgci0a89a9b89kdhi38_rp22sh2s8i66p70slge0o71cth2bs "NikkiHaley_Podium")
---
My name is Nikki Haley. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I'm running for President of the United States.

I'm running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago - an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again.

I'm running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something - that we do love this country.

I'm running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I'm doing this for my son who's a senior in college and shouldn't have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn't believe in just to get an A.

I'm running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer.

_**I 'm running for President because we have a country to save! **_

I've seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden's leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better.

**As governor, I was dubbed a "jobs governor"** because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery.

**At the UN I fought for America,** made sure our allies knew we had their backs and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names.

I know how to make America strong and proud because I've done it before. **And I 'll do it as your next President. **

As President, I'll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington's spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America's future.

**[Will you join me today and help me save our country?](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z94p1i90h5jhcuj01bhsnunthf5uvstna2n1dg10_rp22sh2s8i66p70slge0o71cth2bs "Will you join me today and help me save our country?")**

---
| | [DONATE](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zarsto9rgae00fnheafprhhprsclo2lnm8af05to_rp22sh2s8i66p70slge0o71cth2bs "DONATE")
---
| | Paid for by Team Stand for America, a joint fundraising committee authorized and composed of Nikki Haley for President, Stand for America PAC and SFA Fund Inc.

[www.TeamStandForAmerica.com](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zghpkfmcb389v2c3hq5m6mhmti4gcni98m97ss5o_rp22sh2s8i66p70slge0o71cth2bs)
---

Texts may be sent via an automated telephone dialing system. Consent not required to contribute. Message frequency varies. Message and data rates may apply. You can opt out at any time. Text STOP to end. Text HELP for help. [Privacy Policy](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zn33ni6hujgc6donaviejcf9j6i4p7l0gb35plj8_rp22sh2s8i66p70slge0o71cth2bs). [Terms and conditions](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zn7masfg54qm88ckhp40u46j6mq7q7scdu69oq68_rp22sh2s8i66p70slge0o71cth2bs).

Contributions are not tax-deductible. Team Stand For America does not accept contributions from foreign nationals.

[Privacy Policy](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z3af8q4e0g8im0bnorsaqiio9acc5ehlk5q12oqo_rp22sh2s8i66p70slge0o71cth2bs)

American Action News
---

_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zor2et6d88s42847ol5305n5g3suek2ug1nr91e8_rp22sh2s8i66p70slge0o71cth238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kuo72ttle5pq8ddl69qbcd1jmgr32t5nmepradrmeej3fddnklprctbi6pr34t5i6krqfp9ls4o7et5hm6qbcsr7c0bjbd1km6pqcdtlmcibbp34c3hm9o31c8iv0)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zclc2ipirdgiba682a1gf614dgulb0ltad1g1uto_rp22sh2s8i66p70slge0o71cth2bs)_
