body: ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ To unsubscribe from the Kiggans for Congress, click here It’s Congresswoman Jen Kiggans. If you are like me, you probably get a lot of emails from candidates asking for money. I know it can be annoying at times, but I want to do something a little different. https://click.contact.jenforcongress.com/?qs=d0c19c4ba4dc0dd0e7aad235b2dfa9d42f29dbfafa8cf9831b73354ed8e84c0d0755cc7f40d3c60fa5fe9d196f93a1d1c87bed08e087e8059c6a1397ee47fd82 I want to tell you EXACTLY what my campaign will do with your donation. Look, my background is not in politics. I served in the Navy as a helicopter pilot for a decade before using my GI Bill benefits to become a Nurse Practitioner. So I do things completely differently than most….and I want to level with you. Campaigns are incredibly expensive. I wish it wasn’t that way. The high cost of campaigns isn’t good for our country, and it definitely discourages people from running for office. Asking for donations is my least favorite part of this job, but it’s critical if we are going to have the resources necessary to run an aggressive campaign in a battleground district. So what we need help with right now is funding our campaign’s gas budget. It is critical that our team travel all across Virginia’s 2nd District to meet directly with voters…But gas is really expensive in Joe Biden’s economy! So if you chip in today, your donation will go directly toward helping us travel the district and meet directly with voters. I believe in looking voters directly in the eye, shaking their hands, answering their questions, and asking for their vote. I don’t take anything for granted, so it’s critically important that we keep an aggressive schedule! https://click.contact.jenforcongress.com/?qs=d0c19c4ba4dc0dd0e7aad235b2dfa9d42f29dbfafa8cf9831b73354ed8e84c0d0755cc7f40d3c60fa5fe9d196f93a1d1c87bed08e087e8059c6a1397ee47fd82 So I’m humbly asking you today if you will consider donating a small amount to help fuel our campaign. Every donation - no matter how big or how small - will make a HUGE impact. https://click.contact.jenforcongress.com/?qs=d0c19c4ba4dc0dd0e7aad235b2dfa9d42f29dbfafa8cf9831b73354ed8e84c0d0755cc7f40d3c60fa5fe9d196f93a1d1c87bed08e087e8059c6a1397ee47fd82 DONATE TODAY I’m so incredibly grateful for all my grassroots supporters like you, Peter. THANK YOU, https://click.contact.jenforcongress.com/?qs=d0c19c4ba4dc0dd0e7aad235b2dfa9d42f29dbfafa8cf9831b73354ed8e84c0d0755cc7f40d3c60fa5fe9d196f93a1d1c87bed08e087e8059c6a1397ee47fd82 Congresswoman Jen Kiggans https://click.contact.jenforcongress.com/?qs=d0c19c4ba4dc0dd0e7aad235b2dfa9d42f29dbfafa8cf9831b73354ed8e84c0d0755cc7f40d3c60fa5fe9d196f93a1d1c87bed08e087e8059c6a1397ee47fd82 DONATE TODAY https://click.contact.jenforcongress.com/?qs=d0c19c4ba4dc0dd07df225cf3a143af2bf1f0eb5d65ccb241d25ce5d4454dbc1becfa705e53a0a6f6abc1e41fe34b26ebfbd7e1e7a38addd726f623a3c3d35a1 JEN KIGGANS is running for Congress in the most competitive House race in the entire country, and she needs our urgent support. Can you spare just $5 or $10 today to protect her vulnerable seat? If we are going to defeat the Democrats and keep the Republican Majority, then we MUST support tough conservatives like Jen Kiggans right now. https://click.contact.jenforcongress.com/?qs=d0c19c4ba4dc0dd064b00f14b144046ebfb04e688242b68d20020de9a41ba223d08b6b7970e956d0f23e80e03e6842753525a6449aa9ec6e83b0a163e17dfb6b >">Give your endorsement to this Navy Pilot, Nurse Practitioner, and Mom >> To ensure you are receiving emails from Kiggans for Congress with minimum to no interruption, please add mailto:info@contact.jenforcongress.com info@contact.jenforcongress.com to your safe sender list, for instructions on how to add a contact, please click https://click.contact.jenforcongress.com/?qs=d0c19c4ba4dc0dd094869152aa5a422ef621403135e908e45ff22e738b6dbc5d40717c07287a07db0bd719cc7c3fd2becb2991cd0ed72c9e905e56b7ccd6962c here . name: 4Patriots
subject: Important Food Shortage Notice
body:
This might be your only warning.
188d92cdddd40f90da47bc74ea2ba8fb
**The Truth About The Coming Food Crisis** **This might be your only warning.** According to official reports, dangerous global events have reached America, putting the entire nation in harm's way. Despite this imminent crisis, mainstream media remains silent... And our own government ignores dire warnings of industry experts like fourth-generation American farmers who warn: **_" Food shortages are coming."_** Imagine the panic of seeing empty grocery store shelves, not for a few days, but for several weeks or even months. The loss will be beyond what you can imagine. **As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever.** If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to go hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like...
* Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life - depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired...
* Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick...
* Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means you risk becoming malnourished...

**Well, no need to worry anymore.** Obviously, waiting for the government to give me a handout in a disaster just wasn't an option for me. And I was completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by some companies. That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of these best-selling [**Survival Food Kits**](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/x1YT2wYqlkmT2nz7qOLnKw~~/AARclAA~/RgRnINZWP0RlaHR0cHM6Ly90cmsucmVib290bWFya2V0aW5nLmNvbS9hZmZfYz9vZmZlcl9pZD0xMDkmYWZmX2lkPTE1MjAmYWZmX3N1YjI9UE9QSUZTTjEwMDEyM19STV9ST05fMjAyMzEwMjlXA3NwY0IKZT1sHD5ll83mYFIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~). When you secure your own food stockpile, you will have the peace of mind and security knowing that when a crisis hits... You will be able to calmly reassure your family that they're safe and they will have plenty to eat. [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of these best-selling survival food kits while you still can.**](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/x1YT2wYqlkmT2nz7qOLnKw~~/AARclAA~/RgRnINZWP0RlaHR0cHM6Ly90cmsucmVib290bWFya2V0aW5nLmNvbS9hZmZfYz9vZmZlcl9pZD0xMDkmYWZmX2lkPTE1MjAmYWZmX3N1YjI9UE9QSUZTTjEwMDEyM19STV9ST05fMjAyMzEwMjlXA3NwY0IKZT1sHD5ll83mYFIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~) When a crisis hits, the masses begin to panic, and grocery stores are wiped out. It quickly becomes every man for himself. Don't make the mistake of waiting until it is too late. [**Stock up now**](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/x1YT2wYqlkmT2nz7qOLnKw~~/AARclAA~/RgRnINZWP0RlaHR0cHM6Ly90cmsucmVib290bWFya2V0aW5nLmNvbS9hZmZfYz9vZmZlcl9pZD0xMDkmYWZmX2lkPTE1MjAmYWZmX3N1YjI9UE9QSUZTTjEwMDEyM19STV9ST05fMjAyMzEwMjlXA3NwY0IKZT1sHD5ll83mYFIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~) on these survival food kits while you can.

name: 4Patriots
subject: Important Food Shortage Notice
body:
This might be your only warning.

**The Truth About The Coming Food Crisis** **This might be your only warning.** According to official reports, dangerous global events have reached America, putting the entire nation in harm's way. Despite this imminent crisis, mainstream media remains silent... And our own government ignores dire warnings of industry experts like fourth-generation American farmers who warn: **_" Food shortages are coming."_** Imagine the panic of seeing empty grocery store shelves, not for a few days, but for several weeks or even months. The loss will be beyond what you can imagine. **As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever.** If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to go hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like...
* Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life - depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired...
* Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick...
* Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means you risk becoming malnourished...

**Well, no need to worry anymore.** Obviously, waiting for the government to give me a handout in a disaster just wasn't an option for me. And I was completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by some companies. That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of these best-selling [**Survival Food Kits**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=fce71c58126b43a0b28d466aa960c31a&_e=0X8yuy5YZyv136FFJjN3hIPT2p1U518eyXURpqiDlWyicNMSQOTXZn1GV3kEA6Xq9AoQRqLjIVxTm9snlO-NOsJnvfiHbZAbH40mtwO4OuKN8gYHi39PKhkHUtkj41HHaklP4iqrfIeHjUtEh8D0Vh1ydF8GhjuOSLSztRDwtOfrSXT3-5LpcLYF77zb6SlgDqsTcQ-YJLJzAr1mb57CEfkgvKQngsNE5_AGbaY7_u1thLdJezSiageGuOEedXERTrWUujBr3jTELFqofDC3Pb8mUqS3JPbYC3PVBzjeoRggXATA2Ks5y0Vgx0QZqOWM). When you secure your own food stockpile, you will have the peace of mind and security knowing that when a crisis hits... You will be able to calmly reassure your family that they're safe and they will have plenty to eat. [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of these best-selling survival food kits while you still can.**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=fce71c58126b43a0b28d466aa960c31a&_e=0X8yuy5YZyv136FFJjN3hIPT2p1U518eyXURpqiDlWyicNMSQOTXZn1GV3kEA6Xq9AoQRqLjIVxTm9snlO-NOsJnvfiHbZAbH40mtwO4OuKN8gYHi39PKhkHUtkj41HHaklP4iqrfIeHjUtEh8D0VgtRBuZkin7NlAAuaWLFMGj65KCc-Jj3XM92ZNqb-Mq-QqN7iYTWGVYvmeI8ZBqfTvGt7DQ0CpL1_1uhoG1SryT_nfZex8_vEoSqSM2T2tRA7wmhlJb60399POu49tIiV2hxENrIxalTdUf7sf1gZHBd4jBByNpASGICiSW3BFo0) When a crisis hits, the masses begin to panic, and grocery stores are wiped out. It quickly becomes every man for himself. Don't make the mistake of waiting until it is too late. [**Stock up now**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=fce71c58126b43a0b28d466aa960c31a&_e=0X8yuy5YZyv136FFJjN3hIPT2p1U518eyXURpqiDlWyicNMSQOTXZn1GV3kEA6Xq9AoQRqLjIVxTm9snlO-NOsJnvfiHbZAbH40mtwO4OuKN8gYHi39PKhkHUtkj41HHaklP4iqrfIeHjUtEh8D0VvQk8uvenAwvzPTeh_KBLk4iNMgywl1Tc6uzbBm8u4n4llRPGNpbaUOErX7-RyUm3Tr0xriwNKY9rGlo1TxqeOn5I3noRb5NCFEvqvq09jtq4DVB0wZeXDvF3RuvrVB3EwOupxeB40w2MS8wxjrPlpXESlr-deErDcw2xj1WOS_R) on these survival food kits while you can.

name: Mike Johnson
subject: The cornerstone of leadership
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MIKE JOHNSON FOR LOUISIANA
body:
I believe to my core that the most important things in life are God, family, and pride in our country. These are the values that guide me and shape my life.

|
[ ](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c35788%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=D%2bfbjrDjiMaMopD1tpZe4g&sysid=1)
---
Fellow American,

The most important things in life are faith, family, and freedom. That's not just a slogan, these happen to be the foundations of our great country. That is why I am fighting every day to preserve them.

**Faith.** Our nation began with the bold declaration that all men are created equal by God, and that our rights derive from Him and not the government. The founders insisted that faith must remain central to our national identity because, as George Washington summarized, "religion and morality are indispensable supports" of our republic. Like so many American households through the generations, in our house we instill faith in the hearts of our children, serve God, and serve people.

**Family.** Stable, happy families are the basis of any thriving society, and public policy should always acknowledge this obvious truth. Strengthening the nuclear family should be a top priority, and government should get out of the way and respect parental rights. Kelly and I have been very intentional about passing along the values of hard work, honor, and sacrifice to our children, just as our parents passed them along to us. For nearly two and a half centuries, this has been the American way.

**Freedom.** It is a self-evident truth that God endows all of us with inherent freedoms, such as the natural and unalienable rights to life, liberty, conscience, and the ability to pursue happiness, own property, build wealth and defend ourselves and our families. The purpose of government is to secure these rights, and the ideas we advance should always aim to maintain and increase the liberty of the American people. I’ve devoted my life and career to fighting for those fundamental freedoms and traditional values, first in the courts as a constitutional law attorney, and now in the Congress.

[**This is a simple truth:**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c35789%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=uOH3%2bVyzsFxhJ2pTuItRtw&sysid=1) America is the freest, most powerful, most successful nation in the history of world - but we cannot maintain that status if we are led by politicians who hate the very foundations that made us who we are!

[** SUPPORT MIKE JOHNSON > **](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c35780%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=4crIc9Dk%2b%2fXACvCfVmqMnA&sysid=1)

Right now in America, children are being taught in many schools to be ashamed of their country and themselves. The pledge is being taken out of school because it mentions God. Free speech is being censored and silenced right before our eyes. Democrats are fighting for the right to elective abortion right up to the moment of birth. Unelected, unaccountable bureaucrats are seeking control of almost every aspect of our lives.

**This is simply un-American, and we must stop the madness.**

We must elect more leaders who make decisions based on American values with an emphasis on God, family, and country. It’s the only way to preserve the blessings we have been given here.

[**Today, to continue to help lead this critical fight, I need your financial support - to restore our country and defend our values. Can you make a donation immediately?**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c35781%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=jGHbWDKbUDdIiv%2fU1AK%2fLA&sysid=1)

[** DONATE TO SAVE AMERICA > **](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c35782%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Oofz3cl3o9at5ejJ9dbkIQ&sysid=1)

Fellow American, we have a chance to save our country from the radical Left that is aiming to destroy it, but we’re running out of time. I’m not sure what version of America we will leave to our kids if we continue down this path. [**We simply must make a change before it’s too late.**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c35783%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=CU5yCJWhon4jTOwxapds0A&sysid=1)

I made a promise when I was first elected to do what is best for our country, and for Louisiana, and I intend to keep that promise. It’s why I have been a trusted ally of President Donald Trump, who selected me for critical positions and endorsed all of my campaigns. It’s also why I was elected by my colleagues to serve as Vice Chairman of the House Republican Conference - one of seven elected leadership positions for Republicans in the House - and to chair the Subcommittee on the Constitution and Civil Liberties in the prestigious Judiciary Committee.

We are working in Congress every day to defend our conservative way of life and lead the fight for freedom, [**but we cannot do it alone.**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c35784%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=FFb26Zi0C2EQGLtnDKiemg&sysid=1)

[**If you are committed to keeping the House from the radical Democrats who are self-serving and want to turn America into a socialist country, then I need your support today.**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c35795%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=f42XSj0HxbM6sTh13cY%2fNw&sysid=1)

[** CHIP IN > **](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c35796%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=FmuePcZMsQ7bBPT9w4F6Zg&sysid=1)

The path we’re on currently will lead us to destruction. But that outcome is not inevitable. We still have the ability to turn this country around-- IF conscientious conservatives across America will stand up RIGHT NOW.

We MUST act, and we must do so today.

[**Can you pitch in right now to help save our country, Fellow American?**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c35797%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=btLgOelkagyLWpM1FNkcGg&sysid=1)

Thank you for all you do, and God bless.

[ ](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c35788%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=D%2bfbjrDjiMaMopD1tpZe4g&sysid=1)

Mike Johnson
Speaker of the House

| **_MIKE JOHNSON_**
* * *
Mike is a dedicated husband and father of four, as well as a constitutional law attorney who has devoted his life and career to fighting for the fundamental freedoms and traditional values that have always been a priority to the people of Louisiana.

[**WILL YOU STAND WITH MIKE?**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c35798%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=RIvop%2bf8nx5mTP5RaueBKw&sysid=1)

---

| PAID FOR BY MIKE JOHNSON FOR LOUISIANA
---

Your America News
---
_Your America News • 625 First Street #183 • Alexandria, VA 22314_
[Unsubscribe](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c920805%7c8433%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c0&wdmdk=WkV%2fhQNi0NwnBhGyINnMGA&sysid=1)
_[**unsubscribe**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c35799%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=dlcVEzy99ROkkzXUhkZFlg&sysid=1)_ | _[manage data preferences](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c35790%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=DkONObYRpTyP1769uAN7wQ&sysid=1)_

clean_body: This might be your only warning. The Truth About The Coming Food Crisis This might be your only warning. According to official reports, dangerous global events have reached America, putting the entire nation in harm's way. Despite this imminent crisis, mainstream media remains silent... And our own government ignores dire warnings of industry experts like fourth-generation American farmers who warn: " Food shortages are coming." Imagine the panic of seeing empty grocery store shelves, not for a few days, but for several weeks or even months. The loss will be beyond what you can imagine. As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever. If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to go hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like... Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life - depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired... Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick... Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means you risk becoming malnourished... Well, no need to worry anymore.** Obviously, waiting for the government to give me a handout in a disaster just wasn't an option for me. And I was completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by some companies. That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of these best-selling . When you secure your own food stockpile, you will have the peace of mind and security knowing that when a crisis hits... You will be able to calmly reassure your family that they're safe and they will have plenty to eat. When a crisis hits, the masses begin to panic, and grocery stores are wiped out. It quickly becomes every man for himself. Don't make the mistake of waiting until it is too late. on these survival food kits while you can. American Defense News 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

name: Nikki Haley
subject: Moment to talk?
body:
I couldn't be more grateful to have a chance to connect with you.

| |
---
| | | | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=86c4acdcf9394184a25422c5c48544f9&_e=5nsWLojMaillEAQQHqOojsSTHOglGYiZkJQyYki3mA5JBVw2G4nwrNDYEW-kD0cIeeEDc36Od7L-VBMtzt-W6yhWP1FxKu9y-Wz6G_z57p681LY7wUC5pFe14spnZPuEel4QMCpMAmqh14iXQ-qgWAiumaMt30ykFv8-mx463hn6iBwpJXkHxHW7UYrlkQj4X9NFkLZ5M6a0LJMyqAASARofM428CVzpzewA2mfKIBtoaImvCD9XPv64yvmpQWDeNotXlWOJaF1tBOm5fCKQue0R7uX8rnaP4-hKfGx2ObY-NlbU__Hh-gaKPv06OmdcW3NJJq-LDi3BxFQ0Ma-z4JPoroeC-uodQbqnVjWNudT6nbzbq5pKtx_uyAHqvi1WivwciNmg1_umdaWnpZ0brVUe3YOpKRsjv1coTRDaoDGq0ePQc-ORAGKemYm4HCRdSAIIRL1d85ekf3cn8osRZdAyvm1Y6jwtmBeOnTLMnm3QgGdLY1-dEcmgjNvx1mUSx61ww6hWk3CPFpw9eMOCpt8FKQFnufJ-ybu_1swW-90dew3ZrC3uqMcAi5ZRP53iAtsmewH6hhSOHZa88vv9letRq__D1y66tOtLNNnPyVCJp7rrIxm-Fnw8w7dIroap)
---

Hi Friend,

Whether you've been with me from the start or just heard from me for the first time at the debate, I couldn't be more grateful to have a chance to connect with you.

| I am the daughter of legal immigrants from a small, rural town in South Carolina. We were the only Indian family in our town. My father wore a turban as he still does to this day, and my mother wore a sari. No one knew who we were, what we were, or why we were there. But with each passing day, the community began to look beyond our skin color. They began to see my family for who we are: hard working people who held the same values they cherished. Gradually, those initial stares transformed into smiles and we shifted from being excluded to embraced. Not every day was perfect. But every day was better than the one before it.
---

After graduating from Clemson and working in the corporate world, I decided to take a job working for my family's business that my mother started in our living room when I was a child. I was frustrated when I saw how hard it was to make a dollar and how easy it was for government to take it away. When I voiced these frustrations to my mom, she gave me some wise advice which was: _" Don't complain. Do something about it." _

---
| | | So, that's exactly what I did and I decided to run for state legislature. But it wasn't easy. I ran against the longest-serving legislator in the state and no one believed I had a chance. I was polling at a mere 15 percent a week before the primary. **But the people of South Carolina took a chance on me, and we won.**

It was an honor to serve the people as a state legislator. I fought against the status quo and stood up for the people of my district. When I fought for government transparency by pushing to make sure important votes were on the record, my colleagues retaliated. They stripped me of my committees. So I decided to run for governor.

When I campaigned for governor, people didn't know who I was. I was polling in fourth place, with limited time until Election Day. I was the least funded and least known GOP candidate. But together, we defied expectations and won. Then, we made a difference in South Carolina by cutting taxes, creating thousands of jobs, and revitalizing our economy.

When I was nominated as Ambassador to the United Nations, people said I didn't have the experience. I proved them wrong. When I got to the UN, I took the "kick-me" sign off our back. I told the world that America would have the backs of our allies, and for those who did not have our backs, we were taking names! The dictators, murderers, and thieves at the UN didn't know what hit them.

My name is Nikki Haley. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I'm running for President of the United States.

I'm running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago - an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again.

I'm running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something - that we do love this country.

I'm running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I'm doing this for my son who's a senior in college and shouldn't have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn't believe in just to get an A.

I'm running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer.

_**I 'm running for President because we have a country to save! **_

I've seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden's leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better.

**As governor, I was dubbed a "jobs governor"** because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery.

**At the UN I fought for America,** made sure our allies knew we had their backs and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names.

I know how to make America strong and proud because I've done it before. **And I 'll do it as your next President. **

As President, I'll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington's spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America's future.

**[Will you join me today and help me save our country?](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=86c4acdcf9394184a25422c5c48544f9&_e=5nsWLojMaillEAQQHqOojsSTHOglGYiZkJQyYki3mA5JBVw2G4nwrNDYEW-kD0cIj75jS1wZrjtvd_hDG_4ReSbhaA1fY1wKsjXi_iQreg94HfQ0OhoKWRIVX6y4q6G_Kf1wcOlXJduLF_eMx6ndWSST7jxvlrBQ127JOU2bRvHpDUHoTsSWqnkC67NqHPK9D1wqkkd_Hz2PH98dfjaTNbrhLx5UoYkbctGiiCSfvHE5X2-aBGRJOYJ2UPEIBjiR8Zl9bTfkQC4ccTmS1soX3yykDqKCVtLchDUGqFFP0-ghLQD2r83PrR4z8Plw9IVFKH56npQ_VbpdY1l2oNSS-pnMkevj10XK3lKlGKtBvexkrK4yvdqc18XMbXIoLSjse5BzbtFfmspzyZM0BLtQXCEBpf-bJuvtilRaUFECvIpGc3VuyGhbQrO_LbxNXxlU2CdIR95UG-Q2d8Cdr53E5xHSmS34ydc6874C0oWQfH-94Nib-oelmWlcfKr61tbYM0pH9R4EGjputd6GWfjt7PGqxPFg2-QyboZcILiYHw__0b-PQ7NPcBM_9_8wXNF6I8XD_Ud2QLuQtPQvqJKKvfNTrFzSbr9rpPxD1BO-pGe7a1cF5jZFXCOkXFHuD0YJ "Will you join me today and help me save our country?")**

clean_body: I couldn't be more grateful to have a chance to connect with you. | | | | | | Hi Friend, Whether you've been with me from the start or just heard from me for the first time at the debate, I couldn't be more grateful to have a chance to connect with you. Now, I think it's important to take a few minutes to talk with you about the journey I have been on. "Once youâ€TMve finished reading this, please consider making a contribution of any amount to help me keep my campaign momentum STRONG!" Ever since I launched my campaign for President, I have read and heard my life described in every way imaginable. Today, I want you to hear my story in MY words. | | | | | | I am the daughter of legal immigrants from a small, rural town in South Carolina. We were the only Indian family in our town. My father wore a turban as he still does to this day, and my mother wore a sari. No one knew who we were, what we were, or why we were there. But with each passing day, the community began to look beyond our skin color. They began to see my family for who we are: hard working people who held the same values they cherished. Gradually, those initial stares transformed into smiles and we shifted from being excluded to embraced. Not every day was perfect. But every day was better than the one before it. After graduating from Clemson and working in the corporate world, I decided to take a job working for my family's business that my mother started in our living room when I was a child. I was frustrated when I saw how hard it was to make a dollar and how easy it was for government to take it away. When I voiced these frustrations to my mom, she gave me some wise advice which was: " Don't complain. Do something about it." | | | So, that's exactly what I did and I decided to run for state legislature. But it wasn't easy. I ran against the longest-serving legislator in the state and no one believed I had a chance. I was polling at a mere 15 percent a week before the primary. But the people of South Carolina took a chance on me, and we won. | | It was an honor to serve the people as a state legislator. I fought against the status quo and stood up for the people of my district. When I fought for government transparency by pushing to make sure important votes were on the record, my colleagues retaliated. They stripped me of my committees. So I decided to run for governor. When I campaigned for governor, people didn't know who I was. I was polling in fourth place, with limited time until Election Day. I was the least funded and least known GOP candidate. But together, we defied expectations and won. Then, we made a difference in South Carolina by cutting taxes, creating thousands of jobs, and revitalizing our economy. When I was nominated as Ambassador to the United Nations, people said I didn't have the experience. I proved them wrong. When I got to the UN, I took the "kick-me" sign off our back. I told the world that America would have the backs of our allies, and for those who did not have our backs, we were taking names! The dictators, murderers, and thieves at the UN didn't know what hit them. | I launched my campaign for President because our country is heading down a path of doubt, division, and self-destruction. We need a leader who will rise to the occasion, offer solutions, and prioritize serving the people over the political class. Now, I just completed my SECOND debate, and I need a SURGE of support to keep the momentum strong in order to continue sharing this message across America! "It would mean a lot to me if every single person reading this could send a donation of just $5 to show the strength of my campaign post-debate. >> " Your donation will not only show that my campaign is a force to be reckoned with, but it will showcase the tremendous momentum we have gained since last quarter! I 'm hoping you'll consider pitching in a generous gift today! "It would mean a lot to me if every single person reading this could send a donation of just $5 to show the strength of my campaign post-debate. >> " ** | | | | | | | | | | Friend, throughout my life, I've been shaking up the status quo. I'm hoping to do the same as your next President. But in order to get there, " I need your help â€“ starting right now. " Your support is what keeps our movement thriving, so thank you for standing with me. My very best, | Nikki Haley | | | | | | "NikkiHaleyMerch" | | "Claim Your Mug" | | More About Nikki Haley | "NikkiHaleyPodium" My name is Nikki Haley. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I'm running for President of the United States. I'm running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago - an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again. I'm running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something - that we do love this country. I'm running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I'm doing this for my son who's a senior in college and shouldn't have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn't believe in just to get an A. I'm running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer. I 'm running for President because we have a country to save! I've seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden's leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better. As governor, I was dubbed a "jobs governor" because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery. At the UN I fought for America, made sure our allies knew we had their backs and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names. I know how to make America strong and proud because I've done it before. And I 'll do it as your next President. As President, I'll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington's spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America's future. "Will you join me today and help me save our country?" | | "DONATE" | Paid for by Team Stand for America, a joint fundraising committee authorized and composed of Nikki Haley for President, Stand for America PAC and SFA Fund Inc. By providing your phone number, you are consenting to receive SMS/MMS news alerts, action items, and donation requests to the number provided by from each of Team Stand For America, Stand For America PAC, Stand for America, SFA Fund Inc., and Ambassador Nikki Haley directly or by third parties acting on their behalf. Texts may be sent via an automated telephone dialing system. Consent not required to contribute. Message frequency varies. Message and data rates may apply. and . You can opt out at any time. Text STOP to end. Text HELP for help. . . Contributions are not tax-deductible. Team Stand For America does not accept contributions from foreign nationals. 186 Seven Farms Drive, Ste F-401 Daniel Island, SC 29492 Conservatives Give 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 | _

Fellow American,

You might not know me very well – _probably because I have been heads down working for the past seven years in Congress._

So, in my own words, I want to give you a chance to hear what I stand for.

**To my core, I believe the most important things are God, family, and country.**

**_I believe that God is not done with America yet._**

**I believe we need to unite as a party and unite as a nation. The hour is late, and the crisis is great – but I am bullish about the future of America.**

I believe in the law – I’m a constitutional law attorney and I respect the law.

**I believe America is the freest, most powerful, most successful nation in the history of the world – _but our days as the beacon of freedom for the world are numbered if we let the far-left force their anti-American agenda on the rest of us._**

[**Last November, the American people put their faith in House Republicans and gave us a majority. We’ve been charged with holding Democrats accountable for their failure to get our country out of the malaise of their own making. To deliver on the promises we made, we need you on our team TODAY.**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=661b313cfbab412abd57d4c453a9477c&_e=x5fupYNIVbwysRljHbYgAh5wlG6HVhpCaqT-kTGyjR8gatmE5KT-3kKcH_vDMdnyzfev7WaaHCtHMOqMVlckca_NO2B0dcFnkQHekkC06pPJ14TlnciCs0PWyTaOu3EcrR70s4HlLhxYh056ZAjhULvkL3iT-n0xS8hrD4SyM6y0bwAKOcgRH8ZmJcKfq0h01kZKhNHxG1nTPmGjEIEE6J6RG6p8JI9P-fzIC2xljD5dGV_I54fm-XZCCOyHAhTaufBw4cKTz2YQg1Xo4-yAPuxZQ2f-PdZ3jJ59dDppQ59Csv4DHC4PP7QM7XWBU_VCAgiRdA8H7Z9sy1i4ZORj4DV2ERiSdzR13zIjLlrxv8QzCLN1UOZjdMyJu88aBIRpAv3WaLrUT3BYIkFh4DH2og%3D%3D)

[** STAND WITH SPEAKER MIKE > **](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=661b313cfbab412abd57d4c453a9477c&_e=x5fupYNIVbwysRljHbYgAh5wlG6HVhpCaqT-kTGyjR8gatmE5KT-3kKcH_vDMdnyzfev7WaaHCtHMOqMVlckca_NO2B0dcFnkQHekkC06pPJ14TlnciCs0PWyTaOu3EcrR70s4HlLhxYh056ZAjhULvkL3iT-n0xS8hrD4SyM6y0bwAKOcgRH8ZmJcKfq0h01kZKhNHxG1nTPmGjEIEE6J6RG6p8JI9P-fzIC2xljD5dGV_I54fm-XZCCOyHAhTa961Hd6ADp9Yr_vkN4lDeM1bgmuQpENdVgyfeCuzKBIxtfgV72j0ptsyvoGvxUwiyVeCuvLvBaTK6LfbPiWnDGs2XjBpbgW4kTjqAxjf0om8Fbz21bxZ19pXrrHlDvFO4WaZQNhRe-Rl5TDJUyB_zbg%3D%3D)

Fellow American, I know it takes time to build trust; you’re getting to know me and I’m navigating this new role – but we must act – and quickly. We need a full course correction,**otherwise, I’m not sure what version of America we’ll hand down to the next generation.**

[**So, I’m asking you today – please commit to a donation of any amount. **_-STEP FORWARD TODAY-_** [** DONATE > **](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=661b313cfbab412abd57d4c453a9477c&_e=x5fupYNIVbwysRljHbYgAh5wlG6HVhpCaqT-kTGyjR8gatmE5KT-3kKcH_vDMdnyzfev7WaaHCtHMOqMVlckca_NO2B0dcFnkQHekkC06pPJ14TlnciCs0PWyTaOu3EcrR70s4HlLhxYh056ZAjhULvkL3iT-n0xS8hrD4SyM6y0bwAKOcgRH8ZmJcKfq0h01kZKhNHxG1nTPmGjEIEE6J6RG6p8JI9P-fzIC2xljD5dGV_I54fm-XZCCOyHAhTaIxjEkFe-Mjn0jjy-_PDqNle-5XC7xdlJkvErru7WUwwL2Ld08Ffd_id7TXyX-ILrRNRy5bZNGioef00JxmD3oCiTOl0PblNzVoEEnlEbViaPqJzfq5wsu8Vp_372BvHkmCGVndjnDZeTLucv1dKSnw%3D%3D)

name: Reclaiming American Freedom
subject: The decline of American Citizenship
body:
This sponsored message from Reclaiming American Freedom is on behalf of Hillsdale College
My name is Kyle Murnen and I am the Director of Online Learning at Hillsdale College

[](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=d9a7a463eb74495a96e31c1f8ef46fb5&_e=MsgwhopMrjGDVzPXDCVryJh3FX_aWQ45I7HBOcckyX827s7zF9aVxlRMrWqQ_YGGKXguGhwtVFTs3CxLEcgm3bbW0QpTG_el_frldfJ7ksSo7Y_0dU7e9pcp3OUsVJU7lHjmGOWulSPKVysgQvQ-1S_D-HE88rUxva2ReWTI3VSyP8vOAgaGPTqptZwqUx-KvbG9c_i0duRBYYh6s4yZGDrE9pcI28-vc4pQHgzOYr9BjSiBWql0mC-SKd2tJrdVXGuTEEU7F34QbWu7lObHB4s7lEfLYfmn32TFKXYG7OzDyBSo0C2gduggcfDRcMvmH8YdersU1re1hx3rhyDs59mZ27hBir82gwS2A3uPrSOZojjGOe5Ue0i-05Po9sKEd8IUemSJQT6KVxcBM0XQO9-2wodW7yluVGK5xrwQt2uAgSoTLpPMTR83Ir55KEod) Dear Friend,

My name is Kyle Murnen and I am the Director of Online Learning at Hillsdale College, where we offer free online courses to anyone who wishes to learn.

**One of our top-rated courses, "American Citizenship and Its Decline," is taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson and is based on his book _The Dying Citizen_.**

This course argues that at the heart of America's current crises are symptoms of a far larger problem that afflicts the West: the loss of freedom and political power of the citizen.

Dr. Hanson frames this problem by first explaining the history of citizenship in the West and by reminding us how rare it is in human history to have governments that are created and controlled by the people.

To maintain this type of government requires a robust and self-reliant middle class, clearly defined and enforced borders, national autonomy, and confidence in our way of life.

Yet today, the middle class is disappearing under enormous economic strains, the distinction between citizen and resident is being blurred by open borders, and pre-civilizational tribalism is dividing Americans into a variety of identity groups.

These problems are being aggravated by top-down pressures from an unelected bureaucratic class that uses judicial, executive, and legislative powers to overwhelm the citizen.

Finally, globalism poses a historic challenge to national sovereignty, as many of today's elites seek to replace American laws and independence with international bodies, often without the consent of our elected representatives or the people they serve.

The course, however, concludes on a hopeful note: Citizens still hold the key to revitalizing our traditions of empowered citizenship and regaining control over our government.

So, enroll today in this free course, "American Citizenship and Its Decline," with Victor Davis Hanson. You can embark on this journey with us to learn about these threats to our rights as citizens and how to combat them.

Click the secure link below to start today.

**[https://online.hillsdale.edu/register/american-citizenship-and-its-decline](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=d9a7a463eb74495a96e31c1f8ef46fb5&_e=MsgwhopMrjGDVzPXDCVryJh3FX_aWQ45I7HBOcckyX827s7zF9aVxlRMrWqQ_YGGKXguGhwtVFTs3CxLEcgm3bbW0QpTG_el_frldfJ7ksSo7Y_0dU7e9pcp3OUsVJU7lHjmGOWulSPKVysgQvQ-1S_D-HE88rUxva2ReWTI3VSyP8vOAgaGPTqptZwqUx-KvbG9c_i0duRBYYh6s4yZGDrE9pcI28-vc4pQHgzOYr9BjSiBWql0mC-SKd2tJrdVXGuTEEU7F34QbWu7lObHB4s7lEfLYfmn32TFKXYG7OwMbZ0au7A9f_MMBmv4r9g0bAL6u5TsRgAhovV-6S9SC6cnN0E28VIeUC9uEbLQhitcRxT90HjsfvefNl0XOfCIo0ldmYjEdwNGibf4lVYRhU10ESKtluPDMEOgwcz8w80kGYWiOTzEHlVoMZI0cCrU)
**

Best regards,
Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College |

| Reclaiming American Freedom

clean_body: This sponsored message from Reclaiming American Freedom is on behalf of Hillsdale College My name is Kyle Murnen and I am the Director of Online Learning at Hillsdale College Dear Friend, My name is Kyle Murnen and I am the Director of Online Learning at Hillsdale College, where we offer free online courses to anyone who wishes to learn. One of our top-rated courses, "American Citizenship and Its Decline," is taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson and is based on his book The Dying Citizen. This course argues that at the heart of America's current crises are symptoms of a far larger problem that afflicts the West: the loss of freedom and political power of the citizen. Dr. Hanson frames this problem by first explaining the history of citizenship in the West and by reminding us how rare it is in human history to have governments that are created and controlled by the people. To maintain this type of government requires a robust and self-reliant middle class, clearly defined and enforced borders, national autonomy, and confidence in our way of life. Yet today, the middle class is disappearing under enormous economic strains, the distinction between citizen and resident is being blurred by open borders, and pre-civilizational tribalism is dividing Americans into a variety of identity groups. These problems are being aggravated by top-down pressures from an unelected bureaucratic class that uses judicial, executive, and legislative powers to overwhelm the citizen. Finally, globalism poses a historic challenge to national sovereignty, as many of today's elites seek to replace American laws and independence with international bodies, often without the consent of our elected representatives or the people they serve. The course, however, concludes on a hopeful note: Citizens still hold the key to revitalizing our traditions of empowered citizenship and regaining control over our government. So, enroll today in this free course, "American Citizenship and Its Decline," with Victor Davis Hanson. You can embark on this journey with us to learn about these threats to our rights as citizens and how to combat them. Click the secure link below to start today. Best regards, Kyle Murnen, '09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College | | Reclaiming American Freedom 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Becky Wagner
subject: My husband made the right decision
body:
I wish I were writing to you under happier circumstances...

Dear Friend,
I wish I were writing to you under happier circumstances...
...but my hero police officer husband, Mark Wagner, is the next big target of the radical anti-police movement and I urgently need your help before they make an example out of him.
That's Mark in the picture I sent you, along with our boys Nolan and Jacob and dog Kilo.
[](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=32f0f5cd382f4543a7dd4aa261933fdc&_e=bJ20hH5ucKyIX5QzcdrCXPqbnT7C_l5jdZbBlu0yBWrahR6y3l0CIwdp7iYdBrf3yBnGkcCXALpsy0wyYKNb84ZsQFa-cM0wbiEBHd8heVW6KEFLCbJNQk197UdQyXdkuir1sK1UXxQ5g2xrRrz_RDhtMW-UC35H97tRLaSmAy0Ee_xhysCh1jgof5DimeRt3XFANYq1UYJ1NzAUq4kJ0fHD_oMqcQw6M59dRpkcyU3UvPbkwGyIoS3SAoYW_BXVKu713aKdf-HJuJ1nQ8od5XZQJVMGeH7NvjL4HUZ5RQ478LiPPm2uYwmbGKCavimuC44v231fXSpWXGhkjIM0W06QKN_7D0Mf6Z2Gco_NARs%3D)
Not only is Mark a highly respected officer, he's an incredibly supportive father, a loving husband, and a fierce friend.
He's dedicated his life to protecting others. But we live in far-Left Madison, Wisconsin - and the "defund the police" mob whipped up rage, LIED about what happened, and trashed Mark's reputation.
And now Mark faces 10 YEARS behind bars for doing exactly what he was trained to do in the line of duty - and I'm scared I might lose him. [**That 's why I wrote this letter to you, someone I've never met before, to ask for your help.**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=32f0f5cd382f4543a7dd4aa261933fdc&_e=bJ20hH5ucKyIX5QzcdrCXPqbnT7C_l5jdZbBlu0yBWrahR6y3l0CIwdp7iYdBrf3yBnGkcCXALpsy0wyYKNb84ZsQFa-cM0wbiEBHd8heVW6KEFLCbJNQk197UdQyXdkuir1sK1UXxQ5g2xrRrz_RDhtMW-UC35H97tRLaSmAy0Ee_xhysCh1jgof5DimeRtrNujsYY61QQhWaLTnTXeQXGcVt7GA5MTq1j0m2bR8ku2YGJJE10GVv_69KGm6V7pxO9_Ic7pdTiwW6z4PvlB3atQmZcJzW7YleMJSqtgEnZm4dRDdrYoNQyiVbsYE8H6kFYlfSmVEP_kqE6GiF2LwqIjCkg0YIdxitN5_1CXGzg%3D)
But first, let me explain what happened...
On the morning of February 3, 2022, Mark and other officers tried to arrest a _violent_ _criminal_ named Quadren Wilson.
Wilson has a rap sheet a mile long with dozens of arrests for drug distribution, theft, witness intimidation, battery, eluding police, and more. He was wanted for allegedly dealing fentanyl to a man found dead in a restaurant bathroom.
Mark's arrest team planned to capture Wilson in his vehicle using a containment strategy. They pulled in their trucks to block his car on both ends. But Wilson floored the accelerator, spinning his wheels wildly in a desperate attempt to escape justice.
Mark and another officer exited their vehicle to make the arrest. Mark was holding one of those big POLICE shields and had his gun drawn. But Wilson refused Mark's commands to show his hands, continuing to spin his wheels and try to force his way out.
With the wheels screeching and smoking, Mark and the other officer saw Wilson reach into the center console and pull his hand up.
Mark thought Wilson had a gun. He heard what he thought was gunfire. Then Mark felt something hit the shield he was holding and push him backward.** **
**Both Mark and the other officer responded to this life-threatening situation by firing into the vehicle.**
Mark believed his life and his fellow officers' lives were in danger. He did what he was trained to do and stopped the threat.
Thankfully, Wilson survived and no one else was injured. But because Wilson is black and Mark is white - anti-police radicals jumped at the chance to target Mark.
Protesters drummed up a racial firestorm by spreading lies that Wilson "had his hands up" and that he "was shot five times in the back." The corrupt liberal media repeated these lies and painted my husband as a monster.
And on September 22, 2022, the liberal District Attorney caved to the mob and filed BOGUS felony charges against Mark. **Now Mark faces 10 YEARS in prison.**
[**_Now I hope you can see why I 'm turning to you for help today._**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=32f0f5cd382f4543a7dd4aa261933fdc&_e=bJ20hH5ucKyIX5QzcdrCXPqbnT7C_l5jdZbBlu0yBWrahR6y3l0CIwdp7iYdBrf3yBnGkcCXALpsy0wyYKNb84ZsQFa-cM0wbiEBHd8heVW6KEFLCbJNQk197UdQyXdkuir1sK1UXxQ5g2xrRrz_RDhtMW-UC35H97tRLaSmAy0Ee_xhysCh1jgof5DimeRtj5SgZKtvn1tox5DHzNbZRvB0nKlyHutlzzVhsEVQZHLSJoI5s_dGjxyAE6aOg3zJIanjR8Jys05yPDf-hwzEOpuUzmnQstpT6GSSJfjaompjiRh3ZoOMjUNsT75rMEeq29mutIUrzqyoZH0muWU9dlX2aLjoyF52mXkUWpKuxM0%3D)
Mark dedicated his life to helping others. He's spent 30 years in law enforcement, most of them with the Milwaukee Police Department (MPD).
We knew fighting alone against the anti-police movement here in Wisconsin would be impossible and our hope that justice would prevail was quickly fading when we received a call from **the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund (LELDF)** offering to help Mark.
This incredible organization helps innocent officers, like my husband, who have been unfairly prosecuted for split-second, use-of-force decisions in the line of duty.
Law and justice experts like President Ronald Reagan's Attorney General Edwin Meese and former FBI Assistant Director Ronald Hosko serve on LELDF's Board. LELDF's president, Jason Johnson, served over 20 years as a police officer, including as Deputy Commissioner of the Baltimore Police Department.
In short, these are experts when it comes to policing. And they thoroughly vet cases to determine if an officer was wrongly accused or charged before deciding to help.
They provide legal counsel, expert witnesses, whatever is needed to make sure wrongly accused police officers get a fair shake in court. And they do it all free of charge!
But LELDF doesn't receive any money from the government to help police officers facing unjust charges. They're funded entirely by the generous support of folks like you who can recognize a miscarriage of justice and want to help fix it.
This is why I reached out to you today. I needed to ask you a very important question:
[**_Will you please help my husband Mark fight the unjust charges against him and clear his name by rushing a generous, tax-deductible donation to LELDF today?_**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=32f0f5cd382f4543a7dd4aa261933fdc&_e=bJ20hH5ucKyIX5QzcdrCXPqbnT7C_l5jdZbBlu0yBWrahR6y3l0CIwdp7iYdBrf3yBnGkcCXALpsy0wyYKNb84ZsQFa-cM0wbiEBHd8heVW6KEFLCbJNQk197UdQyXdkuir1sK1UXxQ5g2xrRrz_RDhtMW-UC35H97tRLaSmAy0Ee_xhysCh1jgof5DimeRtfmc9ivXYnNTLQPGU682X51Y_bArHR7z045cE1jP-lCrGfasjDJw5G7kc9K1YSsBakmziz45zWAVEDOAUfhyHVKiY4OOkDL45V938N3vTAEK22g4k8QreOl7eEQyVvEMgH6ZxVGThJ3MGF3HqzYSwxjwvupi3PoSIfHo0uT8-81k%3D)
Your kind gift today of $35, $50, or $100 to help Mark will mean so much to my family.
Or, if you're blessed with the means to help with a gift of $250, $500, or even $1,000 or more, I pray you will so my husband doesn't spend 10 YEARS behind bars away from his family.
Right now, LELDF is preparing to ramp up legal action in Mark's case. [**So please follow this link to make your tax-deductible donation right away.**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=32f0f5cd382f4543a7dd4aa261933fdc&_e=bJ20hH5ucKyIX5QzcdrCXPqbnT7C_l5jdZbBlu0yBWrahR6y3l0CIwdp7iYdBrf3yBnGkcCXALpsy0wyYKNb84ZsQFa-cM0wbiEBHd8heVW6KEFLCbJNQk197UdQyXdkuir1sK1UXxQ5g2xrRrz_RDhtMW-UC35H97tRLaSmAy0Ee_xhysCh1jgof5DimeRto4YoozMwQpbYrVMr-W79xKzNx_T5yRSD9r1BSTZqsuJk3DKpeDF50sdnEcuGX0lhxstXtqXbTclH7HRqNXQaQnqqF37jCZW2gcdvD-tsAgCYBn6-hYd7fHrSjsrCi8G4hzvyokO14x-YfNueWxi4aj-25NPOqkZTUQGQ0fP33b4%3D)
Any gift amount you can send today is truly a blessing. No matter what you're able to give, please say a prayer for Mark and our family.
Thank you in advance for your generous support of my family and LELDF.
With deepest gratitude,
Becky Wagner
P.S. Mark is the type of person who'd offer to donate a kidney to a friend in need just because it's the right thing to do. In fact, that's exactly what he did when he donated one of his kidneys to his former partner of more than a decade! Mark didn't even let his partner know he got checked out as a potential donor. He just said that his partner had young kids who needed him to be around and it was the right thing to do.
This is the type of man the anti-police mob is targeting and trying to destroy: a kidney donor, a youth football coach, a man who assists the elderly from our parish in running errands and doing handy-man projects. A man of faith who's always helping others.
Mark faces 10 years behind bars - simply for doing his job to serve and protect. [**_Will you help him clear his name by making a tax-deductible donation of $35, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000 or any amount to the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund today?_** ](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=32f0f5cd382f4543a7dd4aa261933fdc&_e=bJ20hH5ucKyIX5QzcdrCXPqbnT7C_l5jdZbBlu0yBWrahR6y3l0CIwdp7iYdBrf3yBnGkcCXALpsy0wyYKNb84ZsQFa-cM0wbiEBHd8heVW6KEFLCbJNQk197UdQyXdkuir1sK1UXxQ5g2xrRrz_RDhtMW-UC35H97tRLaSmAy0Ee_xhysCh1jgof5DimeRt0CM9ZUmKacsCQlPtT1DLLJIrfXFw4N3D0ZhqglOq_gQFeCQfdRvPFQJ_2OaPFlxJv-piO5F3FWTq1CBGYgEMbifQppqwYE0M8pbA_N03VnSP2wgv4gQXFbfid2oz9rtSJb0q8VRSk6PL-jGN2RgA4OQ1pU_qyPRUMro94NPYzuM%3D) Your generosity will help LELDF mount the strongest legal defenses for my husband and other wrongly accused officers. Thank you in advance for your prayers and support.

\----------------

_More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we 're defending, please visit **www.leldf.org**. And remember - Blue Lives Matter!_
_(C) Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund | www.PoliceDefense.org
2560 Huntington Ave. Suite 203, Alexandria, VA, 22303_

Defend the Constitution

name: Nikki Haley
subject: Moment to talk?
body:
I couldn't be more grateful to have a chance to connect with you.

| |
---
| | | | [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5ce8703835be409894c6b6942a7bff39&_e=R0SDtoP-WL3ytGpeFEvsWi5o3g6RIBbhtb2ucTNGmTuralYI6QKK1ZTOtuEM5uzH7ETaGHhxEAKhqx3hiTkXXiJtEW1KxBKQEhjxPq-8Iub84zld1TTGB_FyTNt9T6IC14XFhNgb36smtXegKBQKQBVmpmlgCgoX9iG1qadKHUITx-2XKdFmgPPzuz6_aaQzBnS1gs9srVO3WgyQAiZz38zRzVZNlZWscjESe8Raoc--MBAf1m5dxz7w_7d92m_r9meT2KFjN9sWdhePl-e7_h6f4hb7igSf0fFRiZQksxXF8hdEpJWhodKukpDgFvDo53Q_K80tdH4Ts9q5wVpugmOR9EK3vf66Gmm788llNR7OhnSqnfQhszMcjdttUtO7l1j_yvf5vkEZGKMM-4it9sc6bwB-v_sDOQRPjvrA4N-tePXfIJQFC3r_ZwT2KTWxVskFXYi2Jzw-v3AdiHQI2aFy1c1Jm9gQ0OJDigC2ge8Qs1hfcYzGvDbJKZyx9VKB9bEmXhUS7I6veGG2pgU6AAJgOs6z5zopIKWLN3tBkI61eXhBvILTAGHJOmRhZv8thkdH5Ze4ok7VN8xUCNdHHmNomamrOe30PBP8KZz5kMz6ywNwyLDE24uoG7Jaw-OM)
---

Hi Friend,

Whether you've been with me from the start or just heard from me for the first time at the debate, I couldn't be more grateful to have a chance to connect with you.

Ever since I launched my campaign for President, I have read and heard my life described in every way imaginable. _**Today, I want you to hear my story in MY words.**_

| I am the daughter of legal immigrants from a small, rural town in South Carolina. We were the only Indian family in our town. My father wore a turban as he still does to this day, and my mother wore a sari. No one knew who we were, what we were, or why we were there. But with each passing day, the community began to look beyond our skin color. They began to see my family for who we are: hard working people who held the same values they cherished. Gradually, those initial stares transformed into smiles and we shifted from being excluded to embraced. Not every day was perfect. But every day was better than the one before it.
---

After graduating from Clemson and working in the corporate world, I decided to take a job working for my family's business that my mother started in our living room when I was a child. I was frustrated when I saw how hard it was to make a dollar and how easy it was for government to take it away. When I voiced these frustrations to my mom, she gave me some wise advice which was: _" Don't complain. Do something about it." _

---
| | | So, that's exactly what I did and I decided to run for state legislature. But it wasn't easy. I ran against the longest-serving legislator in the state and no one believed I had a chance. I was polling at a mere 15 percent a week before the primary. **But the people of South Carolina took a chance on me, and we won.**

It was an honor to serve the people as a state legislator. I fought against the status quo and stood up for the people of my district. When I fought for government transparency by pushing to make sure important votes were on the record, my colleagues retaliated. They stripped me of my committees. So I decided to run for governor.

When I campaigned for governor, people didn't know who I was. I was polling in fourth place, with limited time until Election Day. I was the least funded and least known GOP candidate. But together, we defied expectations and won. Then, we made a difference in South Carolina by cutting taxes, creating thousands of jobs, and revitalizing our economy.

When I was nominated as Ambassador to the United Nations, people said I didn't have the experience. I proved them wrong. When I got to the UN, I took the "kick-me" sign off our back. I told the world that America would have the backs of our allies, and for those who did not have our backs, we were taking names! The dictators, murderers, and thieves at the UN didn't know what hit them.

My name is Nikki Haley. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I'm running for President of the United States.

I'm running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago - an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again.

I'm running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something - that we do love this country.

I'm running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I'm doing this for my son who's a senior in college and shouldn't have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn't believe in just to get an A.

I'm running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer.

_**I 'm running for President because we have a country to save! **_

I've seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden's leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better.

**As governor, I was dubbed a "jobs governor"** because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery.

**At the UN I fought for America,** made sure our allies knew we had their backs and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names.

I know how to make America strong and proud because I've done it before. **And I 'll do it as your next President. **

As President, I'll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington's spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America's future.

**[Will you join me today and help me save our country?](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5ce8703835be409894c6b6942a7bff39&_e=R0SDtoP-WL3ytGpeFEvsWi5o3g6RIBbhtb2ucTNGmTuralYI6QKK1ZTOtuEM5uzHTNBH_gKvWR25v_3CEZxPzohxUQKRPk9lC_xeN7TR9Oj1IXUTkfEHuQyt82HjLMY0UNrwQqbXL8Gfb-2kF-grm3c1mBFKxjf95TaN9AR7WmH9EbXwjB9JYsO4Z3wK7qOR_4oZIiT56QD1yOY_yqydxxtLvfj-5BAngm7X_a44-o-Cz4m0v6lnXHivCZKZwmP4urImOTkHmyQ_lnsItO4oir6rqZ5Nw9Z8EURqWma-kPfpMmS-rNOn1YM5LoYAnrL96H22Fn6PxJVojOXqfSfJGTgnf06-0z9h8qCN0a_2XCjRdGR9baMdK9WrZz-NruB-mWOvFD9y5JVGsr3hJSmmI30bo7mb1wMPT_4o1_eNfAnHU5TEwHJQXKq_XuTB-tNXDh8Ta3vKpIhl9UXs634hqnSYptytFWCzC3bcx9AzwMVpBR_Nca6kj2XjsaCby4ChOqflwZpXWOCVMSTZQChl9dlnvifMB1WHLNdRmiLHbGghZa2WBfOVeFoCZ41fobdfBnkwq6Ojg4SQsQtakmADseNyEdIKSwXIqnOyXjOjrJ2CehfqAlF4ljkvV57QUkb- "Will you join me today and help me save our country?")**

clean_body: I couldn't be more grateful to have a chance to connect with you. | | | | | | Hi Friend, Whether you've been with me from the start or just heard from me for the first time at the debate, I couldn't be more grateful to have a chance to connect with you. Now, I think it's important to take a few minutes to talk with you about the journey I have been on. "Once youâ€TMve finished reading this, please consider making a contribution of any amount to help me keep my campaign momentum STRONG!" Ever since I launched my campaign for President, I have read and heard my life described in every way imaginable. Today, I want you to hear my story in MY words. | | | | | | I am the daughter of legal immigrants from a small, rural town in South Carolina. We were the only Indian family in our town. My father wore a turban as he still does to this day, and my mother wore a sari. No one knew who we were, what we were, or why we were there. But with each passing day, the community began to look beyond our skin color. They began to see my family for who we are: hard working people who held the same values they cherished. Gradually, those initial stares transformed into smiles and we shifted from being excluded to embraced. Not every day was perfect. But every day was better than the one before it. After graduating from Clemson and working in the corporate world, I decided to take a job working for my family's business that my mother started in our living room when I was a child. I was frustrated when I saw how hard it was to make a dollar and how easy it was for government to take it away. When I voiced these frustrations to my mom, she gave me some wise advice which was: " Don't complain. Do something about it." | | | So, that's exactly what I did and I decided to run for state legislature. But it wasn't easy. I ran against the longest-serving legislator in the state and no one believed I had a chance. I was polling at a mere 15 percent a week before the primary. But the people of South Carolina took a chance on me, and we won. | | It was an honor to serve the people as a state legislator. I fought against the status quo and stood up for the people of my district. When I fought for government transparency by pushing to make sure important votes were on the record, my colleagues retaliated. They stripped me of my committees. So I decided to run for governor. When I campaigned for governor, people didn't know who I was. I was polling in fourth place, with limited time until Election Day. I was the least funded and least known GOP candidate. But together, we defied expectations and won. Then, we made a difference in South Carolina by cutting taxes, creating thousands of jobs, and revitalizing our economy. When I was nominated as Ambassador to the United Nations, people said I didn't have the experience. I proved them wrong. When I got to the UN, I took the "kick-me" sign off our back. I told the world that America would have the backs of our allies, and for those who did not have our backs, we were taking names! The dictators, murderers, and thieves at the UN didn't know what hit them. | I launched my campaign for President because our country is heading down a path of doubt, division, and self-destruction. We need a leader who will rise to the occasion, offer solutions, and prioritize serving the people over the political class. Now, I just completed my SECOND debate, and I need a SURGE of support to keep the momentum strong in order to continue sharing this message across America! "It would mean a lot to me if every single person reading this could send a donation of just $5 to show the strength of my campaign post-debate. >> " Your donation will not only show that my campaign is a force to be reckoned with, but it will showcase the tremendous momentum we have gained since last quarter! I 'm hoping you'll consider pitching in a generous gift today! "It would mean a lot to me if every single person reading this could send a donation of just $5 to show the strength of my campaign post-debate. >> " ** | | | | | | | | | | Friend, throughout my life, I've been shaking up the status quo. I'm hoping to do the same as your next President. But in order to get there, " I need your help â€“ starting right now. " Your support is what keeps our movement thriving, so thank you for standing with me. My very best, | Nikki Haley | | | | | | "NikkiHaleyMerch" | | "Claim Your Mug" | | More About Nikki Haley | "NikkiHaleyPodium" My name is Nikki Haley. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I'm running for President of the United States. I'm running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago - an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again. I'm running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something - that we do love this country. I'm running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I'm doing this for my son who's a senior in college and shouldn't have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn't believe in just to get an A. I'm running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer. I 'm running for President because we have a country to save! I've seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden's leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better. As governor, I was dubbed a "jobs governor" because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery. At the UN I fought for America, made sure our allies knew we had their backs and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names. I know how to make America strong and proud because I've done it before. And I 'll do it as your next President. As President, I'll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington's spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America's future. - "Will you join me today and help me save our country?" | | "DONATE" | Paid for by Team Stand for America, a joint fundraising committee authorized and composed of Nikki Haley for President, Stand for America PAC and SFA Fund Inc. By providing your phone number, you are consenting to receive SMS/MMS news alerts, action items, and donation requests to the number provided by from each of Team Stand For America, Stand For America PAC, Stand for America, SFA Fund Inc., and Ambassador Nikki Haley directly or by third parties acting on their behalf. Texts may be sent via an automated telephone dialing system. Consent not required to contribute. Message frequency varies. Message and data rates may apply. and . You can opt out at any time. Text STOP to end. Text HELP for help. . . Contributions are not tax-deductible. Team Stand For America does not accept contributions from foreign nationals. 186 Seven Farms Drive, Ste F-401 Daniel Island, SC 29492 Conservative Liberty Wire 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

subject: Important Food Shortage Notice
body:
This might be your only warning.

**The Truth About The Coming Food Crisis** **This might be your only warning.** According to official reports, dangerous global events have reached America, putting the entire nation in harm's way. Despite this imminent crisis, mainstream media remains silent... And our own government ignores dire warnings of industry experts like fourth-generation American farmers who warn: **_" Food shortages are coming."_** Imagine the panic of seeing empty grocery store shelves, not for a few days, but for several weeks or even months. The loss will be beyond what you can imagine. **As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever.** If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to go hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like...
* Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life - depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired...
* Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick...
* Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means you risk becoming malnourished...

**Well, no need to worry anymore.** Obviously, waiting for the government to give me a handout in a disaster just wasn't an option for me. And I was completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by some companies. That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of these best-selling [**Survival Food Kits**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=01e6538ce2284915aadd016b5c7bc93f&_e=jlPECweP1Sjlwj-ojZI9S5OZ2XiAy0AEs4jliwsTBtjLeDfG9tzPrWa66d0hqs8cc7tzsfof0pkp347lcJzthpjtT1uaKIeGyMoeIIXw6IMyhK9H7OTbok3EqGAr9TCQ1BpFFGkGwoEuyvEW5KfhTu9ZWvGLGpsiJ3RykLC27eBvtYYKJomVUT92eTXXTPQiBUd-ryh_E-n69UMIMDP1MuU_x0V5lBtW8fRyRY-mPvCckAeuWx8eGu5zS-2s_2F_-TWksXzblu0J-FUyVP7hfqkL7hfI_GpLU9QzD3R0eZEZk5rqW5CPFE2L6RQBk48g). When you secure your own food stockpile, you will have the peace of mind and security knowing that when a crisis hits... You will be able to calmly reassure your family that they're safe and they will have plenty to eat. [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of these best-selling survival food kits while you still can.**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=01e6538ce2284915aadd016b5c7bc93f&_e=jlPECweP1Sjlwj-ojZI9S5OZ2XiAy0AEs4jliwsTBtjLeDfG9tzPrWa66d0hqs8cc7tzsfof0pkp347lcJzthpjtT1uaKIeGyMoeIIXw6IMyhK9H7OTbok3EqGAr9TCQ1BpFFGkGwoEuyvEW5KfhTkzHlFon3ZnblTwVy0JvZJyVbQ814mnm07PaX9aRiWK1VaCNy6BV6orFaNkuQx0ORzWwa1knC1cBEDMac_KUyXNjMS3qIYzglS9rjnXHq2U7-0uy41XjAwnsICRmP2pQdljqHdchN087FCGTb1hPQvI-6IYSuZQ-PeylDePR0dYC) When a crisis hits, the masses begin to panic, and grocery stores are wiped out. It quickly becomes every man for himself. Don't make the mistake of waiting until it is too late. [**Stock up now**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=01e6538ce2284915aadd016b5c7bc93f&_e=jlPECweP1Sjlwj-ojZI9S5OZ2XiAy0AEs4jliwsTBtjLeDfG9tzPrWa66d0hqs8cc7tzsfof0pkp347lcJzthpjtT1uaKIeGyMoeIIXw6IMyhK9H7OTbok3EqGAr9TCQ1BpFFGkGwoEuyvEW5KfhTkUNtxwCuX56UEMuGrrEkBlleA1lcdAQgmzyZ-dAb_5efixQ0UBPgxH5uzuSJPtImYT7FyHecYBpT42RcU9iREa4XXPN6XjolQ4Lvn81GxWghL0c9--CtxWfQljj1AIoQRpHO0eP-Un8-zae0tuo2wQ3XP1JlC_7a6_MUeQp5abC) on these survival food kits while you can.

Fellow American,

To my core, I believe the most important things in life are **faith, family, and freedom** - _but those foundations of our great country are under attack._

Right now, in America, children are being taught in many schools to be ashamed of their country and themselves. The pledge is being taken out of school because it mentions God. Free speech is being censored and silenced right before our eyes. Democrats are fighting for the right to elective abortion right up to the moment of birth. Unelected, unaccountable bureaucrats are seeking control of almost every aspect of our lives.

**_This is simply un-American, and we must stop the madness._**

We must elect more leaders who make decisions based on American values with an emphasis on God, family, and country. It’s the only way to preserve the blessings we have been given here.

[**Today, to continue to help lead this critical fight, I need your financial support – to restore our country and defend our values. Will you please stand with me immediately?**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=d6557e5741014b958a4b3c1f87f6ff4d&_e=dMRLv167VAWaq9LWwqXSFDgYw5WwF5tyAwOOZdujYqhI9AbEQvRDi8kneivS8KMQJMEralFl_Gs9TXNc7fmHLUFTiEVnmgy_yoX4_N-dqKVSwKKlm-bO7j2qSbwXzPO7tEb74KeHnTJhCvRA7ITkYR5SGmRd7N8sgUdNCqIP9AlhHKvJCHk6jCXjb6yZJLUfmrdRcnzrN1lK0Qm4fBNssW5i8qt89rvis7g2KBYWlMul7iHj892IthTj54wd0tvnk7OBIulOfz11MD99vZ7a9pBa2k1-d4VLtcJR2n5NDl0SwJR0E379blHs_sTELA2mY7lOkYyPZ9hexZSc5dRSoLraEN-21ev_6bBTa7P9tjT1AWEAPr5b3o3K5r8iqY-URlmlnD6wlrI4ULcjR1vmnA%3D%3D)

[** CHIP IN > **](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=d6557e5741014b958a4b3c1f87f6ff4d&_e=dMRLv167VAWaq9LWwqXSFDgYw5WwF5tyAwOOZdujYqhI9AbEQvRDi8kneivS8KMQJMEralFl_Gs9TXNc7fmHLUFTiEVnmgy_yoX4_N-dqKVSwKKlm-bO7j2qSbwXzPO7tEb74KeHnTJhCvRA7ITkYR5SGmRd7N8sgUdNCqIP9AlhHKvJCHk6jCXjb6yZJLUfmrdRcnzrN1lK0Qm4fBNssW5i8qt89rvis7g2KBYWlMul7iHj892IthTj54wd0tvnjYfx1Ez23ZZXLT9NUXsYknxovxakjJvqI81E5zkWeqD1R4YIIckWIjdD4qxr-t0VU8bX9TdG4n-FguvAuCn2jQI0hvt_vzd8c14T4BLu4bOG799XN48wtKGNxONmZFY8GtJC5yOECE2nOG5RuGz7tw%3D%3D)

Fellow American, we have a chance to save our country from the radical Left that is aiming to destroy it, but we’re running out of time. I’m not sure what version of America we will leave to our kids if we continue down this path. [**We simply must make a change before it’s too late.**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=d6557e5741014b958a4b3c1f87f6ff4d&_e=dMRLv167VAWaq9LWwqXSFDgYw5WwF5tyAwOOZdujYqhI9AbEQvRDi8kneivS8KMQJMEralFl_Gs9TXNc7fmHLUFTiEVnmgy_yoX4_N-dqKVSwKKlm-bO7j2qSbwXzPO7tEb74KeHnTJhCvRA7ITkYR5SGmRd7N8sgUdNCqIP9AlhHKvJCHk6jCXjb6yZJLUfmrdRcnzrN1lK0Qm4fBNssW5i8qt89rvis7g2KBYWlMul7iHj892IthTj54wd0tvnRGSf8XDX6BHHcc7NIIIl0_t66V9hm7efWd6JGJ97UvIt6mbs9EnLlPx4UoYUit1mR2viH5fDMfVhJZOUtE10Qr1qlkESZkyAq89woZP-WgJ1uCPaIdgPsEOgh6K4BJpsBAWRcF2Ng7Zyc94VC1HRvw%3D%3D)

The path we’re on currently will lead us to destruction. But that outcome is not inevitable. We still can turn this country around - _**IF**_ conscientious conservatives across America stand up RIGHT NOW.

We MUST act, and we must do so today.

[**Can you pitch in right now to help save our country?**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=d6557e5741014b958a4b3c1f87f6ff4d&_e=dMRLv167VAWaq9LWwqXSFDgYw5WwF5tyAwOOZdujYqhI9AbEQvRDi8kneivS8KMQJMEralFl_Gs9TXNc7fmHLUFTiEVnmgy_yoX4_N-dqKVSwKKlm-bO7j2qSbwXzPO7tEb74KeHnTJhCvRA7ITkYR5SGmRd7N8sgUdNCqIP9AlhHKvJCHk6jCXjb6yZJLUfmrdRcnzrN1lK0Qm4fBNssW5i8qt89rvis7g2KBYWlMul7iHj892IthTj54wd0tvnUR1mqNRkhJkegLXQEDVVSBlrcKfj5KYpmp4xfrqFpgvHehXljJLeOrs5TfmuHSUsgg0K1hQ1qpuH1TykvLR1wIgKRgz7Pq_UiByUtjY3R4uGA4gyRKFPWuOO7wpOFREIwIfNtU6tmv_Dcctyj0XeXQ%3D%3D)

[** STAND WITH SPEAKER JOHNSON > **](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=d6557e5741014b958a4b3c1f87f6ff4d&_e=dMRLv167VAWaq9LWwqXSFDgYw5WwF5tyAwOOZdujYqhI9AbEQvRDi8kneivS8KMQJMEralFl_Gs9TXNc7fmHLUFTiEVnmgy_yoX4_N-dqKVSwKKlm-bO7j2qSbwXzPO7tEb74KeHnTJhCvRA7ITkYR5SGmRd7N8sgUdNCqIP9AlhHKvJCHk6jCXjb6yZJLUfmrdRcnzrN1lK0Qm4fBNssW5i8qt89rvis7g2KBYWlMul7iHj892IthTj54wd0tvnhi_aiu608C30V_xIxVA_yKFKG5F0GPJd7kuyNXYoZ2w3gCZISy96VY56v4qWW42gSD3zJyZc_rRbhCHVISFDtqOWehwvdzC20rK5EhQYDxhFxbt9N2kM4SAxjt5fd8_bRW_v0y1YE1wXWQ4KfAVKWg%3D%3D)

Thank you for all you do, and God bless.

[ ](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=d6557e5741014b958a4b3c1f87f6ff4d&_e=dMRLv167VAWaq9LWwqXSFDgYw5WwF5tyAwOOZdujYqhI9AbEQvRDi8kneivS8KMQJMEralFl_Gs9TXNc7fmHLUFTiEVnmgy_yoX4_N-dqKVSwKKlm-bO7j2qSbwXzPO7tEb74KeHnTJhCvRA7ITkYR5SGmRd7N8sgUdNCqIP9AlhHKvJCHk6jCXjb6yZJLUfmrdRcnzrN1lK0Qm4fBNssW5i8qt89rvis7g2KBYWlMul7iHj892IthTj54wd0tvnB2JDOSjazYnmfcKhx0ofkOaqnhRzuBhSIJIoCm4ULAxnPAgYiyPp8SutrR5CkFvp0U9jEHLKs3apfcf1r8UKe49WS0QfnvpsXI93ug_aFUoycOqyEwi_ZE6jhJ4BuOnCy5Pn2BEOWmw5VOYPOf9oEQ%3D%3D)

Mike Johnson
Speaker of the House

| **_MIKE JOHNSON_**
