subject: Important Food Shortage Notice
body:
This might be your only warning.

**The Truth About The Coming Food Crisis** **This might be your only warning.** According to official reports, dangerous global events have reached America, putting the entire nation in harm's way. Despite this imminent crisis, mainstream media remains silent... And our own government ignores dire warnings of industry experts like fourth-generation American farmers who warn: **_" Food shortages are coming."_** Imagine the panic of seeing empty grocery store shelves, not for a few days, but for several weeks or even months. The loss will be beyond what you can imagine. **As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever.** If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to go hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like...
* Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life - depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired...
* Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick...
* Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means you risk becoming malnourished...

**Well, no need to worry anymore.** Obviously, waiting for the government to give me a handout in a disaster just wasn't an option for me. And I was completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by some companies. That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of these best-selling [**Survival Food Kits**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2f7bfeaf3c5846b6842bf410214c0db8&_e=TgOXzCh2MFjFA1t-j_AqG0sJoksew5h66bIjrsFN97Nf54QpT6Yv-k60bIXjs1pQI-DYIpQV-UbYOp2PwCuXUEnZ6KJztQ1tcGKn3VVZQLE85m0vTzg6nOqq-Ing0X0zcHZ47roRaSHD2T0-H_6FpfZFsATPh-GAP0zeryFj-yh6gMnRh3z7VfZ-dTCBLPvkcm6r_-TzLWGbLstKi7tWIOF5Z3Qju4HYGdROj7KD3lwYJcntrYDK0LrRcL-cD3T72z4Mn-5OCflGvOLOU1tE8a3UQ_aXeAWzJQm26mM5mKtn6grO8epc5Js7HT2z0cH8). When you secure your own food stockpile, you will have the peace of mind and security knowing that when a crisis hits... You will be able to calmly reassure your family that they're safe and they will have plenty to eat. [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of these best-selling survival food kits while you still can.**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2f7bfeaf3c5846b6842bf410214c0db8&_e=TgOXzCh2MFjFA1t-j_AqG0sJoksew5h66bIjrsFN97Nf54QpT6Yv-k60bIXjs1pQI-DYIpQV-UbYOp2PwCuXUEnZ6KJztQ1tcGKn3VVZQLE85m0vTzg6nOqq-Ing0X0zcHZ47roRaSHD2T0-H_6FpUUAF5gfl04ECqUB_3PlLg76KEmU7ycR6jH_9DjYHEmV1GVdiwhRW0K1R_z7YAN_aEq3SVb8dYtNwZgGEqq-jfxERKXDlksNycER2aYcATA-Czz8t5N5gaZY0vp22LPJdAinuKMuk2aNUZbkZ6yxs4HRcoh7f8Guhu8Ae17HNOqq) When a crisis hits, the masses begin to panic, and grocery stores are wiped out. It quickly becomes every man for himself. Don't make the mistake of waiting until it is too late. [**Stock up now**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2f7bfeaf3c5846b6842bf410214c0db8&_e=TgOXzCh2MFjFA1t-j_AqG0sJoksew5h66bIjrsFN97Nf54QpT6Yv-k60bIXjs1pQI-DYIpQV-UbYOp2PwCuXUEnZ6KJztQ1tcGKn3VVZQLE85m0vTzg6nOqq-Ing0X0zcHZ47roRaSHD2T0-H_6FpSkKerImmakrMTrP-OAnrUj981KY1Ec9ag0Htk6Juo0FCxeBM-CRvRhTKu4A-hATCxM7xmubCd2ieVkJaUvx3chHkJv2UranyS_osk5AwzE3rkLp4SnSvc40AlyinmRYeHZJTDVnyUvkjiaAL1GacCCSwVLaGyw3q3oFseomODXJ) on these survival food kits while you can.

Fellow American,

To my core, I believe the most important things in life are **faith, family, and freedom** - _but those foundations of our great country are under attack._

Right now, in America, children are being taught in many schools to be ashamed of their country and themselves. The pledge is being taken out of school because it mentions God. Free speech is being censored and silenced right before our eyes. Democrats are fighting for the right to elective abortion right up to the moment of birth. Unelected, unaccountable bureaucrats are seeking control of almost every aspect of our lives.

**_This is simply un-American, and we must stop the madness._**

We must elect more leaders who make decisions based on American values with an emphasis on God, family, and country. It's the only way to preserve the blessings we have been given here.

clean_body: We must elect more leaders who make decisions based on American values with an emphasis on God, family, and country. It's the only way to preserve the blessings we have been given here. | Fellow American, To my core, I believe the most important things in life are faith, family, and freedom - but those foundations of our great country are under attack. Right now, in America, children are being taught in many schools to be ashamed of their country and themselves. The pledge is being taken out of school because it mentions God. Free speech is being censored and silenced right before our eyes. Democrats are fighting for the right to elective abortion right up to the moment of birth. Unelected, unaccountable bureaucrats are seeking control of almost every aspect of our lives. This is simply un-American, and we must stop the madness. We must elect more leaders who make decisions based on American values with an emphasis on God, family, and country. It's the only way to preserve the blessings we have been given here. Fellow American, we have a chance to save our country from the radical Left that is aiming to destroy it, but we're running out of time. I'm not sure what version of America we will leave to our kids if we continue down this path. The path we're on currently will lead us to destruction. But that outcome is not inevitable. We still can turn this country around - IF conscientious conservatives across America stand up RIGHT NOW. We MUST act, and we must do so today. Thank you for all you do, and God bless. Mike Johnson Speaker of the House | MIKE JOHNSON * Mike is a dedicated husband and father of four, as well as a constitutional law attorney who has devoted his life and career to fighting for the fundamental freedoms and traditional values that have always been a priority to the people of Louisiana. | PAID FOR BY MIKE JOHNSON FOR LOUISIANA Freedom Nation Today 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 | _

Fellow American,

You might not know me very well – _probably because I have been heads down working for the past seven years in Congress._

So, in my own words, I want to give you a chance to hear what I stand for.

**To my core, I believe the most important things are God, family, and country.**

**_I believe that God is not done with America yet._**

**I believe we need to unite as a party and unite as a nation. The hour is late, and the crisis is great – but I am bullish about the future of America.**

I believe in the law – I’m a constitutional law attorney and I respect the law.

**I believe America is the freest, most powerful, most successful nation in the history of the world – _but our days as the beacon of freedom for the world are numbered if we let the far-left force their anti-American agenda on the rest of us._**

[**Last November, the American people put their faith in House Republicans and gave us a majority. We’ve been charged with holding Democrats accountable for their failure to get our country out of the malaise of their own making. To deliver on the promises we made, we need you on our team TODAY.**](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=6f117e2fcd8a4686867109cfff4ee009&_e=7VXoqbMb520XSYXNN0tRRhs9qfuqVYrAA_dKa_qWqerO6nYpThukVBz1aNVQ4KbgxMt6Zmq2_NEys1ang_CQ1tXwuisXDb9kmnjwmy8Og80GFYA5pCFBnxJb5iO6VlC_x0Y9q19ixSaHJ6g9ubcFy1NLRhNdCw2XiPdwy-0wLKuYmjv8uvhmkn5nbwDa5XYlIXxsu38Tl0eIAUHF0c-dBtuEl3DxE4bdPUygLTIolHCBI9ahB7nHfCctlc5ofkGYYq6dMzL-EhF4OrfJurhAkLkdJRf5y4o3_G9P76oH7jS85HSkEQr5YKJfDcli-QcHviRk3bTvN1oJj0An02OMDy7Ap0bozoQw-sz_IeNFtijmcSy5pYzxpxmdWjCFXdepX4PlDvlg3Lp5NAj0Djrvvg%3D%3D)

[** STAND WITH SPEAKER MIKE > **](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=6f117e2fcd8a4686867109cfff4ee009&_e=7VXoqbMb520XSYXNN0tRRhs9qfuqVYrAA_dKa_qWqerO6nYpThukVBz1aNVQ4KbgxMt6Zmq2_NEys1ang_CQ1tXwuisXDb9kmnjwmy8Og80GFYA5pCFBnxJb5iO6VlC_x0Y9q19ixSaHJ6g9ubcFy1NLRhNdCw2XiPdwy-0wLKuYmjv8uvhmkn5nbwDa5XYlIXxsu38Tl0eIAUHF0c-dBtuEl3DxE4bdPUygLTIolHCBI9ahB7nHfCctlc5ofkGYqraS0sg0lRbEo9yeyv1BQwD-7m795Lf8HjVKWvR-pVjzgQQV8JL6HqtmbVMmS8Q5amoIJ2qMirM7Ym_4m7Ehcx-PAbbjY3cudP9CfCqF0ubgCm8AMYr5mZi0ca-3mfa40_pLmffWu24OLuoZQ7a0_Q%3D%3D)

name: Ron DeSantis
subject: I’ve seen this horror firsthand
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President
body:
To view this email as a web page, go to the link below, or copy and paste it into your browser's address window.
https://view.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=ce0cf21a881640dbacc9302acd5253235477e77c3efe293bd545094e320ef7581706289daf287e2bb15645e1972eb443ae3ba86850b54a2c5ee8ae050eb35b19df803667f04d780df19660873c974d10

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=08cab242a1f0e7492d725d2a4b5817b9dbbe9bbf726c83c7c9438f636527b3427c213b0650e3e60ff2419948295af08061d4b1a5012ce47ed83d4afaadef1033

Friend,

I need to share a story with you. When I was serving in the Middle East as an active-duty naval officer in places like Fallujah and Ramadi, I learned that “freedom” to this region, meant an imposition of Islamic, Sharia law, NOT the democracy that America has defended for generations.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=08cab242a1f0e7492d725d2a4b5817b9dbbe9bbf726c83c7c9438f636527b3427c213b0650e3e60ff2419948295af08061d4b1a5012ce47ed83d4afaadef1033

But there was one outpost in the region that was unlike the rest—one place that truly believes in freedom and one place in the region that we can count on. That was the State of Israel.

Israel is our ally—it's the birthplace of Judeo-Christian values and Western civilization, and the ground where Jesus walked. We have great economic ties, we have cultural affinity, and have trust with Israel. But we are watching Joe Biden shower the terrorists that have thrown Israel into its darkest hour with millions of dollars of your money.

I am taking this personally, and so is my state. We are sending pallets full of donated medical supplies, children’s toys, clothing, and critical equipment from the State of Florida and continuing to deploy planes to bring stranded Americans home. I am fed up with Joe Biden’s failure. We are acting, and I would do the same as President.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=08cab242a1f0e749c4db1bfd104bf558a09881dd30ee7b29892d243a077218bd0d5f7bba873a9aec9143b370f7a002c7fed1c58b8c2b345928d09f78792eceb5
Support my campaign with $30

Friend, we know that Israel has a tough neighborhood. And after seeing the atrocity in that region firsthand, I believe the least we can do is give them support as they stand for what’s right.

We need a President who believes this too, and I am stepping up to be that leader. We will ALWAYS support Israel as they fight for what’s right and focus on ripping the despicable terrorism out of their state from root to branch.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=08cab242a1f0e7497bc1e3b7569c167cfb2e9b59027668717212a3c4fb1f736dbccb2a0cb0d2ce0ff3074d5ff7fbfdf66eb6b874d66d4d1b7bbe371b89af8a3f
PITCH IN $25

PITCH IN $47

PITCH IN $100

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=08cab242a1f0e749fd736c025d58f1425dbdad160f827f37bda8a954b7eaae1f676d5a95c3afc3213ce530f19891263c7ac69b225e8951e4e0fbfb08526c13c5

PITCH IN $250

You can rest assured, with your support, on Day One of my presidency, I will reverse Biden’s disastrous open-border policies so that like-minded terrorists will never be able to attack our vulnerabilities and invade our country armed with weapons, drugs, and intent to harm. We will get it done... if we step up today.

In Freedom,

Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain.

After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom.

When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor.

Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide.

In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is personal and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=08cab242a1f0e7492d725d2a4b5817b9dbbe9bbf726c83c7c9438f636527b3427c213b0650e3e60ff2419948295af08061d4b1a5012ce47ed83d4afaadef1033

On Day One, Ron DeSantis has promised that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by immediately getting to work stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late.

In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He’s taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and won every single time. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon.

That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now.

Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without “green cards”), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general).

Contribution rules

- I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).
- This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.
- I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person.
- I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.

When I was serving in the Middle East as an active-duty naval officer in places like Fallujah and Ramadi, I learned that “freedom” to this region, meant an imposition of Islamic, Sharia law, NOT the democracy that America has defended for generations. But there was one outpost in the region that was unlike the rest—one place that truly believes in freedom and one place in the region that we can count on. That was the State of Israel. Israel is our ally—it's the birthplace of Judeo-Christian values and Western civilization, and the ground where Jesus walked. We have great economic ties, we have cultural affinity, and have trust with Israel. But we are watching Joe Biden shower the terrorists that have thrown Israel into its darkest hour with millions of dollars of your money. I am taking this personally, and so is my state. We are sending pallets full of donated medical supplies, children’s toys, clothing, and critical equipment from the State of Florida and continuing to deploy planes to bring stranded Americans home. I am fed up with Joe Biden’s failure. We are acting, and I would do the same as President. Support my campaign with $30 Friend, we know that Israel has a tough neighborhood. And after seeing the atrocity in that region firsthand, I believe the least we can do is give them support as they stand for what’s right. We need a President who believes this too, and I am stepping up to be that leader. We will ALWAYS support Israel as they fight for what’s right and focus on ripping the despicable terrorism out of their state from root to branch. name: Shift WA
subject: Top News: A Halloween Survey
body:
The Shift WA team has been working to shift the political debate
in Washington state since 2013. We've spent the last decade
providing people like you with the facts and perspectives needed
to make a difference in your community.

The team here at Shift WA has
been working to shift the political debate in Washington state
since 2013. We've spent the last decade providing people like you
with the facts and perspectives needed to hopefully make a
difference in your community. So, as always, we will help keep
you-up-to-date with an item or two of interest from your own
backyard. Read on...

This week's Newsmaker
Interview...
This week we talked with Andrea
Suarez, Founder and Executive Director of the non-profit
volunteer organization We Heart Seattle. In a very short time the
group has made a significant impact in cleaning up encampments
and helping people get off the streets. Created during the
height of the COVID pandemic in 2020 when homeless encampments
were filling Seattle's parks, sidewalks, and other public places,
We Heart Seattle challenged the status quo regarding how best to
help those struggling with drugs and homelessness. Along the
way, they have encountered protests by a small group of
extremists as volunteers have cleaned up encampments and
attempted to help those who were suffering. Read more...

This week's top story…
We assume part of Governor
Inslee's decision to take a carbon polluting flight to the U.N.
was to get away from the increasingly louder local noise over his
costly cap-and-tax scheme and the Washington Policy Center's case
that "Governor Inslee's office and others in his administration
are upset that we and others refer to the cost of the CO2
allowances in the law as a 'tax.' The governor's office and
others have resorted to some very convoluted language and logic
to avoid using that politically powerful word." Read more...

In case you missed it…
Leave it to the local paper to
put the finishing touches on the Democrat plan to let the courts
do their re-districting dirty work. That's the take from the
Yakima Herald editorial page, which writes that "(W)hatever
happens with the District 15 boundaries from here, somebody won't
be happy, so more suits or appeals could be in the works soon. We
wouldn't be surprised if the courts were still haggling over this
one when the next census comes around." However, the local paper
takes a dim view of the Dems' motivation for the lawsuit,
pointing out that "some Democrats - particularly those who live
west of the Cascade Range - seem confident that a clear Latino
majority in the 15th would automatically add a nice hue of blue
to Central Washington. But they're living in a fantasy world if
they take for granted that Latinos will lean left." Read more...

Governor Inslee's pennies can
sure add up...

DONATE

This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com and sent from Shift
Washington. If you would like to send this message to some of
your friends, you can click here to do so.

You can also stay up to date on
our efforts to shift the debate in Washington State by following
us on Facebook & Twitter.
If you believe you received this message
in error or no longer wish to receive emails from Shift
Washington, click to unsubscribe.

name: Friends of the Earth
subject: Your Signature is Needed: The melting Arctic
body:
| | | | | [](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2081762?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---|---|---

| | **A STARVING polar bear lumbers over the crumbling ice shelf. Her hungry cubs follow close behind. She’s searching for food, but their hunting grounds are RAPIDLY melting away!** The Arctic is warming _**TWICE as fast**_ as the rest of the world, Friend. The local Indigenous Gwich’in people are seeing the ecosystem they depend on wither away. Local wildlife like polar bears and caribou are struggling. **Oil and gas drilling are pushing the Arctic and its inhabitants _to the brink._** The good news is that President Biden recently announced new actions to protect the Arctic National Wildlife Refuge and the National Petroleum Reserve in Alaska. But **there are still remaining loopholes that could allow oil and gas drilling in these fragile habitats!** [_**Please, Friend, tell the Biden Administration to ensure there can be NO OIL and GAS DRILLING in the Arctic! We need 1,992 more signatures from your area to help PROTECT people and wildlife!**_](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2081763?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==) | [SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2081764?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
In addition to the immediate threat of drilling, the resulting greenhouse gas emissions are seriously concerning. The Arctic includes **critical habitat** for many species, including **migratory birds, brown bears, polar bears, walruses,** and more – but these habitats could **MELT AWAY** with continued drilling.
Indigenous communities have been leading the effort to protect the Arctic from greedy fossil fuel companies. Their way of life is deeply tied to the health of the land and the wildlife in the region. But the Biden Administration’s new rules failed to address the impacts oil and gas development on this communities’ livelihoods, and the loopholes leave room for fossil fuel development. [_**Will you take just 30 seconds RIGHT NOW to tell President Biden no drilling in the Arctic? >>**_](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2081765?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
[SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2081766?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
**Standing with you,
Raena Garcia
Senior Fossil Fuel and Lands Campaigner,
Friends of the Earth**
|
##### Contact Us:
Friends of the Earth U.S. Washington, D.C. | Berkeley, CA 1-877-843-8687 [Contact us](foe.org/about-us/contact/)
---
##### Email Preferences:
[Click here to unsubscribe](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/subscribe?campaignpageurl=https%3A%2F%2Faction.foe.org%2Fpage%2F2555%2Fsubscriptions%2F1%3Fea.broadcast.id%3D267851&ea.campaigner.email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC)
##### Learn more:
[www.foe.org/news](http://www.foe.org/news) [www.foe.org/about-us](http://www.foe.org/about-us) [www.foeaction.org](http://www.foeaction.org)
---
##### Connect:
[](https://www.facebook.com/foe.us?fref=ts) [](https://twitter.com/foe_us) [](https://www.flickr.com/photos/foeaction/)

name: Mike Johnson
subject: How I lead
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MIKE JOHNSON FOR LOUISIANA
body:
I believe to my core that the most important things in life are God, family, and pride in our country. These are the values that guide me and shape my life.

|
[ ](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=a00dfece247f4d0297354f2590881399&_e=Cg-bnlxSqEO8kN1wjtKxb4iGuPojIRbewxlBDnGOjn-21KKrVW9eonXmLfN5ZB9ASCNCFxxFcQd0G-hPt8l5FLRtYT-HTBF7oTSgLNx0_8a7NalXvJAcoAduE1kmB6GvLniR20GKFfJvLip0YOt5fyRiZnb1LBYD5TfywZiNm2vhjaugfj6jFdsv-fcvCnjMEYz1zUIqiD5hAKepbYXSXMS8jb4KedRDTf9uHWXDLVMqpxKGdxh4wB9jBbbw9H-podaM_vceateZysA8uj58FcSbzrV-ouJQlLSYIhn6mIT9kgqeflettRwnAkT8oq3PE5rRJkblL9Cjncmzno9ONg-qepaf3s6vim0ikmkth4SKLgh4gt9Xg2SSBWrgBMvW)
---
Fellow American,

The most important things in life are faith, family, and freedom. That's not just a slogan, these happen to be the foundations of our great country. That is why I am fighting every day to preserve them.

**Faith.** Our nation began with the bold declaration that all men are created equal by God, and that our rights derive from Him and not the government. The founders insisted that faith must remain central to our national identity because, as George Washington summarized, "religion and morality are indispensable supports" of our republic. Like so many American households through the generations, in our house we instill faith in the hearts of our children, serve God, and serve people.

**Family.** Stable, happy families are the basis of any thriving society, and public policy should always acknowledge this obvious truth. Strengthening the nuclear family should be a top priority, and government should get out of the way and respect parental rights. Kelly and I have been very intentional about passing along the values of hard work, honor, and sacrifice to our children, just as our parents passed them along to us. For nearly two and a half centuries, this has been the American way.

**Freedom.** It is a self-evident truth that God endows all of us with inherent freedoms, such as the natural and unalienable rights to life, liberty, conscience, and the ability to pursue happiness, own property, build wealth and defend ourselves and our families. The purpose of government is to secure these rights, and the ideas we advance should always aim to maintain and increase the liberty of the American people. I've devoted my life and career to fighting for those fundamental freedoms and traditional values, first in the courts as a constitutional law attorney, and now in the Congress.

[**This is a simple truth:**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=a00dfece247f4d0297354f2590881399&_e=Cg-bnlxSqEO8kN1wjtKxb4iGuPojIRbewxlBDnGOjn-21KKrVW9eonXmLfN5ZB9ASCNCFxxFcQd0G-hPt8l5FLRtYT-HTBF7oTSgLNx0_8a7NalXvJAcoAduE1kmB6GvLniR20GKFfJvLip0YOt5fyRiZnb1LBYD5TfywZiNm2vhjaugfj6jFdsv-fcvCnjMEYz1zUIqiD5hAKepbYXSXMS8jb4KedRDTf9uHWXDLVNaErJgRC6U7xz1KIHPnQOsgvfF_c1Y1ZSUMUGF3qTqsJZXPxchGANx01vTmFK8qNndbsilD2-33SDviV71nApTr61mBwAdP6fqz4vp5vBCr_HAHNw4_6N7XgWbjucB5JLtH4Q_h_Zt-qDBSxv6xrKm) America is the freest, most powerful, most successful nation in the history of world - but we cannot maintain that status if we are led by politicians who hate the very foundations that made us who we are!

[** SUPPORT MIKE JOHNSON > **](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=a00dfece247f4d0297354f2590881399&_e=Cg-bnlxSqEO8kN1wjtKxb4iGuPojIRbewxlBDnGOjn-21KKrVW9eonXmLfN5ZB9ASCNCFxxFcQd0G-hPt8l5FLRtYT-HTBF7oTSgLNx0_8a7NalXvJAcoAduE1kmB6GvLniR20GKFfJvLip0YOt5fyRiZnb1LBYD5TfywZiNm2vhjaugfj6jFdsv-fcvCnjMEYz1zUIqiD5hAKepbYXSXMS8jb4KedRDTf9uHWXDLVMhbbfBmcFGA-Jt1s8_grIes9xRQSZ4fE9bJTIjWUw70_D-ogCPQdWir5yQ66Y5d2Y5TqUIT9dXs2GEX0rFQK2zmAgAZDWCXeZJGIpju70tFHcXZlATn3swPUVJKHI-RiF19GlU7qALULnFwVLYoSYS)

Right now in America, children are being taught in many schools to be ashamed of their country and themselves. The pledge is being taken out of school because it mentions God. Free speech is being censored and silenced right before our eyes. Democrats are fighting for the right to elective abortion right up to the moment of birth. Unelected, unaccountable bureaucrats are seeking control of almost every aspect of our lives.

**This is simply un-American, and we must stop the madness.**

We must elect more leaders who make decisions based on American values with an emphasis on God, family, and country. It's the only way to preserve the blessings we have been given here.

[**Today, to continue to help lead this critical fight, I need your financial support - to restore our country and defend our values. Can you make a donation immediately?**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=a00dfece247f4d0297354f2590881399&_e=Cg-bnlxSqEO8kN1wjtKxb4iGuPojIRbewxlBDnGOjn-21KKrVW9eonXmLfN5ZB9ASCNCFxxFcQd0G-hPt8l5FLRtYT-HTBF7oTSgLNx0_8a7NalXvJAcoAduE1kmB6GvLniR20GKFfJvLip0YOt5fyRiZnb1LBYD5TfywZiNm2vhjaugfj6jFdsv-fcvCnjMEYz1zUIqiD5hAKepbYXSXMS8jb4KedRDTf9uHWXDLVPyevqdQBe1gBWscu8-oeG6OGOV5q8KIkl6g6UEn3b1b9TA2k0l_0pieu2xO5FxAVAZc8rR4fkX90pxXzg2-fGiTZLYfkKvRdWZgPk_cbIQDi7PnBbDlr5nWJ03C30W-VvjWQ7RB4YwL88wZgHQIHXh)

[**We simply must make a change before it 's too late.**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=a00dfece247f4d0297354f2590881399&_e=Cg-bnlxSqEO8kN1wjtKxb4iGuPojIRbewxlBDnGOjn-21KKrVW9eonXmLfN5ZB9ASCNCFxxFcQd0G-hPt8l5FLRtYT-HTBF7oTSgLNx0_8a7NalXvJAcoAduE1kmB6GvLniR20GKFfJvLip0YOt5fyRiZnb1LBYD5TfywZiNm2vhjaugfj6jFdsv-fcvCnjMEYz1zUIqiD5hAKepbYXSXMS8jb4KedRDTf9uHWXDLVM4LVfpbwWcqMtbhCQDIMtqTxVwxYE1AKxreortzl08IBvjJP7IEVfL4LpRrxQIDlSTID8xT-6ur7r7d2dI-_-0G8D4Iv75R5wIbEPuN3cmvJ6kt7MOagdQDHwM8gGn37NufZmygPRF4sadqO0p0Gu6)

I made a promise when I was first elected to do what is best for our country, and for Louisiana, and I intend to keep that promise. It's why I have been a trusted ally of President Donald Trump, who selected me for critical positions and endorsed all of my campaigns. It's also why I was elected by my colleagues to serve as Vice Chairman of the House Republican Conference - one of seven elected leadership positions for Republicans in the House - and to chair the Subcommittee on the Constitution and Civil Liberties in the prestigious Judiciary Committee.

We are working in Congress every day to defend our conservative way of life and lead the fight for freedom, [**but we cannot do it alone.**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=a00dfece247f4d0297354f2590881399&_e=Cg-bnlxSqEO8kN1wjtKxb4iGuPojIRbewxlBDnGOjn-21KKrVW9eonXmLfN5ZB9ASCNCFxxFcQd0G-hPt8l5FLRtYT-HTBF7oTSgLNx0_8a7NalXvJAcoAduE1kmB6GvLniR20GKFfJvLip0YOt5fyRiZnb1LBYD5TfywZiNm2vhjaugfj6jFdsv-fcvCnjMEYz1zUIqiD5hAKepbYXSXMS8jb4KedRDTf9uHWXDLVNcw7lPENXEHoNZNArC49hdbCXe0tLklYzgZXn9YBrrh2Mclr0AZSJtsAlikqGMWy5GyLsmtEJaE1BGJbrVeSl1U-BEnhhrc-X01Ze7DxgO5zK02Z_D60vx9s7aPvZ0__0Gem9oRpSOiLVR-bAcfHyt)

[** CHIP IN > **](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=a00dfece247f4d0297354f2590881399&_e=Cg-bnlxSqEO8kN1wjtKxb4iGuPojIRbewxlBDnGOjn-21KKrVW9eonXmLfN5ZB9ASCNCFxxFcQd0G-hPt8l5FLRtYT-HTBF7oTSgLNx0_8a7NalXvJAcoAduE1kmB6GvLniR20GKFfJvLip0YOt5fyRiZnb1LBYD5TfywZiNm2vhjaugfj6jFdsv-fcvCnjMEYz1zUIqiD5hAKepbYXSXMS8jb4KedRDTf9uHWXDLVNxbMsPQwo0TL9pSBG31HUnZRDHJKssDWxr-puAVHZqTax8XLOS7dJxqDk_v7UtFwSNeaHzZXALII2c-UGfUMWFAtITKNgxNhq5myirGlunFGzbywGjGNOLv0qlx3gLcvko_Wtx10wRC4hnVRPI2_wI)

The path we're on currently will lead us to destruction. But that outcome is not inevitable. We still have the ability to turn this country around-- IF conscientious conservatives across America will stand up RIGHT NOW.

We MUST act, and we must do so today.

[**Can you pitch in right now to help save our country, Fellow American?**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=a00dfece247f4d0297354f2590881399&_e=Cg-bnlxSqEO8kN1wjtKxb4iGuPojIRbewxlBDnGOjn-21KKrVW9eonXmLfN5ZB9ASCNCFxxFcQd0G-hPt8l5FLRtYT-HTBF7oTSgLNx0_8a7NalXvJAcoAduE1kmB6GvLniR20GKFfJvLip0YOt5fyRiZnb1LBYD5TfywZiNm2vhjaugfj6jFdsv-fcvCnjMEYz1zUIqiD5hAKepbYXSXMS8jb4KedRDTf9uHWXDLVOx6VsFbG-6YLHZTFIethFlKCQ-Y2x3c6v4_3YC16pmbnFjxrJ-P7Ev9U_nvwQwuwM2GTfBJxSarbSuRBxS6S3RDiSsod8iwxE3wYxLHsHIC-iFVeSgt-GvazswOHb3iXWcb9NPqOKvbEiTKPwjRIAP)

clean_body: I believe to my core that the most important things in life are God, family, and pride in our country. These are the values that guide me and shape my life. | Fellow American, The most important things in life are faith, family, and freedom. That's not just a slogan, these happen to be the foundations of our great country. That is why I am fighting every day to preserve them. Faith. Our nation began with the bold declaration that all men are created equal by God, and that our rights derive from Him and not the government. The founders insisted that faith must remain central to our national identity because, as George Washington summarized, "religion and morality are indispensable supports" of our republic. Like so many American households through the generations, in our house we instill faith in the hearts of our children, serve God, and serve people. Family. Stable, happy families are the basis of any thriving society, and public policy should always acknowledge this obvious truth. Strengthening the nuclear family should be a top priority, and government should get out of the way and respect parental rights. Kelly and I have been very intentional about passing along the values of hard work, honor, and sacrifice to our children, just as our parents passed them along to us. For nearly two and a half centuries, this has been the American way. Freedom. It is a self-evident truth that God endows all of us with inherent freedoms, such as the natural and unalienable rights to life, liberty, conscience, and the ability to pursue happiness, own property, build wealth and defend ourselves and our families. The purpose of government is to secure these rights, and the ideas we advance should always aim to maintain and increase the liberty of the American people. I've devoted my life and career to fighting for those fundamental freedoms and traditional values, first in the courts as a constitutional law attorney, and now in the Congress. America is the freest, most powerful, most successful nation in the history of world - but we cannot maintain that status if we are led by politicians who hate the very foundations that made us who we are! Right now in America, children are being taught in many schools to be ashamed of their country and themselves. The pledge is being taken out of school because it mentions God. Free speech is being censored and silenced right before our eyes. Democrats are fighting for the right to elective abortion right up to the moment of birth. Unelected, unaccountable bureaucrats are seeking control of almost every aspect of our lives. This is simply un-American, and we must stop the madness. We must elect more leaders who make decisions based on American values with an emphasis on God, family, and country. It's the only way to preserve the blessings we have been given here. Fellow American, we have a chance to save our country from the radical Left that is aiming to destroy it, but we're running out of time. I'm not sure what version of America we will leave to our kids if we continue down this path. I made a promise when I was first elected to do what is best for our country, and for Louisiana, and I intend to keep that promise. It's why I have been a trusted ally of President Donald Trump, who selected me for critical positions and endorsed all of my campaigns. It's also why I was elected by my colleagues to serve as Vice Chairman of the House Republican Conference - one of seven elected leadership positions for Republicans in the House - and to chair the Subcommittee on the Constitution and Civil Liberties in the prestigious Judiciary Committee. We are working in Congress every day to defend our conservative way of life and lead the fight for freedom, The path we're on currently will lead us to destruction. But that outcome is not inevitable. We still have the ability to turn this country around-- IF conscientious conservatives across America will stand up RIGHT NOW. We MUST act, and we must do so today. Thank you for all you do, and God bless. Mike Johnson Speaker of the House | MIKE JOHNSON * Mike is a dedicated husband and father of four, as well as a constitutional law attorney who has devoted his life and career to fighting for the fundamental freedoms and traditional values that have always been a priority to the people of Louisiana. | PAID FOR BY MIKE JOHNSON FOR LOUISIANA Reclaiming American Freedom 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

‘Paranoia’: Public Safety Officials Believe Mental Health Issues
Plagued Maine Mass Shooter

The suspect of the Lewiston, Maine, mass shooting struggled with
mental health issues, specifically “paranoia,” public safety officials
announced on Saturday. Robert Card, the suspect named by police, shot
and killed 18 individuals and wounded 13 more on Wednesday evening at
a bowling alley and bar.

NYC Shipping Migrants Out With One-Way Plane Tickets Because There’s
‘No More Room’

New York City is giving free plane tickets to leave the nation’s
largest metro area because it has run out of space for migrants, a
city spokesperson told The City. The city has opened a “reticketing
center” where they’re offering flights for migrants to go to any
destination in the world, according to The City.

name: 4Patriots
subject: Important Food Shortage Notice
body:
This might be your only warning.

**The Truth About The Coming Food Crisis** **This might be your only warning.** According to official reports, dangerous global events have reached America, putting the entire nation in harm's way. Despite this imminent crisis, mainstream media remains silent... And our own government ignores dire warnings of industry experts like fourth-generation American farmers who warn: **_" Food shortages are coming."_** Imagine the panic of seeing empty grocery store shelves, not for a few days, but for several weeks or even months. The loss will be beyond what you can imagine. **As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever.** If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to go hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like...
* Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life - depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired...
* Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick...
* Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means you risk becoming malnourished...

**Well, no need to worry anymore.** Obviously, waiting for the government to give me a handout in a disaster just wasn't an option for me. And I was completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by some companies. That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of these best-selling [**Survival Food Kits**](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9dd3666098b045048b4bd47a4545834c&_e=uYNCBEwOF6ADlUu_LPElhBkCHFjMd3eivOz4z-q0T8Azw10y-qCg_QBp_KRtJQJBBPcHgeNhz6nZ9F2mO53I4UAet71nvpDB_pqt-7a2v1Ol3SWC12NKokCQ_Mfz4OsOtC8GoWOTXLwCGJKnfJuAm7zv8jQR1B8FwT9A2P65dhqaXU1asDQDmypuiQu1wdb9VzdXSjMxyCy2SvbXmDhdRkxjdo7x5-deOA-pRxLb5UeLa3JuVffcUBC_aTb8BeXp6wZaru4JZwqLyeQcvoNzCyyWTmJbPFPQgZTWRgTUycI_I8sRw7W-Pv3qNBzNZfx9). When you secure your own food stockpile, you will have the peace of mind and security knowing that when a crisis hits... clean_body: This might be your only warning. The Truth About The Coming Food Crisis This might be your only warning. According to official reports, dangerous global events have reached America, putting the entire nation in harm's way. Despite this imminent crisis, mainstream media remains silent... And our own government ignores dire warnings of industry experts like fourth-generation American farmers who warn: " Food shortages are coming." Imagine the panic of seeing empty grocery store shelves, not for a few days, but for several weeks or even months. The loss will be beyond what you can imagine. As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever. If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to go hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like... Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life - depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired... Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick... Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means you risk becoming malnourished... Well, no need to worry anymore.** Obviously, waiting for the government to give me a handout in a disaster just wasn't an option for me. And I was completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by some companies. That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of these best-selling . Fellow American,

To my core, I believe the most important things in life are **faith, family, and freedom** - _but those foundations of our great country are under attack._

Right now, in America, children are being taught in many schools to be ashamed of their country and themselves. The pledge is being taken out of school because it mentions God. Free speech is being censored and silenced right before our eyes. Democrats are fighting for the right to elective abortion right up to the moment of birth. Unelected, unaccountable bureaucrats are seeking control of almost every aspect of our lives.

**_This is simply un-American, and we must stop the madness._**

We must elect more leaders who make decisions based on American values with an emphasis on God, family, and country. It's the only way to preserve the blessings we have been given here.

[**Today, to continue to help lead this critical fight, I need your financial support - to restore our country and defend our values. Will you please stand with me immediately?**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7cbd09490b314210984ee0c32ea21dcd&_e=bBcHDT7APDg2jmbE9P7r610pyHBKV0PVTP45LqohCYBTGkAvwfaWTBr6_qFd5RFcYkRqncUv_RlqsuxRcH0ldng9DSzbMrQzyg3S3Nx4EjHDLmS8jmnS5Yvp0n4MYZRImXHhfFG9is0IuGCqp7__49Ltq9xXCvaFPblOQv0HozuuqC_9R82At8ibruvSD9LFqpSYLF74twgPy3MmRXTJD9LTXEb3H5zJOGcl__PmCHWO6N5wnMDdYAzFQSMHhDV1KMzeSkST9b5JehS58BxeAOXn9d5sQNI2BNmNXbs1u0pe-7UcS_hXfXJwwvyXINEECKYqc2m6JfmI_nkHb32JBO2aMo6buMImC5XPok4255ZOijikMVkjl3qXMA3Iv5kTt0A1LT298F8HQiiZlu1IoA%3D%3D)

[** CHIP IN > **](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7cbd09490b314210984ee0c32ea21dcd&_e=bBcHDT7APDg2jmbE9P7r610pyHBKV0PVTP45LqohCYBTGkAvwfaWTBr6_qFd5RFcYkRqncUv_RlqsuxRcH0ldng9DSzbMrQzyg3S3Nx4EjHDLmS8jmnS5Yvp0n4MYZRImXHhfFG9is0IuGCqp7__49Ltq9xXCvaFPblOQv0HozuuqC_9R82At8ibruvSD9LFqpSYLF74twgPy3MmRXTJD9LTXEb3H5zJOGcl__PmCHWO6N5wnMDdYAzFQSMHhDV1CBPdrCH641hLxejzExuJOTP36F-9x_g9YI0Wq7JI4C1gP-0ZIpOBQOpfBJ0RLSxaHGaJleLttEghwx7xQusGpIAMwqeNhsoGVC5i2KesziKYUJfSWmYOmLmju8Ud-W30bJBAaVI-w9fD4nRS-th1JA%3D%3D)

Fellow American, we have a chance to save our country from the radical Left that is aiming to destroy it, but we're running out of time. I'm not sure what version of America we will leave to our kids if we continue down this path. [**We simply must make a change before it 's too late.**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7cbd09490b314210984ee0c32ea21dcd&_e=bBcHDT7APDg2jmbE9P7r610pyHBKV0PVTP45LqohCYBTGkAvwfaWTBr6_qFd5RFcYkRqncUv_RlqsuxRcH0ldng9DSzbMrQzyg3S3Nx4EjHDLmS8jmnS5Yvp0n4MYZRImXHhfFG9is0IuGCqp7__49Ltq9xXCvaFPblOQv0HozuuqC_9R82At8ibruvSD9LFqpSYLF74twgPy3MmRXTJD9LTXEb3H5zJOGcl__PmCHWO6N5wnMDdYAzFQSMHhDV1whDX4zA_pajq4ZpA7ZNHAUxkUvMOsjlLMbnjw0XRI14lyp_bNg0t71UNG7YeGY29Cb7TUjqXHbDdLl073XOGloMPA2k2eb8rdxq-GAPtFndD4Wy2YUmegBM5aqDGuhjIWf8LER-Y6Os7rTD89QFc0A%3D%3D)

The path we're on currently will lead us to destruction. But that outcome is not inevitable. We still can turn this country around - _**IF**_ conscientious conservatives across America stand up RIGHT NOW.

We MUST act, and we must do so today.

[**Can you pitch in right now to help save our country?**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7cbd09490b314210984ee0c32ea21dcd&_e=bBcHDT7APDg2jmbE9P7r610pyHBKV0PVTP45LqohCYBTGkAvwfaWTBr6_qFd5RFcYkRqncUv_RlqsuxRcH0ldng9DSzbMrQzyg3S3Nx4EjHDLmS8jmnS5Yvp0n4MYZRImXHhfFG9is0IuGCqp7__49Ltq9xXCvaFPblOQv0HozuuqC_9R82At8ibruvSD9LFqpSYLF74twgPy3MmRXTJD9LTXEb3H5zJOGcl__PmCHWO6N5wnMDdYAzFQSMHhDV1fYkXXhn3PB_8mqa5pf1FMVI93fBGVSA5XYV98P8PELkKwo_7pWbcms3y3rYumW5JJxTG8hYJbQE9UZEzcsZSb8ItwEhahY6WylYgE2pbVDBq84vEgiZ-_U5AQk08lEJsGDRWkGS2lyoM8wOtrLOmyg%3D%3D)

| Friend,
**I went inside the US Capitol on January 6, 2021...** to support President Trump and stand up for fair elections in this country.
I was sentenced to**30 days in federal prison** on a petty misdemeanor charge for “picketing” because of it.
(10 of those days, I even spent in solitary confinement, because I refused to take the Covid shot.)
**But I don’t regret one single minute of it,** because I know that standing for what’s right is ALWAYS the right thing to do...no matter what.
I’m running for Congress because I think our nation would be a hell of a lot better off if politicians in Washington _actually stood with and stood by their principles._
My name is Chuck Hand and I’m writing to you today because **[I’ve been told you’re the kind of person who’s always ready to help a real conservative fight for this country.](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8kMHOlTAQhZ9m2EHKtIXLgoVKrgsTlyauSJkWqFLKP1Dxf3vDFd2e82W-kzFhW_z43kL9ERBnb3dABPkBEN--n4HTj_Dlc46_v-Vv1degrxI_AeLxvrn_5H2kcMH45UrrLrOtHK1QmWvLqnnousFSZ3NrZGnHhxms1I3URI2rFNGAYlQVDbrOfIsCZSmwKUspdFMoqYSw46CsI1KPAZR4eQoTHHsy5X6chjnGUFAM2dLOx7Htr2FPwOfuKLErTr-ysxcB-KQ50c98NqvNx8j55CJP3ryKceptXPsY-pN79ytfVt0P3P_bBPLJ10H26wSyOzg5wMqEmNYDZIcasEpH6PeYmBzIbqXljoKzPgWQ3cB3QiZsxk8ryO6v6TJcprs_HF_8yWXGrd1Ovyx-r2pQYno9gGL4EwAA__8ETo0N)**
**[Could you pitch in just a couple bucks to help me launch my campaign for Congress...](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8kMHOlTAQhZ9m2EHKtIXLgoVKrgsTlyauSJkWqFLKP1Dxf3vDFd2e82W-kzFhW_z43kL9ERBnb3dABPkBEN--n4HTj_Dlc46_v-Vv1degrxI_AeLxvrn_5H2kcMH45UrrLrOtHK1QmWvLqnnousFSZ3NrZGnHhxms1I3URI2rFNGAYlQVDbrOfIsCZSmwKUspdFMoqYSw46CsI1KPAZR4eQoTHHsy5X6chjnGUFAM2dLOx7Htr2FPwOfuKLErTr-ysxcB-KQ50c98NqvNx8j55CJP3ryKceptXPsY-pN79ytfVt0P3P_bBPLJ10H26wSyOzg5wMqEmNYDZIcasEpH6PeYmBzIbqXljoKzPgWQ3cB3QiZsxk8ryO6v6TJcprs_HF_8yWXGrd1Ovyx-r2pQYno9gGL4EwAA__8ETo0N)** and help me _finally_ give a real voice to the working men and women that make up this nation?
**[Donate here if you can. A couple bucks would be a huge help.](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8kMHOlTAQhZ9m2EHKtIXLgoVKrgsTlyauSJkWqFLKP1Dxf3vDFd2e82W-kzFhW_z43kL9ERBnb3dABPkBEN--n4HTj_Dlc46_v-Vv1degrxI_AeLxvrn_5H2kcMH45UrrLrOtHK1QmWvLqnnousFSZ3NrZGnHhxms1I3URI2rFNGAYlQVDbrOfIsCZSmwKUspdFMoqYSw46CsI1KPAZR4eQoTHHsy5X6chjnGUFAM2dLOx7Htr2FPwOfuKLErTr-ysxcB-KQ50c98NqvNx8j55CJP3ryKceptXPsY-pN79ytfVt0P3P_bBPLJ10H26wSyOzg5wMqEmNYDZIcasEpH6PeYmBzIbqXljoKzPgWQ3cB3QiZsxk8ryO6v6TJcprs_HF_8yWXGrd1Ovyx-r2pQYno9gGL4EwAA__8ETo0N)**
As you can guess, we have **_zero_** support from the GOP Establishment and a whole lot of big guns pointed at us from the Far-Left.
I’d say they’re treating me like a joke...that they don’t _really_ think a guy who works in construction in one of the poorest districts in America has a snowball’s chance in hell...
**_...but they know better._**
After the last few years of conservative wins,**they _absolutely_ believe a Trump-loving, conservative-thinking “deplorable” like me can win. ** That’s why they’re already firing everything they’ve got at me. | | | | [STAND WITH ME IN THIS FIGHT!](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8kMHOlTAQhZ9m2EHKtIXLgoVKrgsTlyauSJkWqFLKP1Dxf3vDFd2e82W-kzFhW_z43kL9ERBnb3dABPkBEN--n4HTj_Dlc46_v-Vv1degrxI_AeLxvrn_5H2kcMH45UrrLrOtHK1QmWvLqnnousFSZ3NrZGnHhxms1I3URI2rFNGAYlQVDbrOfIsCZSmwKUspdFMoqYSw46CsI1KPAZR4eQoTHHsy5X6chjnGUFAM2dLOx7Htr2FPwOfuKLErTr-ysxcB-KQ50c98NqvNx8j55CJP3ryKceptXPsY-pN79ytfVt0P3P_bBPLJ10H26wSyOzg5wMqEmNYDZIcasEpH6PeYmBzIbqXljoKzPgWQ3cB3QiZsxk8ryO6v6TJcprs_HF_8yWXGrd1Ovyx-r2pQYno9gGL4EwAA__8ETo0N)

They know that, when I make it to Washington, I’m going to be the biggest headache they’ve ever seen...

...because I’ll force the Establishment to **look straight in the eye** with the American majority they’ve been screwing over for decades.

They don’t want you to have a voice, ever again. **I _refuse_ to be silent.**

But making it to Washington is tough as hell for people like you and me...and **I can only win if I can depend on your help.**

I know times are tight, and I know you’re just hearing from me for the first time.

But if you think we need more people like me in Washington, **[I hope you’ll pitch in even just a dollar or two to help me prove that I can win this thing.](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8kMHOlTAQhZ9m2EHKtIXLgoVKrgsTlyauSJkWqFLKP1Dxf3vDFd2e82W-kzFhW_z43kL9ERBnb3dABPkBEN--n4HTj_Dlc46_v-Vv1degrxI_AeLxvrn_5H2kcMH45UrrLrOtHK1QmWvLqnnousFSZ3NrZGnHhxms1I3URI2rFNGAYlQVDbrOfIsCZSmwKUspdFMoqYSw46CsI1KPAZR4eQoTHHsy5X6chjnGUFAM2dLOx7Htr2FPwOfuKLErTr-ysxcB-KQ50c98NqvNx8j55CJP3ryKceptXPsY-pN79ytfVt0P3P_bBPLJ10H26wSyOzg5wMqEmNYDZIcasEpH6PeYmBzIbqXljoKzPgWQ3cB3QiZsxk8ryO6v6TJcprs_HF_8yWXGrd1Ovyx-r2pQYno9gGL4EwAA__8ETo0N)**

**[Make your donation using this secure link.](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8kMHOlTAQhZ9m2EHKtIXLgoVKrgsTlyauSJkWqFLKP1Dxf3vDFd2e82W-kzFhW_z43kL9ERBnb3dABPkBEN--n4HTj_Dlc46_v-Vv1degrxI_AeLxvrn_5H2kcMH45UrrLrOtHK1QmWvLqnnousFSZ3NrZGnHhxms1I3URI2rFNGAYlQVDbrOfIsCZSmwKUspdFMoqYSw46CsI1KPAZR4eQoTHHsy5X6chjnGUFAM2dLOx7Htr2FPwOfuKLErTr-ysxcB-KQ50c98NqvNx8j55CJP3ryKceptXPsY-pN79ytfVt0P3P_bBPLJ10H26wSyOzg5wMqEmNYDZIcasEpH6PeYmBzIbqXljoKzPgWQ3cB3QiZsxk8ryO6v6TJcprs_HF_8yWXGrd1Ovyx-r2pQYno9gGL4EwAA__8ETo0N)**

Chuck

Fellow American,

To my core, I believe the most important things in life are **faith, family, and freedom** - _but those foundations of our great country are under attack._

Right now, in America, children are being taught in many schools to be ashamed of their country and themselves. The pledge is being taken out of school because it mentions God. Free speech is being censored and silenced right before our eyes. Democrats are fighting for the right to elective abortion right up to the moment of birth. Unelected, unaccountable bureaucrats are seeking control of almost every aspect of our lives.

**_This is simply un-American, and we must stop the madness._**

We must elect more leaders who make decisions based on American values with an emphasis on God, family, and country. It’s the only way to preserve the blessings we have been given here.

[**Today, to continue to help lead this critical fight, I need your financial support – to restore our country and defend our values. Will you please stand with me immediately?**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=2b7d42f65aca48a8861e8ac34e84d568&_e=EGWH_C5MZV_Hnf2yd7UNOkVHT4eW8V-lW9n6s1Ogm-N1qmReXLZxjqxXaHwePDXSF8VfiT2d_rbIRTuiw2onCFbmTh5OYNtzo22zrBsr-MTZHz4ziR7GmRJGZzNVmvZ0SnqQvrRm9LmuSfLoLt7484mx1vQWUvEafBwweIjRImeBZ5aK6jmDJMewIUeMNoR_UHBPZ30HSlEEr2XLIygRRgZuHeS1M-x69TXI5og05PbjTzb2sX6ynEhsgUcJszKYbwoHc1SSHvYUOtErDitvUVwrIz0uWoc8nXU244A1HBX5gpuTb9hNC81uRElD6WBqMjK7VCWpTREKY9eECGWQPmtBqgOiqcElbHliEN1xgJk8RZS73fs627pQlqYKcGIiesrYlRsT41dSD1ajB9YEkQ%3D%3D)

[** CHIP IN > **](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=2b7d42f65aca48a8861e8ac34e84d568&_e=EGWH_C5MZV_Hnf2yd7UNOkVHT4eW8V-lW9n6s1Ogm-N1qmReXLZxjqxXaHwePDXSF8VfiT2d_rbIRTuiw2onCFbmTh5OYNtzo22zrBsr-MTZHz4ziR7GmRJGZzNVmvZ0SnqQvrRm9LmuSfLoLt7484mx1vQWUvEafBwweIjRImeBZ5aK6jmDJMewIUeMNoR_UHBPZ30HSlEEr2XLIygRRgZuHeS1M-x69TXI5og05PbjTzb2sX6ynEhsgUcJszKYLZphKzZDDup6BKJw83dRnTuA1bBeopplooBz9TCEP8pBX7LwSqwxMHjdHRd19km4XeD2WjT5_YUSd98VDP73xGzdHPid7Zpp4soBFsukH5wFUEuSiChHUBHlvJpYeGuHewzLfj7dvoAscJebxdVKjw%3D%3D)

Fellow American, we have a chance to save our country from the radical Left that is aiming to destroy it, but we’re running out of time. I’m not sure what version of America we will leave to our kids if we continue down this path. [**We simply must make a change before it’s too late.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=2b7d42f65aca48a8861e8ac34e84d568&_e=EGWH_C5MZV_Hnf2yd7UNOkVHT4eW8V-lW9n6s1Ogm-N1qmReXLZxjqxXaHwePDXSF8VfiT2d_rbIRTuiw2onCFbmTh5OYNtzo22zrBsr-MTZHz4ziR7GmRJGZzNVmvZ0SnqQvrRm9LmuSfLoLt7484mx1vQWUvEafBwweIjRImeBZ5aK6jmDJMewIUeMNoR_UHBPZ30HSlEEr2XLIygRRgZuHeS1M-x69TXI5og05PbjTzb2sX6ynEhsgUcJszKY3RMK-bR2DdmGawU-uzEHECaPbYmDBiQ_qyk0aReKjCNZsXJIa5kN2GtQmM-AEDQjQsWLZJtdnJSmUrzxQYWoY7-JEK1ZfWSVFlTt4r9jyq3b0DJ56-0kSzpNBlJWW_oMUVtwisVq5OH4dP2JY1jiDw%3D%3D)

The path we’re on currently will lead us to destruction. But that outcome is not inevitable. We still can turn this country around - _**IF**_ conscientious conservatives across America stand up RIGHT NOW.

We MUST act, and we must do so today.

[**Can you pitch in right now to help save our country?**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=2b7d42f65aca48a8861e8ac34e84d568&_e=EGWH_C5MZV_Hnf2yd7UNOkVHT4eW8V-lW9n6s1Ogm-N1qmReXLZxjqxXaHwePDXSF8VfiT2d_rbIRTuiw2onCFbmTh5OYNtzo22zrBsr-MTZHz4ziR7GmRJGZzNVmvZ0SnqQvrRm9LmuSfLoLt7484mx1vQWUvEafBwweIjRImeBZ5aK6jmDJMewIUeMNoR_UHBPZ30HSlEEr2XLIygRRgZuHeS1M-x69TXI5og05PbjTzb2sX6ynEhsgUcJszKYOZ4zndxQRRMBp1CPp_W0TgKtk89HirXtOcgcUsjDESmb7Y2jmkX1Vi8D6Uj5Av34wfLWJ9St9HrkbUeK5Rd5KLXGBw1WytedqpcDN7L2BDGhVdQfexT9MBKoN_O7eOpx6FhHTCaFKqx8x4P5dtsnBg%3D%3D)

[** STAND WITH SPEAKER JOHNSON > **](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=2b7d42f65aca48a8861e8ac34e84d568&_e=EGWH_C5MZV_Hnf2yd7UNOkVHT4eW8V-lW9n6s1Ogm-N1qmReXLZxjqxXaHwePDXSF8VfiT2d_rbIRTuiw2onCFbmTh5OYNtzo22zrBsr-MTZHz4ziR7GmRJGZzNVmvZ0SnqQvrRm9LmuSfLoLt7484mx1vQWUvEafBwweIjRImeBZ5aK6jmDJMewIUeMNoR_UHBPZ30HSlEEr2XLIygRRgZuHeS1M-x69TXI5og05PbjTzb2sX6ynEhsgUcJszKYAPlT1OEQVF_WaiLi4PDiRX9P1PA5bXnAH0eYt-OGnQ5jhn05G2uJQacWG6uaku4B3IlrYLDZIiIzPOG_B4fbwhZBnuD3-s93E7p69pJ8bYKBYKYpvUvx79d1zZ_VllnzDOvaeDWmU5IAMCojK3xDTw%3D%3D)

Thank you for all you do, and God bless.

clean_body: We must elect more leaders who make decisions based on American values with an emphasis on God, family, and country. It’s the only way to preserve the blessings we have been given here. | | Fellow American, To my core, I believe the most important things in life are faith, family, and freedom - but those foundations of our great country are under attack. Right now, in America, children are being taught in many schools to be ashamed of their country and themselves. The pledge is being taken out of school because it mentions God. Free speech is being censored and silenced right before our eyes. Democrats are fighting for the right to elective abortion right up to the moment of birth. Unelected, unaccountable bureaucrats are seeking control of almost every aspect of our lives. This is simply un-American, and we must stop the madness. We must elect more leaders who make decisions based on American values with an emphasis on God, family, and country. It’s the only way to preserve the blessings we have been given here. Fellow American, we have a chance to save our country from the radical Left that is aiming to destroy it, but we’re running out of time. I’m not sure what version of America we will leave to our kids if we continue down this path. The path we’re on currently will lead us to destruction. But that outcome is not inevitable. We still can turn this country around - IF conscientious conservatives across America stand up RIGHT NOW. We MUST act, and we must do so today. Thank you for all you do, and God bless. Mike Johnson Speaker of the House | MIKE JOHNSON * Mike is a dedicated husband and father of four, as well as a constitutional law attorney who has devoted his life and career to fighting for the fundamental freedoms and traditional values that have always been a priority to the people of Louisiana. | PAID FOR BY MIKE JOHNSON FOR LOUISIANA Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but .

subject: 📧 New Message for you...

clean_body: We have exactly 9 days until Election Day. If we want any chance of securing victory, we need to heed President Biden’s call and get the job done. So, can you chip in? | | | | | ---|--- 🚨 There are 9 days until Election Day 🚨 9 days – that’s all we have left to make an impact on Election Day. subject: Introducing myself
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MIKE JOHNSON FOR LOUISIANA
body:
We must elect more leaders who make decisions based on American values with an emphasis on God, family, and country. It's the only way to preserve the blessings we have been given here.

| [ ](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e509b746bad64adcb0c1c79c0d57c2ad&_e=CNF6cPi76W6fK88MhLziHpoUpJsKB-yrUbzcWpFIJFlsfbqZtzNcIkHtvzjZQpAsC4ycGMUEG0ucXZTINTBnE5ZcVAoPsUSYwLnPzbQslzrYXDjQfbT3jutNr2qG7MMhxng_np7-yZarvkfYVKIMTdhcoJ8LepHO7TL3S_8drv6WOc0coeaEgs50g5d-VP0bWLxyaRECPLSSoXIzRq2RHGc8AK0LXgsjgnBipMx6HCQ9dHdERMfxuoo8FB-mSRGYukthKn9wMbDWv_WIVx-Y3LQDT4oXFe9HoUAgWWep17v6h6VpEZUhYoQK1mz9YdPktPfof_fejJmOXWWhEMHhOCo6TNtU2w60hL093E3McF3dfsSpyrQ1nNi8R37QgsxSVbdVKfg_himYZouqt0XXNQ%3D%3D)
---
Fellow American,

To my core, I believe the most important things in life are **faith, family, and freedom** - _but those foundations of our great country are under attack._

Right now, in America, children are being taught in many schools to be ashamed of their country and themselves. The pledge is being taken out of school because it mentions God. Free speech is being censored and silenced right before our eyes. Democrats are fighting for the right to elective abortion right up to the moment of birth. Unelected, unaccountable bureaucrats are seeking control of almost every aspect of our lives.

**_This is simply un-American, and we must stop the madness._**

We must elect more leaders who make decisions based on American values with an emphasis on God, family, and country. It's the only way to preserve the blessings we have been given here.

[**Today, to continue to help lead this critical fight, I need your financial support - to restore our country and defend our values. Will you please stand with me immediately?**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e509b746bad64adcb0c1c79c0d57c2ad&_e=CNF6cPi76W6fK88MhLziHpoUpJsKB-yrUbzcWpFIJFlsfbqZtzNcIkHtvzjZQpAsC4ycGMUEG0ucXZTINTBnE5ZcVAoPsUSYwLnPzbQslzrYXDjQfbT3jutNr2qG7MMhxng_np7-yZarvkfYVKIMTdhcoJ8LepHO7TL3S_8drv6WOc0coeaEgs50g5d-VP0bWLxyaRECPLSSoXIzRq2RHGc8AK0LXgsjgnBipMx6HCQ9dHdERMfxuoo8FB-mSRGYeUMsoH012HM4jlkXcun9p2eCdFS7J27C8J9SiY2323erpc9NrhYQwE7eyqlBTiZPpYQqjuRzdurtVF7V7RxDUaaeeczVyn8t4LQwwKn3KwP2U3k5z2z5VISEvM2gjkpSR7PnkloVYTFDVTmHeyNjmA%3D%3D)

[** CHIP IN > **](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e509b746bad64adcb0c1c79c0d57c2ad&_e=CNF6cPi76W6fK88MhLziHpoUpJsKB-yrUbzcWpFIJFlsfbqZtzNcIkHtvzjZQpAsC4ycGMUEG0ucXZTINTBnE5ZcVAoPsUSYwLnPzbQslzrYXDjQfbT3jutNr2qG7MMhxng_np7-yZarvkfYVKIMTdhcoJ8LepHO7TL3S_8drv6WOc0coeaEgs50g5d-VP0bWLxyaRECPLSSoXIzRq2RHGc8AK0LXgsjgnBipMx6HCQ9dHdERMfxuoo8FB-mSRGYRVxKH9LXafYGbiH6mXfqFtxbbtHvojSenDSGuu7RGQ4j_baGnARpwJ419rav1Zi5dhLE9WVuSvCTrxqVMoTPhBwGGiwZnwCmmnxGEwIJWxLb2HXtsXmcszoBH_KNKRDCDHVQbkUyNkgmEfme9pnlJw%3D%3D)

Fellow American, we have a chance to save our country from the radical Left that is aiming to destroy it, but we're running out of time. I'm not sure what version of America we will leave to our kids if we continue down this path. [**We simply must make a change before it 's too late.**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e509b746bad64adcb0c1c79c0d57c2ad&_e=CNF6cPi76W6fK88MhLziHpoUpJsKB-yrUbzcWpFIJFlsfbqZtzNcIkHtvzjZQpAsC4ycGMUEG0ucXZTINTBnE5ZcVAoPsUSYwLnPzbQslzrYXDjQfbT3jutNr2qG7MMhxng_np7-yZarvkfYVKIMTdhcoJ8LepHO7TL3S_8drv6WOc0coeaEgs50g5d-VP0bWLxyaRECPLSSoXIzRq2RHGc8AK0LXgsjgnBipMx6HCQ9dHdERMfxuoo8FB-mSRGYva7KWSZ6aXw-Al7GFm11FVLhq9aSNb_QoW-CP38D-J22okItVQqUu16MTDflYZRsXlzW84l2Ghc6cltVP_vcHXlCVw4Fb1IH5LL_9EmEczw7lbzddqODNYA7q9uADLk05ojVmGsnlhfPiqO59PPWpA%3D%3D)

The path we're on currently will lead us to destruction. But that outcome is not inevitable. We still can turn this country around - _**IF**_ conscientious conservatives across America stand up RIGHT NOW.

We MUST act, and we must do so today.

[**Can you pitch in right now to help save our country?**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e509b746bad64adcb0c1c79c0d57c2ad&_e=CNF6cPi76W6fK88MhLziHpoUpJsKB-yrUbzcWpFIJFlsfbqZtzNcIkHtvzjZQpAsC4ycGMUEG0ucXZTINTBnE5ZcVAoPsUSYwLnPzbQslzrYXDjQfbT3jutNr2qG7MMhxng_np7-yZarvkfYVKIMTdhcoJ8LepHO7TL3S_8drv6WOc0coeaEgs50g5d-VP0bWLxyaRECPLSSoXIzRq2RHGc8AK0LXgsjgnBipMx6HCQ9dHdERMfxuoo8FB-mSRGYtnJMbhyFn1U9h684X6HUNs4QYyEXWqxurOUSZwT-ti3vxP7uRBocalUavstR6X4XsAYgS3CilrUgFror5O74q3Y9qPu5U3iIGT6snU-n9wCUiXikSkLZzBB6sZea-bfn5GI4mjWk_0iQUX4Jgi9ong%3D%3D)

[** STAND WITH SPEAKER JOHNSON > **](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e509b746bad64adcb0c1c79c0d57c2ad&_e=CNF6cPi76W6fK88MhLziHpoUpJsKB-yrUbzcWpFIJFlsfbqZtzNcIkHtvzjZQpAsC4ycGMUEG0ucXZTINTBnE5ZcVAoPsUSYwLnPzbQslzrYXDjQfbT3jutNr2qG7MMhxng_np7-yZarvkfYVKIMTdhcoJ8LepHO7TL3S_8drv6WOc0coeaEgs50g5d-VP0bWLxyaRECPLSSoXIzRq2RHGc8AK0LXgsjgnBipMx6HCQ9dHdERMfxuoo8FB-mSRGYZyTdEi4DR0Ww5bZDf7GhBA6rWyfV2OC0HxNZ_DQMJ4OjRH_EdyOiFC_7HfKUSi_gUybKCHvB8e5Z-7vHHQUlfUPr3YuNfN3EpLCawngwIvFzgsbETs1XVg26OCuWx221Z-jamDMUAl4aajrs0A3r3A%3D%3D)

Thank you for all you do, and God bless.

[ ](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e509b746bad64adcb0c1c79c0d57c2ad&_e=CNF6cPi76W6fK88MhLziHpoUpJsKB-yrUbzcWpFIJFlsfbqZtzNcIkHtvzjZQpAsC4ycGMUEG0ucXZTINTBnE5ZcVAoPsUSYwLnPzbQslzrYXDjQfbT3jutNr2qG7MMhxng_np7-yZarvkfYVKIMTdhcoJ8LepHO7TL3S_8drv6WOc0coeaEgs50g5d-VP0bWLxyaRECPLSSoXIzRq2RHGc8AK0LXgsjgnBipMx6HCQ9dHdERMfxuoo8FB-mSRGY8JEuippPwCTA7ImZaogm95CIBcULepZp0cjRaDX_NyNhSITCcMBz_mZQhF7mcpRG4VTmg-dTs7R_l3fABotEnTs9VL8ODep4UyRCn_8Ub-7zo-g8la5AbxSNFinO9J4l_w-YKL5tTUdz0d5aI5CqZQ%3D%3D)

name: Freedom Nation Today
subject: The decline of American Citizenship
body:
This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College
My name is Kyle Murnen and I am the Director of Online Learning at Hillsdale College

[](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f03fda38a2ea4becbab07905b1bbccf2&_e=wefb9XSdvmJqDwkxWYs480CAGhd3pMPzg3iLJRnb77hVUmtaGbCdPU7vfoxKkCgR0wQ034VfTircrcpl9C2K9uRrIP-ZbBAqjLjVpYlC6EJnn9U7SxH4N5NgB5AcHNjcHdyoPlHQ0XmOFynpo0KzCxjILVhemSqMvR0-IWschpIVLevgkRITd1RVTLV400A6CuRIMHhL-tDv3Vq81YXwuPudw4kVEP0CVOlO-CRxR8xdqVvUY-w56dS6nmDAU41h84hFpPOycHxddOdx5Y_6Vnb3xaR4jLGtbMYFBOu19J_LLznwXdHxmCXurmxYL3akGu-_EpXa97o3JELj9w_Jao4yc7yiVSDjTmE3TBXBnBzcoJB3CHO9yZrlNXy_oFTPqQglEMHp1ZPoQkD7Bm976-O4XepbmhnBH-WIytyrhejt10qVpB5tS6EwUr5XFLsE) Dear Friend,

My name is Kyle Murnen and I am the Director of Online Learning at Hillsdale College, where we offer free online courses to anyone who wishes to learn.

**One of our top-rated courses, "American Citizenship and Its Decline," is taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson and is based on his book _The Dying Citizen_.**

This course argues that at the heart of America's current crises are symptoms of a far larger problem that afflicts the West: the loss of freedom and political power of the citizen.

Dr. Hanson frames this problem by first explaining the history of citizenship in the West and by reminding us how rare it is in human history to have governments that are created and controlled by the people.

To maintain this type of government requires a robust and self-reliant middle class, clearly defined and enforced borders, national autonomy, and confidence in our way of life.

Yet today, the middle class is disappearing under enormous economic strains, the distinction between citizen and resident is being blurred by open borders, and pre-civilizational tribalism is dividing Americans into a variety of identity groups.

These problems are being aggravated by top-down pressures from an unelected bureaucratic class that uses judicial, executive, and legislative powers to overwhelm the citizen.

Finally, globalism poses a historic challenge to national sovereignty, as many of today's elites seek to replace American laws and independence with international bodies, often without the consent of our elected representatives or the people they serve.

The course, however, concludes on a hopeful note: Citizens still hold the key to revitalizing our traditions of empowered citizenship and regaining control over our government.

So, enroll today in this free course, "American Citizenship and Its Decline," with Victor Davis Hanson. You can embark on this journey with us to learn about these threats to our rights as citizens and how to combat them.

Click the secure link below to start today.

clean_body: This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College My name is Kyle Murnen and I am the Director of Online Learning at Hillsdale College Dear Friend, My name is Kyle Murnen and I am the Director of Online Learning at Hillsdale College, where we offer free online courses to anyone who wishes to learn. One of our top-rated courses, "American Citizenship and Its Decline," is taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson and is based on his book The Dying Citizen. This course argues that at the heart of America's current crises are symptoms of a far larger problem that afflicts the West: the loss of freedom and political power of the citizen. Dr. Hanson frames this problem by first explaining the history of citizenship in the West and by reminding us how rare it is in human history to have governments that are created and controlled by the people. To maintain this type of government requires a robust and self-reliant middle class, clearly defined and enforced borders, national autonomy, and confidence in our way of life. Yet today, the middle class is disappearing under enormous economic strains, the distinction between citizen and resident is being blurred by open borders, and pre-civilizational tribalism is dividing Americans into a variety of identity groups. These problems are being aggravated by top-down pressures from an unelected bureaucratic class that uses judicial, executive, and legislative powers to overwhelm the citizen. Finally, globalism poses a historic challenge to national sovereignty, as many of today's elites seek to replace American laws and independence with international bodies, often without the consent of our elected representatives or the people they serve. The course, however, concludes on a hopeful note: Citizens still hold the key to revitalizing our traditions of empowered citizenship and regaining control over our government. So, enroll today in this free course, "American Citizenship and Its Decline," with Victor Davis Hanson. You can embark on this journey with us to learn about these threats to our rights as citizens and how to combat them. Click the secure link below to start today. Best regards, Kyle Murnen, '09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College | | Freedom Nation Today 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

name: Adam Schiff
subject: these attacks against me
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
| This is a more personal message than you generally receive from a campaign, but I wanted to pull back the curtain a bit why I’m in this race, and what the result will mean for our country.
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=4322%2E5257348%2EVEW9lo)
Derek —
This is a more personal message than you generally receive from a campaign, but I wanted to pull back the curtain a bit why I’m in this race, and what the result will mean for our country.
The last few years have been grueling for our nation and our democracy, but it hasn’t always been like this.
There was a time before Donald Trump. When you could disagree without being disagreeable. When it wasn’t taboo to have friends across the aisle, or at least people you could work with. When you would bring people together — Democrats and Republicans — to get things done.
Why? Because it was in the best interest of the American people to have a government that functioned. And that wasn’t in chaos 24/7.
Those days feel long gone now. We have seen a seismic shift in the last few years — since a charlatan celebrity and reality TV host who called disabled veterans “suckers” and “losers,” denigrated our immigrant communities, and railed on about “fake news” was elected President of the United States.
I’ve never been one to back down from the bad guys — so amidst these attacks, I did my duty and called him out. I took on these fights not because they were easy, but because it needed to be done.
That vitriol has taken a turn for the worse. Here’s what the other side has had to say about me:
“Wild-eyed conspiracy nut.” - Tucker Carlson
“Pencil neck. Shifty Schiff.” - Donald Trump
“[He] openly lied to the American public.” - Kevin McCarthy
**Never in my life would I expect to be cast a president’s “favorite” enemy — but here we are. And I’m not going to back down.**
It doesn’t end with these personal attacks either. With every new insult comes a horde of MAGA supporters, ready to pile on more death threats. Through Twitter. Email. Phone calls. Letters. You name it. With multiple people prosecuted for threatening to kill me. That NEVER happened before Trump.
There are days when the fight gets difficult. During the impeachment process. Serving on the January 6 Committee. When House Republicans censured me for doing my constitutional duty.
**But like I said on the House floor, I am honored by their enmity. I am flattered by the falsehoods they level against me. Those who were the authors of the big lie must attack the truth tellers and I am proud to stand accused. I wear their attacks as a badge of honor. Knowing that I have lived by my oath of office.**
My guiding principle has been serving in a way that will bring pride to my children. I believe that right and truth and decency matter now more than ever.
After long nights of consideration, I decided to run for California’s U.S. Senate seat. Because MAGA Republicans aren’t getting the job done and there’s too much that needs fixing. I have a record of getting tough things done, and I’m ready to do the hard work needed for our families, for our economy, for our democracy, and for our planet.
**[It’s clear Donald Trump and MAGA Republicans are going to do everything they can to sabotage my campaign — because they know how effective I am at gathering the truth, making a case, and holding them accountable. I need your help to overcome their attacks. Will you rush in $10 to help me continue my work for the American people?](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1312?c0=oct2023_abs_em.JYMaWc&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_NO_20231029_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=4&akid=4322%2E5257348%2EVEW9lo)**

name: Donald J. Trump
subject: How do I feel?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Save America Joint Fundraising Committee, a joint fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Donald J

The answer is... | | Patriot,

---
A trial is set to begin on Monday to try and FORCIBLY REMOVE my name from the BALLOT in a top battleground state.
---
People have been asking how I feel, they want to know what my demeanor is like...

---
I think this headline from the _New York Post_ sums it up perfectly well...

---
[](https://link.donaldjtrump.com/u/click?_t=c26d591425684a3289b90149d613a03c&_m=8a71054b75794fada33e755f467d0805&_e=Kyi1OCUVy6clPLPGRA9dNrUt6ck1VbmKmQ3BJarw09fdUw_0jbTybMA4nszLhiGq--snypEcqKPyBVfhkVvEFrTqavkEZK93tAJZuZyORA8mEVzy6cxtim2kKT_svMVwwxTP-nLuRBt-K4fKbmL4xbD3w_rz2zG547EEEsUD_jSdyNPq1RqV1he9UhTUXsgsUcSliELwCIqVRcEd9Fwl5gNUJyHaQe1rWkIvasx1tFti3n_ZaKTF49GZPNYrWXnSR9v_ZSo8WXqHWkOMY_WS1fYr84C02JeONRpsYz9gctlOi1HrM_dWvGf5cP0iL0zCuiTTG6rSlxDDI3crthSNulgJ0ockzX_4zjCcW0XlCfqJtbMLFyLSWPa6WGYcmdLfx9XMgkiFeyxipdvgt-aQ1jEq-Qz9qH6FiFxnY2lJUhGeD5dJImhYfQF2c-FBVNY2CBkkWluX8xa_WijRPt0MTS-V9a-GZyULgeJa7Tb2XbA0qGg3bo4hTQvIznUNfo60)
---
Since the moment I declared I would run for president as a political outsider, the Left has tried to break my spirit. They’ve tried to get me to cave and surrender.

---
And much to their grave disappointment, I have never yielded once. I have remained what is often called a _“happy warrior”_ in our mission to Make America Great Again!
---
**Even if ALL of the Democrats’ vicious attacks succeed – if they impose the “corporate death penalty” upon me, if they even put me in jail as an innocent man – there’s one thing they still can NEVER take from me...**** _my faith._**
---
And that goes for _all of us_ , Patriot.

---
No matter how bad things become, NO ONE can ever rob you of your _hope_ for a better tomorrow.

---
Even as it may seem that our country is falling apart, that the world is burning, and that our once great Republic conceived in liberty and justice is transforming into a Third World Dictatorship, we simply cannot give up hope.

---
And I’ll let you in on a little secret – it drives the Left CRAZY to see us optimistic and hopeful during these dark moments...

---
_..._** _Because it reminds them that they do NOT have power over us._**

---
We are a movement of brave, unyielding patriots united by a _LOVE_ for our country. It’s called Make America Great Again!

---
We want nothing else than to make our nation prosperous, peaceful, and proud again. _That’s it!_

---
So, while a dark cloud may be hanging over our country today, I have faith, nevertheless, that we will MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN!

---
_With yet another trial set to start right at the end of the month, I ask that you make a contribution before the October end-of-month deadline to ensure we prevail against the never-ending witch hunts and save our great country.
_
---
_If you cannot contribute at this time because of the very sinister people in control of D.C. who want to crush our spirits, then please do not even think about donating. But I will still ask you for this one favor: do not, ever, under any circumstances, lose faith!_

---

Peter,

To my core, I believe the most important things in life are **faith, family, and freedom** - _but those foundations of our great country are under attack._

Right now, in America, children are being taught in many schools to be ashamed of their country and themselves. The pledge is being taken out of school because it mentions God. Free speech is being censored and silenced right before our eyes. Democrats are fighting for the right to elective abortion right up to the moment of birth. Unelected, unaccountable bureaucrats are seeking control of almost every aspect of our lives.

**_This is simply un-American, and we must stop the madness._**

We must elect more leaders who make decisions based on American values with an emphasis on God, family, and country. It’s the only way to preserve the blessings we have been given here.

[**Today, to continue to help lead this critical fight, I need your financial support – to restore our country and defend our values. clean_body: I believe the most important things in life are faith, family, and freedom – but those foundations of our great country are under attack. | | Peter, To my core, I believe the most important things in life are faith, family, and freedom - but those foundations of our great country are under attack. Right now, in America, children are being taught in many schools to be ashamed of their country and themselves. The pledge is being taken out of school because it mentions God. Free speech is being censored and silenced right before our eyes. Democrats are fighting for the right to elective abortion right up to the moment of birth. Unelected, unaccountable bureaucrats are seeking control of almost every aspect of our lives. This is simply un-American, and we must stop the madness. We must elect more leaders who make decisions based on American values with an emphasis on God, family, and country. It’s the only way to preserve the blessings we have been given here. Peter, we have a chance to save our country from the radical Left that is aiming to destroy it, but we’re running out of time. I’m not sure what version of America we will leave to our kids if we continue down this path. The path we’re on currently will lead us to destruction. But that outcome is not inevitable. We still can turn this country around - IF conscientious conservatives across America stand up RIGHT NOW. We MUST act, and we must do so today. Thank you for all you do, and God bless. I have to show it to you: **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72383277/435162831/1307708269?refcode=ea.251d9714-5b76-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&ms=ea.251d9714-5b76-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTU5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNTFkOTcxNC01Yjc2LWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5aD-tnGnkVvTSWQ7nsDz_oUE45pOEUob7N3Q0y2fAXk=)** I won’t sugarcoat it: We can't afford to fall short this month.
