name: Defend the Constitution
subject: The decline of American Citizenship
body:
This sponsored message from Defending the Constitution is on behalf of Hillsdale College
My name is Kyle Murnen and I am the Director of Online Learning at Hillsdale College

[](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=027e613356eb41b4931c28ef3ca4779e&_e=QZNWDRx_dNpt2lmvhDaWOqT3IEFp1gkXkkZbPMr1Kaqo_0qmnSThYo7427aoGzBrsyLC-tV06ocM9anL_GdmaSgbAKWMyvwMKn_d7K-HHrXT1dIdShhy0uc3E7L9PL3rBDtjgNpr1A9DXDGPfJLqloSFn4fmZ-XiIbMPAra8fjekVazwzj2pv3Fqe62WeZt65RmMsh77cXPIKc3YSkZNiBEe_nVqomaDvlPy5J5Pj63O6Ulsij0nztQDG_U3uQixTRcZ0Nqt8UZZMTVVCs5bUDKkLcm7spJ0fcrrfntumcCNF9qwC36X3wIA-h_q1wCnC3pIWRLdUwxgs73K1_L8biuQfUVWcmziOfyfklVWwYl1A9QIL1el8cz7rB3zz70VEFqjB4-IUCV-agRQ1L1HbeF0pp5gPaG84w0j8jY5j-LcMBrBvlz-lxpxRlrjYg3u) Dear Friend,

My name is Kyle Murnen and I am the Director of Online Learning at Hillsdale College, where we offer free online courses to anyone who wishes to learn.

**One of our top-rated courses, "American Citizenship and Its Decline," is taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson and is based on his book _The Dying Citizen_.**

This course argues that at the heart of America's current crises are symptoms of a far larger problem that afflicts the West: the loss of freedom and political power of the citizen.

Dr. Hanson frames this problem by first explaining the history of citizenship in the West and by reminding us how rare it is in human history to have governments that are created and controlled by the people.

To maintain this type of government requires a robust and self-reliant middle class, clearly defined and enforced borders, national autonomy, and confidence in our way of life.

Yet today, the middle class is disappearing under enormous economic strains, the distinction between citizen and resident is being blurred by open borders, and pre-civilizational tribalism is dividing Americans into a variety of identity groups.

These problems are being aggravated by top-down pressures from an unelected bureaucratic class that uses judicial, executive, and legislative powers to overwhelm the citizen.

Finally, globalism poses a historic challenge to national sovereignty, as many of today's elites seek to replace American laws and independence with international bodies, often without the consent of our elected representatives or the people they serve.

The course, however, concludes on a hopeful note: Citizens still hold the key to revitalizing our traditions of empowered citizenship and regaining control over our government.

So, enroll today in this free course, "American Citizenship and Its Decline," with Victor Davis Hanson. You can embark on this journey with us to learn about these threats to our rights as citizens and how to combat them.

Click the secure link below to start today.

**[https://online.hillsdale.edu/register/american-citizenship-and-its-decline](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=027e613356eb41b4931c28ef3ca4779e&_e=QZNWDRx_dNpt2lmvhDaWOqT3IEFp1gkXkkZbPMr1Kaqo_0qmnSThYo7427aoGzBrsyLC-tV06ocM9anL_GdmaSgbAKWMyvwMKn_d7K-HHrXT1dIdShhy0uc3E7L9PL3rBDtjgNpr1A9DXDGPfJLqloSFn4fmZ-XiIbMPAra8fjekVazwzj2pv3Fqe62WeZt65RmMsh77cXPIKc3YSkZNiBEe_nVqomaDvlPy5J5Pj63O6Ulsij0nztQDG_U3uQixTRcZ0Nqt8UZZMTVVCs5bUDKkLcm7spJ0fcrrfntumcC38UksYeVLbSNxiaOVQf2WapUZCzDZwja3rc60T4HGfAXqh0e7BRnjsauE3EJAlPb9xFzloRkHvJgjwn1oLAKkrT3egAYya2UoZo08NDiyo69BZDhKfnBc5cxI0i9iNPuguQctUkKXc-Sh8wIExtaZ)
**

Best regards,
Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College |

| Defending the Constitution
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
[](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_s=027e613356eb41b4931c28ef3ca4779e&_t=D7KqITsaHXEkoS_jM2S7nadfRM_y7NTKWN5VkzFKnDgz5hO0lZS2UEVYW1bWkDlkV2SQkRcPb2eparYV6SIO6oGNL6E5TLQn4L4RW4-zWIthWMAIflCjtx1A48ETBwRm9fMp4_UmMojqWllNIMtqvToxfFrCJ1ajG9QVKSs3V_k%3D)
_[**unsubscribe**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=027e613356eb41b4931c28ef3ca4779e&_e=bMGWmkimoq10jbURiP3A69W-Gr2QpYRX5sWinzB_MbdxIf_mMhY7vU7USvJeQ2sX12aW7rPoqX62-Rld22pi0RyKTquNk8AMYKBjm49WxtIoxIs8hbITqKPfrtXy4-VfKZUjv-a26CCSPDf90U1-NrPCaLXTRPCF4hBkZd9_oa7ZWxK16aklYuyxU7BfjRvTbM3VKv9le-BpPgQtMrvSSeqI24lN855ovYUW4tFRs8eso9oFyD5LOripVKk-bFxFrAZgAbv7dBxEKgjUmZB1UQ%3D%3D)_ | _[manage data preferences](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=027e613356eb41b4931c28ef3ca4779e&_e=QZNWDRx_dNpt2lmvhDaWOuPt3TQKzteTsx8aEyfkVpYMm0jazjevBXWMaDwzQpM-TheaZ5-XraUtvRRm50BCo-NA9RjJr-wMr4v_jTbo_gum3QTFd5mJd3E-RePOCHqOFLMkT8DEw3MZejV_P9VzTYc4g9nD6l_2RLdm3ygRmDU2vI7Z1XrvyD0ymiPtSPPHJ6z_vxvkogItqg_SOhwUmfFYkNZwHuC9plm0QPCitys%3D)_

Thanks to your unyielding support so far this year, we have been able to secure _real_ wins for working families across the nation. From going toe to toe with Big Pharma to holding the pro-gun extremists accountable, _you_ have given me the ability to fight for progress fearlessly.
But our hard work is far from over. With gun rights groups continuing to reign nearly unchecked, far-right lawmakers attempting to control every aspect of a person's life, and wealthy organizations continuing to wreak havoc on local communities, there is still a lot of work to be done.
**Peter, I vow to _never_ stop fighting for progress, but it's your support that makes all of my work possible. But right now, I'm pacing $10,000 behind where I need to be for the month. So please, before October ends:**
**[Will you chip in $5 or more to get me back on track? Our fight for progress is fueled by grassroots supporters like you, and I'm counting on your help.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72383351/435163051/-2022127741?&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1235-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZDFkOTcxNC01Yjc2LWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JZiINzpoXON3wWE69WO5BE4g_LTuBOoNeKLwVxDurkA=)**
Thank you,

Letitia
| With so many tough and crucial fights ahead, I am counting on people like you to fuel my fight for justice, progress, and true equality. From going toe to toe with Big Pharma to holding the pro-gun extremists accountable, you have given me the ability to fight for progress fearlessly. But our hard work is far from over. With gun rights groups continuing to reign nearly unchecked, far-right lawmakers attempting to control every aspect of a person's life, and wealthy organizations continuing to wreak havoc on local communities, there is still a lot of work to be done. Peter, I vow to never stop fighting for progress, but it's your support that makes all of my work possible. But right now, I'm pacing $10,000 behind where I need to be for the month. name: Conservative Intel
subject: Milton Friedman: What does “created equal” mean?
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vsyqQT6iNh

Are equality and liberty consistent one with the other or are
they in conflict?

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/osyqQT6iNh

Hi
Friend,
One of
the reasons young people are so attracted to the idea of
socialism is the promised equality of outcomes.

They want
life to be fair for everyone, and for all to have wellness,
happiness, and financial security. But if the end goal of
socialism is "equality", that begs the question: what is
equality? Are equality and liberty consistent one with the other
or are they in conflict?

In this
25-page commentary, "Created Equal", legendary economist and
Hoover fellow Milton Friedman answers these and other questions
in great depth. You'll learn what Thomas Jefferson meant when he
wrote the words "created equal" in the Declaration of
Independence and how the meaning has changed through American
history. You'll see how Friedman brilliantly illustrates
differences between equality of opportunity and equality of
outcome.
With many
today striving to increase government power in the name of a
concept of "equality", Friedman's words still ring true for those
who believe that a society that puts freedom first will end up
with both greater freedom and greater equality.

Please
follow this link to get your free copy of "Created Equal" now.

Thanks,

Greg

Greg
Stamps | Online Development
Hoover
Institution | Stanford University

With its
eminent scholars and world-renowned Library and Archives, the
Hoover Institution is a non-partisan, data-driven policy research
organization that seeks to improve the human condition by
advancing ideas that promote economic prosperity, national
security, and democratic governance. Over more than one hundred
years, Hoover's work has directly led to policies that have
produced greater freedom, democracy, and opportunity in the
United States and around the world.

name: Staff Sgt. Aquilino Gonell
subject: They attacked us with the American flag.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
The same flag I swore an oath to when I joined the Army.
#

[](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-oct23.kRA6ky&refcode=em231029-1&t=1&akid=1382%2E734936%2EAzgZ73)
---
Peter -
I will never forget January 6th. I was more afraid at the Capitol that day than I was in my entire deployment to Iraq.
On January 6, I was assaulted by more than 40 rioters and mob members who were part of concerted efforts to overtake the Capitol. I was sprayed with bear mace, punched, kicked, beaten with stolen police batons and weapons.
They even attacked us with the American flag. The same flag I swore an oath to when I joined the Army.
I still bear the scars of this day and am saddened every time I think about my career being cut short because of that day.
I honestly thought I was going to die.
But I fought back. I fought for our democracy.
I'm still fighting for it.
And while I was fighting the mob, Ruben Gallego was on the House floor. He helped barricade the doors. He taught his colleagues how to use a gas mask. He was ready to fight for our democracy again, same as when he joined the Marines, same as when he fought in Iraq.
He's still fighting for it, too.
He's fighting to beat the people who led those insurrectionists, who cheer them on, who defend them — peoplein Arizona like Mark Lamb and Kari Lake.
Ruben is the kind of leader we need in the Senate, not them. I’m proud to support him. And that's why I'm writing to you today.
To win, he is going to need your help.
[**Can he count on you? Make today the day that you give your first donation to Ruben’s Arizona Senate campaign.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-oct23.kRA6ky&refcode=em231029-1&t=2&akid=1382%2E734936%2EAzgZ73)

name: Sherrod Brown
subject: I'm reaching out to ask for $5
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ZAK FOR CONGRESS
body:
#
I'll be straight with you, folks. I'm reaching out this morning to ask for $5.

[_I'm about to explain why, but if you're ready to chip in $5 to help me hit our critical $25,000 goal before our midnight deadline, you can click here to split a donation between my campaign and Zak Malamed's now._](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/23-sb-split?amount=5?source=em231028-zm-sb-split&refcode2=544_8507_41vJ3g&akid=544%2E8507%2E41vJ3g)

[CONTRIBUTE ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/23-sb-split?amount=5?amount=5&refcode=em20231028-sb-split-el&refcode2=544_8507_41vJ3g&akid=544%2E8507%2E41vJ3g)

Look, folks: As soon as CNN reported that I was one of the most vulnerable senators up for reelection, Mitch McConnell made my seat his top target to flip red and take back the Senate majority.

So now I'm facing GOP millionaire opponents in a _**toss-up race**_ – and if I can't make up the gap on my midnight fundraising goal, they'll know the multimillion-dollar attack ads are worth it.

**I know $5 might not seem like much in comparison to the GOP's millions – but if you join the thousands of grassroots folks who've already given $5 this week, we'll be on track to meet this critical goal and have the resources it takes to fight back and win.**

[_Unlike my GOP opponents, I can't just write my campaign another check. I'm counting on grassroots folks like you to power us to victory. So please, will you split $5 – or anything you can spare – between my campaign and Zak Malamed's so we can win in Ohio and keep this Senate seat blue?_](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/23-sb-split?amount=5?source=em231028-zm-sb-split&refcode2=544_8507_41vJ3g&akid=544%2E8507%2E41vJ3g)

If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Split $5 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/23-sb-split?amount=5?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=em20231028-sb-split-el&refcode2=544_8507_41vJ3g&akid=544%2E8507%2E41vJ3g) [Split $25 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/23-sb-split?amount=5?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=em20231028-sb-split-el&refcode2=544_8507_41vJ3g&akid=544%2E8507%2E41vJ3g) [Split $50 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/23-sb-split?amount=5?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=em20231028-sb-split-el&refcode2=544_8507_41vJ3g&akid=544%2E8507%2E41vJ3g) [Other Amount ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/23-sb-split?amount=5&amount=30&refcode=em20231028-sb-split-el&refcode2=544_8507_41vJ3g&akid=544%2E8507%2E41vJ3g)
---

None of this is possible without you. Thank you.

– Sherrod

body:
This email is a bit longer than our usual content. I hope you’ll take a moment to read my story and support my fight.

| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72386929/435176099/1172010437?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDgzNTciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYjRmZmY0MmYtNWY3Ni1lZTExLWIwMDQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=eIrJPTbN8Nu2aEnVRcGJJdteJ9H8FZVGF-sQgUBYswE=&emci=46976587-5e6d-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&emdi=b4fff42f-5f76-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&ceid=13535713)

| | Peter, my campaign’s picked up a lot of buzz since I announced I was running for Congress. **But there are just some things about me you won’t hear from the press.** I know this district. I grew up here. My ancestors were pioneers who settled in the Sierra foothills. My family remain stewards of these lands. And I’ve hiked 500 miles of the district on the Pacific Crest Trail. This love of the land gave me a unique understanding in my job helping protect Californians from wildfire. But what led me to my job as Deputy Secretary for Forest and Wildland Resilience was a wildfire not far from home. When the deadliest wildfire ignited 96 miles from my hometown _**, I got in my car and drove to Paradise to help my community in any way needed.**_ The trauma and devastation I witnessed changed the trajectory of my career and led me to my job working on the frontline of California’s wildfire crisis and fast-tracking wildfire prevention efforts to protect communities. Even in my lesser known work in national security — serving in the US Defense Department, the US State Department and USAID — you may not know that I was stationed as a civilian at one of the deadliest checkpoints in Baghdad, working to give Iraqi citizens the tools to build their own democracy. Peter, tackling tough issues has always been the lifeblood of my career, and when I see a problem,_**I’ve been the one leading the charge to find a solution.**_ [**I’m running for Congress because Kevin Kiley’s extremism is a problem for CA-03 that can’t go unchecked. It’s time for a real problem-solver to represent our district, and I’m ready for the challenge. Will you rush a contribution of any amount so we can flip this seat, take back the House, and send me to Congress in 2024?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72386930/435176100/-1974041978?refcode=E4563-20231017-Onboarding3-SL-CampaignNews&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDgzNTciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYjRmZmY0MmYtNWY3Ni1lZTExLWIwMDQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=eIrJPTbN8Nu2aEnVRcGJJdteJ9H8FZVGF-sQgUBYswE=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [DONATE $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72386931/435176101/-1974041978?express_lane=true&refcode=E4563-20231017-Onboarding3-EG-CampaignNews&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDgzNTciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYjRmZmY0MmYtNWY3Ni1lZTExLWIwMDQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=eIrJPTbN8Nu2aEnVRcGJJdteJ9H8FZVGF-sQgUBYswE=)

name: Lucas T. Kunce
subject: The boldest campaign Missouri has ever seen
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
Please let me explain.
#
Hey Peter, it’s Lucas Kunce.
I wanted to take some time this morning to tell you a little more about the campaign we’re building to defeat Josh Hawley here in Missouri — and why it’s already the boldest grassroots movement our state has ever seen.
**So before I ask you to[chip in any amount toward our goal of raising 10,000 individual donations before November 1st,](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/38743?refcode=em20231029-4077&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=4077%2E614464%2Ee5YEbH) will you please let me explain?**
**[ADD A DONATION NOW](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/38743?refcode=em20231029-4077&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=4077%2E614464%2Ee5YEbH)**
For decades, lying politicians have let massive corporations strip our communities for parts — and Missouri has had a front row seat.
I can’t accept a status quo where politicians who take massive donations from Big Ag tell us it’s normal for billionaires in China and Brazil to buy up our farmland and put hard-working family farmers out of business. And I won’t stand for another twenty years of members of Congress who’ve never worn a uniform sacrificing American lives and tax dollars on forever wars, while refusing to invest into the everyday people who make our country strong.
Out-of-touch elites like Josh Hawley have spent decades wasting our money on tax breaks and subsidies for Wall Street, Big Pharma, Big Tech, and just about everything else that’s gutting our country.
They’re willing to lie, cheat, and steal from the American people to protect the corporate PACs and mega-donors who own their careers. And they’ll even raise their fist to look strong before they start running from threats to our democracy.
**We don’t need any more frauds in Congress.** That’s why I’m running for U.S. Senate. Our mission of taking power back for everyday people has earned our movement national media attention. And our commitment to running this campaign the right way, without a cent from corporate PACs, has given us the ability to run the boldest campaign in Missouri history — taking on corrupt political elites like Hawley without hesitation about some mega-donor being upset.
More than just fighting to codify protections for abortion access — **I’m running to end the filibuster so we can actually get it done.**
More than just banning insider trading among members of Congress and their families — **I’m running to put them in jail if they steal from us.**
More than just breaking up Big Pharma — **I’m running to prosecute the insulin cartels who are killing people.**
And more than just rejecting corporate PAC money — **I’m running to abolish corporate PACs altogether.**
This campaign is powered by the people because that’s exactly who I’ll work for in the U.S. Senate — I'll be accountable to real, everyday Americans, not some corporate executive or political machine. We’re throwing out their rulebook and building a grassroots movement to fundamentally change who has power in our country. **And I need you on our team:**
**[So if you’re ready to help us take back power for everyday people in Missouri and across the country, please add a donation of $25, $10, or whatever you can toward our goal today.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/38743?refcode=em20231029-4077&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=11&akid=4077%2E614464%2Ee5YEbH)**

For too long, our country’s corrupt politicians have bought their way into power and maintained a broken status quo. That cycle stops with our movement.
Thanks for being part of it,
Lucas Kunce

Our Senate campaign here in Maryland is running up against a self-funded, multi-millionaire who has already invested nearly _**$10 million**_ of his own money into his campaign.
So yes, it’s safe to say we have quite a bit of catching up to do when it comes to fundraising and keeping pace with the seemingly unlimited resources of our most serious opponent.
**But that’s OK, Peter.** Because when _this_ grassroots team comes together, we will outwork any wealthy millionaire who thinks they can just buy their way into the U.S. Senate.
**[So, what do you say, Peter? Can I count on you to donate just $10 to help our Senate campaign get back on track and spread our message to voters across Maryland?](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/7442?t=12&amount=10&akid=614%2E52803%2EHCtny5)**

Thanks for your help, and happy Sunday!
—Angela

Right now, I have just two days until my end-of-month deadline. _If we’re going to match Tim Kaine’s MILLIONS that he has in the bank, we have to get started early - and that means meeting EVERY SINGLE GOAL from now until Election Day. _ Because of you, we’ve been able to build an incredible movement so far. Virginians are sick and tired of the same old political insiders pretending to represent them while only looking out for big-money special interests. clean_body: | | | Peter, I know the U.S. Senate elections aren’t until next year - but I can’t afford for you to tune out until we get closer to Election Day. Right now, I have just two days until my end-of-month deadline. If we’re going to match Tim Kaine’s MILLIONS that he has in the bank, we have to get started early - and that means meeting EVERY SINGLE GOAL from now until Election Day. Because of you, we’ve been able to build an incredible movement so far. Virginians are sick and tired of the same old political insiders pretending to represent them while only looking out for big-money special interests. But we have a lot more work to do, which is why I have to ask you today: Glenn Youngkin’s victory in Virginia two years ago wasn’t a fluke. There’s real conservative momentum building in our state. The failures of Joe Biden and Tim Kaine are hitting Virginia families hard, and they’re not sitting by idly and letting them get away with it. We CAN win here, but it’s going to take a lot of fo work. Meeting this goal is critical to setting us up for success for the rest of the campaign. It’s going to be a long road, but together, I know we can do it. - In Liberty, CAPT Hung Cao USN (Ret) | TEXT HUNG TO 21412 I came to America with little besides the clothes on my back. But with faith, dedication, and hard work, my family and I made it in America. I’m running for Senate to defend the American Dream that gave me everything.The Left is on a war path against the values that make us the greatest country on Earth. I didn’t put my life on the line defending those values in Special Operations in the Navy to let the Left destroy them. We are fueled by grassroots patriots like you. Hi Peter —

This week, I signed a pledge to not take any contributions from oil, gas, and coal industry executives, lobbyists, or PACs and instead, prioritize the health of our families, climate, and democracy over fossil fuel industry profits.

Time after time, we’ve seen politicians bend the knee to these toxic special interest groups like the fossil fuel industry, and I’ve made the commitment to run this campaign the right way.

**[I’m proud of this pledge, but it does mean I need all the support I can get from grassroots donors - especially now as I’m behind on a critical end-of-month deadline that is coming up in TWO DAYS. subject: 👋 To all of Ilhan Omar's supporters…
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
...please don't click away or scroll past this. Not yet.
# [](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/35?t=1&akid=659%2E791427%2EJRZ6il)

👋 To all of Ilhan Omar's supporters, please don't click away or scroll past this — not yet.
During times like these, Ilhan likes to be very direct, so let us get right to the point: **[Can you make your first $3 contribution to stand with our re-election campaign today?](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-oct23.jei10D&refcode=em231029-1-t1t2&t=2&akid=659%2E791427%2EJRZ6il)**

Here's why:
You may already know that Ilhan doesn't fund her campaigns for Congress the way a lot of her colleagues in Washington do. She doesn't have any shady super PACs backing her, she doesn't receive blank checks from corporate lobbyists, and there certainly aren't any billionaires waiting in the wings. Just lots and lots of people chipping in what they can.

Over 99% of donations to our campaign are under $50 a piece. Our average contribution this year is $19.28. And when we ask supporters to chip in for the first time, we usually ask for $3.
All that matters is that you are choosing to be a part of this movement. Because when all of us are standing together, it adds up to something more powerful than the right-wing could ever throw our way.

**For a campaign like ours, there are no small contributions. Every vote counts, every door-knock counts, and every dollar counts. So please:**
**[Can you make a contribution — of $3, $10, or anything you can — to stand with Ilhan Omar and our progressive movement today? It'd mean a lot if you could add yours before our upcoming October deadline.](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-oct23.jei10D&refcode=em231029-1-t1t2&t=3&akid=659%2E791427%2EJRZ6il)**
_If you 've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your contribution will go through immediately:_
[Donate $3](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/14?c0=io-em-oct23.JMhw-G&refcode=em231029-1-t1t2&t=22&akid=659%2E791427%2EJRZ6il)
[Donate $10](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/771?c0=io-em-oct23.KuFa2q&refcode=em231029-1-t1t2&t=23&akid=659%2E791427%2EJRZ6il)
[Donate $15](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/772?c0=io-em-oct23.FvF_CA&refcode=em231029-1-t1t2&t=24&akid=659%2E791427%2EJRZ6il)
[Donate $25](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/15?c0=io-em-oct23.65wiVW&refcode=em231029-1-t1t2&t=25&akid=659%2E791427%2EJRZ6il)
[Donate $50](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/8?c0=io-em-oct23.ghJtQt&refcode=em231029-1-t1t2&t=26&akid=659%2E791427%2EJRZ6il)
[Or, donate another amount](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-oct23.jei10D&refcode=em231029-1-t1t2&t=27&akid=659%2E791427%2EJRZ6il)

Thank you so much. 🙏
In solidarity,
Team Ilhan

She doesn't have any shady super PACs backing her, she doesn't receive blank checks from corporate lobbyists, and there certainly aren't any billionaires waiting in the wings. Just lots and lots of people chipping in what they can. Over 99% of donations to our campaign are under $50 a piece. Our average contribution this year is $19.28. And when we ask supporters to chip in for the first time, we usually ask for $3. All that matters is that you are choosing to be a part of this movement. Because when all of us are standing together, it adds up to something more powerful than the right-wing could ever throw our way. For a campaign like ours, there are no small contributions. Every vote counts, every door-knock counts, and every dollar counts. So please: If you 've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your contribution will go through immediately: Thank you so much. 🙏 In solidarity, Team Ilhan PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS

name: Shawn Harris via Blue Amp Action
subject: Gratitude.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC
body:
Together, we can unseat Marjorie Taylor Greene and build a better future for everyone.
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[ unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Teedbb55f-772f-4bd7-9118-8c97deff255c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter – I really don’t know what to say besides thank you. Thank you for making the launch of our campaign such an overwhelming success. I am incredibly humbled by the supportive messages, encouragement, and donations from people across the country. We’re building our movement to unseat Marjorie Taylor Greene around our shared values of compassion and kindness. Because of you, we’re starting this campaign on the right foot. **If you didn’t donate to our launch, don’t worry, you still can **[by clicking here!](https://default.salsalabs.org/T468935cb-6533-46c0-97d7-8af6775d8bbd/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) [**DONATE $7 NOW >>**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td739dc6f-9557-4405-b4bb-f02dfe1ce798/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T8ed28998-a740-4cd6-bb70-f3a39c0903f5/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) As a reminder: my name is Shawn Harris. I am a recently-retired United States Army Brigadier General, a grandfather, and a proud son of Georgia. I am running to restore dignity to northern Georgia and replace Ms. Greene in the House of Representatives. Ms. Greene is the wrong person to represent us at this critical moment. Instead of addressing the issues that make it harder for us to get by, she is focused on dividing our country and devaluing our fellow Americans — embarrassing us at home and abroad. [If you’re on board, would you chip in $7, $15, $25, or whatever you’re comfortable with to help us get our voter outreach efforts up and running?](https://default.salsalabs.org/T2ebaf851-6404-4fe7-be6f-bc4984455591/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country.

name: Andy Kim
subject: Our kids deserve better
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Andy Kim for New Jersey
body:
People often ask me why I ran for office.

There are a lot of reasons I could give, things like the power of good governance and belief in our democracy. But what it really boils down to is two Jersey boys – a six-year-old and an eight-year-old – my boys.

In 2018, Republicans were threatening to take away my family's health care, so I got in the fight and ran for Congress. Now I'm running because Bob Menendez has taken away my family's trust in our Senator.

I want our kids to grow up in a world where our leaders fight for the people who elected them, where corruption isn't tolerated, and where our democracy thrives.

Our kids deserve better than a broken America, and I'm willing to put in the work to get us there. Are you willing to make a contribution to help me achieve these goals for the next generation? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-andy-kim-ak4nj?refcode=2023-10-29-fatherhood-fire&recurring=&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=5957e624-6476-ee11-b004-00224832eb73]

When I read Senator Menendez's indictment, I felt an enormous crisis of confidence. I did not have confidence that my Senator – my kids' Senator – should continue to serve. He has the right to due process, but that does not mean he is entitled to stay in a job that demands the trust of the people he represents. So I'm channeling my fire as a father and running for Senate to fight for the future all of our kids deserve.

I'm fighting for an America where anyone can grow up to be anything, where health care costs don't bankrupt people, where small businesses can flourish, where our veterans are taken care of, and where we have the courage to tackle the climate crisis head-on.

I refuse to believe my two boys are destined to grow up in a broken America. I will do all I can to give them and their generation a better future. I cannot fix everything in our nation, but I can fix this one thing and restore a sense of integrity to this Senate seat.

Our kids deserve better than what we have, but that won't happen unless we step up together. I'm stepping up and humbly asking for your help. Can you make a donation today to fight for a better future tomorrow? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-andy-kim-ak4nj?refcode=2023-10-29-fatherhood-fire&recurring=&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=5957e624-6476-ee11-b004-00224832eb73]

More soon,

Andy

clean_body: People often ask me why I ran for office. There are a lot of reasons I could give, things like the power of good governance and belief in our democracy. But what it really boils down to is two Jersey boys – a six-year-old and an eight-year-old – my boys. In 2018, Republicans were threatening to take away my family's health care, so I got in the fight and ran for Congress. Now I'm running because Bob Menendez has taken away my family's trust in our Senator. I want our kids to grow up in a world where our leaders fight for the people who elected them, where corruption isn't tolerated, and where our democracy thrives. Our kids deserve better than a broken America, and I'm willing to put in the work to get us there. Are you willing to make a contribution to help me achieve these goals for the next generation? [] When I read Senator Menendez's indictment, I felt an enormous crisis of confidence. I did not have confidence that my Senator – my kids' Senator – should continue to serve. He has the right to due process, but that does not mean he is entitled to stay in a job that demands the trust of the people he represents. So I'm channeling my fire as a father and running for Senate to fight for the future all of our kids deserve. I'm fighting for an America where anyone can grow up to be anything, where health care costs don't bankrupt people, where small businesses can flourish, where our veterans are taken care of, and where we have the courage to tackle the climate crisis head-on. I refuse to believe my two boys are destined to grow up in a broken America. I will do all I can to give them and their generation a better future. I cannot fix everything in our nation, but I can fix this one thing and restore a sense of integrity to this Senate seat. Our kids deserve better than what we have, but that won't happen unless we step up together. I'm stepping up and humbly asking for your help. Can you make a donation today to fight for a better future tomorrow? [] More soon, Andy Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: $5 [] $15 [] $25 [] $50 [] Paid for by Andy Kim for New Jersey

name: Elissa Slotkin
subject: A number I’m really proud of
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
body:
Hey there,
I wanted to make sure you saw this email from my team yesterday. During his time in Congress, Mike Rogers accepted over $4.8 million (!) in corporate PAC money – a full 30% of the money he raised. This absurdly high number reflects how he voted on a number of key issues.
And if his first FEC report of this Senate race is any indication, we can expect him to be soliciting a ton of big corporations in the hopes they support his campaign. While we know corporate PACs are going to throw the kitchen sink at our race, I am proud of how much money I’ve taken from them over the years: $0.
**But to ensure we have the resources we will need over the next year to win this race, we have to keep up a steady drumbeat of support through emails like this.** That’s why I’m writing today, and why I would love to earn your support:
[**Can I count on you to chip in $3, or whatever you can, to help us continue powering this campaign? Your support really does have a meaningful impact on what we can accomplish.](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-oct23.ttRNnI&refcode=em231029-1-15&t=1&akid=760%2E135344%2Edr0Ovv)**
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-oct23.ttRNnI&refcode=em231029-1-15&t=2&akid=760%2E135344%2Edr0Ovv)**
Thank you for your continued support,
Elissa
\---------- Begin forwarded message ---------
From: Team Slotkin
Subject: Three numbers that tell a story
To: dpwillis67@gmail.com
[](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-oct23.ttRNnI&refcode=em231029-1-15&t=3&akid=760%2E135344%2Edr0Ovv)
Friend -
Since former Republican Congressman Mike Rogers filed his FEC report, we have been learning a lot about who is funding his campaign and where his contributions are coming from. Here are three important numbers you should know:
> **$120,000:** That’s how much PAC money Mike Rogers received in the first 24 days of his campaign – from other Republicans supporting his race as well as from corporate PACs backed by a private prison company and Elon Musk’s SpaceX PAC.
> **$4.8 million:** This is how much corporate PAC money Rogers took throughout his time in Congress. Corporate PACs loved supporting Mike Rogers because they knew he would take their check and then vote their way on the floor of the House. Whether it was defense contractors, big pharmaceutical companies, or Wall Street PACs, Mike Rogers cashed in at the expense of Michiganders.
> **$0:** Elissa has taken $0 in corporate PAC money since she first ran for Congress in 2018. She never wanted her constituents to question why she was voting a certain way, or have any doubt that she was fighting for their interests, and their interests alone. And unlike some, she stuck to the pledge even when she got elected.
Despite not taking corporate PAC money, Elissa has gone toe-to-toe with corporate-backed GOP opponents and won. How? By relying on lots and lots of people giving what they can, when they can over time. And the number one sources of individual contributions to this campaign? Emails like this one.
**So while we know that Mike Rogers will see a flood of corporate PAC money throughout his campaign, we also know that contributions to emails like these add up in a big way.** They are what power our operation and help us make strategic decisions about when we hire staff, when we will air TV ads, and how we build out our ground game.
[**That’s why we’re asking: Will you chip in $3 to help us send Elissa to the Senate? The amount isn’t as important as the donation itself, because they all really do add up.**](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-oct23.ttRNnI&refcode=em231029-1-15&t=4&akid=760%2E135344%2Edr0Ovv)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Donate $3](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/128?c0=ebs-em-oct23.s_Ko7f&refcode=em231029-1-15&t=23&akid=760%2E135344%2Edr0Ovv)**
---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/129?c0=ebs-em-oct23.1KsVSv&refcode=em231029-1-15&t=24&akid=760%2E135344%2Edr0Ovv)**

****
Thank you,
Team Slotkin

name: Christie
subject: Your record stood out. >>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
| | | Hi team -- Christie here, Executive Director of the DSCC. When I looked through our past survey responses, I was very impressed with your level of enthusiasm. In fact, you were **more active than 90 percent of Democrats in our database!**

We defied history and _expanded_ our Senate majority last year because we partnered with folks like you. Now, we NEED your help to do it again.

We're launching a high-priority focus group that's ONLY open to Democrats who've proven their commitment to winning -- **and you’re in the top 10% of Democrats who made the cut. So please, accept your invitation by taking this survey right away:

[www.dscc.org/GrassrootsDemocraticStrategists/#9716520](http://go.dscc.org/go/15934?ask=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20231029-Christie-ActiveDemsGroup23RFv2-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20231029-Christie-ActiveDemsGroup23RFv2-Pros-sl1&akid=12436%2E9716520%2EYrTCjy)**

I'm excited to have you on the team!

clean_body: Passing this along. | = Peter, did you see Brandon’s email on the BIG news?! A new poll has us neck and neck with Tate Reeves, and the Cook Political Report's updated rating has turned this into a real nail-biter. If we want to help Brandon win in just 9 days, every minute counts. We only have a few hours left to hit our $130,000 GOTV goal, and it’s our most critical public filing deadline of the campaign. = | = | = | = ---|---|--- = | = | = Thanks for your support, Team Brandon \----------Forwarded message---------- From: Brandon Presley Date: Mon, October 23, 2023 Subject: Holy smokes! There’s a new shift in the race. “[The race] has morphed into a competitive fight with added intrigue heading into Election Day thanks to a strong challenger in Brandon Presley" \- The Cook Political Report | = --- Peter — the Cook Political Report just labeled this high-stakes gubernatorial race even more competitive with a new shift in our favor, and only 15 days to go before Election Day. And earlier today, a brand new poll came out showing us WITHIN ONE POINT of Tate Reeves. If you didn't think this race was a real nail-biter, you should now! Mississippi might be known for electing 'R' labeled politicians, but let me tell you, people are hungry for change. And I am ready to disrupt the status quo in Jackson, clean up corruption, deliver real results for the hardworking people and families of Mississippi, and tell those special interests and lobbyists that the party is over. This election is OUR chance to make a real change for our state. Together, we're going to take down corrupt Tate Reeves. But look, Tate and his special interest buddies are throwing everything and the kitchen sink to defeat us on November 7th. = = | = | = ---|---|--- = | = | = Thanks for your support, Brandon Presley = | | = = Follow along: Paid for by Brandon Presley Campaign Brandon Presley Campaign P.O. | | In a moment, [**we’ll ask if you can make a donation to help hit our monthly fundraising goal before the end of October.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72393780/435199929/1358700588?refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20231029_eom_deniers_v1s3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwN2FmMDFmNS02Nzc2LWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=A4idbkaf8pk1jsIWo52aFBVLVHYLO4lWF7mQFBDqdiI=) But first, we want to share something that caught our eye and reminded us why we do this work. A new report shows that in 17 states, the foxes are guarding the henhouse of our democracy. The States United Democracy Center has been tracking election deniers running for office. That group includes people who echoed Donald Trump’s unfounded conspiracy theories about the 2020 election or who’ve baselessly undermined election results since then. And their report found that **23 election deniers now serve in statewide offices overseeing elections in 17 states: seven governors, five secretaries of state, and 11 attorneys general.** Election deniers have used their positions of authority to hinder election administration, push dangerous unfounded claims of voter fraud, and pull out of an effort to ensure accurate voter rolls. These anti-voter extremists have no place in elected office. **We’re fighting to elect pro-voter candidates in 2023’s state and local races, the 2024 cycle, and beyond. And no matter how hard some politicians try to suppress the vote, we’ll work even harder to make sure eligible voters have the resources they need to cast their ballots.** But this work depends on grassroots support from activists like you. And we haven’t hit our fundraising goal for October. Reaching this target will inform how much we can invest in protecting the freedom to vote. [**Before Tuesday’s end-of-month fundraising deadline, can you make a donation of $20 or any amount to help defend free and fair elections?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72393783/435199932/-1399699140?amount=20&refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20231029_eom_deniers_v1s3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwN2FmMDFmNS02Nzc2LWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=A4idbkaf8pk1jsIWo52aFBVLVHYLO4lWF7mQFBDqdiI=) Together, The Fair Fight Team

A new report shows that in 17 states, the foxes are guarding the henhouse of our democracy. The States United Democracy Center has been tracking election deniers running for office. That group includes people who echoed Donald Trump’s unfounded conspiracy theories about the 2020 election or who’ve baselessly undermined election results since then. And their report found that 23 election deniers now serve in statewide offices overseeing elections in 17 states: seven governors, five secretaries of state, and 11 attorneys general. Election deniers have used their positions of authority to hinder election administration, push dangerous unfounded claims of voter fraud, and pull out of an effort to ensure accurate voter rolls. These anti-voter extremists have no place in elected office. We’re fighting to elect pro-voter candidates in 2023’s state and local races, the 2024 cycle, and beyond. And no matter how hard some politicians try to suppress the vote, we’ll work even harder to make sure eligible voters have the resources they need to cast their ballots. But this work depends on grassroots support from activists like you. And we haven’t hit our fundraising goal for October. Reaching this target will inform how much we can invest in protecting the freedom to vote. = Together, The Fair Fight Team ---|--- | * 1270 Caroline Street | Suite D120-430 | Atlanta, GA 30307 ©2023 Fair Fight - All rights reserved. Emails like this one are the best way to communicate updates with voting rights activists like you. Thank you for being in the fight to ensure access to democracy for all. If you would like to receive fewer emails from us, please click . If you would like to no longer receive emails, please . | | PAID FOR BY FAIR FIGHT

subject: I couldn't be more grateful

we have what it takes to win.
| | |

Friend, I'll start with the good news:
Thanks to grassroots Democrats like you who stepped up to help me reach my critical goal last quarter, **we OUTRAISED Rick Scott by six figures!**
This is a major victory for our movement. **It proves what I’ve always known: This people-powered team has what it takes to defeat my opponent and save our Senate majority. And I couldn't be more grateful to have you alongside me** — _thank you, friend._
But here's the thing: We can't afford to lose even an _ounce_ of momentum before my end-of-month deadline in less than 62 hours.
Rick Scott is one of the wealthiest members of the Senate. He can dip into his multi-million-dollar fortune — _or reach out to his far-right megadonors_ — whenever his campaign account is running low.
**But Scott won't risk a repeat of last quarter, and I'm already up against an onslaught of multi-million dollar attack ads. ****That's why I've set an ambitious $150,000 end-of-month goal to fight back — and I won't be able to hit it without your help, friend.**
Rick Scott thinks he can buy this seat — just like he did in 2018.**It's up to us to show him that on Election Day, corporate dollars don't decide the winner — people do.**

name: Gabby Giffords
subject: We cannot rest until we see a future free from gun violence
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
At GIFFORDS, we work day in and day out to end gun violence. We can only do this work through the support of people like you.
#

Friends -
When it comes to ending gun violence in our communities, the fight never stops.
Every day, innocent people in our nation are victims of gun violence. Just this past week, we watched tragedy unfold in Lewiston, Maine when 18 lives were stolen at the hands of a mass shooter. Countless others are victims of gun violence every single day—most of whose stories we don’t see in the headlines. We cannot rest until we see a future where we can live our lives without the risk or fear of gun violence.
At GIFFORDS, we work day in and day out to end gun violence. We research violence prevention solutions, we work to pass gun safety legislation, and we help elect leaders at every level of government who will prioritize ending our nation’s gun violence crisis.
That work is powered by the contributions made to GIFFORDS PAC from supporters like you.
In just two days, we’ll be facing our October fundraising deadline. Hitting our fundraising goals is so important. The goals we set are not arbitrary. We set them because we know that in order to stand up to the gun lobby’s large sums of corporate money, we have to reach certain thresholds in order to compete.
That’s why I’m humbly asking for your support today:
[**Will you contribute $3 or any amount that makes sense for you to GIFFORDS PAC before our October fundraising drive ends on Tuesday?**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-oct23.zcsGXG&refcode=em231029-1-30&t=1&akid=6799%2E3935704%2EtEOz3g)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_

Gabby Giffords

Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

name: End-of-Month Alert (via Courier)
subject: Will you help us build the nation's largest left-leaning news network?
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72395897/435207668/2130526953?refcode=emwrapper&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMmQxMzMyZDgtNmI3Ni1lZTExLWIwMDQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=FKaWkbqdKWIiFwvn53EqCcwVOVTyVig8CmRxaZAJl5E=&emci=4297eef6-cb74-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&emdi=2d1332d8-6b76-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&ceid=14016711)
Peter,
From right-wing disinformation campaigns to mainstream media focused more on turning a profit than serving the public, it’s _no wonder that 185 million Americans don’t trust the news._
**At Courier, we're doing something to change that.**
As the nation’s largest left-leaning local news network, we run a network of newsrooms in nine states (with more on the way) in key battleground states, where disinformation is spreading the fastest.
Every day, our talented team of journalists delivers factual news to readers who live in areas where honest, local news is hard to come by (if it even exists). We take the responsibility of delivering good, factual information seriously and will never compromise the truth or our values in our work.
**You can power this work by investing in Courier Newsroom with a donation today. So with two days left before our October fundraising deadline,[will you pitch in today so we can expand our network of left-leaning local newsrooms?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72395898/435207670/641188560?refcode=em20231029&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMmQxMzMyZDgtNmI3Ni1lZTExLWIwMDQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=FKaWkbqdKWIiFwvn53EqCcwVOVTyVig8CmRxaZAJl5E=)**
**[Pitch in ➡️](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72395899/435207671/641188560?refcode=em20231029&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMmQxMzMyZDgtNmI3Ni1lZTExLWIwMDQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=FKaWkbqdKWIiFwvn53EqCcwVOVTyVig8CmRxaZAJl5E=)**
**Your support could not come at a more crucial time.** Local newsrooms are disappearing left and right, and right-wing misinformation and disinformation have taken their place. This pattern has become so pervasive that **millions of Americans now believe in dangerous conspiracies about our democracy.**
**We’re fighting back with our innovative news model that attacks right-wing propaganda and misinformation at its source. At Courier we’re committed to:**
* Focusing on audiences without access to quality reporting who are vulnerable to misleading or false information.
* We don’t chase profits, and we don’t use jargon or lock our stories behind a paywall. We create meaningful, factual content that matters to the lives and communities of our readers.
* We target our news to the spaces where people spend most of their time — on social media newsfeeds, across inboxes, and in search engines where people look for information online.

In other words, we’re doing journalism radically different to fight the spread of bad information. And the best part? Our research shows we’ve already started to increase civic participation among our audiences. We know our model works.
**Right _now,_ we’re mobilizing a community of grassroots supporters who want to help us fight disinformation in their local communities, and we’re hoping you’ll join us!**
Together, we can beat the right-wing propaganda ecosystem, reclaim our voices in our communities, and strengthen our democracy for good.

clean_body: Peter, From right-wing disinformation campaigns to mainstream media focused more on turning a profit than serving the public, it’s no wonder that 185 million Americans don’t trust the news. At Courier, we're doing something to change that. As the nation’s largest left-leaning local news network, we run a network of newsrooms in nine states (with more on the way) in key battleground states, where disinformation is spreading the fastest. Every day, our talented team of journalists delivers factual news to readers who live in areas where honest, local news is hard to come by (if it even exists). We take the responsibility of delivering good, factual information seriously and will never compromise the truth or our values in our work. You can power this work by investing in Courier Newsroom with a donation today. So with two days left before our October fundraising deadline,= = Your support could not come at a more crucial time. Local newsrooms are disappearing left and right, and right-wing misinformation and disinformation have taken their place. This pattern has become so pervasive that millions of Americans now believe in dangerous conspiracies about our democracy. We’re fighting back with our innovative news model that attacks right-wing propaganda and misinformation at its source. At Courier we’re committed to: Focusing on audiences without access to quality reporting who are vulnerable to misleading or false information. We don’t chase profits, and we don’t use jargon or lock our stories behind a paywall. We create meaningful, factual content that matters to the lives and communities of our readers. We target our news to the spaces where people spend most of their time — on social media newsfeeds, across inboxes, and in search engines where people look for information online. In other words, we’re doing journalism radically different to fight the spread of bad information. And the best part? Our research shows we’ve already started to increase civic participation among our audiences. We know our model works. Right now, we’re mobilizing a community of grassroots supporters who want to help us fight disinformation in their local communities, and we’re hoping you’ll join us! Together, we can beat the right-wing propaganda ecosystem, reclaim our voices in our communities, and strengthen our democracy for good. = = Together, — The Courier Team Email us: mailto:info@couriernewsroom.com

Should the US be importing refugees from Gaza?

In Freedom,

Team DeSantis

Team DeSantis

Subject: Should your neighborhood be war-torn?
Friend,

We'd like to know your opinion.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=30bc832cc4f522d3d6581c79eedfe01c5d0db981c0230e16b0f167ff6f77a755b4aa3634aced3a5425e80f413251d75af3ac27cc2f7e9c71881d5330a8ad21e2

SHOULD THE US HOUSE GAZA REFUGEES?

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=30bc832cc4f522d326c78f12adce4a8d1deb2306cbc3da7f2da13094e08161cc61836d9c5b04d2a67a0440b62e3a57c8fdcb1ae897aa81472f30e8a3e4b4ee87
YES

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=30bc832cc4f522d3402be90d5bc5198e6a4c7fd38e3150fca6552bafff971d28e35ce2e3d335becfeb4a74492ad12b47054465d270e4f8f508fac520adc4a757
NO

Our country is being crippled under the weight of illegal immigration run rampant over our border and across our country. Now, we're seeing radical mobs parade through streets celebrating Hamas terrorism.

Why would we continue to endanger the American people by allowing Palestinian Arabs from Gaza to pour in?

"First of all, we don't have the capacity. We have an open border as it is; we don't even know who the hell's coming into our country right now. So put that aside, what you have in Gaza, you have toxic culture where they teach Jew hatred, the textbooks that the kids learn in school don't even have Israel on the map. And so this is stuff that's really embedded in that culture. So importing that to the United States, you know, would increase antisemitism and increase anti-Americanism. We can't do that. But I'd say anybody that comes to this country, to me, you know, if you don't believe in this country, if you don't share the values of this country, you are not getting admitted to this country." — Ron DeSantis

Ron DeSantis is actively fighting to restore American values, protect American citizens from further decline, and close our border to the criminals flooding our country with murder and drugs.

In Freedom,

Team DeSantis

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=30bc832cc4f522d361ea55980f2236a9bf39c6a66e721e2ec665c4e100c5b884d1df1ae7d3437b62808e9ff1985a54494bc9caae6126d40488d5c7cdcd433e2e

🚨 ATTENTION 🚨

Our grassroots team drives our every success, and we know we ask a lot of you to help us win this critical election. As this race continues to heat up, we will be relying on our supporters to help us go the distance, and we want to make sure we respect your preferences when we reach out to you. here.

Volunteer!

We welcome you to join Team DeSantis by volunteering to spread our message: Decline is a choice. Success is attainable. And freedom is worth fighting for.

Help us lead our Great American Comeback by getting involved today!

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=30bc832cc4f522d34a581d12eec431263d637e6f8d8980a5bd17fe094b33c9a53a1134aa7caaa43c5d01006ccd248a7849371ebf61289de04dfb0024402a9853
Sign up here!

Get to Know Ron DeSantis

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=30bc832cc4f522d3d6581c79eedfe01c5d0db981c0230e16b0f167ff6f77a755b4aa3634aced3a5425e80f413251d75af3ac27cc2f7e9c71881d5330a8ad21e2

Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain.

After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom.

When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor.

Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide.

In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is personal and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=30bc832cc4f522d3d6581c79eedfe01c5d0db981c0230e16b0f167ff6f77a755b4aa3634aced3a5425e80f413251d75af3ac27cc2f7e9c71881d5330a8ad21e2

On Day One, Ron DeSantis has promised that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by immediately getting to work stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late.

In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He’s taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and won every single time. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon.

That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now.

Over these past few months, I’ve been truly blown away by the enthusiasm and generosity of this grassroots team. [**(If you haven’t yet had a chance to donate to support Virginia Democrats, you can pitch in here.)**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72395923/435207701/851989849?refcode=EM_BS_LUR_231029_FR_LongestEmail_A0_na_U1_X1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDA3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZjEzMzJkOC02Yjc2LWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=c9xApaE6Z1ts7l0WC1_H4al47V50_NTNrXvBC2ZF5t4=) Together, we’ve left an indelible mark on this race. In these final days, I want to explain our strategy so far, and how we’re still fighting to elect a Democratic majority in November. **Defend Democracy** It’s our responsibility to ensure that democracy endures in the Commonwealth. That’s why I founded Defend Democracy PAC – to stop Republicans from subverting democracy for political gain. Our mission from the beginning has been to elect responsible leaders who will stand up for the truth, expand voting access, and encourage greater participation in our democracy. Moreover, Defend Democracy PAC is making sure voters get the accurate information they need to participate in this all-important election. **Protect Freedom & Choice in Virginia** It’s difficult to convey the severity of the threat to abortion rights in Virginia if Democrats fall short this November. Put simply, Gov. Youngkin could have the majorities he needs to ban abortion by January 2024. And safe, legal abortion isn’t the only freedom on the chopping block. At the first opportunity, Republicans will enact a host of voter suppression laws to restrict participation in our democracy to a select few, chip away at the rights of workers to organize, and dismantle our public education system. **Protecting freedom starts with defending our slim State Senate majority – and even better if we flip the House of Delegates in November.** **I’m proud to say that we’ve disbursed a total of $315,000 directly to battleground Democrats.** Those funds wouldn’t exist without you, and I’m so grateful that you’re still with us as the clock winds down. [**So, with two days until our final End-of-Month deadline, will you chip in $25 or more to help us make one last push for Democrats in Virginia?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72395924/435207702/851989849?refcode=EM_BS_LUR_231029_FR_LongestEmail_A0_na_U1_X1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDA3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZjEzMzJkOC02Yjc2LWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=c9xApaE6Z1ts7l0WC1_H4al47V50_NTNrXvBC2ZF5t4=) | | | [Donate $25](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72395925/435207703/851989849?refcode=EM_BS_LUR_231029_FR_LongestEmail_A0_na_U1_X1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDA3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZjEzMzJkOC02Yjc2LWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=c9xApaE6Z1ts7l0WC1_H4al47V50_NTNrXvBC2ZF5t4=)

name: Sandra Bishop
subject: [Membership Update] Peter, here’s what it takes to transform politics
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Emerge America This email was sent by Emerge America
body:
| | | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/72395918/435207694/-1986725773?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1346-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjMxMTMzMmQ4LTZiNzYtZWUxMS1iMDA0LTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=aOSg_3WiulkLGvypE8zHFEZ6vaVG8L5PIgdW-3813u0=)
---
Peter – Emerge works year in and year out to build a bench of powerhouse Democratic women. That’s how we seize the opportunity to transform politics at every level – and run the right candidate in the right races at the right time.

**[In just a minute, I’m going to ask for your help to hit our crucial end-of-month goal and keep advancing our winning strategy.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/72395919/435207695/-1986725773?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1346-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjMxMTMzMmQ4LTZiNzYtZWUxMS1iMDA0LTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=aOSg_3WiulkLGvypE8zHFEZ6vaVG8L5PIgdW-3813u0=) But first, here’s why your support matters at this pivotal moment for our democracy: **
**9 ****That’s how many days until the November elections THIS YEAR.** Emerge has known from the start that 2023 would be a critical election year, and we’ve been ramping up our work to empower Democratic women to meet this moment.
**200+ ** **That’s how many trailblazing Emerge women are on the ballot right now** – poised to achieve historic firsts, build crucial blue firewalls in bellwether states, and take us ever closer to strong, women-led Democratic majorities across the country.
**30+ ** We urgently need NEW voices in politics, but first-time candidates usually win at a rate of only about 10 percent. But in 2022, **Emerge’s first-time candidates won at a rate of 43 percent, a 30+ point jump! **
**500 That’s how many Emerge community members we need to make an Emerge membership gift before our end-of-month deadline** so we can keep empowering Democratic women to victory this November and beyond. We must seize the opportunity to build a truly representative government that puts our rights and our communities first!

| | [DONATE NOW ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/72395920/435207696/-1986725773?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1346-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjMxMTMzMmQ4LTZiNzYtZWUxMS1iMDA0LTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=aOSg_3WiulkLGvypE8zHFEZ6vaVG8L5PIgdW-3813u0=)
---
**We count on community members like you, who know how high the stakes are, to power our work to recruit and train the leaders we need and deserve. But our deadline is approaching fast, so please: **
**[Make a membership gift of $5 or more to Emerge now to power our women-led movement. Every dollar will go towards our proven programs to help Democratic women run, win, and change the face of politics in every state.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/72395921/435207697/-1986725773?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1346-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjMxMTMzMmQ4LTZiNzYtZWUxMS1iMDA0LTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=aOSg_3WiulkLGvypE8zHFEZ6vaVG8L5PIgdW-3813u0=)**
Thank you for your urgent support today,

Sandra Bishop
Chief Development Officer, Emerge

name: Virginia House Democrats
subject: This is very serious
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Long Run PAC, P
body:
#
**All 140 seats of Virginia’s state legislature are on the ballot, and if the MAGA GOP takes full control, they will ban abortion.**
That’s it, that’s the truth.**
We’re working desperately around the clock to protect reproductive freedom in Virginia, the last Southern state to have access to this essential healthcare. But Republicans are not backing down.
[**We must band together and fight back: will you split a contribution between the Virginia Democrats and The Long Run now to help us win this fight? »**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-vadems-split.HpfcE0&refcode=em231029-1-t2&t=1&akid=4958%2E196590%2EPuMU6n)
[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-vadems-split.HpfcE0&refcode=em231029-1-t2&t=2&akid=4958%2E196590%2EPuMU6n)
It’s clear: if Republicans buy a MAGA majority in the House, Glenn Youngkin will “happily and gleefully” sign any abortion ban that comes to his desk.
Republicans have shown us who they are. Just this year, Virginia Republicans introduced abortion ban after abortion ban. For years they have put forward legislation to shame and punish women who seek care. And let’s not forget the leader of the House Republicans voted against abortion over 40 times.
Up until this point, we’ve been able to hold the line and protect our freedoms thanks to a narrow majority in the Senate. But Republicans are laser focused on winning total control. _If they win the trifecta – there will be nothing we can do to stop them._
**It all comes down to these next 10 days. This is the last stand.**
That’s why we need every single one of our supporters to take action - with support from grassroots Democrats like you, we can block their far-right agenda, and elect leaders who will protect our fundamental freedoms. [**Time is running out, will you split a contribution between the Virginia Democrats and The Long Run right now in this final chance to protect reproductive freedom? »**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-vadems-split.HpfcE0&refcode=em231029-1-t2&t=3&akid=4958%2E196590%2EPuMU6n)
Thank you for standing alongside us,
VA House Dems

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you. We'd hate to see you go, but if you'd like you can [**unsubscribe here**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=4&akid=4958%2E196590%2EPuMU6n). You can also [**sign up to receive fewer emails.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/signup/fewer-emails/?source=em-footer&t=5&akid=4958%2E196590%2EPuMU6n)
The Long Run PAC is funded by grassroots donors giving what they can, when they can. [**Make a contribution to The Long Run PAC today.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/longrunpac-em-footer?refcode=em-footer&t=6&refcode2=4958_196590_PuMU6n&akid=4958%2E196590%2EPuMU6n)
Submit this form to [**update your contact information.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/signup/update-contact-info/?source=em-footer&t=7&akid=4958%2E196590%2EPuMU6n)
Paid for by The Long Run PAC, P.O. Box 597
Milwaukee, WI 53201, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.

[**Click here to join our virtual Ceasefire Now event, happening tonight at 8 pm ET / 5 pm PT.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/SVVf6UGddUySPN6znLYVWqhFH81qQkGDaHYHgqP4kZzjI203EXAXSXzQJ3dmlHf9sRdc671slMPYohB2iv27PZGr66ch4qJOoe4vGgEjm341SLE3QrTV3rCWL_f0c2pJ-ck6rDmksc2A98r15tkQ0aWWxosJ6ElBKeNwJom3gPrLxdQTFgWqmCaPvsEvNawLSp5ZOC0T3znjrCXrRwa-e5IJsKOgfF4QSaAmCCNGxWDQ1RG4TFOBFbcJ-KfTijOCeDkDmrsEV0cS9Ab9lLyz73Dy7ZZiJigrariPkQ7FWMs4tw-pvy-6GWO4713JWeC4bHBnMDiKGFBVTzmEOK9t1Q/40u/trcddS4lRV2gVVdIOOixoQ/h1/EYOy5o-Z_UvuxAWnVAMvdK6If29EF-6nuXCn0gcDRbk) **After you click the link, use the following passcode to join the call: 102023**
---
Friend,

clean_body: The reality is we need everyone involved to give what they can to show that this team is stronger than ever before. | | | Peter, We have made major strides building a country that prioritizes everyday Americans, but Joe and Kamala agree -- our work is not finished. Americans have seen what the other side has to offer: an extreme and out-of-touch agenda. We rejected it in 2020, and we’ll reject it again in 2024. But the reality is Joe and Kamala can’t win this fight alone. This has been a grassroots campaign from day one, and it’s going to take a massive show of support from this team to make sure Joe and Kamala’s message is reaching voters all over the country. We know we’ve got a tough fight ahead of us in 2024 and it’s up to us to reelect Joe and Kamala and continue building on the progress we’ve made. With your support, we know we will. \-- Team Biden-Harris

subject: Fellow Conservative, your response is vital!

body:
I wanted to reach out and introduce myself because, Friend, I hear you are one of our most dedicated grassroots supporters. |
---

|
Hi there Friend,

It's Speaker of the House, Mike Johnson.

_**I wanted to reach out and introduce myself because, Friend, I hear you are one of our most dedicated grassroots supporters. **_

I was raised in Shreveport, LA. My father was a firefighter who taught me early the importance of service and sacrifice.

I attended Louisiana State University, where I received a degree in business and later my law degree.

As a constitutional lawyer, I worked tirelessly to protect religious freedom, the sanctity of human life, and biblical values.

---

Speaker Mike Johnson
