name: Matthew Lucci
subject: I Visited Every County in TX-25
body:
Hi!

If this is your first time reading the weekly Lucci Letter, welcome! It’s
great to have you on the team as we campaign to Take Our Country Back in
Texas’ 25th US Congressional District. I'd love to hear from you, so hit
"reply" and let me know what's on your mind!

It's been a couple of weeks since my last email, because I've been very
busy crisscrossing the district for the Take Our Country Back Tour. Over
the course of 12 days, my team and I drove over 5,000 miles, met over 2,000
voters, visited over 40 towns, and toured each of the 13 counties in our
district. Why did I do this? Because I believe that everyone in Texas' 25th
Congressional District should be represented by someone who's fighting for
*US*, not for the DC establishment. For over a decade, we've been ignored
by our congressman, who has been more concerned with running for Speaker
than fighting for us that call Texas our home. It's almost comical that the
day he announced his run for Speaker of the House, he forgot which district
that he represents
<https://youtube.com/shorts/eCtVbdaL4e8?si=2mYMP1uL3jtj6DeC>. We deserve
better.

In the meantime, I've been very active across the 25th Congressional
District.

I met with the Sheriffs of 4 counties, along with multiple Police Chiefs to
learn how to best support our local law enforcement. In each community,
they told me that drugs like meth and fentanyl were lead drivers of crime,
and often interlaced with mental health challenges that are becoming more
pervasive. For example, one person dies of fentanyl poisoning in Tarrant
County every two and a half hours. That's not just adults, that's also kids
who don't know what they're taking. In fact, teachers at Arlington ISD told
me that cartels are using kids to sell pills laced with fentanyl to their
middle school classmates.

I've dedicated my life to ending the fentanyl crisis in this country. That
includes securing the border, addressing the demand for drugs in America,
and interrupting the supply from overseas. That's how we'll keep our
communities safe, and make it easier for our local police to do their job.
I'll be rolling out a robust plan to support our law enforcement this
November.
[image: image.png]
After a ride-along with Chief Birbeck in Olney

Business owners across the district have spoken to me about how hard it is
to run their small businesses in this economy. A dollar is worth less than
it's ever been, food is more expensive than it's ever been, and governments
at all levels want to increase our taxes. I joined the BreakDown with Greg
Cooper to discuss the school bonds on the ballot in Johnson County. Hint:
I'm opposed to massive bong packages that add millions in debt to fund
politicians' projects. See the full show here
<https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=v42MLgY2MoM>.
[image: Breakdown 1.JPG]
Discussing School Bond Packages on JoCo Radio

[image: image.png]
Meeting with voters in Glen Rose

*Remember to go vote on the 14 Texas State Constitutional Amendments on or
before November 7th. *There are also city council and ISD elections in some
parts of the district (including Granbury and Rio Vista). Unfortunately,
there's a lot of bonds on the ballot this time around (Johnson County and
Joshua, to name a couple). If you don't want a tax increase, go vote
against it.

My team is putting together a short documentary of our Take OurCountry Back
tour, which will be available on YouTube and Facebook next Sunday! I'll
send you the link when it goes live. Make sure that you're following on
social media if you want to keep up with my campaign in the meantime.

[image: image.png]
Encouraging Runners at the Crazy Water Festival 5K

[image: image.png]
Thanking Veterans for their service to our nation

Like I mentioned before, multiple organizations have offered to host a
debate between the incumbent and I. We’ve reached out to him, and spoken
with his team when they come to our events, but Roger Williams refuses to
engage in a debate on the issues that matter to us in TX-25. After 12 years
in Congress, maybe he thinks he’s too good for us. It’s time that we elect
a new representative and Take Our Country Back from elitist career
politicians.

*We've been incredibly efficient with our use of funds (no $600 steak
dinners in DC for us!), but serious campaigns are not cheap. I could really
use your help to get to our fundraising goal this month. Could you forward
this email to someone and ask them to chip in $25
<https://secure.winred.com/lucci-for-congress/donate-today>to help us
connect with voters and Take Our Country Back? *

Thank you for not just supporting this campaign, but standing up for the
future of our country.

God Bless You!
[image: Matthew Lucci Signature.png]

*PS- If you'd like to unsubscribe, just reply and let me know.*

--
*--*
*Matthew Lucci for Congress TX-25*
LucciForTexas@gmail.com
(682) 220-9925
*www.LucciForTexas.com <http://www.luccifortexas.com/>*

We’ve reached out to him, and spoken with his team when they come to our events, but Roger Williams refuses to engage in a debate on the issues that matter to us in TX-25. After 12 years in Congress, maybe he thinks he’s too good for us. It’s time that we elect a new representative and Take Our Country Back from elitist career politicians. We've been incredibly efficient with our use of funds (no $600 steak dinners in DC for us!), but serious campaigns are not cheap. I could really use your help to get to our fundraising goal this month. Could you forward this email to someone and ask them to chip in $25 <>to help us connect with voters and Take Our Country Back? Thank you for not just supporting this campaign, but standing up for the future of our country. God Bless You! [image: Matthew Lucci Signature.png] PS- If you'd like to unsubscribe, just reply and let me know. -- -- Matthew Lucci for Congress TX-25 LucciForTexas@gmail.com (682) 220-9925 www.LucciForTexas.com <>

body:
When we think about the people who have done the most to support VoteVets over the years, it’s not the people who write the biggest checks who come to mind.
#
Derek -
When we think about the people who have done the most to support VoteVets over the years, it’s not the people who write the biggest checks who come to mind.
It’s the people who were there when everything was on the line.
Like you, Derek.

Your support, voice, and participation has helped us run some of the most powerful election ads out there and flipped races for Democrats.
It’s helped us fight for things that matter most to Veterans. It’s helped us get three seats filled on the Joint Chiefs of Staff after a months-long blockade from Tommy Tuberville. And it will lead to big victories in 2024.

But here’s an interesting fact: out of almost 2 million people who have taken action with VoteVets, only 1% have made a donation to support our work.
Today, we’re asking you to join that select group.

Our average donation is $25. Some give more, many give less. But with the GOP waging an all-out assault on our Military, all that matters is that you’re choosing to power our work with a donation before our end-of-month deadline ends at midnight Tuesday.
We’ll put it right to work fighting and defeating these liars and hypocrites in the most important election cycle in modern American history — the one we’re in right now.
[**If helping VoteVets run some of the most effective election ads of the cycle, ads that win races seems worth $5 to you, we’re humbly asking you to make that donation before our deadline on Tuesday. We need you. Thank you.**](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-oct23.zemByr&refcode=em231029-1-30&t=1&akid=18246%2E3013755%2EYQ7vFM)

Donations from people just like you help this campaign better connect with our community. name: Jayapal HQ
subject: We’re down to the wire
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
Even amidst the pushback from the GOP, Pramila is determined to quench the chaos and keep fighting for the American people.
#
We're down to the wire, Peter.
With just two days to reach our end of month goal to raise $16,433, we wanted to ask you one question:
[**What can we say to inspire you to make a contribution to our campaign and help us reach our goal?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/46612?refcode=em20231029-3097&t=1&akid=3097%2E420207%2E46DrrH)
**What if we told you that our average contribution of $14.57 is what has kept our campaign’s momentum going?** Not mega-donors or corporate PACs who actively work against our values.
Or what if we told you that Pramila is one of the few progressive voices who are determined to call out corruption, injustice, and harmful leadership in Congress? **** Even amidst the pushback from the GOP, Pramila is determined to quench the chaos and keep fighting for the American people.
[**This fight will take all of us**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/46612?refcode=em20231029-3097&t=2&akid=3097%2E420207%2E46DrrH)[**, Peter. And when all of us come together, we will have the resources to protect and re-elect Pramila. Can we count on you to make a donation of $3 or more today?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/46612?refcode=em20231029-3097&t=3&akid=3097%2E420207%2E46DrrH)
**[Contribute](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/46612?refcode=em20231029-3097&t=22&akid=3097%2E420207%2E46DrrH)**

clean_body: Even amidst the pushback from the GOP, Pramila is determined to quench the chaos and keep fighting for the American people. We're down to the wire, Peter. With just two days to reach our end of month goal to raise $16,433, we wanted to ask you one question: What if we told you that our average contribution of $14.57 is what has kept our campaign’s momentum going? Not mega-donors or corporate PACs who actively work against our values. Or what if we told you that Pramila is one of the few progressive voices who are determined to call out corruption, injustice, and harmful leadership in Congress? ** Even amidst the pushback from the GOP, Pramila is determined to quench the chaos and keep fighting for the American people. name: Speaker Mike Johnson
subject: My first message to grassroots conservatives
body:
I’m humbled.

[View in Web Browser](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJw8kMtu6yAURb_mMIsFBwyXAYPbRqSK0kEHyRzziFFx7PrRyn9fxU07PY-1l7brhpLTakA9AWKbwwSIwP8D4jLzizufX8d1F_vT7lBf8Hpf4jMgzusQ_y4fkCp2Lpf7VO1JMAIdS55Ew6T-V2sutCCt4Y10EmMjVWJaRJ0UFcpR7XXjmQicZIMUOaOoWc0Z0or5hIrWiXvBnQ8aBN2CqjTGOLf59h7H4HJZK993pJh2nodpE7OAtg9NdVt8icv08-X7DtA-lAHtJ6DFt4_D8WVwzQjcbiXw_Skel2t9lGQ0YfjKpeRJKhD0-kv5DgAA__9rNV88) | [Unsubscribe](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJw8kL1u6zAMhZ-G3mJIpGRFg4Z7G7hAkI7Jrsh0LFT-gWWj8NsXSd2uh-THD8f3U4rt5sD8B8QuNhkQgf4B4rrQzV-vH_N24PFyeNc3fDyH-AaIyzbx3-YOKbn3MT1Tcyoap9DLNhTsZGWP2pKyquicJ28qoYSWkqxBQyxMOEohW3HUtuIiOhRIUqCVmiSKUoYWjdAtBUU-NBaUeD0q25l56eLwyXPjY9rKMPZFct2yTPklVgPWY3MvhzUkXvPPVRh7wHpXBqzzes9hjtMSxyED1uuwJ3cGql-N0OnC5_Whz1Uxu2b6iinFXBlQ4vGL_A4AAP__7jhkZA)

| Friend, it is the honor of a lifetime to serve as the 56th Speaker of the House. I’m humbled that my Republican colleagues in the House united behind me as the next Republican Speaker, and I owe everyone who voted for them a debt of gratitude. It’s a debt I intend to repay by being the best servant leader I can be. The Speaker’s gavel is a solemn responsibility, especially in a time like this when the course of history will be set by our actions over the next year. I relied on my faith in God each day before I was Speaker, and I’ll continue to do so each day after. **Scripture is very clear: God is the one who raises those up in authority.** _**I believe that each one of us in Congress has a huge responsibility, to use the gifts that God has given us to serve the people of this great country, for one simple reason; they deserve it.**_ I’m determined to save our country from the powers which seek to destroy it, but I cannot do that alone.
---
| [ **DONATE NOW** ](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJw8kEGvnCAUhX_NdaeBC-q4cNHWTDft8r2tQbgorYhByGT-fcNk-rbnfOE7XOXP3dnnCP13QNycuQARxDdAzEl8qo-P3_FZU_hV_2w_cS0l_gDE9Dzpi3w_0pBXbi9pP1VmlKi41RWNvBtu7SDkIKttXFhH_U0KJKskYy3XuEjeCt1bxvhtqNyIDAVnOPBWcGQN1xZ71lqhpVDaDCDZS9TYSJQ2d_ylaJTbn40OvtrHLaXzeg27A94v0jlS83BHJFMIwPsW8kX1Gs56USnttMaQD1PbfJjSroudTTjm4GeKs_9Te5rjNb9n9SDuyod8JBBTywC7WBTRHSuIKcVMgF1Ofr5CjppATGeK78iTcdmDmJb_iVb-VG49QEwvUfl3Eb3rRLHgNhlexdGcD7fv7up6kGx93UAH_y8AAP__qUyNrg)
---
I’m humbly asking patriots to unite together in our common cause of protecting and preserving the Constitution for generations to come and reigniting the promise of America for every citizen of this great country. **[Right now, I’m focused on getting Republicans back to work on the promises we made to voters, but I also desperately need to boost my fundraising so we can not only maintain, but grow our conservative majority.](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJw8kEGvnCAUhX_NdaeBC-q4cNHWTDft8r2tQbgorYhByGT-fcNk-rbnfOE7XOXP3dnnCP13QNycuQARxDdAzEl8qo-P3_FZU_hV_2w_cS0l_gDE9Dzpi3w_0pBXbi9pP1VmlKi41RWNvBtu7SDkIKttXFhH_U0KJKskYy3XuEjeCt1bxvhtqNyIDAVnOPBWcGQN1xZ71lqhpVDaDCDZS9TYSJQ2d_ylaJTbn40OvtrHLaXzeg27A94v0jlS83BHJFMIwPsW8kX1Gs56USnttMaQD1PbfJjSroudTTjm4GeKs_9Te5rjNb9n9SDuyod8JBBTywC7WBTRHSuIKcVMgF1Ofr5CjppATGeK78iTcdmDmJb_iVb-VG49QEwvUfl3Eb3rRLHgNhlexdGcD7fv7up6kGx93UAH_y8AAP__qUyNrg) **
| [ **DONATE NOW** ](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJw8kEGvnCAUhX_NdaeBC-q4cNHWTDft8r2tQbgorYhByGT-fcNk-rbnfOE7XOXP3dnnCP13QNycuQARxDdAzEl8qo-P3_FZU_hV_2w_cS0l_gDE9Dzpi3w_0pBXbi9pP1VmlKi41RWNvBtu7SDkIKttXFhH_U0KJKskYy3XuEjeCt1bxvhtqNyIDAVnOPBWcGQN1xZ71lqhpVDaDCDZS9TYSJQ2d_ylaJTbn40OvtrHLaXzeg27A94v0jlS83BHJFMIwPsW8kX1Gs56USnttMaQD1PbfJjSroudTTjm4GeKs_9Te5rjNb9n9SDuyod8JBBTywC7WBTRHSuIKcVMgF1Ofr5CjppATGeK78iTcdmDmJb_iVb-VG49QEwvUfl3Eb3rRLHgNhlexdGcD7fv7up6kGx93UAH_y8AAP__qUyNrg)
---
There are dozens of highly competitive battleground seats that we must win in 2024, or Hakeem Jeffries will take the Speaker's Gavel and immediately go back to business as usual on January 4th, 2025. **Saving our country from the Radical Left is not a small task, and it will require an overwhelming effort from grassroots conservatives from every county in every state.** [**If you’re able, I’d be humbled to have your support.**](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJw8kEGvnCAUhX_NdaeBC-q4cNHWTDft8r2tQbgorYhByGT-fcNk-rbnfOE7XOXP3dnnCP13QNycuQARxDdAzEl8qo-P3_FZU_hV_2w_cS0l_gDE9Dzpi3w_0pBXbi9pP1VmlKi41RWNvBtu7SDkIKttXFhH_U0KJKskYy3XuEjeCt1bxvhtqNyIDAVnOPBWcGQN1xZ71lqhpVDaDCDZS9TYSJQ2d_ylaJTbn40OvtrHLaXzeg27A94v0jlS83BHJFMIwPsW8kX1Gs56USnttMaQD1PbfJjSroudTTjm4GeKs_9Te5rjNb9n9SDuyod8JBBTywC7WBTRHSuIKcVMgF1Ofr5CjppATGeK78iTcdmDmJb_iVb-VG49QEwvUfl3Eb3rRLHgNhlexdGcD7fv7up6kGx93UAH_y8AAP__qUyNrg) _In Liberty,_ Speaker Mike Johnson
| **Paid for by House GOP Battleground Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Elise for Congress, E-PAC, and NY Republican Federal Campaign Committee.** **[https://gopbattlegroundfund.com/](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJw8jrtuxCAURL8GurXg8goFRR5ymqTc7TEXbBT8kI0V-e8jW9G2M0dnxo9LyelwxLwRgCHjRgCIeCUAexUPf79_r8ctzl-3T_WA_izhnQDUY4lP8l_SxNHncqbmg6KT4HkKNDqu7YuyQlpJBxeU18GAwCgkGlQYu9Axq7XXgqPsaHbAQHAGlivBgTU8JDBMJRGk8AEtkewaatIaYx3y9BNX9LkcTZhHWtxQ67Jdx1oCbT8vna-1xH6d9wnTPuHJEWjp6nD5zaXkTRsiWX9Jwzz-BQAA__9M9VPR)**

body:
WOW
| [ ](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/26910?t=1&akid=20346%2E4449941%2EniC9LU)
---
**_Jamie Raskin just STUNNED House Republicans in his closing remarks:_** [ ](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/agree-w-raskin-Oct?source=FFR_20231029_EMPET_E1_T0_AC_RS&t=7&akid=20346%2E4449941%2EniC9LU) | [25,000 SIGNATURES NEEDED TO SAVE PRESIDENT BIDEN: ADD YOUR NAME IF YOU AGREE WITH JAMIE RASKIN »](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/agree-w-raskin-Oct?source=FFR_20231029_EMPET_E1_T0_AC_RS&t=8&akid=20346%2E4449941%2EniC9LU)
---
* * *
Listen, even Republicans’ own witnesses admitted there’s no evidence that President Biden committed a crime! **WOW!**
**IF** we expose the sham impeachment inquiry for what it is – _a partisan witch hunt with no basis in reality_ – then we can stop it in its tracks!

**BUT IF** we sit back and do nothing, Republicans will continue to lie and tarnish President Biden’s reputation – **_ensuring another Trump Presidency._**
[**_So we need to know that you agree with Rep. Jamie Raskin: Add your name if you agree with Raskin that MAGA Republicans’ impeachment inquiry is about NOTHING »_**](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/agree-w-raskin-Oct?source=FFR_20231029_EMPET_E1_T0_AC_RS&t=9&akid=20346%2E4449941%2EniC9LU)
[25,000 SIGNATURES NEEDED TO SAVE PRESIDENT BIDEN: ADD YOUR NAME IF YOU AGREE WITH JAMIE RASKIN »](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/agree-w-raskin-Oct?source=FFR_20231029_EMPET_E1_T0_AC_RS&t=10&akid=20346%2E4449941%2EniC9LU)

We won’t sit back and let Republicans bury President Biden with their lies!

Thank you for speaking out,

– Fight for Reform

subject: Re: Sunday

body:
|
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=1425%2E35263%2EAB0c-1)
Hey Peter — I hate to bother you on a Sunday, but I need to share something important with you. My team just let me know what we’re behind on our October fundraising goal, and the deadline is just two days away. That’s a problem because while our fundraising slows down, Republicans are making plans to spend a fortune on Wisconsin’s Senate race. As we speak, the GOP is recruiting a right-wing megamillionaire willing to spend up to $20 million of his own cash to defeat me. That’s why I’m reaching out with an important request. I know that these emails can be a bit pesky sometimes — and trust me, the last thing I want to do is ask you for your hard earned money. But the truth is, these emails make a huge difference for our team. If we’re going to protect my seat from right-wing self-funders, then we need to hit every single one of our fundraising goals — including this one. But we can’t do it without you, so I’m personally asking: **[Will you please pitch in to help my reelection campaign reach our end-of-month goal before the deadline expires this Tuesday?](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-oct23.ejjIam&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20231029_PM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=1425%2E35263%2EAB0c-1)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $5 NOW](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2150?c0=tbe-em-oct23.p1cCjd&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20231029_PM1_V1_S1&t=5&akid=1425%2E35263%2EAB0c-1)

This month has been...enlightening, to say the least, Peter.

After being without a Speaker for almost three weeks, Republicans finally elected insurrectionist, anti-woman, and anti-LGBT Mike Johnson as the next Speaker of the House. He’s as radical as they come and he poses a serious threat to democracy. Guess what else? Every single Arizona Republican in the House voted to confirm him including my opponent David Schweikert.

I’m running for Congress because the people of this district are tired of the petty political games. They want someone who will **strengthen our district’s small businesses** , someone to **invest in our economy and infrastructure,** and someone who will **uphold our sacred democracy**.

[I’m all in on this race, but my October fundraising deadline is Tuesday at midnight. Can you spare $10 or $25 to ensure that I meet my fundraising goal and FLIP this seat from red to blue?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72399428/435219281/1075697501?source=SBD_CO_EM_FR_102723_1_1_EOM&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc0NDIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiM2ViNWNjYWYtNzI3Ni1lZTExLWIwMDQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=aZ99Oa0oYKfFAnhPv-kxgBeDyecLbKv1pivNDdNJp6I=) | [Help me flip this seat →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72399429/435219282/1075697501?source=SBD_CO_EM_FR_102723_1_1_EOM&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc0NDIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiM2ViNWNjYWYtNzI3Ni1lZTExLWIwMDQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=aZ99Oa0oYKfFAnhPv-kxgBeDyecLbKv1pivNDdNJp6I=)

clean_body: A proud Arizonan and lifelong Democrat, Conor O'Callaghan is running to represent Arizona's 1st Congressional District and unseat MAGA Republican David Schweikert. If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | This month has been...enlightening, to say the least, Peter. After being without a Speaker for almost three weeks, Republicans finally elected insurrectionist, anti-woman, and anti-LGBT Mike Johnson as the next Speaker of the House. He’s as radical as they come and he poses a serious threat to democracy. Guess what else? Every single Arizona Republican in the House voted to confirm him including my opponent David Schweikert. I’m running for Congress because the people of this district are tired of the petty political games. They want someone who will strengthen our district’s small businesses , someone to invest in our economy and infrastructure, and someone who will uphold our sacred democracy. = | = I really believe we can flip this seat, Peter. It has gone from a district that Republicans consistently won by double-digits to a district that was essentially 50-50 in the last election. That’s a big deal. = If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now. | = | = | = | = | = | = Schweikert is out; common sense is in. subject: The most expensive media markets in the country
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
| Adam doesn’t take a dime from corporate PACs, so we’ll need even more grassroots support to run the ads and get our message out there.
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=4339%2E5257348%2EqylqCY)
Derek —
**In just a few weeks, Adam and our team are going to make decisions about the biggest investment of our campaign: Reserving television ads.**
Television and digital ads are one of the best ways to get Adam’s name out there to reach millions of people, _especially_ in a state as large as California with 22 million registered voters.
It’s also a big investment: California is home to some of the most expensive media markets in the country, where TV ads can range anywhere from $1,000-$25,000 per spot.
**That is *a lot* of money — but it’s a necessary investment in a race as competitive as ours.** This is the first time tens of millions of voters will see Adam’s name on their ballots — _twice_ with the special _and_ general elections. And now with over 30 declared candidates in the race (and counting), we need to make sure voters hear our message and turn out.
**[The largest media market in California is Los Angeles, where more than 5.83 million households have TVs. Before Tuesday’s end-of-month deadline, will you rush in $5.83 or more to help share Adam’s message directly with voters across the state?](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/3216?c0=oct2023_abs_em.UxXlnC&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EOM_AC90_20231029_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=4&akid=4339%2E5257348%2EqylqCY)**

Peter Willis —

As you probably know by now, abortion is on the ballot in Ohio right now.

Losing is not an option. Not only is the safety and livelihood of millions of women on the line, but it’s also a major test heading into 2024. When the Supreme Court ruled against Roe, women across the country lost fundamental rights to healthcare and autonomy. We are now fighting state by state to get those back, and a victory in a state like Ohio will show major momentum.

We are trying to fill a $1,200 gap to keep our organizing efforts in Ohio up and running at full speed through Election Day.

Can you donate now to make sure we are fully funded before our deadline tonight? (https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/10252?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_OR_20231029_fr_ohturnout1.3_0_2MO_amandanichols_na_na_ohturnout1.3&t=1012&akid=4850%2E5885482%2Ek0RaiS)

clean_body: [ stdin# ][IMG] Peter Willis — As you probably know by now, abortion is on the ballot in Ohio right now. Losing is not an option. Not only is the safety and livelihood of millions of women on the line, but it’s also a major test heading into 2024. When the Supreme Court ruled against Roe, women across the country lost fundamental rights to healthcare and autonomy. We are now fighting state by state to get those back, and a victory in a state like Ohio will show major momentum. We are trying to fill a $1,200 gap to keep our organizing efforts in Ohio up and running at full speed through Election Day. Can you donate now to make sure we are fully funded before our deadline tonight? name: Jordan
subject: We’re combating unfair maps nationwide!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NATIONAL REDISTRICTING ACTION FUND
body:
Team, so much has happened in October, and as we head into November, we know a lot is at stake. We have seen major victories for voters in Georgia and some setbacks in North Carolina in just the past few weeks. It is imperative we keep up the fight. But as the finance coordinator, I can tell you this work is not cheap. We have fundraising goals we absolutely have to hit before the month is over.
[**We need just 14 folks from your community to step up and chip in a few dollars before midnight on Tuesday. Can you help All On The Line by chipping in $25 today?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/72400240/435221667/1219855261?amount=25&refcode=20231029_AOTL_F_EOM1Oct_RedLite&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImU0ODVmOTM5LTc0NzYtZWUxMS1iMDA0LTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=LX64slHzoO_S6toi_hhqqbx4Z9mxQ732Xt6jLSV4HhE=)
When we combat unfair maps together, we ensure our voices are heard, anti-democratic extremists don’t win, and democracy lives to fight another day.
\-- Jordan Westendorf
Finance Coordinator

**_All On The Line is the grassroots advocacy campaign supported by the National Redistricting Action Fund. Support our work to end gerrymandering._**

subject: We shouldn’t have to live like this.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Roland Gutierrez For Texas
body:
You’re receiving this message because of your past support of Democratic candidates and causes. Roland Gutierrez is running to defeat Ted Cruz for Senate. We need your support to elect Roland, but if you’d prefer not to receive emails from our campaign, you can unsubscribe: https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/ifYYiIyK0UCnX-4gLHfqiQ2?unsubscribedata=0jxWAsKRPqUJj%2F4Ck7VQXONFY7rQ%2FJXKXwFWvtVeK4hY37eZSkiuf2fAlX7T8KJArLAqYXQTseZVixFRdZCXMp3TR1HsMl8Vz1DgWdcV1nJ7iwYrLjlTouIeGFr5ealiqCswvaBOLnPMTMaOnkBLBWasaRUc1fKJA3lHYqr3mOziuoKxPGRdTkKgggRm8keN15D3HNxnxH3ChDtyyQhY4jbpIxE9yuJ%2BDtkafONBEuSyE4X5gWBPBDNSq1QDtadfxAuYZIKYMog%2BG%2Fkya5wQ7tjBIlFdgcEBqxa9NPgTOJ4295yb%2Fy6GN5tPbnn2%2BcwjKEprY7B8IOskWPztFD4p2eqRnIAsZc30FCPbCpnHr5gYw4vQdZ01qiX71Y9%2BrXCtthRu4qGAeWcnXaZ2RXo7ENufSQLAb6N6xvnHKMVBZDdnbnP7To40mfuUIvegvXPD .
secure.actblue.com/donate/rg2024-em?amount=25 [secure.actblue.com/donate/rg2024-em?amount=25]
Peter,
Like many of you, I was horrified to learn the news of the shooting at the Texas State Fair.
We should not have to live like this.
Our children shouldn’t have to live in fear when they go to school, the grocery store, the mall, and now the State Fair.
And let’s be clear, Peter: The problem is the loose gun laws in Texas that allow anybody that’s 18 and up to buy a gun like it’s a slurpee at 7-Eleven.
This is a terrifying reality we’re living in, and it’s the direct fault of the Republican politicians in Texas right now.
The loose gun laws that Ted Cruz supports terrorize Texans and make us less safe. He’s everything that’s wrong with Washington and more. He’s spent years blocking common-sense gun violence prevention measures to keep us safe.
I’ve had enough, and I know you have too.
I have worked tirelessly to advance legislation to reduce gun violence in Texas, and I’m ready to escalate this fight. This has got to come to an end. But I need your help.
Please consider making a small contribution to my campaign against Ted Cruz — against gun violence — against the gun lobby — and for the people of Texas. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/rg2024-em]
Thank you for your support.
Roland Gutierrez
Democrat Roland Gutierrez is running for US Senate to defeat Ted Cruz. Texans deserve leaders who will look out for their best interests. We need you in this campaign. Can you donate $5 right now to help Roland win this race? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rg2024-em]

Friend,
This week, I was called to the witness stand in New York as part of the Radical Attorney General’s vicious witch hunt against me.
I sat in a courtroom in the city I grew up in, the city I raised my family in, the city I built a tremendous organization in, the city I loved – and I listened to the Democrats fervently try to destroy everything my family and I have built...
In fact, they want to invoke the **“corporate death penalty”** upon me.
Before I ever ran for president as a political outsider, everyone knew how much I cared about the city I spent most of my life in.
_The New York Post_ even ran an article called _“How Donald Trump helped save New York City.”_
But sadly, from the Soros-backed prosecutor who was responsible for my FIRST sham ARREST to the Attorney General who campaigned on being “a pain in my...” (_you know what_), the political machine in the state I helped save is hellbent on destroying me.
_**But something recently gave me a lot of hope.**_
A new poll came out showing that New York – in the general election – has now become a SINGLE-DIGIT RACE. That’s HUGE.
_A Republican on the verge of flipping deep blue New York? WOW!_
It was further proof that no matter how many times the political machine tries to destroy me, THE _PEOPLE_ know the TRUTH!
Voters get it. Voters see what’s being done in Biden’s America – and they HATE it.
Attempting to IMPRISON your chief political rival as an _INNOCENT_ man? That’s not something we do in America. That goes against every single thing _we_ believe in.
But so long as we never give up on our mission, we will weather this storm and we will MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN!
If you’re doing poorly due to the very sinister people who are plotting our demise instead of fixing our country, then please don’t even think about donating. Instead, use this new poll out of the blue state New York as HOPE that brighter days do, in fact, lie ahead! We will Make America Great Again!

clean_body: During these dark times, THE PEOPLE get it. | | | Friend, This week, I was called to the witness stand in New York as part of the Radical Attorney General’s vicious witch hunt against me. I sat in a courtroom in the city I grew up in, the city I raised my family in, the city I built a tremendous organization in, the city I loved – and I listened to the Democrats fervently try to destroy everything my family and I have built... In fact, they want to invoke the “corporate death penalty” upon me. Before I ever ran for president as a political outsider, everyone knew how much I cared about the city I spent most of my life in. The New York Post even ran an article called “How Donald Trump helped save New York City.” But sadly, from the Soros-backed prosecutor who was responsible for my FIRST sham ARREST to the Attorney General who campaigned on being “a pain in my...” (you know what), the political machine in the state I helped save is hellbent on destroying me. But something recently gave me a lot of hope. A new poll came out showing that New York – in the general election – has now become a SINGLE-DIGIT RACE. That’s HUGE. A Republican on the verge of flipping deep blue New York? WOW! It was further proof that no matter how many times the political machine tries to destroy me, THE PEOPLE know the TRUTH! Voters get it. Voters see what’s being done in Biden’s America – and they HATE it. Attempting to IMPRISON your chief political rival as an INNOCENT man? That’s not something we do in America. That goes against every single thing we believe in. But so long as we never give up on our mission, we will weather this storm and we will MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN! If you’re doing poorly due to the very sinister people who are plotting our demise instead of fixing our country, then please don’t even think about donating. Instead, use this new poll out of the blue state New York as HOPE that brighter days do, in fact, lie ahead! We will Make America Great Again! | Thank you, | Donald J. Trump 45th President of the United States Contributions to Trump Save America JFC are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. Paid for by Trump Save America Joint Fundraising Committee, a joint fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Donald J. Trump for President 2024, Inc. and Save America.

body:
John Lee recently announced his candidacy for Nevada’s 4th Congressional District, because he is committed to not only the revitalization of North... | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/3c0e526ab380/john-lee-mayor-who-rescued-north-las-vegas-announces-for-congress-12661540?e=91a702298f)

[](https://johnleeforcongress.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=18876e295d2df144af23d05e5&id=d24b006060&e=91a702298f)
Friend,
John Lee recently announced his candidacy for Nevada’s 4th Congressional District, because he is committed to not only the revitalization of North Las Vegas but all of Nevada and America.
[**With so much at stake in the 2024 election, we want to hear from you about the issues that mean the most to you for 2024.**](https://johnleeforcongress.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=18876e295d2df144af23d05e5&id=c7c85aa812&e=91a702298f)

| [HEALTHCARE](https://johnleeforcongress.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=18876e295d2df144af23d05e5&id=f2f8877d27&e=91a702298f)
---
| [NATIONAL SECURITY](https://johnleeforcongress.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=18876e295d2df144af23d05e5&id=b43676c385&e=91a702298f)
---
| [SOMETHING ELSE?](https://johnleeforcongress.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=18876e295d2df144af23d05e5&id=4d8d740b48&e=91a702298f)
---
The Democrats in Washington have not put our country on a good path, so John is stepping up to make sure that NV-04 goes red and that Republicans hold the House in 2024.
John’s priorities for this district are the same ones he had for North Las Vegas as Mayor. We must get our financial house in order by reducing government spending and taxation, helping Nevadans keep more of what they earn, reducing inflation, giving Nevadans more healthcare options, and improving education standards for the next generation.
It will require nothing less than that to get America back on track.
[**These are just some of the priorities that he has for our district, but we would like to know what priorities you have. Let us know by taking our official survey and share your thoughts with John.**](https://johnleeforcongress.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=18876e295d2df144af23d05e5&id=3a4215328e&e=91a702298f)

name: Beto O'Rourke
subject: Our most important deadline of the year
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Powered by People, [poweredxpeople
body:
As we prepare to launch new programming in November, I hope you’ll pitch in to ensure we meet our end-of-month fundraising goal.
#
Next month, Powered by People will launch new programming for the 2024 election cycle that will enable us to run the largest voter registration campaign in Texas.
October 31 is our most important end-of-month fundraising deadline of the year because in November we will begin to hire staff, re-engage volunteers, and build out the systems necessary to run this ambitious program to build long-term Democratic power.
[**Right now, we’re $16,707 behind our $75,000 October fundraising goal — so will you please consider chipping in $3 before the end-of-month deadline?**](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20231029.LRmJrV&refcode=ema20231029-234061&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=234061%2E444211%2E02W5bk)

name: Tony Evers
subject: absolutely no margin for error
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tony for Wisconsin
body:
Derek,

I hope you’re enjoying your Sunday. My team and I are working hard this
weekend to make sure we hit our October fundraising goal, and that means
we need to raise another $31,836 before Tuesday at midnight.

We’re nearly a year away from Election Day, so we have to keep building up
our grassroots strength across Wisconsin to keep our state blue in the
2024 presidential election.

Races in Wisconsin are always tight — and the road to the White House runs
through Wisconsin — so there is absolutely no margin for error in 2024.

name: Adam Schiff
subject: A more personal message
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Seth Moulton for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/m23-schiff [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/m23-schiff]
We just got some breaking news, folks:
A multimillionaire Republican celebrity just jumped into our top-two “jungle primary” in the U.S. Senate race.
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP25/1/74758/images/garvey.jpg]
Donate [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/m23-schiff]
Steve Garvey was a first baseman for the Dodgers and Padres, and apparently he’s ready to take up the fight for everyone born on third base thinking they hit a triple. Go figure.
If that’s all you need to hear, I’m personally asking you to split a donation of any amount between Seth Moulton and my Senate campaign to help us respond. Our new Republican opponent is sure to have big money behind him, and we need to be ready for the inevitable wave of attacks — because that’s not the only recent twist in this Senate race. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/m23-schiff]
Garvey appears to be taking a cue from another celebrity Republican with no political experience, Donald Trump. And given Trump’s determination to make sure I don’t become California’s Senator next year, I wouldn’t be surprised to see Trump and MAGA world get solidly behind Garvey. I will need your help to ensure Garvey and Trump feel the sting of losing on March 5, 2024.
And there’s one more wrinkle in this race: I’m now running in two concurrent elections — a special election for the remainder of the late Sen. Dianne Feinstein’s term, and a general election for a full Senate term. Two elections happening on the same ballot, on the same day . Twice.
With millions of Californians preparing to see my name on their ballot for the very first time, we’re going to have to invest a tremendous amount of resources to educate voters and meet them across the state.
And it’s even more urgent with today’s news. Can you rush in a split donation of any amount between Seth Moulton and my Senate campaign to respond to the entry of our new opponent and help ensure we win this race? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/m23-schiff]
There’s nothing Mitch McConnell and the Republican Party would like more than to see a celebrity Republican put another Senate seat in play. So let’s stop him, Trump and Steve Garvey in their tracks — today.
Thanks for your support,
Adam
Donate [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/m23-schiff]
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/r_WYy1BSbkmUjvconTI5TQ2?unsubscribedata=WoSlN3NmiojaRCMcFjyXNCq3VUaJOHZwoqksGRKn6un4MqvyIfUZiIGPz8nu8XYonuVw1Nso6AHW%2BE2R8ICD9EJe%2Fl0BonyFhNtCeXgUcNGrAaKTAN41PItFtM3Sz4kuY46KCvKnHrmGN%2FxYO%2FZd87mHCnX5XFlNHsFx7VFPjpN4BdVhi1VZtT3TBWjDJQIm5DwPXndcb1CvGxI95P0GlQzaBkE3br1O1IQXDuMfy1Qpzw2o0ceXS%2B7OaTegqI8qpGWSQvc%2FDKnYiwatqIpcGuqwe2GzEX4PxDiaAry4Fv3KGmYl9ZtcfDGk%2BB56TEbuNT2E22HUQ9kIFOJHPZVEVeTPRs5OL%2BZ5mIomzsC7NPSpiaKMFb4zug%2F3CDs0ww9nNKS17PURnD16Db0DZvYuaaQL6%2BaPKqxIpy2e6%2FZFPe4%3D .

Hi Peter, This message is a bit longer than the ones we usually send, but I'm hoping you can spare a few minutes to let me explain why our upcoming end-of-month deadline is so important. [**_If you’d prefer to cut to the chase, I completely understand! Please consider making a donation of any amount right here._**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72402087/435227727/1794220520?refcode=AU_HTP_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20231029_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNjdjYzZjYjAtNzg3Ni1lZTExLWIwMDQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=M0PnemkJ4BOt0jnywNh6C0fCuMTltxqQj9XOTdcKvyU=) You see, at the end of each quarter, our team meets to go over our fundraising numbers. Then, we calculate exactly how much we’ll be spending and how much we need to raise to keep our movement on track and make sure operations are running. We set internal deadlines to keep us on track for each quarter, and next week’s deadline is our FINAL benchmark before the 2023 elections. We are working day and night to support amazing candidates and set ourselves up to win big this year and beyond. But everything we do takes resources, so making sure we meet this goal is essential to make that happen. The truth is that early money is key to winning elections. That’s why we continuously ask for your support through these deadlines — to make sure we are building a movement that will leave nothing up to chance to support great candidates in the years to come. All deadlines are important, Peter — but when your movement relies heavily on emails like this one to meet our goals — we have to step up to ensure we can afford to make early investments in the plans we have for the weeks and months ahead. [_**So folks, if you can, will you power our critical work with a donation today? No matter how much, your support will get us one step closer to reaching our goal before our end-of-month deadline.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72402089/435227729/1794220520?refcode=AU_HTP_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20231029_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNjdjYzZjYjAtNzg3Ni1lZTExLWIwMDQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=M0PnemkJ4BOt0jnywNh6C0fCuMTltxqQj9XOTdcKvyU=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $5 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72402091/435227731/1794220520?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=AU_HTP_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20231029_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNjdjYzZjYjAtNzg3Ni1lZTExLWIwMDQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=M0PnemkJ4BOt0jnywNh6C0fCuMTltxqQj9XOTdcKvyU=)

clean_body: | = Hi Peter, This message is a bit longer than the ones we usually send, but I'm hoping you can spare a few minutes to let me explain why our upcoming end-of-month deadline is so important. = You see, at the end of each quarter, our team meets to go over our fundraising numbers. Then, we calculate exactly how much we’ll be spending and how much we need to raise to keep our movement on track and make sure operations are running. We set internal deadlines to keep us on track for each quarter, and next week’s deadline is our FINAL benchmark before the 2023 elections. We are working day and night to support amazing candidates and set ourselves up to win big this year and beyond. But everything we do takes resources, so making sure we meet this goal is essential to make that happen. The truth is that early money is key to winning elections. That’s why we continuously ask for your support through these deadlines — to make sure we are building a movement that will leave nothing up to chance to support great candidates in the years to come. All deadlines are important, Peter — but when your movement relies heavily on emails like this one to meet our goals — we have to step up to ensure we can afford to make early investments in the plans we have for the weeks and months ahead. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = I know your inbox is probably crowded with folks asking for their support, so thank you for sparing a few minutes of your time to read this message. – Katie HER Time PAC 2120 University Ave Berkeley, CA 94704 United States | mailto:team@her-time.com | Paid for by the HER Time PAC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.

name: Robert F. Kennedy, Jr.
subject: Re: What terrifies elites more than our campaign?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM KENNEDY
body:
As you may know, I recently declared myself independent from both political parties.

| [ ](https://www.kennedy24.com/?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=terrified_of_our_campaign_un&n=1)
---
Hi Peter, As you know, I recently declared myself as an independent candidate for President. **“Independent” doesn’t just mean I’m independent of the two parties. It also means I’m independent of their traditional funders, all the corporate donors, Big Tech, Big Pharma, Wall Street and the rest.** But let me tell you who I’m NOT independent of. **I’m not independent of you! And I don’t want to be.** When I’m President, YOU – **the people** – are going to be my boss. YOU are going to be who I listen to. Not the lobbyists or the influence peddlers or the whole out-of-touch culture of Washington DC. And that means I’m also dependent on you to fund my campaign. Those mega corporations and insiders won’t touch me with a ten-foot pole. **Instead I’m relying on thousands and thousands, soon to be millions, of small donations from people like you.** **** Close to two-thirds of American voters say they want an alternative to the two party candidates. **If you’re serious about that, I’d like to ask you to donate to my campaign so we can get on the ballot on all 50 states.** Now is the time to show everyone an independent candidate is for real.**A[$25 contribution](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=terrified_of_our_campaign_un&n=2) will help so much -- especially now.**
| [](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=terrified_of_our_campaign_un&n=3 "Donate $25 now") [Donate $25 now](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=terrified_of_our_campaign_un&n=3)
---
**Thank you!**
Robert F. Kennedy, Jr.
Team Kennedy
[https://www.kennedy24.com/](https://www.kennedy24.com/?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=terrified_of_our_campaign_un&n=4)
[Donate today](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=terrified_of_our_campaign_un&n=5) to put a Kennedy back in the White House — Elect Robert F. Friend,

**It 's game time.**

Virginians are now voting in what could be the most consequential election in our Commonwealth's history.

_**I truly believe this is the most important election in America.**_ We have a chance to prove to the entire country that a state that was completely controlled by out-of-touch Democrats can change direction and succeed under commonsense, conservative governance.

| [ **GET IN THE GAME** ](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=c692c2a3cc664681baacac883226a36e&_e=RKNAnSkF3pcozlAFls4U9iNWNTFqF33rfCwp-OrW5eFyf1TI1_EpbYVcl009En1ipgBo_99tsJCUYaWbMU0eW2kKqHwhVMbZsfba762SL7TQ2VwAsSaxRh4wGDJUildbmi5ZKl0qMz_R7rLp1bnMLS2m1OCob-rFKFCdR11Yt4rByZ89Lj3lwcvwseaqT3yKStxSsj74HE3McibHYvRRCfV9JDXh1h2fe-SIrfHUAkfULYX68OClS1yYVK6yVENzrWbXf6TillGcJNe-n9WhRvbu1v96rQbkROjspO8r_JqGMoxvL31GqZNe9PGb5tV1aDCFKKHDgRmHsBnbBjuWpbPePeRvBIt0yZod1MjvKH4TcdfarYaEen96MOarcdLN)

Peter,

Most people know Mike Johnson as the new Speaker of the House, a constitutional law attorney, and small business owner – but to our family, he’s husband, dad, and role model.

My name is Kelly Johnson, and I’m Mike’s wife and his number one supporter. We’ve been married for 23 years now, and I have never known anyone who is more tirelessly committed to serving God, our country, and its people—or who fights as hard for our principles every single day. He was born with that servant’s heart.

Mike is respected for his courage and integrity and trusted for his wisdom and insight. He is honest, principled, smart, and unshakeable. That’s precisely what America needs in these times of unprecedented challenge.

[**I wanted you to hear a bit more about my husband Mike, from me, the person who knows him best. Would you be willing to spare a moment to watch this video I recorded for you?**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=6f67d041fb794b049d4a2c7d74974014&_e=kYZtl0YswFgWUvTAzMAeb4AunRLU_5PjFTuNM4mW6Un0NDuVGv8ATp0JH6jMXbxEmZMPzST8uilLkCAxMFC2TnSvysXFgm3U_jEcHD3mTbYBz2oZbejryWZ41adoq8OpRPXw7ISzpruSbav5vmN71kEB_yazMiZFzDvL4r9Qnxtyzi2pL3no7PqygBu4vzY1ejbj2UU31UBO5e4i83juZHN80X1m30TwXWyZVwMHosDuUV61NMBwwD25e4T4ygsJEUst26tFLt9-59o1CsiNK8ctOYiOxcOS2rz8z7c8CSHtWqHqI5Vxtav9hHXdHeL-T36lfpfLet18vLlCveKS3ek4TLRLGPkc3cInF72KwigrjDQ_Qb_5R2y-AJWDezMU)

| **_MIKE JOHNSON_**

He was born with that servant’s heart. Mike is respected for his courage and integrity and trusted for his wisdom and insight. He is honest, principled, smart, and unshakeable. That’s precisely what America needs in these times of unprecedented challenge. I am grateful every day that our four beautiful children have such a strong role model and devoted father. [https://rumble.com/v3pzkos-loomer-unleashed-ep1-45-gets-gagged-as-fbi-says-trump-supporters-are-the-ne.html](https://substack.com/redirect/47913e17-3f0f-4878-a178-21589faa189f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
**On the inaugural episode of Loomer Unleashed, hosted by investigative journalist Laura Loomer, we are joined by President Trump 's longest serving friend and advisor, the legendary Roger Stone to discuss the gag order that has been placed on President Trump, the FBI's unprecedented war on MAGA, and Letitia James' unconstitutional conflicts of interest.**
**FOLLOW LAURA LOOMER ON RUMBLE: **[https://rumble.com/c/LauraLoomer](https://substack.com/redirect/c21b08f9-5c4c-4054-87f8-7e9cb9df4e2b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Recently, illegal immigration, or rather the full-scale invasion of America, could best be described as a tidal wave. Our porous Southern Border has allowed an endless flood of illegal alien invaders into our country, often without any legal accountability.
If the past few decades were a tidal wave, then 2023 has been a tsunami. According to a USA TODAY report from the end of September, it's estimated that around 2.8 million illegal border crossings have occurred this year alone, and that is just an estimate. Who knows how many more illegals snuck across the border in the dead of night or were stowed away in a semi-truck that weren't included in that number? Just to put that number in perspective, 2.8 million people would be equivalent to the entire city of Miami crossing our border SIX TIMES! Obviously, this raises the question: where are these people going - and more importantly - who are they?
The sheer volume of migrants, coupled with the Biden administration's complete refusal to enforce any sense of law and order, has made the border a complete disaster as well as a major national security risk. As a result of this chaos, you can be sure that we have no idea who precisely is coming into our country-let alone their intentions.
Currently, these illegal aliens are merely being given a notice to appear in Immigration Court, then casually let loose into our nation to do as they please. Naturally, very few of these people ever show up to their hearing...and why would they? There is zero legal accountability for these people, and some reports have shown that the migrant court dates have been scheduled as far out as 2027.
It is essential to recognize that this presents a massive national security risk. While we understand that illegal immigration alone is already detrimental to our country and its social fabric, consider what having 2.8 million unvetted aliens show up in just nine months could mean for our country. We know that these illegals are not just coming from Mexico anymore, but they are arriving in the thousands from Africa and the Middle East. And if Mexico wasn't sending their best, just imagine what is being sent from Syria, Nigeria, or Iran.
Just this last week alone, I reported on how, directly following the call for a global day of Jihad by a former leader of Hamas, U.S. Customs and Border Patrol encountered dozens of men from Iran and Lebanon who were trying to illegally enter the United States via the open U.S. Mexico border.
These people do not speak our language, do not share our values, and do not easily assimilate into our culture - which by itself poses a massive problem. But imagine what else might be lurking within these hordes of people. What is stopping terrorist cells from entering and operating in our nation? Certainly, nobody at the Southern Border would stop them. ICE and the Border Patrol have their hands tied by Biden, and he can barely complete a sentence - let alone solve the immigration crisis that he and the Democrat Party have enabled from the moment he was sworn into office.
These people just get a free pass to some liberal sanctuary city where they can lay in wait to capitalize on the next crisis. While you may think this sounds like an exaggeration, just look at what has happened in Europe over the last few years. Much like our situation here in America, there has been an unending flood of migrants from the global South into European nations. European governments have generally sat back and watched as a foreign population has resettled in their once-European homeland. The E.U. made sure to quell any dissenters to this replacement regime, and they have even gone so far as to implement "hate speech" laws to stop people from speaking about Islam and mass migration.

Now, in countries like France, Germany, and England, a mass of people who are entirely disconnected from the natives can be agitated into action at a moment's notice. All of this raises a very important and pressing question. How can civilized countries continue to function when entire swathes of their populations are totally incompatible? body:
Please your response is needed URGENTLY...
| [ ](https://act.protectvoting.org/survey/Harris_Approval/?source=VPP_20231029_EMPOLL_E2_T0_AC_RS&t=6&akid=11520%2E878179%2E6TKdsm) | **OFFICIAL: KAMALA HARRIS APPROVAL POLL**

DUE: **OCTOBER 29, 2023 @ 11:59PM**
[**1,250 RESPONSES STILL NEEDED: Do you approve of Vice President Kamala Harris?**](https://act.protectvoting.org/survey/Harris_Approval/?source=VPP_20231029_EMPOLL_E2_T0_AC_RS&t=7&akid=11520%2E878179%2E6TKdsm) [](https://act.protectvoting.org/survey/Harris_Approval/?source=VPP_20231029_EMPOLL_E2_T0_AC_RS&t=8&akid=11520%2E878179%2E6TKdsm) | [YES, I DO! »](https://act.protectvoting.org/survey/Harris_Approval/?source=VPP_20231029_EMPOLL_E2_T0_AC_RS&t=9&akid=11520%2E878179%2E6TKdsm)

_*OUR DATA COLLECTION TEAM FLIPPED THROUGH THOUSANDS OF FILES TO SELECT YOU AS**ONE OF THE 1,250 DEMOCRATS** THAT WILL RESPOND TO THIS POLL. PLEASE, ANSWER THIS **URGENT** POLL BEFORE 11:59 PM!*_
**Since Vice President Kamala Harris was elected, she has proven herself to be a vital asset and a strong force to keeping our democracy alive.**

Beyond her historic election, she has continued to break records _and_ barriers with her persistence and strong leadership.

However, the MAGA extremist rot that has been plagued this nation since Donald Trump’s election has taken root.

Every day far-right extremists and MAGA heads try to stain her image in an effort to bring VP Harris’s and President Biden’s agenda to a _s-c-r-e-e-c-h-i-n-g HALT._

That’s why we’re reaching out to loyal Democrats like you to fix the record and strengthen Kamala Harris’ approval rating.
**_PLEASE ANSWER THIS POLL BEFORE OUR URGENT 11:59PM DEADLINE:_**
[**1,250 RESPONSES STILL NEEDED: Do you approve of Vice President Kamala Harris?**](https://act.protectvoting.org/survey/Harris_Approval/?source=VPP_20231029_EMPOLL_E2_T0_AC_RS&t=12&akid=11520%2E878179%2E6TKdsm)
[YES, I DO! »](https://act.protectvoting.org/survey/Harris_Approval/?source=VPP_20231029_EMPOLL_E2_T0_AC_RS&t=13&akid=11520%2E878179%2E6TKdsm)
---

[I’M UNDECIDED. »](https://act.protectvoting.org/survey/Harris_Approval/?source=VPP_20231029_EMPOLL_E2_T0_AC_RS&t=15&akid=11520%2E878179%2E6TKdsm)
Thank you,

_VPP Research Team_
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=11520%2E878179%2E6TKdsm). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=11520%2E878179%2E6TKdsm).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=11520%2E878179%2E6TKdsm) to request fewer emails. subject: This is what a contribution from you can do:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELIZABETH PANNILL FLETCHER FOR CONGRESS
body:
ELIZABETH PANNILL FLETCHER FOR CONGRESS [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/82676/images/lizzie-reelect-logo-outlined.png]
With our October deadline [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lpfe231029?refcode=lpfe231029] coming up the day after tomorrow, I want to take a second to tell you a little bit about what your contributions help us accomplish.
With the primary in March and nearly a year to go until Election Day, things are going to start moving quickly and our outreach efforts will pick up.
We will be contacting voters and gathering support, hosting block walks, postcard parties, phonebanking, and more to get the word out about the stakes in this election! We will put mail in mailboxes, signs in yards, and ads where we need them. And, as you know by now, all of those things require money.
That’s what your contributions go toward. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lpfe231029?refcode=lpfe231029]
#TeamLizzie is also engaged in other important races on the ballot—not just ours!
We’re supporting other Democratic candidates across the district, state, and country so that we can win back the House and give Texans the leaders they need and deserve at every level of government.
One thing you can do right now to help is make a contribution before our October 31 deadline. Every dollar supports all we are doing and will do between now and Election Day. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lpfe231029?refcode=lpfe231029]
Talk soon,
Collin

body:
Ending the era of fossil fuels should be our highest priority in the fight against the climate crisis!

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/72408696/435237156/931971737?refcode=BLU-JANE-20231029-z-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImQxYmM1YTFkLTdmNzYtZWUxMS1iMDA0LTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Q4OWiDqJ9Gc4-jywcCIaK2FSZHoCSVkfd8T4zavn1RQ=)
---
| | | **Earth to Hit Critical Warming Threshold by Early 2030s, Climate Panel Says**

_-The New York Times_
---
| [FIGHT BACK ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/72408697/435237157/931971737?refcode=BLU-JANE-20231029-z-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImQxYmM1YTFkLTdmNzYtZWUxMS1iMDA0LTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Q4OWiDqJ9Gc4-jywcCIaK2FSZHoCSVkfd8T4zavn1RQ=)
---
The earth will cross a critical threshold for global warming by 2030 if we don’t take drastic measures to end our use of fossil fuels, a report from the Intergovernmental Panel on Climate Change shows.

_**Ending the era of fossil fuels should be our highest priority in the fight against the climate crisis!**_

Ending the era of fossil fuels should be our highest priority in the fight against the climate crisis! name: WesMoore.com
subject: Hope you’re proud of this…
body:
Friend,

Good leaders know we can’t just talk . We need to deliver . That’s what Governor Moore has done for nine straight months since taking office. Consider how many lives we’ve changed for the better in just our first year...

✅ Gov. Moore raised the minimum wage for 150,000 Maryland families.
✅ We launched programs to lift 37,000 Maryland children out of poverty.
✅ We signed key gun safety laws to protect our communities from violence.
✅ And days ago we introduced the inaugural class of Maryland Serves. Our first-in-the-country program offers a paid year of service for high school graduates, to empower and give purpose to the next generation.

Firstname, in a time of national gridlock, hyperpartisanship, and the 24/7 news cycle, Governor Moore stands out. We’re showing this country what it looks like to lead with a strong, positive agenda. Action, not just words.

And the reason we’re here in the first place? It’s because supporters like you have stepped up for us time and time again to fund Governor Moores’s campaign. So here we are again asking for your help.

We have set a very modest fundraising goal before our end-of-month deadline. But based on our average donation size, we can’t get there until about 35 more people choose to give. Can you help close the gap by donating $25 right now before our deadline? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20231029-1?refcode=em20231029]

Donate » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20231029-1?refcode=em20231029]

The accomplishments here aren’t Governor Moore’s alone. They’re yours, too. The governor may be the one signing the bills, but it’s all made possible by those of you who’ve donated, volunteered time to the campaign, and spread the word.

Please help us reach our end-of-month deadline goal by donating. It’ll help us keep going and building on the accomplishments above. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20231029-1?refcode=em20231029]

Thank you for all your continued support,

Team Moore

---
This message was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com.

Receive Fewer Emails: https://secure.ngpvan.com/5dp2nzUoCUKkmjN2NCT3Cw2
Update Your Information: https://support.wesmoore.com/a/update-your-information
Unsubscribe: unsubscribe: https://support.wesmoore.com/p/naFTamTwwEaXtoxkWZyUYA2?unsubscribedata=mLS76zlZx6e52lYIN1d56ibm2JosvSH3cfbKxQz1dICHGp3qDf1GaM1R2T0fLt%2F2YNq2H3V4HD3QLVFbInTuwXAsIvLQkbVcm6XkGgrw5rIc%2BlWa06lGIPufO0z%2Bp4rLppP71AbpE1blDk%2FTdYbPjt5dPCGXmjCIAX%2FqYdHI0zLhxkDOnV90h7zPPEOt5TYZJqHQvoSNt8EfGwb9XX%2FZd%2BXg2g1%2BxPcSrsFpiJAsspcDmU%2BicyjtwGZC3XRCxuIL5yqv2TS0h81S5ch5vZIrPsZT9OBGiYio7Jqu1PXJfYlmO3gapFur%2FWw4YaJ0MGXLfHjgI%2BxlZVFJSkl1plxnZqC7OpzFvaWFQUPu2pJsmQ0YPyumCNSIlCcnuqh%2BHagcGI3UoiFmwlXYi9Thry6RRLJD%2BSWE0%2F8ksnrNm3eRWSFMG3rYFjT2Dr3MKFe1c8f2

To give by check:

Wes Moore for Maryland
PO Box 50123
Baltimore, MD 21211

subject: Let me introduce myself
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MIKE JOHNSON FOR LOUISIANA
body:
I believe to my core that the most important things in life are God, family, and pride in our country. These are the values that guide me and shape my life. | [Unsubscribe](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_s=5169bbae222141e0b39d992c4c7cdd67&_t=w8yf-DsyTGqRTnMlMPlZG1O0r9D6gA41UbJIPziDuV0gJLNCgKUcvJ_RkdTdPpBIiCyi5XRgg5hqaxCgPkdP4K2vSxpm9zNAVL2zuBHmtCY%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_s=5169bbae222141e0b39d992c4c7cdd67&_t=w8yf-DsyTGqRTnMlMPlZG1O0r9D6gA41UbJIPziDuV0gJLNCgKUcvJ_RkdTdPpBIiCyi5XRgg5hqaxCgPkdP4K2vSxpm9zNAVL2zuBHmtCY%3D)

Fellow American,

The most important things in life are faith, family, and freedom. That's not just a slogan, these happen to be the foundations of our great country. That is why I am fighting every day to preserve them.

**Faith.** Our nation began with the bold declaration that all men are created equal by God, and that our rights derive from Him and not the government. The founders insisted that faith must remain central to our national identity because, as George Washington summarized, "religion and morality are indispensable supports" of our republic. Like so many American households through the generations, in our house we instill faith in the hearts of our children, serve God, and serve people.

**Family.** Stable, happy families are the basis of any thriving society, and public policy should always acknowledge this obvious truth. Strengthening the nuclear family should be a top priority, and government should get out of the way and respect parental rights. Kelly and I have been very intentional about passing along the values of hard work, honor, and sacrifice to our children, just as our parents passed them along to us. For nearly two and a half centuries, this has been the American way.

**Freedom.** It is a self-evident truth that God endows all of us with inherent freedoms, such as the natural and unalienable rights to life, liberty, conscience, and the ability to pursue happiness, own property, build wealth and defend ourselves and our families. The purpose of government is to secure these rights, and the ideas we advance should always aim to maintain and increase the liberty of the American people. I’ve devoted my life and career to fighting for those fundamental freedoms and traditional values, first in the courts as a constitutional law attorney, and now in the Congress.

[**This is a simple truth:**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=5169bbae222141e0b39d992c4c7cdd67&_e=MhbXogSrecR13rQaX1KB2sE2KkSj9rQdCeA5MeypUedMLdzrX0KGQ8QAyMEIEw27Xkd-6c1nn6SjKOic28-SrxNwiCMDx-DPWOU-AGTalI5-xIVi3kQZGFbQJfwZ7q7URWadD2-miZh3ZjXI0S0thn4QsiF-5kVa7jp5ZBx3GbzFfzldooGEBkxPC4EwanYZOcUheiAZRlih5MP7KEv8wiJJr0e1Pc3IKrDGQHQVCFNVMLvIX-2lFYQzmQtVNXhk5G0FTaksmL497iMfp6VvP3MC93zyqsU_bot0ZY3nh1ajFANpVWLIWhQndkqHieg8hgp7cZ0U4G1UwENTjM5_pmVFg6A21vJB1TWRXatczzbPQdh95MORDa7zjMo5LcCYUlzR1YCxp3kjKAccXDOl2A%3D%3D) America is the freest, most powerful, most successful nation in the history of world - but we cannot maintain that status if we are led by politicians who hate the very foundations that made us who we are!

[** SUPPORT MIKE JOHNSON > **](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=5169bbae222141e0b39d992c4c7cdd67&_e=MhbXogSrecR13rQaX1KB2sE2KkSj9rQdCeA5MeypUedMLdzrX0KGQ8QAyMEIEw27Xkd-6c1nn6SjKOic28-SrxNwiCMDx-DPWOU-AGTalI5-xIVi3kQZGFbQJfwZ7q7URWadD2-miZh3ZjXI0S0thn4QsiF-5kVa7jp5ZBx3GbzFfzldooGEBkxPC4EwanYZOcUheiAZRlih5MP7KEv8wiJJr0e1Pc3IKrDGQHQVCFN4iKTdqvC_oZhW1vMi0otDN0Ir9KE2H9pWMD-cgef1xd6_I2OgGwAzlkHpzdB7HBRD1LrWIEDzvAGOwzWYMV6oj-ABSV-nkHKFTMM86dnQPlJryQxnowa6M1lQrzU5XCGjSojd9PSijB5GGZs4t55nImWaB45qgMhpS3mX_hBZDg%3D%3D)

Right now in America, children are being taught in many schools to be ashamed of their country and themselves. The pledge is being taken out of school because it mentions God. Free speech is being censored and silenced right before our eyes. Democrats are fighting for the right to elective abortion right up to the moment of birth. Unelected, unaccountable bureaucrats are seeking control of almost every aspect of our lives.

**This is simply un-American, and we must stop the madness.**

We must elect more leaders who make decisions based on American values with an emphasis on God, family, and country. It’s the only way to preserve the blessings we have been given here.

[**Today, to continue to help lead this critical fight, I need your financial support – to restore our country and defend our values. Can you make a donation immediately?**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=5169bbae222141e0b39d992c4c7cdd67&_e=MhbXogSrecR13rQaX1KB2sE2KkSj9rQdCeA5MeypUedMLdzrX0KGQ8QAyMEIEw27Xkd-6c1nn6SjKOic28-SrxNwiCMDx-DPWOU-AGTalI5-xIVi3kQZGFbQJfwZ7q7URWadD2-miZh3ZjXI0S0thn4QsiF-5kVa7jp5ZBx3GbzFfzldooGEBkxPC4EwanYZOcUheiAZRlih5MP7KEv8wiJJr0e1Pc3IKrDGQHQVCFMVoRtEJYCINcWPqUyMYVzPQCXCh-DY_QmB-ccw2maySt_DgTKmldqMaNl9n6X3E5oiuWaQfkNiVM00vDW0OS-zO5fKAw-DTRNULWGVAeov0RYzAgXRu3dfxKszrdqiQLVqiiz7oj6JDzsBrFydbNIfi-X2WnwNVDtx48DBT03EFw%3D%3D)

[** DONATE TO SAVE AMERICA > **](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=5169bbae222141e0b39d992c4c7cdd67&_e=MhbXogSrecR13rQaX1KB2sE2KkSj9rQdCeA5MeypUedMLdzrX0KGQ8QAyMEIEw27Xkd-6c1nn6SjKOic28-SrxNwiCMDx-DPWOU-AGTalI5-xIVi3kQZGFbQJfwZ7q7URWadD2-miZh3ZjXI0S0thn4QsiF-5kVa7jp5ZBx3GbzFfzldooGEBkxPC4EwanYZOcUheiAZRlih5MP7KEv8wiJJr0e1Pc3IKrDGQHQVCFO_EVwJvxSTs9ecFZNX-jYpZMIwx9N_56ElZh7jI8BPZRfoLWIqQ6N3jTvOi5BQSLRvG_8cDk6OsmOaqDLqBv4QUu9RwsKyhOggXL3JCg6Upw-hfS23RGYWZcEE2lF7fL3keTJGVdx6AoEgVZGEQ_BHBt-2O-qFl3ZiGPsNNXK8Uw%3D%3D)

Fellow American, we have a chance to save our country from the radical Left that is aiming to destroy it, but we’re running out of time. I’m not sure what version of America we will leave to our kids if we continue down this path. [**We simply must make a change before it’s too late.**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=5169bbae222141e0b39d992c4c7cdd67&_e=MhbXogSrecR13rQaX1KB2sE2KkSj9rQdCeA5MeypUedMLdzrX0KGQ8QAyMEIEw27Xkd-6c1nn6SjKOic28-SrxNwiCMDx-DPWOU-AGTalI5-xIVi3kQZGFbQJfwZ7q7URWadD2-miZh3ZjXI0S0thn4QsiF-5kVa7jp5ZBx3GbzFfzldooGEBkxPC4EwanYZOcUheiAZRlih5MP7KEv8wiJJr0e1Pc3IKrDGQHQVCFOUy33SsLlmEaDdD9XmadndZMwM9ht0wSv7Pr0Qc_sPvT1YNy7twqEfISxEKpqheE9S_653ROLhJGW_lP3sdDZ8RO-N7sZ-mLG3Y9U7bPQ1r4CiWjFq5WpC0RPNyw2iOTEfVezSfbn5uki7HaIQJuW6UWq-tSGS3f6UDEcBZux12A%3D%3D)

I made a promise when I was first elected to do what is best for our country, and for Louisiana, and I intend to keep that promise. It’s why I have been a trusted ally of President Donald Trump, who selected me for critical positions and endorsed all of my campaigns. It’s also why I was elected by my colleagues to serve as Vice Chairman of the House Republican Conference – one of seven elected leadership positions for Republicans in the House – and to chair the Subcommittee on the Constitution and Civil Liberties in the prestigious Judiciary Committee.

We are working in Congress every day to defend our conservative way of life and lead the fight for freedom, [**but we cannot do it alone.**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=5169bbae222141e0b39d992c4c7cdd67&_e=MhbXogSrecR13rQaX1KB2sE2KkSj9rQdCeA5MeypUedMLdzrX0KGQ8QAyMEIEw27Xkd-6c1nn6SjKOic28-SrxNwiCMDx-DPWOU-AGTalI5-xIVi3kQZGFbQJfwZ7q7URWadD2-miZh3ZjXI0S0thn4QsiF-5kVa7jp5ZBx3GbzFfzldooGEBkxPC4EwanYZOcUheiAZRlih5MP7KEv8wiJJr0e1Pc3IKrDGQHQVCFPa7L1HkDDElZo5xqgG-_0p856eoTSITTzlwifNoNmPVPBhn_kBv5CL68WvI38VjxBEMoi681WGP2E49P5w_Tdma6TElO_B0K5o1RnjrH0KEGDil-S5tfjzNNL-CxfkJDYAijBJ1RzR9bNl7s8teQ1cnVJEKziB2qd59Sdh-BgA9g%3D%3D)

[**If you are committed to taking back the House from the radical Democrats who are self-serving and want to turn America into a socialist country, then I need your support today.**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=5169bbae222141e0b39d992c4c7cdd67&_e=MhbXogSrecR13rQaX1KB2sE2KkSj9rQdCeA5MeypUedMLdzrX0KGQ8QAyMEIEw27Xkd-6c1nn6SjKOic28-SrxNwiCMDx-DPWOU-AGTalI5-xIVi3kQZGFbQJfwZ7q7URWadD2-miZh3ZjXI0S0thn4QsiF-5kVa7jp5ZBx3GbzFfzldooGEBkxPC4EwanYZOcUheiAZRlih5MP7KEv8wiJJr0e1Pc3IKrDGQHQVCFPfh0rjTMhEM804Igz9oODGkd4xgmPUz5v-mCtv0IYpltIYHvrrb3tjWgcUcr5dEM8v1MDjp661bNgqjps4WQFEEYZgllwJ6cfSJHPiezJKMvxdLu_0_IpEZPnxC4od2gIl26uKJyNWhVLIfMy0sHe5-a89867mvcgVMEUszZNORw%3D%3D)

[** CHIP IN > **](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=5169bbae222141e0b39d992c4c7cdd67&_e=MhbXogSrecR13rQaX1KB2sE2KkSj9rQdCeA5MeypUedMLdzrX0KGQ8QAyMEIEw27Xkd-6c1nn6SjKOic28-SrxNwiCMDx-DPWOU-AGTalI5-xIVi3kQZGFbQJfwZ7q7URWadD2-miZh3ZjXI0S0thn4QsiF-5kVa7jp5ZBx3GbzFfzldooGEBkxPC4EwanYZOcUheiAZRlih5MP7KEv8wiJJr0e1Pc3IKrDGQHQVCFMteu3FYVRiHAhConqACVnM300XIo2EBwv6Kdnq2cqh2u05Jzf0dVGQkRJLk2cwGotLZNpdLA0P0vO75k6o0uWTg1j7cVNpi8YOlRjHg7cTTJgLD1aWxKRy4sMg2tKX6jZFFNO4KrALPjpI_JunvGJnaNCGjD4B9xzYcoUBe4zPWQ%3D%3D)

The path we’re on currently will lead us to destruction. But that outcome is not inevitable. We still have the ability to turn this country around-- IF conscientious conservatives across America will stand up RIGHT NOW.

We MUST act, and we must do so today.

clean_body: I believe to my core that the most important things in life are God, family, and pride in our country. These are the values that guide me and shape my life. | | Fellow American, The most important things in life are faith, family, and freedom. That's not just a slogan, these happen to be the foundations of our great country. That is why I am fighting every day to preserve them. Faith. Our nation began with the bold declaration that all men are created equal by God, and that our rights derive from Him and not the government. The founders insisted that faith must remain central to our national identity because, as George Washington summarized, "religion and morality are indispensable supports" of our republic. Like so many American households through the generations, in our house we instill faith in the hearts of our children, serve God, and serve people. Family. Stable, happy families are the basis of any thriving society, and public policy should always acknowledge this obvious truth. Strengthening the nuclear family should be a top priority, and government should get out of the way and respect parental rights. Kelly and I have been very intentional about passing along the values of hard work, honor, and sacrifice to our children, just as our parents passed them along to us. For nearly two and a half centuries, this has been the American way. Freedom. It is a self-evident truth that God endows all of us with inherent freedoms, such as the natural and unalienable rights to life, liberty, conscience, and the ability to pursue happiness, own property, build wealth and defend ourselves and our families. The purpose of government is to secure these rights, and the ideas we advance should always aim to maintain and increase the liberty of the American people. I’ve devoted my life and career to fighting for those fundamental freedoms and traditional values, first in the courts as a constitutional law attorney, and now in the Congress. America is the freest, most powerful, most successful nation in the history of world - but we cannot maintain that status if we are led by politicians who hate the very foundations that made us who we are! Right now in America, children are being taught in many schools to be ashamed of their country and themselves. The pledge is being taken out of school because it mentions God. Free speech is being censored and silenced right before our eyes. Democrats are fighting for the right to elective abortion right up to the moment of birth. Unelected, unaccountable bureaucrats are seeking control of almost every aspect of our lives. This is simply un-American, and we must stop the madness. We must elect more leaders who make decisions based on American values with an emphasis on God, family, and country. It’s the only way to preserve the blessings we have been given here. Fellow American, we have a chance to save our country from the radical Left that is aiming to destroy it, but we’re running out of time. I’m not sure what version of America we will leave to our kids if we continue down this path. I made a promise when I was first elected to do what is best for our country, and for Louisiana, and I intend to keep that promise. It’s why I have been a trusted ally of President Donald Trump, who selected me for critical positions and endorsed all of my campaigns. It’s also why I was elected by my colleagues to serve as Vice Chairman of the House Republican Conference – one of seven elected leadership positions for Republicans in the House – and to chair the Subcommittee on the Constitution and Civil Liberties in the prestigious Judiciary Committee. We are working in Congress every day to defend our conservative way of life and lead the fight for freedom, The path we’re on currently will lead us to destruction. But that outcome is not inevitable. We still have the ability to turn this country around-- IF conscientious conservatives across America will stand up RIGHT NOW. We MUST act, and we must do so today. Thank you for all you do, and God bless. Mike Johnson Speaker of the House | MIKE JOHNSON * Mike is a dedicated husband and father of four, as well as a constitutional law attorney who has devoted his life and career to fighting for the fundamental freedoms and traditional values that have always been a priority to the people of Louisiana. | PAID FOR BY MIKE JOHNSON FOR LOUISIANA Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but .
