_**Guys, I wanted to make sure you saw my last message. This is serious... **_

Democrats in Washington and their Socialist Super PACS have too many connections and too much money in their fundraising war chest. **AKA, WAY TOO MUCH POWER!** The people don't tell you how hard it is to start a campaign from Ground Zero. No war chest. No connections. Just you. [**Chip in to help me keep going.**](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=3448c2d5308c48a38686b1d38fa3473c&_e=a-GYsL9M-wuhVbqx6jKWrdYxoGhLQw8onskptw58a17jmp09sn9fQA60_Sp5aFIPUPdl7XQ1CbBQbf9RMr4ioFqbg6H3xY2fvSSpQel5DGYIGTalos0i1teS7jpSvp6BVhFFY7-Xki237KZSZAN4guI0z6hqUwsYm_vn-8RRoERVE2qIgvaUv5GZKXhbQ2IzoYr5btDnb0eX2FjpLAbK3tRvVSRZqsR63e5NKxa20y7_ohrp_BZEzBtTfKzcGcDNeUxHKMT-PCzH1Qe_fJnWcbrKUggMv3tOwtxQJ7nwoVB17-7nyD1xamudKFsTBkNj) **At this point, if I don 't do a complete 180 on the fundraising front, not only will I have to possibly SHUT DOWN my fundraising efforts, but Republicans may never win a race in 2024. **[**Help SAVE AMERICA now!**](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=3448c2d5308c48a38686b1d38fa3473c&_e=a-GYsL9M-wuhVbqx6jKWrdYxoGhLQw8onskptw58a17jmp09sn9fQA60_Sp5aFIPUPdl7XQ1CbBQbf9RMr4ioFqbg6H3xY2fvSSpQel5DGYIGTalos0i1teS7jpSvp6BVhFFY7-Xki237KZSZAN4guI0z6hqUwsYm_vn-8RRoERAEDppaCTUujHvzc7EdcCR0WvdLQom9TP78TF6E7p5aufdoilLGDR2HoLYYwAZwUgerxjRtDFPi4LLLTIbFQrB3pZPE-1ox7e-nPw-S2wBT3u2KddAg9shzdjKY3qa64DXzY_urbcsKuYbUGUTnq6Q)****
If the Democrats can beat us in 2024, I can guarantee you Republicans won't have a chance to beat them for a long time.

**Why? Because as a hillbilly and a Marine, I know a fight.**

I'm one of the toughest Republicans in the Senate. Democrats know that--that's why they're dumping money into the upcoming elections to beat conservatives everywhere. If we can't stop them - **no one can.**

**[If you chip in just $15 toward my End-of-Month fundraising deadline RIGHT NOW, I can promise you that we will blow my fundraising goal out of the water and derail the Biden-Schumer plan to destroy our nation.](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=3448c2d5308c48a38686b1d38fa3473c&_e=a-GYsL9M-wuhVbqx6jKWrdYxoGhLQw8onskptw58a17jmp09sn9fQA60_Sp5aFIPUPdl7XQ1CbBQbf9RMr4ioFqbg6H3xY2fvSSpQel5DGYIGTalos0i1teS7jpSvp6BVhFFY7-Xki237KZSZAN4giIIE7YQwWtGCg794D3O4lD0kza2gdB8GYxgRUN8KpY3xkGaeWw3jiVUCwsRb9UJOFa7CQtjpO0lUJpjM3vDSmON26NGM50P1Dqp0mI9r1Bog6GMBEzBFD2n_mQA5rYuBUPEkkPJ2UQvS8136NuwrWxoUoQdyvB5Tt9dKHPaXIei)**

body:

In just a couple of days, we'll reach our final monthly deadline ahead of Election Day. What we are able to accomplish in these final days will decide whether we continue moving Kentucky forward, or we allow Andy's opponent to take us backward.

It's really that simple. But Andy's opponent won't be slowing down his efforts anytime soon. That's why we need this team of grassroots supporters to continue fighting alongside Andy all the way through Election Day.

We're _so close,_ Peter!

[**Ready to help Andy continue making progress for Kentucky? subject: He’s not just my boss
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Josh Hawley Victory Committee
body:
| | | Fellow American, Josh Hawley is more than just my boss. In the time we’ve worked together, I’ve been proud to call him my friend.

And now, my friend is being attacked.

_**There’s no doubt in my mind that Missouri and the whole country are better because of Josh Hawley’s leadership.**_

From his role taking on out of control spending in Washington to standing up for women athletes against biological men trying to take their place, Josh will ALWAYS speak up for what’s right not just for us but for the next generation.

I’ve seen Josh’s fiery passion firsthand, and now, he’s pushing toward a new goal.

**Our end of month deadline is in just TWO DAYS, and Josh is doing everything he can to meet this goal. **

He’s sometimes too humble to ask for your help, but I’m not: **[Will you chip in $10 now to help Josh Hawley meet his end of month goal?](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=5c1644d257f94dec80852260654e7268&_e=twH8Uii_Y42leaGfxqfDvbR-7pAfaxLelIdcXXcnQpSA_3mUkCTOOwKSgGcZLa8wKyMukiBfiGiy3rXrwgY0rLjYMn4vtSJT5AhI3HPXSHK2S-Ale1Z04Ap7bBwJ4MEtiwHQJQRNMlCFq1SPApe5rPYGcDrmLKQ4mXsvd9jKyGneaQRC_-nRJ2qPOVrUWRVWgxIehwSNkirMYtIb15jjgCmwZgK_0zA2sRS38qTMg7sVV43Ch4kf3FLj-tyKcuMu_iQ9yJR207a105dI7IJnWtIB6eHXs237wjPrzXDwF4K0cr3i61QRy8-UyQ3QNDxb_UqP7l3wn7GI5UAfAwkdB9mAYR0ZZhVykMRyG3AbLiHM5dkTA8tsk_7wWLkgpzrFhv_Y-vZxZTqPBm9YwBJXcQ%3D%3D)**

clean_body: Mom isn’t one of those all-bark-no-bite types. | | Woof woof, Peter — I’m Wheelie, and Becca is one of my moms (I’m lucky enough to have two)! = Mom and the whole campaign team have been working their tails off to get PAWgressive legislation for people like you (and dogs like me) in DC. And I’m SO proud of her — but things have been a bit ruff: She’s pretty much all work and no play. Campaigning and working hard in Washington means less time for fetch, ball, and pets. Can you throw her a bone so she can get back to work (and play)? = Believe me: Mom isn’t one of those all-bark-no-bite types. She does what she says she’ll do – and has the track record to back it up. body:
Joe Biden has failed in every duty to the American people. Our border is wide open, and families are suffering because of the blatant dereliction of duty.
---

---

Friend, We're not safe with Joe Biden in charge. Our border is wide open to let terrorists, cartel members, and drug pushers walk across without any repercussions. This presidential election is an opportunity to CLOSE our border and protect America. What Hamas did in Israel was unimaginable, and it would be a nightmare if that happened right here in our homeland. But the reality is that it could happen. **We need a president who will stop terrorists and cartel members before they cross our southern border. Ron DeSantis is the ONLY presidential candidate who has promised to:** **STOP** the invasion across our border. **AUTHORIZE DEADLY FORC****E** against the drug cartels shuffling fentanyl into our country. **DEPORT** the terrorists praising murder and destruction in America. **Friend****-_**_[**_It will take every single one of us to win this election. Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain. After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom. When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor. Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide. In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is _personal_ and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children.

---
| [](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=3d1f69df64284992bb064c4b7e05ab29&_e=-o2THWHO4FLDKofsPGfAgle1xK1UxSN0V_36bnJ4ouFyQ-SaXSAatV-c_UJ6BCTWHlgDSSYgrybl90nNNuTHKxqTU6sGalQ-on0V1KxpbW56VtWoqoylaHexr92vqpW5k_v1cQk4WX0evpqjh0yZWUKHlgTuC-hoFchTLGADbqWePtdfUqMNC2gYEJaGCVYV0XHMtU_Zz9Lf1XJsBJOHaudGqP52GZgmVJpSgqYevqVtjvmVAN4Y9MS0PEAT-qMIOr6N1EmKHQ9k2gEgqGa0POGLifIvwPwgyTnqk-jZei_lx6CkqYzms72HVUxOOTsNtCNXBpWqpBQq_1pU5c2kZj8u0GEvxWN964d9AoSMegBevb7YInP5pOkBcVQL4PhzF69i95JypyhISDWVH_HZ1gdd1zNAT1zZnZT_au66gSnrXCb03-SkIGAvDVo5VqFD2p-sDOh3ZPIbaIuTC1OBjPvBTDHbtGFTxziM36a6ltA%3D)
---

On Day One, Ron DeSantis has _promised_ that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by _immediately getting to work_ stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late. In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He's taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and **_won every single time_**. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon. _That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now._

name: Gene Karpinski, LCV
subject: BREAKING: House votes 210-199 to GUT clean energy programs. We need to respond urgently.
body:
__Right now, your support goes 3x as far. |
---

|
Peter -- new House Speaker "MAGA Mike" Johnson just fulfilled his promise to the far right in Congress that his first official act would be to expedite an incredibly harmful dirty energy agenda.

Now, in a vote of 210-199, the House just voted to gut clean energy programs, reverse drinking water protections, destroy sacred Native American sites, put wildlife in jeopardy, and block environmental justice initiatives.

**We need your help.** Extreme MAGA Republicans, led by their new Speaker MAGA Mike Johnson, are hustling to pass more anti-environmental spending bills _THIS WEEK_. This sets up a major showdown with the Senate -- without an agreement by November 17, the government will shut down, and the pressure to negotiate away environmental protections and clean energy funding will be enormous.

[The best thing you can do right now is to renew your LCV membership to power our campaign to STOP polluters' agenda in Congress. Right now, all it takes is $5. Give today and your donation will be TRIPLE MATCHED >>](https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/yAyZM-)

| | **
** **FOR IMMEDIATE REVIEW**

**Supporter Record:** Peter Willis
**MATCH STATUS:** [_TRIPLE MATCH ACTIVE_](https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/yAyZM-)

**Deadline:** 11:59 pm, October 31, 2023
**Fundraising Goal:** $30,000

**STATUS:** [Renew now -- it only takes $5 >>](https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/yAyZM-) |
---|---|---

**Peter, this is one of the worst anti-environmental spending bills to pass the House in years.** House Republicans' bill would:_****_

**-- Slash billions of dollars from critical clean energy and clean water programs,** including historic investments from the Inflation Reduction Act;

**-- Put wildlife in serious jeopardy** by giving polluters a loophole that would violate the Endangered Species Act, threatening vulnerable species like salmon and risk contaminating our water sources;

**-- Engage in unrelated and hateful culture wars** with racist and homophobic policy riders targeting diversity, equity, and inclusion programs and allowing for discrimination based on same-sex marriage;

**-- Block support for underserved communities** who have been hit hardest by pollution and environmental injustice.

With just 19 days left until a government shutdown, there is _enormous_ pressure on Congress to reach a compromise that could put our environment and communities at risk.__

[That's why we need your support right now -- to ramp up the pressure on members of Congress to REJECT any spending bill that sacrifices our environment, the health of our communities, and our climate. So please, renew your LCV membership for $5 now >>](https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/yAyZM-)

Thanks for standing with us as we fight for a cleaner and healthier future.

Onward,

Gene Karpinski
President
League of Conservation Voters
__
__

---

| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, [update your contact information](https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/ContactInformation?spMailingID=10156709&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MTg0MDYwMTQyMQS2&spReportId=MTg0MDYwMTQyMQS2). [Click here to unsubscribe](https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/Unsubscribe?spMailingID=10156709&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MTg0MDYwMTQyMQS2&spReportId=MTg0MDYwMTQyMQS2) from our supporter list. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](mailto:feedback@lcv.org), or just reply to this email! Thanks for your support.

[740 15th St NW, 7th Floor
Washington, DC 20005
202-785-8683](https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/j9y2f_) |

name: Team Rashida
subject: re: Republicans' resolution to censure Rashida
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

As the only Palestinian American member of Congress, Rashida’s voice and
lived experience are more critical now than ever. But in response to her
leadership in calling for a ceasefire and an end to the genocide unfolding
against millions of people trapped in Gaza, Rashida has been under
relentless attack.

In some of their first business since electing a new Speaker of the House,
Republicans introduced a resolution to censure Rashida, with even some
Democrats joining these right-wing Islamophobic attacks:

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jdem-20231029-rt.1SZNq5&refcode=em20231029-31581&amount=3&t=1001&akid=31581%2E1203867%2EFzFZD6 ]Newsweek: Marjorie Taylor Greene Gets Democrat Support to Punish
Rashida Tlaib

Marjorie Taylor Green's unhinged resolution is full of dangerous lies and
distortions. It isn't just Islamophobic and bigoted, it also attacks
non-violent Jewish anti-war activists.

Last week, Rashida spoke at a rally in Washington, DC organized by Jewish
Voice for Peace and IfNotNow, and an interfaith prayer vigil and rally to
hold the political establishment accountable for continuing the drumbeat
of war that will lead to more lives lost, especially children in
Palestine.

At the rally, Rashida reminded us that we must not lose our shared
humanity. The cries of the mother in Gaza who lost all of her children in
the unrelenting bombing by the Israeli government are the same cries of a
father who listened to his daughter being attacked by Hamas not knowing if
she is alive.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jdem-20231029-rt.1SZNq5&refcode=em20231029-31581&amount=3&t=1002&akid=31581%2E1203867%2EFzFZD6 ]Rashida’s voice is needed. Will you split a donation between Rashida
and Justice Democrats today to have Rashida’s back as she demands a
ceasefire and works to protect everyone in the region, no matter their
faith or ethnicity?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jdem-20231029-rt.1SZNq5&refcode=em20231029-31581&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=31581%2E1203867%2EFzFZD6 ]Contribute $3

If the United States government and the world do not speak out now, more
lives will be lost. The collective punishment of people in Gaza has been
relentless, with whole neighborhoods destroyed, and generations of
families wiped out. And the Israeli military is saying that they are just
getting started.

Our movement demanding the human rights of Palestinians―and of all
people―is growing. Americans are rising up, saying we will not be
complicit in the genocide of Palestinians.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jdem-20231029-rt.1SZNq5&refcode=em20231029-31581&amount=3&t=1022&akid=31581%2E1203867%2EFzFZD6 ]Together, let’s support Rashida’s leadership as she grieves the lives
lost and works to save countless civilian lives, even as others in
Congress continue the drumbeat of war. Split a contribution to have
Rashida’s back.

Together we must keep pushing for a just future where Israelis and
Palestinians can live in justice and peace, without fear and with true
freedom, equal rights, and human dignity.

— Team Rashida

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time.

There are other ways to make an impact in support of peace and equality in
Israel and Palestine: please urge your member of Congress to support a
ceasefire through [ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/139873?t=1023&akid=31581%2E1203867%2EFzFZD6 ]Adalah Justice Project’s petition or by calling them
using [ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/139874?t=1024&akid=31581%2E1203867%2EFzFZD6 ]Jewish Voice for Peace’s dialer here. Your voice matters in this
critical moment.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20231029-31581-footer&t=1025&refcode2=31581_1203867_FzFZD6&akid=31581%2E1203867%2EFzFZD6

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1026&akid=31581%2E1203867%2EFzFZD6

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
Justice Democrats
1390 Columbia Ave #261
Lancaster PA 17603
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

name: Mark Kelly
subject: About Bob Casey
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
Hi Peter, it's Mark Kelly. I'm reaching out today to ask you to help out my friend Bob Casey.
**[Before I jump in, Bob has an important fundraising deadline coming up at the end of the month, and anything you can contribute to his campaign will help keep him delivering for working families in the Senate.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231029-1?refcode=em20231029-1&refcode2=1006_552475_XvwHLJ&akid=1006%2E552475%2EXvwHLJ)**
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231029-1?refcode=em20231029-1&refcode2=1006_552475_XvwHLJ&akid=1006%2E552475%2EXvwHLJ)**
I'm no stranger to tough Senate races. My races in 2020 and 2022 in Arizona were key to helping Democrats win and hold our Senate majority. I also know that next year, Mitch McConnell and the GOP are going to do everything they can to take back Senate control by trying to defeat Bob and flip Pennsylvania red.
In fact, a mega-millionaire hedge fund executive who lives in Connecticut just launched his Senate campaign in Pennsylvania to run against Bob. We need to take this seriously, because this candidate has the ability to self-fund the race and outspend us.
Now more than ever, we need to stand with Bob as he heads into what will be his most competitive and expensive election yet. Bob is relying on this grassroots team to have his back, so I'm reaching out to ask you directly:
**[Can you chip in a few bucks to Bob's campaign today to help re-elect him in PA and defend our Democratic Senate majority? Grassroots donations were critical to winning my battleground race in Arizona in 2020 and in 2022, and I know they'll make all the difference as we fight to keep PA blue in 2024.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231029-1?refcode=em20231029-1&refcode2=1006_552475_XvwHLJ&akid=1006%2E552475%2EXvwHLJ)**
**[Donate Now ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231029-1?refcode=em20231029-1&refcode2=1006_552475_XvwHLJ&akid=1006%2E552475%2EXvwHLJ)**
Thanks for doing your part,
Mark Kelly
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231029-1?refcode=em20231029-1&refcode2=1006_552475_XvwHLJ&akid=1006%2E552475%2EXvwHLJ)

* * *
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://go.bobcasey.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=1&akid=1006%2E552475%2EXvwHLJ)
* [Update Your Information](https://go.bobcasey.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://go.bobcasey.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=2&akid=1006%2E552475%2EXvwHLJ)

To give by check:
Bob Casey for Senate
PO Box 58746
Philadelphia, PA 19102
Email us: [info@bobcasey.com](mailto:info@bobcasey.com)
PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC.

Hi there Friend,

It's Speaker of the House, Mike Johnson.

_**I wanted to reach out and introduce myself because, Friend, I hear you are one of our most dedicated grassroots supporters. **_

I was raised in Shreveport, LA. My father was a firefighter who taught me early the importance of service and sacrifice.

I attended Louisiana State University, where I received a degree in business and later my law degree.

As a constitutional lawyer, I worked tirelessly to protect religious freedom, the sanctity of human life, and biblical values.

body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72423058/435252617/-1743337223?refcode=em_fr_2023.10.29_b1_hj_all-nd&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NjA4MTgxZi04Zjc2LWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AupnsBLHuzqADUCYLCaFrPZIPoaPNVwenRl27KGTBtU=) I need you to understand where things stand in Emilia Sykes’ race, Peter:

1\. Emilia’s race is rated as **the** **most competitive House race in Ohio.**
2\. **Extreme MAGA Republicans** are targeting her district.
3\. **Holding Ohio’s 13th District is key to reclaiming our House Majority.**

[**When it comes to tough races like Emilia’s, grassroots supporters like you make all the difference. That’s why I’m asking: Will you chip in $10 today to support Emilia before Tuesday at midnight?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72423059/435252618/-1743337223?refcode=em_fr_2023.10.29_b1_hj_all-nd&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NjA4MTgxZi04Zjc2LWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AupnsBLHuzqADUCYLCaFrPZIPoaPNVwenRl27KGTBtU=)

**Peter, I’m honored to serve with Emilia in Congress.** She’s a fighter for Northeast Ohio and I’ve seen firsthand how hard she works to get big things done.

Emilia puts People Over Politics.

She puts working families over the well-connected.

_And she puts Akron over the abysmal MAGA chaos._

**I need Emilia fighting alongside me in the People’s House, Peter, so I’m asking for your help to keep her there.**

subject: We’ve seen what a Republican controlled House is doing. Imagine a Republican controlled Senate, too.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jeff Merkley for Oregon
body:
We’re already working to ensure Democrats win in key Senate and House races across the country.
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72423185/435253063/150430950?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTMyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NzNlZTJiOC04Zjc2LWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=V3XRv6WxSzzWt982Xl-6r4PmO1oprZ_5G4x7teYXL-U=&emci=eec81416-9b75-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&emdi=673ee2b8-8f76-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&ceid=7731215)
---

| | Imagine this: It's the morning of November 6, 2024, the day after Election Day. You wake up, grab your phone, and see a cascade of news notifications calling the results of major Senate and House races across the country. You scroll through the major U.S. Senate races: Montana, Ohio, Arizona, Nevada, Wisconsin, Pennsylvania, and Michigan. **And then it hits you: The Republicans have not only held onto the House, they have also taken over the U.S. Senate.** _A scary thought, right?_ That's why we're already mobilizing our grassroots movement to ensure Democrats win key Senate and House races, and it's also the reason Jeff is raising money for critical races in Montana, Ohio, Arizona, Nevada, Wisconsin, Pennsylvania, and Michigan by lacing up his sneakers and running laps in the Race to Save the Senate. **Our country can't afford the disaster of another Congress fully controlled by MAGA Republicans.** We know what happens when they're in charge – they spawn chaos and force through dangerous, extreme laws that hurt Americans. clean_body: We’re already working to ensure Democrats win in key Senate and House races across the country. | | | | Imagine this: It's the morning of November 6, 2024, the day after Election Day. You wake up, grab your phone, and see a cascade of news notifications calling the results of major Senate and House races across the country. You scroll through the major U.S. Senate races: Montana, Ohio, Arizona, Nevada, Wisconsin, Pennsylvania, and Michigan. And then it hits you: The Republicans have not only held onto the House, they have also taken over the U.S. Senate. A scary thought, right? That's why we're already mobilizing our grassroots movement to ensure Democrats win key Senate and House races, and it's also the reason Jeff is raising money for critical races in Montana, Ohio, Arizona, Nevada, Wisconsin, Pennsylvania, and Michigan by lacing up his sneakers and running laps in the Race to Save the Senate. Our country can't afford the disaster of another Congress fully controlled by MAGA Republicans. We know what happens when they're in charge – they spawn chaos and force through dangerous, extreme laws that hurt Americans. = = Team Merkley ** | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | = | = | = | = ---|---|---|--- | | Paid for by Jeff Merkley for Oregon. | This email was sent by ** Jeff Merkley for Oregon PO Box 14172 Portland, OR 97293 United States Email is an important way for Jeff Merkley to keep supporters like you informed about critical issues and to build a winning grassroots campaign. name: John Fetterman
subject: "Bucks County is one of the swingiest counties in one of the swingiest states in America."
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
#
Hi Derek,
In 9 days, the race for Bucks County Commissioner may determine whether a fake elector is in control of the elections process in Pennsylvania's biggest swing county.
Politico said this about the Bucks County Commissioners' race earlier in the summer:
_"An obscure race for county commissioner underway here in a suburb outside of Philadelphia could tell us a lot about who will win the presidential election in 2024._
**_Bucks County is one of the swingiest counties in one of the swingiest states in America."_**
This race is important for a lot of reasons, but one of the biggest is that the party that controls the County Commission will control the elections process in Bucks in 2024.
Currently we have our first Democratic Majority on the board in decades, but they're in a dead heat race -- and the Chair of the Bucks Republican Party is a FAKE ELECTOR and said she doesn't regret it!
You can't make this stuff up, and the stakes could not be higher.
**[Could you give to make sure that we have Democratic leadership in Bucks County that will ensure a fair and free election in 2024?](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/49743?t=1&akid=8642%2E434096%2Enx0qcQ)**
**[Donate »](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/49743?t=2&akid=8642%2E434096%2Enx0qcQ)**
Democrats across the country cannot afford to lose this race and we all must do our part to keep Bucks County blue this November.
Sincerely,
John
John Fetterman
U.S. Senator from Pennsylvania

name: Katie Porter (iphone)
subject: Personal note
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
I’m VERY happy to be back home in California after three long weeks of Speakerless-drama in the House.
Hey Derek, I’m VERY happy to be back home in California after three long weeks of Speakerless-drama in the House. Now, you can bet I’ll be doing everything I can to hold Mike Johnson accountable.
That spooky situation aside, today I’m in San Bernardino and Rancho Cucamonga meeting with voters.
This race remains highly competitive. **Polling consistently shows us in a good place, but we’ve been outraised each quarter by another candidate in this race**. So right now, I’m really focused on both raising more money, and stretching every dollar further.
Earlier this month, a special election was called. This is a confusing situation, but here’s what you need to know: candidates' names will appear on the same ballot multiple times. Because of this, contribution limits have DOUBLED. Normally, each individual can give up to $6,600. Now they can give $13,200. **Politico analysis shows that puts our campaign at a huge disadvantage, with our opponent Adam Schiff raising around 10x the big money that we do.**
That Derek, is a fact that scares me more than any Halloween costume could! But look, I know we have the grassroots strength to win this race. **To help us close the gap, I have to ask—can you chip in a few bucks today? You can use this Actblue link:**[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20231029-1?personal=dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20231029-1?refcode=EMAM29_1_FAX_20231029_V1_F&refcode2=32260_3422442_ESnJrK&akid=32260%2E3422442%2EESnJrK)
Thanks for considering, I can’t do this without you.
Katie

Katie Porter for Senate
PO Box 5176
Irvine, CA 92616
Email us: [info@katieporter.com](mailto:info@katieporter.com)
Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate

name: Special Elections Update (via DLCC.org)
subject: $7 for 7 special elections →
disclaimer_text: Paid for by DLCC PAC
body:
While one donation may not seem like a lot, the collective power of thousands of donations drives our movement forward. You can play a pivotal role in electing state Dems nationwide by donating today. | | |
---
| |
---|---
**$7.** That’s all we’re asking for to help elect Democrats in the states. Here’s why: **Reason #1:** We have _seven_ special elections next month in critical states like South Carolina, New Hampshire, and Maine – $7 helps win races like those and more. **Reason #2:** We’re battling Republican mega-donors who are dumping millions into races nationwide. But when enough grassroots Democrats chip in $7, it adds up and helps our candidates compete against the GOP money machine. **Reason #3:** Losing means Republicans will gain an advantage in key battleground states – so $7 can help defeat extremists who are determined to tear down abortion rights and ballot access. [So what do you say? Our fundraising deadline is coming up quick, and Sepi is right: real change takes all of us. Will you join us today and help us reach our $5,000 goal by chipping in any amount right now? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_shyne?refcode=231029_team_eom_kicker _l1]

Chip In [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_shyne?refcode=231029_team_eom_kicker _b1]

Thanks for being part of our movement for equity and justice for all.

— Team Sepi

---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Mayor Sepi Shyne <info@sepishyne.com>
Date: Fri, Oct 27, 2023 at 2:04 PM
Subject: When we stand together, we're unstoppable.
To: dpwillis67@gmail.com

Friend,

As Mayor of West Hollywood, I have fought for policies that make life better for workers, the LGBTQ+ community, unhoused folks and everyone in our community.

This campaign isn't just about me. It's about our people-powered movement to create a world where every single person can thrive free from discrimination, violence, and crushing inequality.

Here's some of what we're fighting for, and what we're doing:

*
Workers'
rights.
As
Mayor,
we
worked
to
raise
the
minimum
wage
while
supporting
unions
and
the
PRO
Act,
so
no
one
continues
to
be
exploited
by
greedy
corporations.
*
Social
justice
&
LGBTQ+
rights.
As
an
LGBTQ+
rights,
equity
and
inclusivity
champion
for
over
two
decades,
we
passed
the
nation's
first
multi-stall
gender
neutral
bathroom
ordinance
and
created
a
social
justice
taskforce
to
empower
BIPOC
voices.
*
Healthcare
as
a
basic
human
right.
We
will
continue
to
champion
Medicare
for
All,
so
no
one
is
ever
denied
the
care
they
need.
We
came
together
and
secured
24/7
behavioral
response
units
to
expand
mental
health
care.
*
Helping
unhoused
populations.
We
increased
rental
assistance
in
order
to
keep
folks
housed,
leading
to
a
60%
drop
in
homelessness.
No
one
should
be
sleeping
on
the
streets,
period.
*
Protecting
reproductive
rights
in
the
face
of
federal
rollbacks,
because
we
can't
turn
back
the
clock
on
reproductive
health
and
women's
rights.
*
Protecting
the
environment
and
taking
climate
action.
It
snowed
in
Los
Angeles
last
year:
climate
change
is
happening
now.
As
Mayor,
we
prioritized
sustainability
by
banning
plastics
for
compostable
alternatives
and
fast-tracked
our
climate
action
plan
by
10
years,
because
we
have
no
time
to
waste.
*
Fighting
for
Woman,
Life,
Freedom.
We
will
always
fight
for
the
people
of
Iran
fighting
for
freedom,
and
we
will
be
that
voice
in
Congress.

Friend, real change takes all of us coming together to make it happen. And when we stand together, we're unstoppable. As we near our end-of-month fundraising deadline, can I count on you to power our movement for equity and justice with a donation of any amount today? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_shyne?refcode=231029_team_eom_kicker_l1]

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately:

Contribute $5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_shyne?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=231029_team_eom_kicker_el1&refcode2=919c8737-9476-ee11-b004-00224832eb73]

Contribute $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_shyne?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=231029_team_eom_kicker_el2&refcode2=919c8737-9476-ee11-b004-00224832eb73]

Contribute $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_shyne?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=231029_team_eom_kicker_el3&refcode2=919c8737-9476-ee11-b004-00224832eb73]

Contribute $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_shyne?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=231029_team_eom_kicker_el4&refcode2=919c8737-9476-ee11-b004-00224832eb73]

After fleeing the Iranian Revolution as a child, and growing up as a queer, Brown woman, I know what it's like to feel powerless. I've experienced harassment, prejudice, and outright discrimination throughout my life. Now, I'm running for Congress to stand up for everyone who has been underrepresented and unheard.

Your support keeps our campaign strong and allows us to stand up for those who have been overlooked for far too long. Together, we can make a real difference and ensure that our voices are heard in Congress.

With gratitude,

Mayor Sepi Shyne
#WomanLifeFreedom
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP50/1/103922/images/Copy%20of%20Sepi%20high%20res%20headshot-min.jpg]
Mayor Sepi Shyne has taken on WeHo's biggest issues and delivered results. From raising the minimum wage to the highest in the nation to significantly reducing homelessness – she's running for Congress to fight for all of us. As the first out Iranian LGBTQ+ woman elected anywhere in the world, Sepi is committed to making the American dream a reality for everyone: For immigrants, the LGBTQ+ community, women, and anyone trying to make ends meet. It's our time to Shyne, make a donation today.
Will you join Sepi's team and support her for Congress?
Contribute Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_shyne?refcode=emailfooter&refcode2=919c8737-9476-ee11-b004-00224832eb73]
GIVE Monthly [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_shyne?recurring=true&refcode=footermonthly&refcode2=919c8737-9476-ee11-b004-00224832eb73]

Fellow American,

Most people know Mike Johnson as the new Speaker of the House, a constitutional law attorney, and small business owner – but to our family, he’s husband, dad, and role model.

My name is Kelly Johnson, and I’m Mike’s wife and his number one supporter. We’ve been married for 23 years now, and I have never known anyone who is more tirelessly committed to serving God, our country, and its people—or who fights as hard for our principles every single day. He was born with that servant’s heart.

Mike is respected for his courage and integrity and trusted for his wisdom and insight. He is honest, principled, smart, and unshakeable. That’s precisely what America needs in these times of unprecedented challenge.

[**I wanted you to hear a bit more about my husband Mike, from me, the person who knows him best. Would you be willing to spare a moment to watch this video I recorded for you?**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=beba0d9237964c09ae801829c9b97c74&_e=uQTIWGcX2sbptAzmTdpDyK30FvhADQ7d5I4WsJcZK5nxt05-7_4rDsFb85gvVidP8gVKZwUxH-rLvf5ug5twOYo7PNGx_cuOd-sMxU4JvW5d2grL3Sw1sm3jeIhc9WLqIJ9Y61s_80BFMdCI_rwdGSERd9U_h6QrADHEM3suVR2KkGksNWdbACsdLoFfjjM_j6--Y7b4NFsMR9l1I0WAppJIzZwpMkJX9xR2aPGjtWI9s44uXYT8cKKg-8VVWteK0Eg5aYqdLw2c_cW2CAF2NWo-fvvIFXG9JJY-jaCdoqatznO1BbFXrt_DHPpLrrZgoKkjwlLB5-PgwsL0uYBj76PfF2fzRw-5dnGiuKsZ4FyFeDSh4ym4n21c9B1le1YjiScaemllr-GPXvfZL9ZD5Q%3D%3D)

clean_body: My name is Kelly Johnson, and I’m Mike’s wife and his number one supporter. We’ve been married almost 24 years now. | | Fellow American, Most people know Mike Johnson as the new Speaker of the House, a constitutional law attorney, and small business owner – but to our family, he’s husband, dad, and role model. My name is Kelly Johnson, and I’m Mike’s wife and his number one supporter. We’ve been married for 23 years now, and I have never known anyone who is more tirelessly committed to serving God, our country, and its people—or who fights as hard for our principles every single day. He was born with that servant’s heart. Mike is respected for his courage and integrity and trusted for his wisdom and insight. He is honest, principled, smart, and unshakeable. That’s precisely what America needs in these times of unprecedented challenge. I am grateful every day that our four beautiful children have such a strong role model and devoted father. We are in the greatest fight yet for the heart, soul, and direction of our country. As you know, the future that Democrats have envisioned for America is horrifying. God bless, Kelly Johnson | MIKE JOHNSON * Mike is a dedicated husband and father of four, as well as a constitutional law attorney who has devoted his life and career to fighting for the fundamental freedoms and traditional values that have always been a priority to the people of Louisiana. | PAID FOR BY MIKE JOHNSON FOR LOUISIANA Don't want to receive any more of our emails? clean_body: Team—We wish we had better news. We just checked the numbers, and our grassroots fundraising has stalled. We’re still $10,634 short of where we need to be to reach our $25,000 end-of-month goal. There are just a few days left before our deadline, and if we don’t close the gap soon, we will be forced to adjust our budget and cut an ad here, or pull back our outreach efforts there. The race for NY-17 is one of the closest in the country and Democrats cannot retake our majority without flipping this district. Making cuts is just not an option we can afford—especially with how high the stakes are. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- = | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- We set these fundraising goals for a reason, team. Mondaire isn’t taking corporate PAC money—he relies solely on grassroots donors like you stepping up when and where they can. It makes budgeting much tighter, but Mondaire knows it’s the only way to run an honest campaign. Every fundraising goal we hit gets us one step closer to flipping NY-17, defeating Mike Lawler, and retaking our majority so Democrats can keep making progress for everyday Americans. = We couldn’t do it without you, Finance Team Mondaire Jones is running for Congress to finish the work he started last term. He’s ready to fight to lower costs for residents of the Hudson Valley, defend our democracy, raise wages, and protect reproductive rights for all. And he’s doing it without a penny from corporate PACs. = = = PAID FOR BY MONDAIRE FOR CONGRESS P.O. BOX #873, SLEEPY HOLLOW, NY 10591

Team, we have good news and bad news.

**The good news** is that, over the summer, our movement saw a major victory when the Supreme Court upheld Section 2 of the Voting Rights Act and invalidated Alabama’s congressional maps for diluting the power of Black voters. As a result, we have a huge opportunity to fight for fairer maps in more states ahead of the 2024 election.

**But the bad news** is that now the Court is considering a new case that could open the door for unchecked gerrymandering across the country. | **Vox:
The Supreme Court appears determined to make it easy to draw gerrymanders

_“The Republican Party had a great day in the Supreme Court today. Voting rights did not.”_**

name: =?utf-8?Q?Kelvin=20King?=
subject: We’ve got some exciting events coming up!
body:
We’ve got some exciting events coming up at Let’s Win for America Action and we don’t want you to miss them! | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/lwfaa/weve-got-some-exciting-events-coming-up?e=cb396c52a2)
---
| |
---
| | Friend,

We’ve got some exciting events coming up at Let’s Win for America Action and we don’t want you to miss them!

First, we will be partnering with the Atlanta Young Republicans to host a special event called “The Presidential Series: Candid with the Candidates.” **On Wednesday, November 8, at 6:00 p.m.** , we will host a town hall-style one-on-one conversation with presidential candidate Governor Asa Hutchinson. Guests are encouraged to stay around for a debate watch party following the town hall. Check out the details [here](https://LWFAA.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e05b015cc2e6982fdaa22b89&id=deebdef36c&e=cb396c52a2). We hope to see you at the Park Bench Battery in Atlanta on **November 8**!

We are also excited to partner together with Our Children Have Rights for a virtual town hall **on November 14 at 6:30 p.m**. Being pro-life doesn’t end at birth. We want to help parents who are new to co-parenting thrive. Join us next month for a robust discussion featuring education, resources, and support services for successful co-parenting strategies. If you, or someone you know, would benefit from an event focused on healthy co-parenting and navigating child custody challenges, we hope you will [sign up here](https://LWFAA.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e05b015cc2e6982fdaa22b89&id=37c76e3927&e=cb396c52a2) or spread the word.

---
| Don’t forget to follow us on social media! We post regularly about our appearances, current events, and our takes on the direction our country is going. Stay up to date on all things LWFAA at the links below:

Facebook: [Let's Win for America Action](https://LWFAA.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e05b015cc2e6982fdaa22b89&id=721becace9&e=cb396c52a2)
Twitter: [@LWFAA_](https://LWFAA.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e05b015cc2e6982fdaa22b89&id=ac36529295&e=cb396c52a2)
Youtube: [Let's Win For America Action](https://LWFAA.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e05b015cc2e6982fdaa22b89&id=327cf727c6&e=cb396c52a2)
Instagram: [@lwfaa_](https://LWFAA.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e05b015cc2e6982fdaa22b89&id=501c40e8bb&e=cb396c52a2)

We believe the work we put in now will determine the outcome we receive next November in the ballot box. If you would like to join our movement and help us continue to engage with the community through incredible free events - please consider [making a contribution today](https://LWFAA.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e05b015cc2e6982fdaa22b89&id=368ea12ceb&e=cb396c52a2)!

God Bless,
Kelvin King
Chairman, Let’s Win for America Action

Would you like to have Kelvin or Janelle speak at an event? Contact [Info@LWFAA.com](mailto:Info@LWFAA.com) to connect with a scheduler and get your event on our calendar!

clean_body: We’ve got some exciting events coming up at Let’s Win for America Action and we don’t want you to miss them! | | | | | | | Friend, We’ve got some exciting events coming up at Let’s Win for America Action and we don’t want you to miss them! First, we will be partnering with the Atlanta Young Republicans to host a special event called “The Presidential Series: Candid with the Candidates.” On Wednesday, November 8, at 6:00 p.m. , we will host a town hall-style one-on-one conversation with presidential candidate Governor Asa Hutchinson. Guests are encouraged to stay around for a debate watch party following the town hall. Check out the details . We hope to see you at the Park Bench Battery in Atlanta on November 8! We are also excited to partner together with Our Children Have Rights for a virtual town hall on November 14 at 6:30 p.m. Being pro-life doesn’t end at birth. We want to help parents who are new to co-parenting thrive. Join us next month for a robust discussion featuring education, resources, and support services for successful co-parenting strategies. If you, or someone you know, would benefit from an event focused on healthy co-parenting and navigating child custody challenges, we hope you will or spread the word. | Don’t forget to follow us on social media! We post regularly about our appearances, current events, and our takes on the direction our country is going. Stay up to date on all things LWFAA at the links below: Facebook: Twitter: Youtube: Instagram: We believe the work we put in now will determine the outcome we receive next November in the ballot box. If you would like to join our movement and help us continue to engage with the community through incredible free events - please consider ! God Bless, Kelvin King Chairman, Let’s Win for America Action Would you like to have Kelvin or Janelle speak at an event? | | Patriot,

---
The Republican primary is coming to a GLORIOUS END.
---
_At the end of August, RINOs set a 60-day timeline to try and DESTROY our movement and recapture the GOP for the failed, broken establishment._

---
But that 60-day timeline has officially expired – and we’re still standing stronger than ever before.

---
I can’t say the same for the others...
---
**Yesterday, the** _**THIRD**_**Republican candidate for president DROPPED OUT now that it’s clear that the 60-day plot FAILED** _**MISERABLY**_**.**

This is just the beginning. Candidates are running out of special interest money. They’re ALL stuck in the __single__ digits. More and more will fall like dominoes._

Hello,
When the results started coming in on Election Night last year, the talking heads on cable news couldn’t believe their eyes: **Lauren Boebert and her Democratic opponent Adam Frisch were in a TIED race!**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72424694/435258572/1610638071?refcode=em20231029pm-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&refcode2=6b00bd83-9976-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjIxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YjAwYmQ4My05OTc2LWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bGUI0R6sQchimNbZZ9nI7f4xjw4eaYLsXyr8gg_HcDk=)

Lauren Boebert’s Washington allies and her Super PACs are about to relentlessly attack Adam, but he’s not taking money from corporate PACs. **If Adam Frisch is going to counter their lies and finally kick Boebert out of Congress, he’s counting on grassroots donors like you to give right now to help us raise the last $65,000 we need to hit our end-of-month fundraising goal:**
[**Please, will you chip in $5 or more right now – whatever you can afford to give before our end-of-month fundraising deadline – to help Adam Frisch finally defeat Lauren Boebert in 2024? Every dollar goes a long way.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72424695/435258573/1610638071?refcode=em20231029pm-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&refcode2=6b00bd83-9976-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjIxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YjAwYmQ4My05OTc2LWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bGUI0R6sQchimNbZZ9nI7f4xjw4eaYLsXyr8gg_HcDk=)

clean_body: When the results started coming in on Election Night last year, the talking heads on cable news couldn’t believe their eyes: Lauren Boebert and her Democratic opponent Adam Frisch were in a TIED race! = Hello, When the results started coming in on Election Night last year, the talking heads on cable news couldn’t believe their eyes: Lauren Boebert and her Democratic opponent Adam Frisch were in a TIED race! = The race went to a recount, but ultimately, Adam Frisch lost to Lauren Boebert by just 546 votes. It was the closest race in the entire country. Adam is running against Boebert again – and although no one gave him a chance in 2022, every single political pundit now says that Adam absolutely can defeat her in 2024. Lauren Boebert’s Washington allies and her Super PACs are about to relentlessly attack Adam, but he’s not taking money from corporate PACs. If Adam Frisch is going to counter their lies and finally kick Boebert out of Congress, he’s counting on grassroots donors like you to give right now to help us raise the last $65,000 we need to hit our end-of-month fundraising goal: = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = When Adam defeats Lauren Boebert on November 5, 2024, it will be because people like you stepped up now and gave what you could. On behalf of our district, our country, and our democracy – thank you. Team Frisch ** Paid for by Adam for Colorado. Adam for Colorado PO Box 1240 Glenwood Springs, CO 81602 United States Contributions or gifts to Adam for Colorado are not tax deductible.

clean_body: There's only one way we'll reelect Joe Biden and keep Trump out of the White House -- and that's together. | | | $25. If you knew that donating $25 would mean Donald Trump never set foot in the White House again, wouldn't it be the best $25 you ever spent? If you knew that contributing $25 meant continued progress in addressing climate change and lowering the cost of prescription drugs, wouldn't you pitch in? If you knew that $25 would help protect our democracy from the MAGA extremists who work overtime to rig the game to protect their power, wouldn't it be worth it? Now, we know that $25 may not seem like it can do all of those things... But by the time you read this, a lot of folks have chipped in $25 of their own. And now they're counting on you to join them. Because there's only one way we'll reelect Joe Biden and keep Trump out of the White House -- and that's together. So please: | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | Thank you, \-- Team Biden-Harris

name: Jon Tester
subject: down to the wire
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Seth Moulton for Congress
body:
http://secure.actblue.com/donate/moulton-tester [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/moulton-tester]
Hey folks, this will be the last email you get from me tonight.
My team just let me know that we’re still short of our end-of-month fundraising goal, and it’s coming down to the wire. We only have a few hours left until the deadline, so I’m reaching out to ask this grassroots team to kick things into high gear as a last-minute push.
Falling behind would mean serious, long-term setbacks for our campaign. On the flipside, hitting this goal puts us in the best position to be ready for incoming attacks from Mitch McConnell and his cronies—and I know they’re coming, because McConnell already said he’s got me set in his sights.
Folks, I’m humbly asking you to donate a split donation between my campaign and Seth Moulton to help us hit our end-of-month fundraising goal before midnight TONIGHT. Your donation goes a long way in our grassroots campaign.
Here’s a secure link for you to give: secure.actblue.com/donate/October [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/moulton-tester]
We can’t take anything for granted in this race. The other side will do anything and everything to tear me down. The only way I’ll win this thing is if you’re with me—I really mean that.
Thank you. I appreciate your support.
Jon
Donate [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/moulton-tester]

subject: “Happy wedding anniversary to my wife.”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Susan Wild for Congress
body:
I voted against Mike Johnson and for marriage equality.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72424886/435259237/-1367617159?refcode=BLU-SWC-20231029-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODczMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1Mjg0MjJjOS05YTc2LWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pOp8Yl4S70mTBzI-fN5MtB8XsDO4Gu2zGeLnwoL8Wfo=)
---
Peter: Here’s what I had to say when I voted for Rep. Hakeem Jeffries — and against Republicans’ newly elected Speaker of the House Mike Johnson:

**“Happy wedding anniversary to my wife.”**

Mike Johnson, a far-right ally of Donald Trump, voted against landmark marriage equality legislation that would protect marriages like mine and my wife, Cheryl’s.

He introduced a federal version of Florida’s “don’t say gay” bill and once said being queer is “sinful” and “destructive” as an attorney for the anti-LGBTQ+ group Alliance Defense Fund.

While we’ve come a long way toward achieving LGBTQ+ equality, Republicans’ decision to elect Mike Johnson proves they are hell-bent on taking us backward.

We are still seeing Republicans normalize anti-LGBTQ+ legislation more than two decades after I won a tough battle to adopt my son, Joshua, against a judge who said having two mothers was “not in the best interests of any child.”

That kind of rhetoric — and legislation that supports it — belongs in the past. But Republicans want to move anti-LGBTQ+ discrimination into 2023.

**Meanwhile, the vast majority of Americans support marriage equality.** It’s clear that the Republican Party is too extreme to represent the American people. Mike Johnson’s election as speaker is further confirmation of how radical they have become.

[_**We can't allow Republicans to win in MN-02, expand their narrow majority, and pass extreme anti-LGBTQ+ laws that set us back decades. Will you help us show Republicans that we won't stand for their extremism by splitting an urgent contribution between my campaign and Susan Wild's to take back the House?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72424887/435259239/-1367617159?refcode=BLU-SWC-20231029-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODczMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1Mjg0MjJjOS05YTc2LWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pOp8Yl4S70mTBzI-fN5MtB8XsDO4Gu2zGeLnwoL8Wfo=)

clean_body: I voted against Mike Johnson and for marriage equality. | = Peter: Here’s what I had to say when I voted for Rep. Hakeem Jeffries — and against Republicans’ newly elected Speaker of the House Mike Johnson: “Happy wedding anniversary to my wife.” Mike Johnson, a far-right ally of Donald Trump, voted against landmark marriage equality legislation that would protect marriages like mine and my wife, Cheryl’s. He introduced a federal version of Florida’s “don’t say gay” bill and once said being queer is “sinful” and “destructive” as an attorney for the anti-LGBTQ+ group Alliance Defense Fund. While we’ve come a long way toward achieving LGBTQ+ equality, Republicans’ decision to elect Mike Johnson proves they are hell-bent on taking us backward. We are still seeing Republicans normalize anti-LGBTQ+ legislation more than two decades after I won a tough battle to adopt my son, Joshua, against a judge who said having two mothers was “not in the best interests of any child.” That kind of rhetoric — and legislation that supports it — belongs in the past. But Republicans want to move anti-LGBTQ+ discrimination into 2023. Meanwhile, the vast majority of Americans support marriage equality. It’s clear that the Republican Party is too extreme to represent the American people. Mike Johnson’s election as speaker is further confirmation of how radical they have become. = | | | = | = | = | = | = Thank you for taking action to stop Republican extremism — for LGBTQ+ families everywhere like mine. — Rep. Angie Craig Minnesota’s 2nd District | | = Paid for by Susan Wild for Congress Susan Wild for Congress 1636 N Cedar Crest Blvd. #183 Allentown, PA 18104 United States If you wish to contribute by check, you can do so at the address above. name: Mark Meckler, Convention of States Action
subject: The Constitution – use it or lose it!
body:
| | |
---
Friend, Here’s the latest shocker: There are 20,822 border wall panels currently sitting in storage.
That’s no exaggeration.
On Biden's first day in office, his administration suspended wall construction at the southern border. The government suddenly abandoned everything, including contractors AND materials that the previous administration had organized.
Instead of assembling millions of dollars of supplies along the border, the **Department of Defense is paying a whopping $160,000 per month** to store over 20,000 panels, fiber optic cables, and lighting.
This waste must be _stopped_. Our border must be _secured_. American taxpayers must be _represented._
**[Friend, I’m asking you to please, right this second, simply sign the National Petition for an Article V convention to save America.](http://email.mail.oneamericanflag.com/c/eJxckT2vnDwQhX-N6VjBmGuzBcX7XkJxlQ8pRYptrMEeWG_8gbC5G_LrI1abKErj4vjozJxn0C_OTnvH5P8M4GpNYgCM_8cA5m_vt-0r_PyUy-_721p-uPmP1fELrwwg7wv9sT5TTuTRukOVfWG6RlPbiLGgrhbnVtQAUhTXTp-REzdcwijliC20TVvT-FJPKA1KXdgOKuB1BWeomoa_nKZWcGGwqbSUhjSypjoGnWIg9LRajWFyOJ909IXrrjkv6bHXwGDQMZ3Cph1tacGZ0mFiMDgMxoaZwTDG1dBa3tG58o4pUwmMD1v2ypOxm2e8f9YSh5jitmpivP8LT9BOPRE8XRr9gnYOjPePJqI8HqVjUs6mrFYKGZ0aVwxGBborHZddjavFEFClbbyRzoqriNPvxBgyhcx4H7Qrl0t6f7t-vqRXBkIFZw3j_T_i45i8P1_wR7rs5kuxdma5W-dsEpI11fxgqKP_FQAA__-U7Kko)**

---
| | MILLIONS of taxpayer dollars have been wasted on nonfunctioning supplies, and we can expect this ridiculousness to continue as political control swings back and forth.
If you’re tired of watching your money go to failed government projects, you can find hope in Convention of States. Article V of the Constitution was written for times like this. Our state legislatures give us the means to correct the federal government and Article V gives us the power.
Our current path is unsustainable, and action is critical NOW. Liberty-minded endorsers like Ben Carson, Rand Paul, Charlie Kirk, and Mark Levin are vocal supporters of COS, and you can be too.
Time is running out, and you have the ability to say you’re in this fight, not just standing by silently.

name: Ted Cruz
subject: I don’t mean to alarm you, but this is a big deal
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
You know me. And you know that I wouldn’t be asking for your help unless there were a sincere need. | [](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=d37c5213c62d40d996cad28533a6052d&_e=M0jjmCi-DFqNxwmmZ5i-UwMrTcFt5HETtdKcJHF-mpMkP1W1SDvVfqbwQSkT6oRLuwdgw0h_hlYfSelKZnMO9VLN7XPT4SzACqBNTWv1y8pyt6U5wPTaR7W4z5o_qzOeDsV7nyVwsPAQk4XQ1iXaBn4Rl7m6jJI_DGWlhL7OMBXlgXRGs91oBnkmSyKSHftvJHUC2_Kx_-dXlVn3KZFGTR-J4TmyLY5U5Ws7cYI256Sd9M0HNl073guqFbI2dHLfd8pQGioU9p2sf6IMikTQkC-WWdH9DARgOEBi8lvb4jEptv26XrC4RnetjzbfXeHCnqxZk_jj40OAVR0TFgUpvjWD3dRJnUB8OjrQALtHURye9lLiTyHK1AZCKCVzBS_a9gTJV8O6xNGuNMibOL-r_GTPBhrVL_UpkPHNA0msTpeGai98K-S748ooPkCxUUvk)
Peter,

We’ve known one another for a long time, so you know by now that when I ask for favors there is a reason.

I’ll be straight with you: my campaign needs your immediate financial support. A lot of folks around the country don’t think that my seat is at risk, but the truth is that no one knows that for sure.

You know that Democrats HATE ME.

I know that Democrats HATE ME.

But I bet you didn’t know that they hate me to the tune of $52,000 per day, did you?

When my opponent announced his fundraising numbers for the third quarter earlier this month, it shocked me. From July 1st to September 30th, he raised more than $4.7 million from the liberal coasts that he’s going to use to smear my good name ahead of next year’s election.

**Texans know me; Americans know me.** It’s no secret what I stand for. But I’ll tell you this: if Democrats are allowed to vastly outspend us on the airwaves, there is no telling what kind of twisted lies they’ll try to spin to make my supporters flip sides.

**We cannot – WE WILL not allow them to win. I need to know you’re still with me and Senate Republicans.[ If you are, I’m asking for you to send us just $5 right now.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=d37c5213c62d40d996cad28533a6052d&_e=M0jjmCi-DFqNxwmmZ5i-UwMrTcFt5HETtdKcJHF-mpMkP1W1SDvVfqbwQSkT6oRLuwdgw0h_hlYfSelKZnMO9VLN7XPT4SzACqBNTWv1y8pyt6U5wPTaR7W4z5o_qzOeDsV7nyVwsPAQk4XQ1iXaBn4Rl7m6jJI_DGWlhL7OMBXlgXRGs91oBnkmSyKSHftvJHUC2_Kx_-dXlVn3KZFGTR-J4TmyLY5U5Ws7cYI256Sd9M0HNl073guqFbI2dHLfd8pQGioU9p2sf6IMikTQkC-WWdH9DARgOEBi8lvb4jEi5vkUX63yu6qwnSllJSkHx2ak-yDetgMNqV4-7RG_Xh2Yj2PhKMWcA3QLOZhG_qs9u5dGxm2p1fF6_omshK4-YHvu6zbMqn1UZ2TV2UZOtQ05mAqkowJRwfk00WXHsuStPsPMfvDcK8Yq2jnhaNey)**

[**Chip in $5 IMMEDIATELY >>**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=d37c5213c62d40d996cad28533a6052d&_e=M0jjmCi-DFqNxwmmZ5i-UwMrTcFt5HETtdKcJHF-mpMkP1W1SDvVfqbwQSkT6oRLuwdgw0h_hlYfSelKZnMO9VLN7XPT4SzACqBNTWv1y8pyt6U5wPTaR7W4z5o_qzOeDsV7nyVwsPAQk4XQ1iXaBn4Rl7m6jJI_DGWlhL7OMBXlgXRGs91oBnkmSyKSHftvJHUC2_Kx_-dXlVn3KZFGTR-J4TmyLY5U5Ws7cYI256Sd9M0HNl073guqFbI2dHLfd8pQGioU9p2sf6IMikTQkC-WWdH9DARgOEBi8lvb4jGPLlRU4JMSFzGYGrj1zfLpo5xZocAIr01qko9_37ROL4sMY9HLUoCU6BoSiGcHO0GYSmo_7Gc0hKcPfL1sbM0yPdiJMPne4ngMzJ6y2GalDv2RWu8iHXO6EkxaOljuu_-iX_TVUTLM7erPaf4KAaXA)

clean_body: You know me. And you know that I wouldn’t be asking for your help unless there were a sincere need. | Peter, We’ve known one another for a long time, so you know by now that when I ask for favors there is a reason. I’ll be straight with you: my campaign needs your immediate financial support. A lot of folks around the country don’t think that my seat is at risk, but the truth is that no one knows that for sure. You know that Democrats HATE ME. I know that Democrats HATE ME. But I bet you didn’t know that they hate me to the tune of $52,000 per day, did you? When my opponent announced his fundraising numbers for the third quarter earlier this month, it shocked me. From July 1st to September 30th, he raised more than $4.7 million from the liberal coasts that he’s going to use to smear my good name ahead of next year’s election. Texans know me; Americans know me. It’s no secret what I stand for. But I’ll tell you this: if Democrats are allowed to vastly outspend us on the airwaves, there is no telling what kind of twisted lies they’ll try to spin to make my supporters flip sides. We cannot – WE WILL not allow them to win. I need to know you’re still with me and Senate Republicans. By the end of the day, we need 5,000 individuals to donate $5 or more to keep Texas Red and help us flip the Senate. Can I count on you right now? name: Friends of the Earth
subject: Monarch Pesticide Petition: Halloween’s unofficial mascot?
body:
| | | | | [](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2082069?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---|---|---

| | With Halloween approaching, **orange and black** are everywhere right now. But when it’s time to take down all the spooky season decor, there’s still something orange and black that needs your attention — __**the monarch butterfly!**__ Known for their bright orange and black wings with intricate patterns, these iconic backyard beauties are dying out rapidly. Experts are pointing to a devastating decline in milkweed as a primary contributor to the loss of monarchs. Milkweed is an essential plant that monarchs rely on. It’s where they lay their eggs, and it’s also the ONLY food source for their newborn caterpillars. **_To put it simply, Friend:__M_ onarchs can’t survive without milkweed.__** But glyphosate, the active ingredient in Bayer-Monsanto’s Roundup, is __**DECIMATING**__ milkweed in record numbers — and it’s no coincidence that the monarch population is dropping at the same time. **We cannot let toxic pesticides threaten the survival of monarchs, pushing these vulnerable pollinators closer to EXTINCTION.** [**_TAKE ACTION NOW: Demand that Bayer-Monsanto STOPS selling Roundup and helps SAVE these precious butterflies before it’s too late! >>_**](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2082070?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==) | [SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2082071?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
Bayer-Monsanto will do anything to maximize corporate profits — even if it’s at the expense of **_pollinators, people, and the planet._** The megacorporation has been caught _manipulating science and evading regulations_ in order to hide the **DANGEROUS TRUTH** **about the harms of Roundup.**
Glyphosate is the most widely used pesticide in the world, which means that people and ecosystems around the planet are being exposed to its negative effects every day. It’s _**toxic to bees**_ and can _**harm beneficial soil organisms**_ that help maintain a _healthy ecological balance._
Thousands of farmers and homeowners are SUING Bayer-Monsanto over their _non-Hodgkin's lymphoma_ , a cancer that has been linked to Roundup. Other human health risks associated with glyphosate include **_reproductive harm, kidney toxicity, and fatty liver disease._**
[**_Friend, will you let Bayer-Monsanto get away with its dangerous lies and environmental destruction? Or will you step up today and fight back against the pesticide industry’s corporate greed? Add your name now >>_**](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2082072?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)

clean_body: | | | | | == ---|---|--- | | With Halloween approaching, orange and black are everywhere right now. But when it’s time to take down all the spooky season decor, there’s still something orange and black that needs your attention — the monarch butterfly! Known for their bright orange and black wings with intricate patterns, these iconic backyard beauties are dying out rapidly. Experts are pointing to a devastating decline in milkweed as a primary contributor to the loss of monarchs. Milkweed is an essential plant that monarchs rely on. It’s where they lay their eggs, and it’s also the ONLY food source for their newborn caterpillars. To put it simply, Friend:M onarchs can’t survive without milkweed. But glyphosate, the active ingredient in Bayer-Monsanto’s Roundup, is DECIMATING milkweed in record numbers — and it’s no coincidence that the monarch population is dropping at the same time. We cannot let toxic pesticides threaten the survival of monarchs, pushing these vulnerable pollinators closer to EXTINCTION. == | == Bayer-Monsanto will do anything to maximize corporate profits — even if it’s at the expense of pollinators, people, and the planet. The megacorporation has been caught manipulating science and evading regulations in order to hide the DANGEROUS TRUTH about the harms of Roundup. Glyphosate is the most widely used pesticide in the world, which means that people and ecosystems around the planet are being exposed to its negative effects every day. It’s toxic to bees and can harm beneficial soil organisms that help maintain a healthy ecological balance. Thousands of farmers and homeowners are SUING Bayer-Monsanto over their non-Hodgkin's lymphoma , a cancer that has been linked to Roundup. Other human health risks associated with glyphosate include reproductive harm, kidney toxicity, and fatty liver disease. == == Thanks for taking Action, Friends of the Earth | Contact Us: Friends of the Earth U.S. Washington, D.C. | Berkeley, CA 1-877-843-8687 foe.org/about-us/contact/

subject: This is a people-powered campaign

body:
You’re receiving this message because of your past support of Democratic candidates and causes. Roland Gutierrez is running to defeat Ted Cruz for Senate. We need your support to elect Roland, but if you’d prefer not to receive emails from our campaign, you can unsubscribe: https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/ifYYiIyK0UCnX-4gLHfqiQ2?unsubscribedata=jraQabzvbHx8wB1ZgZmTH4PYoRL1oA%2FJ6WKb41oQFNRZEb%2F1y9nwpG%2FEHD7dDF2Z%2FMmGgnZlP3X71YYD8rB%2BuL2LfYM3mh2L0FYZQ7eTDGtkbpn5T7f5qYd30rfwWyBwftMhZj2pxbqm54hQTib5vL1gmMVofLZbom%2BVQyBTIB%2Fy9%2BNlw%2BBMoKAnsNw1sVxsKi0ZSk3aQK4gWIML8jwcNTAg8tjajMDDfh5LurFuW2pU3SvNX1slrQYf%2FD3%2Byzy0uW9rHg83guwHyUV0jj3QIoahvGOz5OnsokgL26Vb6JtAO4HfZ8jezSLrsFTRWWHXFkVT6GNQNLcA0kVRIdO937ReEA6dNBlVqp8cBUHF1T5kDl%2FmVzD2PTzXZM%2BvUWd6M0bwQhR64z9eIbMMyKlCTdQ6yDJpYN%2Fw07ZPAAzc%2Fu9G7cmNBPvE%2BvyPsJZaan5Y .
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rg2024-em-dmp [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rg2024-em-dmp]
Peter,
Grassroots supporters like you are the lifeblood of this campaign. Your input guides our strategy, your support builds our momentum, and your donations make everything that we do possible.
I’m proud to run a truly people-powered campaign. But that’s not the kind of campaign we’re up against.
I’m running against one of the richest Senators in Washington — a guy who spent $64 MILLION of his own fortune to buy this Senate seat last time around. That’s not even counting all the millions that he raised from far-right megadonors.
You shouldn’t be able to buy your way to Washington. But that’s exactly what Rick Scott did — and he’s trying to pull the same stunt in 2024. Last year, he gave his campaign $4 MILLION to boost his end-of-quarter fundraising.
At the end of the day, this isn’t really about fundraising numbers or big checks. It’s about Rick Scott absolutely failing the Floridians he swore to protect: He wrote the plan to end Medicare and Social Security, pushed Trump’s election conspiracy theories, and advocated for a nationwide ban on abortions.
I’m running for Senate to give Floridians the leadership they deserve — and putting up big fundraising numbers is how we’re going to do it. That’s why I’ve set a big $350,000 end-of-quarter goal to make sure we have the resources we need to win this race. Please, will you split $15 between my campaign and Roland Gutierrez to invest in this grassroots movement and flip Florida blue? I’m counting on your help to compete with Scott’s massive fortune. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/rg2024-em-dmp]
Thank you so much,
Debbie
Democrat Roland Gutierrez is running for US Senate to defeat Ted Cruz. Texans deserve leaders who will look out for their best interests. We need you in this campaign. Can you donate $5 right now to help Roland win this race? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rg2024-em?amount=5]

I’m running for Senate to give Floridians the leadership they deserve — and putting up big fundraising numbers is how we’re going to do it. That’s why I’ve set a big $350,000 end-of-quarter goal to make sure we have the resources we need to win this race. Please, will you split $15 between my campaign and Roland Gutierrez to invest in this grassroots movement and flip Florida blue? I’m counting on your help to compete with Scott’s massive fortune. [] Thank you so much, Debbie Democrat Roland Gutierrez is running for US Senate to defeat Ted Cruz. Texans deserve leaders who will look out for their best interests. We need you in this campaign. Can you donate $5 right now to help Roland win this race? [] CONTRIBUTE [] [] Paid for by Roland Gutierrez For Texas Roland Gutierrez For Texas PO BOX 15232 San Antonio, TX 78212 United States CONTRIBUTE [] Email is a critical way for our campaign to stay in touch with you. But if you'd no longer like to receive emails, you can click here to unsubscribe:

body:
| | If you want to help The Collective PAC build Black political power up and down the ballot, and across the country, then you’re in the right place. If you'd like to unsubscribe [click here.](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnl7NBjmTZL5F5oqdT0MFW4GJFfovgZaqyhL6oVedQTvxqf62j1-674ssdeYZmJRYBzWSHitiKSzbPsrpv-_hwFxmusDClMi_fBQryOBnrEe8f4y-uD-5LBCjC8t9nZK6Csoyz5t1kR3S4xsVrdyThxgJRaXRMpA9-Hg1_5UUlJCylPWuOnbQhAtgIKXgmjKytZ3uGLA653tpYfslFVDxPUo5FtfzK4P17_EQh3TbxifnOZQmQ6fXmkqq6J0DeWjKLZB3a0cpj95LhCDtwsQMwpuv0o4ysQJ5e1rHEmGrCt24VIZC5cZgW4c6kQMKf7pdd_IGJnmbFCWGwqR5f2ZkAKg5cx1RRA0FCkC1yIIFeI9Bi0PXyXNJz9nNttDA_Fn3xf3aMkuSLvJ_c-scn8m8IkaIAr7ptuhozKxKRK-l0oIYw/40u/EwW_GugBTACk92cf55hGvg/h0/LJYPTQIOoaPK6Yh_iZ2nKNM_eZLn4KCQebTW5NvbzG4)
| | Peter,

In 2023 alone, there have been over 500 mass shootings. It’s **_only_** October. That means we are averaging **more than 1 shooting every day**. That’s not normal...

Just this week, 18 people tragically lost their lives to senseless gun violence. We mourn their lives cut far too short. We remember their stories and honor their memories. And we act to make sure that this does not keep happening.

The gun problem in America has gone on for far too long. Far too many lives have been lost by our country’s refusal to enact necessary gun control. Without serious action, more lives will be taken.

**You deserve better.** The American people deserve better. It is crucial now more than ever that we fight for gun laws that will save our nation. **Are you with us, Peter?** [Sign on if you agree: America has a serious gun problem.](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnnBkCvBzmfhJhusTxRCyXif6yeRcdwsx4d74BOCx07gjGdso8GL5fp7asqbcRtj1eAMnN1WRTBTiTfmvWeLwwmRKLj6S9u-UCAGHi5_E_WCRrvWAihtbo5QM7GPX-IcfPU0ui7b_VN4S9aL732xrlQms4mwfkBnbTgBuUaMVs9rE_6pQCg1KUXTWhlwunKTtnAgdyvVVFzFno1b84Cdu89np00nlB8jgxcvHPWaUmtJgxKw23cR3H_pKTGIl4PM-5WM0KifzcVLcwVDtUOQoEfpAWmHTiOOgAfW2Heyb2MKTDni2DZlkAeIogcSyckThWoChLdmlMAIRrSSRiMwQ0Ck/40u/EwW_GugBTACk92cf55hGvg/h1/2YZMVek_HL1GFZgZvGkZFgK9h0J6MY_AY7s0CvHyxWA) | | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnnBkCvBzmfhJhusTxRCyXif6yeRcdwsx4d74BOCx07gjGdso8GL5fp7asqbcRtj1eAMnN1WRTBTiTfmvWeLwwmRKLj6S9u-UCAGHi5_E_WCRrvWAihtbo5QM7GPX-IcfPU0ui7b_VN4S9aL732xrlQmaewe-V8G_62nBOGmbItznYuUYrTZbPhokTVH8TcBYNn9jwp9QEAQNFBO176SpgdK7DbqvxnoFA_dGFrAy51xVhY9-21niNMtPG_WGhYbkKQTBdHxfA_pwXk1mc56KYA0uidGYESV4t4whqXjcG7dwdweD4Aa_nvFNcIBc7c3zWZPRdx9e9bsGpw46P0hNiNz/40u/EwW_GugBTACk92cf55hGvg/h2/RKTSm3pUzjQR-23_VYRc44IH62dMIeE72cgA4rXDrTg)
---
Your support is crucial to show that we will not turn a blind eye to this violence. We need to stand up against the gun lobby. With your help, we can put them on notice. Let’s not let them continue to hurt us and our families. **Now** is the time for serious action. We cannot delay.

Thank you,
The Collective PAC
* * *

body:
I am open about my faith to show how compatible it is with the new political home we built in West Michigan.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72425792/435262512/664569766?refcode=BLU-HSC-20231029-Z-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZWIyNjI3ZC1hMTc2LWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=i2GUfueV69m2p_sVu5CCB4l0Ea33B5j0S63_SwREiC8=)

| _**I am open about my faith to show how compatible it is with the new political home we built in West Michigan.**_ I’m committed to creating a community where everyone can show up as their full and authentic selves. So often, extreme factions within the Republican party want to claim Christianity as a justification for their extreme politics. Well, I think it’s about time we dispel the myth that Republicans own Christianity or that Christianity means one must be anti-choice and anti-LGBTQ+.

My faith is a cornerstone of my personal and political life. Christianity heavily informs the values with which I lead. I believe that we should treat every individual with love and decency, regardless of their background. I believe in the sanctity of life, which means we have to protect a woman’s access to life-saving healthcare. I believe in a loving God who could not care less about the gender of who you love.

That is what Christianity means to me. That is how I choose to live a faith-guided life. I won’t cherrypick bible verses to fuel a message of hate like some extremists in our country will. Instead, I choose to live a life inspired by the empathy, kindness, and compassion that defines Christianity.

[_**If you believe that West Michigan deserves a representative who is guided by faith, compassion, and empathy, I hope you will consider contributing to my reelection campaign today.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72425793/435262513/664569766?refcode=BLU-HSC-20231029-Z-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZWIyNjI3ZC1hMTc2LWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=i2GUfueV69m2p_sVu5CCB4l0Ea33B5j0S63_SwREiC8=)

name: Bob Casey (Official Campaign)
subject: How we’re going to check off our to-do list
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
Grassroots contributions really add up, and we need a strong team by our side to re-elect Bob Casey.
# [](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/181?t=1&akid=1005%2E552475%2Et9okAA)
Peter,
Our campaign to defend Pennsylvania's Senate seat and protect our Democratic Senate majority wouldn't be possible without you.
**[When you chip in to our campaign-- whether it's $100, $25, or just $5 -- you help power our entire operation. Will you make your first donation now? ](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231029-2?refcode=em20231029-2&refcode2=1005_552475_t9okAA&akid=1005%2E552475%2Et9okAA)**
Grassroots contributions really add up, and they're how we're going to be able to win what will be Bob Casey's toughest re-election fight yet. So here's what's on the to-do list:
🙋 Hire additional staff and organizers so we can communicate with voters across the Commonwealth.
📝 Buy supplies and print materials so everyone can hear about Bob's work in the Senate.
📺 Run ads online and on TV to share Bob's record of fighting for PA families.
📅 Host gatherings and events so people can get involved.
🚪 Start knocking on doors across Pennsylvania.
🗳️ Get out the vote and re-elect Bob Casey!
We're facing a fundraising deadline at midnight on October 31st, so your support now will be key to giving us the boost we'll need to run a robust campaign operation.
**[Please, chip in whatever you can so we can reach our $50,000 goal before our critical October 31st fundraising deadline.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231029-2?refcode=em20231029-2&refcode2=1005_552475_t9okAA&akid=1005%2E552475%2Et9okAA)**
**[Donate Now ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231029-2?refcode=em20231029-2&refcode2=1005_552475_t9okAA&akid=1005%2E552475%2Et9okAA)**
Thanks for all that you do.
-- Team Casey
