name: Pat Harrigan
subject: Last email I’ll ever send
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Pat Harrigan Committee
body:
| | | [](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=deee3cc53ede4c4dab30632cadac1499&_e=OpbQkwH-RpPRkpx35JoIXniI8Y4qrtO0dhCWmCLzEd3jWHkKLhKz5qed23EKzoozCQp5qWHFSvJfRZiZyws_kN3EdeMAWAp0N7_ugT1pLXw9UI71pL19vsmu4DDee2yItlApqdRKr2-sFji2crY-Agc1QtIjn8w3g0hZWS5TxfNGzeKdm2QljdaM9exHqQtbI49Zo5XUPhD-QvMUcYtEhcR8IrmfS3MmKtRFHUHpFG33f7yWhZKdyjoiG2hdSCR7rKYGdkvc2iuA9oi39jGQ91waGS52huLB8VhMcts2QDBEjUR8fQ5Wg0XYhMw0fB9SYwAoR6eYrP-ROlKed7NCJoP3pZhl_YbGbiiHotiGDeQ%3D)
---
Fellow American, This is the first and last email I'll ever send you.

You see, I'm a little unsure about opening up to you this way.

**But the deck is stacked against us, my back is against the wall, and your response to this message will decide everything. **

My name is Pat Harrigan. You don't know me, but I'm a Green Beret veteran from North Carolina. I graduated from West Point, and I served 18 months in combat.

After that, my wife and I started a firearm parts company from our double-wide trailer - and grew it to become a successful, job-creating business. And most important of all, I'm the dad of two beautiful girls.

**I 'm also a GOP candidate in the MUST WIN race in NC, a district that WILL decide who controls Washington. **

Nancy Pelosi and Joe Biden already have $100 million bucks ready to trash our GOP candidates in every swing district on the map.
---
[**That 's why I'm humbly asking if you'll chip in just a few bucks today.**](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=deee3cc53ede4c4dab30632cadac1499&_e=OpbQkwH-RpPRkpx35JoIXniI8Y4qrtO0dhCWmCLzEd3jWHkKLhKz5qed23EKzoozCQp5qWHFSvJfRZiZyws_kN3EdeMAWAp0N7_ugT1pLXw9UI71pL19vsmu4DDee2yItlApqdRKr2-sFji2crY-Agc1QtIjn8w3g0hZWS5TxfNGzeKdm2QljdaM9exHqQtb0hkEDxPZvbjIb289S4haGwC5zh63thNzuw637b_oDusYiUr4sffj86XtnMbHcKggAXmhInTQvPD5ruj9zrrjH6T0_s3dMUlJtmiv31bXdLgK3lX2PnJeHVwUy-ZD8e74DIUI_T-1RzJc33cFhjKCxybsASHoXf59tX3_uZ3MBNk%3D)

I'm not the kind of guy who asks for help, but starting a grassroots campaign is tough - **really, really tough. **

The Democrats won't stop attacking us and cutting off every path to victory we have. Folks like you & me - they hate our guts.

[Please have my back on this one:](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=deee3cc53ede4c4dab30632cadac1499&_e=OpbQkwH-RpPRkpx35JoIXniI8Y4qrtO0dhCWmCLzEd3jWHkKLhKz5qed23EKzoozCQp5qWHFSvJfRZiZyws_kN3EdeMAWAp0N7_ugT1pLXzfvqnMcdbyGXJEqzYc3wRl9LdCTQa7gEeYFY4I4K8e0Eh-GlILlF-kTYrIIqCYqi3619r9IM-PQg0NmXU-t4ShBuWbymYKQOoK3cG9b6y4jIu1sg1WOtTPXOo2QiLa3uJKzLXtj-Y_LJcS64ol6hpV3FIYUX__cSisClZ4IFv48Q%3D%3D)

clean_body: | | | Fellow American, This is the first and last email I'll ever send you. You see, I'm a little unsure about opening up to you this way. But the deck is stacked against us, my back is against the wall, and your response to this message will decide everything. My name is Pat Harrigan. You don't know me, but I'm a Green Beret veteran from North Carolina. I graduated from West Point, and I served 18 months in combat. After that, my wife and I started a firearm parts company from our double-wide trailer - and grew it to become a successful, job-creating business. And most important of all, I'm the dad of two beautiful girls. I 'm also a GOP candidate in the MUST WIN race in NC, a district that WILL decide who controls Washington. Nancy Pelosi and Joe Biden already have $100 million bucks ready to trash our GOP candidates in every swing district on the map. The talking heads and political know-it-alls say I can't win this race. But I bet you've heard that one before... I'm not the kind of guy who asks for help, but starting a grassroots campaign is tough - really, really tough. The Democrats won't stop attacking us and cutting off every path to victory we have. Folks like you & me - they hate our guts. Look, I'm not a politician. I'm nothing flashy or special, just a regular guy who loves this country more than anything. So, I'm opening my heart to you today in hopes you'll stand with me. I won't give you empty promises & fancy slogans. That's not me. But I'll give you my word as a veteran that I'll fight with all I have to do what's right and make you proud. Thank you & God bless. Pat Harrigan GOP Conservative Candidate North Carolina's 14th District | | Paid for by The Pat Harrigan Committee | | Pat Harrigan is a former member of the U.S. Army. name: Ted Cruz
subject: Bucketloads of cash
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
You know me. And you know that I wouldn’t be asking for your help unless there were a sincere need. | [](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=5d1781f5832948408e8a8b4f1ada5e1d&_e=Yn9xmqWZiHKFtw7ZB6LROYN8tOyaAVvwxikxYJCJgLiCTA95J33_VRvqz2uio83joHXkZFqjfHjjQGkoS9BfyL6ZV-HNOlCIyVYGCtv0ttTugLTJnnJ_DLVUsiwfDZpvsUGSRYZxUp4AGCUoyQCUEXDiznRljq74dz6V50PvLnYwUn2MwauBRVJEND6_r91egN16DLA3q3W0p04VVD8cmhM7zjaIIHJSEzx8WYyXFHNkCe0W8N8r01sGKYtIc0Iod_IQsh9uSSvtNfJHo5DoYOTaYwNazxYLyk2XxgVQRde-aMeYQ_jb1mJ3T_nanoKrSN512qOKz_ceM3rv-XialEQ6As9cHi-TLQy6TrwrkxKjVfddckxZTp59-GKXgYZZaGfD-Dl4wOrwasXn4rY-8Q0p4w3CyOfeBshs2df7VRRsq8I9Qj75mNu1xJ5SDnqH)
Fellow American,

We’ve known one another for a long time, so you know by now that when I ask for favors there is a reason.

I’ll be straight with you: my campaign needs your immediate financial support. A lot of folks around the country don’t think that my seat is at risk, but the truth is that no one knows that for sure.

You know that Democrats HATE ME.

I know that Democrats HATE ME.

But I bet you didn’t know that they hate me to the tune of $52,000 per day, did you?

When my opponent announced his fundraising numbers for the third quarter earlier this month, it shocked me. From July 1st to September 30th, he raised more than $4.7 million from the liberal coasts that he’s going to use to smear my good name ahead of next year’s election.

**Texans know me; Americans know me.** It’s no secret what I stand for. But I’ll tell you this: if Democrats are allowed to vastly outspend us on the airwaves, there is no telling what kind of twisted lies they’ll try to spin to make my supporters flip sides.

**We cannot – WE WILL not allow them to win. I need to know you’re still with me and Senate Republicans.[ If you are, I’m asking for you to send us just $5 right now.](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=5d1781f5832948408e8a8b4f1ada5e1d&_e=Yn9xmqWZiHKFtw7ZB6LROYN8tOyaAVvwxikxYJCJgLiCTA95J33_VRvqz2uio83joHXkZFqjfHjjQGkoS9BfyL6ZV-HNOlCIyVYGCtv0ttTugLTJnnJ_DLVUsiwfDZpvsUGSRYZxUp4AGCUoyQCUEXDiznRljq74dz6V50PvLnYwUn2MwauBRVJEND6_r91egN16DLA3q3W0p04VVD8cmhM7zjaIIHJSEzx8WYyXFHNkCe0W8N8r01sGKYtIc0Iod_IQsh9uSSvtNfJHo5DoYBdT5LKEQ9lvPSmVjZGVPUnYIpHYcivkcbxnrr93piCwyioVDYBrioRxVBbK7DTl7exFHV0wFgW6_1iLjlv0SqdKAfvewB2AHvBPFrEN0J_0T2nb3kjRCHvit9YN2U8x7JbREvKUuAlMqf7K93gvN8ly_QmyDvEABkmVo8MV6fb8)**

[**Chip in $5 IMMEDIATELY >>**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=5d1781f5832948408e8a8b4f1ada5e1d&_e=Yn9xmqWZiHKFtw7ZB6LROYN8tOyaAVvwxikxYJCJgLiCTA95J33_VRvqz2uio83joHXkZFqjfHjjQGkoS9BfyL6ZV-HNOlCIyVYGCtv0ttTugLTJnnJ_DLVUsiwfDZpvsUGSRYZxUp4AGCUoyQCUEXDiznRljq74dz6V50PvLnYwUn2MwauBRVJEND6_r91egN16DLA3q3W0p04VVD8cmhM7zjaIIHJSEzx8WYyXFHNkCe0W8N8r01sGKYtIc0Iod_IQsh9uSSvtNfJHo5DoYNr2l3H5WUQLe2jq_sMTkIpcF0vKw2GZwrjeHmopB-rGgEmMf_s5brHAgrKPZU7DzNMyv572GJo9SNdcOEc48CzlJy-1NO5bVkv_IuB5PIdpfj2LWVjDOHFI2sCtvJiBNNEoWElgUh1Cc_Ie8QmFB6-lBpDEmwtRQupVmMhD0EAi)
By the end of the day, we need 5,000 individuals to donate $5 or more to keep Texas Red and help us flip the Senate. Can I count on you right now?

For Freedom,

[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=5d1781f5832948408e8a8b4f1ada5e1d&_e=Yn9xmqWZiHKFtw7ZB6LROYN8tOyaAVvwxikxYJCJgLiCTA95J33_VRvqz2uio83joHXkZFqjfHjjQGkoS9BfyL6ZV-HNOlCIyVYGCtv0ttTugLTJnnJ_DLVUsiwfDZpvsUGSRYZxUp4AGCUoyQCUEXDiznRljq74dz6V50PvLnYwUn2MwauBRVJEND6_r91egN16DLA3q3W0p04VVD8cmhM7zjaIIHJSEzx8WYyXFHNkCe0W8N8r01sGKYtIc0Iod_IQsh9uSSvtNfJHo5DoYPDfE1rfEP6pXZs7uX-loThgT-OkRLka7walKfgCOU4vyFRQG6a58QlolzI7pNiM9H5zBKQYEXNNX20i0E3upSEbiVzoEoLlCHg5kSYA_vKvprd9RO466zhHfzkPIQIvyxNAgkmQNhP0kimAEc4-JlEr9Wbo2ue9XNP5WaxHB6w1)
Ted Cruz

name: Sherrod Brown
subject: just $26 can win us this race
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
| **$26.**

I'm proud to share that $26 is the average grassroots donation to our campaign.

I know that might not seem like much when you think about the tens of millions that GOP super PACs are going to spend to try to defeat me and flip the Senate. But that's the power of this grassroots movement – it's made up of folks like you who believe in this fight and chip in what they can, when they can.

This movement is how we're going to defy the pundits who are calling me one of the most vulnerable senators in the country, win in Ohio, and defend our Senate majority.

But here's the problem: **_The Cook Political Report_ ranks this race a toss-up – and Washington Republicans are already launching attack ads against me. We need all hands on deck to fight back – but right now, we're coming up short.**

**If everyone reading this email chipped in $26 – or even just a few dollars – we could reach our $25,000 daily fundraising goal before the midnight deadline. But not everyone will, so I'm personally asking if I can count on you.**

[Please, will you split $26 – or as much as you can right now – between my campaign and the Voter Protection Project to help me fight back against GOP attacks, defend this seat, and keep the Senate blue?](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/56174?t=6&akid=11513%2E878179%2EwrNRut) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Sherrod Brown and VPP will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/56175?t=7&akid=11513%2E878179%2EwrNRut)

name: Rick Scott
subject: Ilhan Omar is scared
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rick Scott for Florida
body:
| | | Peter,

It absolutely blows my mind.

Ilhan Omar said that it’s “scary” to serve with lawmakers who forcefully condemn terrorism.

**That’s right - she’s scared because Members of Congress think terrorism is bad.**

_This makes NO sense - but who’s surprised?_

**I’ll tell you what’s scary, serving with members of Congress who defend Iran-backed terrorists and spread antisemitic misinformation.**

**There is NO PLACE for politicians who side with terrorists.**

I’m running for re-election to the Senate because we need leaders who will continue to make America stronger while politicians like Ilhan Omar are rooting for our enemies.

**I’m not afraid to call out America-hating politicians like Ilhan Omar - and yet, it’s made me a top target for woke left.**

clean_body: | | | Peter, It absolutely blows my mind. Ilhan Omar said that it’s “scary” to serve with lawmakers who forcefully condemn terrorism. That’s right - she’s scared because Members of Congress think terrorism is bad. This makes NO sense - but who’s surprised? I’ll tell you what’s scary, serving with members of Congress who defend Iran-backed terrorists and spread antisemitic misinformation. There is NO PLACE for politicians who side with terrorists. I’m running for re-election to the Senate because we need leaders who will continue to make America stronger while politicians like Ilhan Omar are rooting for our enemies. I’m not afraid to call out America-hating politicians like Ilhan Omar - and yet, it’s made me a top target for woke left. Thank you, Rick Scott | | | | | Team Rick Scott Featured Merchandise *Made in the USA Golf Balls and Joe Biden, the two things that seem to get themselves lost the most! name: Lt. Col. Alex Vindman (USA, Ret.)
subject: RE: RESPONSE NEEDED: Support Biden’s Aid Request
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS ACTION FUND
body:
Republicans are threatening to block President Biden’s relief package. It’s unconscionable. But at the end of the day, it’s also just bad policy.
#
Hey there, Derek.
It’s Alex Vindman. I wanted to follow up on an important email that VoteVets sent you.
The fight in Ukraine is one that is very important to me, because what happens in Ukraine directly affects U.S. security. We’ve been able to keep our friends supplied, keep Putin off balance, and provide humanitarian aid and relief. Pound for pound, it is among the most efficient and effective uses of our nation’s resources in many decades. We have to keep it up.
With everything happening in the Eastern Mediterranean right now, the United States remains the indispensable power. We can support our ally Israel, provide humanitarian relief to Gaza, help prevent a broader Middle East conflict, and support Ukraine.
But Republicans are threatening to block President Biden’s relief package. It’s unconscionable and also terrible national security policy.
**[So I’m personally asking if you can help us out. Join VoteVets and add your name to personally endorse President Biden’s $100 billion relief package. It might seem like a small act, but it can have a real impact keeping our nation, and the world, safer.**](https://act.votevets.org/signup/231025_vv_em_fundaid_ukraine/?source=em231029-1-30?refcode2=17561.3013755.uSIm6j&akid=17561%2E3013755%2EuSIm6j)
| [ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.votevets.org/signup/231025_vv_em_fundaid_ukraine/?source=em231029-1-30?refcode2=17561.3013755.uSIm6j&akid=17561%2E3013755%2EuSIm6j)
---
Thank you,
Lt. Col. Alex Vindman, (USA, Ret.)
* * *
Derek,
Amid all the noise, we missed a very important date yesterday.
October 24th marked 20 months since Putin’s authoritarian regime invaded democratic Ukraine.
It’s easy to get distracted with everything going on. But for our friends in Ukraine, we have to stay focused. In their fight to liberate their country, we must continue to be a strong ally. The best case for American security has always been for Putin to be defeated. That remains the case.
And that is why we are writing to you to see if you can support Biden’s $100 billion aid request. It would provide billions of dollars to support Ukraine, help Israel defend itself against Hamas, and send humanitarian aid to Gaza.
This package helps our allies fight terrorists and tyrants. Defends freedom. It is critical support — and it will help keep the United States safe. And Republicans are threatening to block it.
**[It’s going to take a strong push to get this across the finish line. So we are asking if you can add your name to that effort. Join VoteVets and sign on to support Biden’s aid request.**](https://act.votevets.org/signup/231025_vv_em_fundaid_ukraine/?source=em231029-1-30?refcode2=17561.3013755.uSIm6j&akid=17561%2E3013755%2EuSIm6j)
| [ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.votevets.org/signup/231025_vv_em_fundaid_ukraine/?source=em231029-1-30?refcode2=17561.3013755.uSIm6j&akid=17561%2E3013755%2EuSIm6j)
---
Thank you,
The team at VoteVets

PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS ACTION FUND
Use of military rank, job titles or photographs in uniform does not imply the endorsement of the Department of Defense, Departments of the Army, Navy, Air Force, or the Marines or Space Force.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here ](https://act.votevets.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=1&akid=17561%2E3013755%2EuSIm6j).

name: GallegoForArizona.com
subject: Our deadline on Tuesday.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
With Halloween AND our end-of-month deadline on October 31st, we’ve got to get a head start now
#

Peter -
We know a lot of emails are hitting your inbox right now. And we don’t expect you to donate to every email we send to you — not by a long shot. But we do hope you’ll consider chipping in to this one.
Please let us explain why:
**FIRST:** Kari Lake the MAGA Queen is officially in this race, running for Senate in Arizona. MAGA Mike Johnson just took the Speaker’s seat in the House. Trump’s faithful are on the march. We have to be ready for them.
**THEN:** Kyrsten Sinema and her $10+ million war chest are in the news — gloating about how she killed our best chance at filibuster reform. And the minute she jumps in, she will be formidable.

If Republicans succeed, the consequences for women, people of color, the LGBTQ+ community, and so many others could be catastrophic. And that's exactly why we have to step up this cycle, Peter — not just for the big-ticket races, but also for our fearless candidates in places like Virginia, who can stop this anti-choice power grab at the state and local level.

We've already made incredible progress on this front: last year, we flipped _four_ state chambers from red to blue and secured _two_ new Democratic trifectas, controlling the state House, Senate, and governorship in Michigan and Minnesota. We can repeat this success in 2024 if we do what we did last cycle: invest in key races _now_.

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: “How high?”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for Senate
body:
| | | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/216?t=3&akid=120%2E4032634%2EC1Uwwh)
---
Powerful interests — fossil fuel giants, Big Pharma, billionaire CEOs, you name it — have a very handy tool at their disposal: piles and piles of money. They use their money to fund campaigns for politicians who ask “How high?” when they say “Jump.” They use their money to hire armies of lobbyists that swarm Capitol Hill. They use their money to put government on their side, all so they can make even bigger piles of money. But we’ve got a powerful tool on our side too: a grassroots movement. And we’re delivering results. Side by side, we took back the House. We flipped the White House. We won the Senate. And we used that power to beat those powerful interests and make real change for working people, including:
* The biggest-ever American investment in fighting climate change, which will help reduce carbon emissions by 40% by 2030.
* The first-ever authorization for Medicare to negotiate lower prescription drug prices — and a guaranteed $35 cap on monthly insulin costs for people on Medicare.
* A 15% minimum corporate tax — so billionaire corporations can’t get away with reporting billions in profits and paying nothing in taxes.
* Getting student debt canceled for millions of borrowers — despite the Supreme Court substituting politics for the rule of law and striking down President Biden’s broader plan.

Democrats win when we go out there and unapologetically fight for the big, structural change we need — to stand up to powerful special interests and advocate for real change for working people. I’m going to continue fighting for this. **Grassroots supporters like you make it possible to defeat the powerful interests and put power in the hands of working people, where it belongs. But we’ve got a big fight ahead of us in 2024, and if the GOP gains any more power, they’ll work to pass their extremist agenda and actively reverse all the progress we’ve made together.** [**Can you please make a donation of $28 or whatever makes sense right now to support our campaign and keep up the fight for our plans that will put more power in the hands of working people? Together, we can keep building a government that works for everyone, not just the rich and powerful.**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/911?amount=28&t=8&akid=120%2E4032634%2EC1Uwwh)

name: Wendy Davis
subject: you won't regret this
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ZAK FOR CONGRESS
body:
#
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/23-allred-split?amount=25?source=em231030-ca-split&refcode2=546_8507__-odFy&akid=546%2E8507%2E_-odFy)
Hi, friend, it's Wendy Davis. [_I'm going to ask you to support my good friend Colin Allred's campaign to defeat Ted Cruz._](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/23-allred-split?amount=25?source=em231030-ca-split&refcode2=546_8507__-odFy&akid=546%2E8507%2E_-odFy) But first, let me tell you why Colin is the steady leader we need in the Senate:

I first met Colin when he worked as the DFW Regional Voter Protection Director for my campaign in 2014.

**Here's the thing about Colin:** What you see is what you get – Colin is a community servant before all else. I knew from the day I hired him (almost 10 years ago!) that he would do everything in his power to make sure Texans have every opportunity to succeed.

That's why I was so proud to endorse him in 2018 when he decided to run for Congress and defied all odds to defeat a 22-year Republican incumbent.

**And it's why I'm thrilled to support Colin again now. He can defeat Ted Cruz _if_ we give him the resources he needs to reach voters across Texas.** [_That's why I'm personally asking you to support him, too. Please, will you split a donation of $25, or any amount, between Colin and Zak Malamed to help Colin send Ted Cruz packing once and for all? →_](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/23-allred-split?amount=25?source=em231030-ca-split&refcode2=546_8507__-odFy&akid=546%2E8507%2E_-odFy)

[DONATE →](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/23-allred-split?amount=25?amount=25&refcode=em202310230-ca-split-el&refcode2=546_8507__-odFy&akid=546%2E8507%2E_-odFy)

I'm sure I don't need to convince you how terrible Ted Cruz has been for Texans.

His attacks on our reproductive freedom and LGBTQ+ rights, his outrageous book ban, his irresponsible trip to Cancun while a winter storm caused power outages across the state ... I could go on and on, but the long and short of it is this: **We need a new senator, and Colin Allred is the real deal.**

Experts agree Texas is winnable. FiveThirtyEight called it Democrats' best pickup opportunity in 2024, and CNN says Cruz is the most vulnerable Republican senator on the ballot. All we need is a powerful, Texas-sized grassroots movement made up of passionate supporters like you.

[_So please, will you join me by splitting a donation of any amount between Colin's campaign and Zak Malamed today? Colin needs to raise $25,000 by midnight, and I promised we'd help him get there. Every dollar gets us that much closer to defeating Ted Cruz →_](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/23-allred-split?amount=25?source=em231030-ca-split&refcode2=546_8507__-odFy&akid=546%2E8507%2E_-odFy)

[DONATE →](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/23-allred-split?amount=25?amount=25&refcode=em202310230-ca-split-el&refcode2=546_8507__-odFy&akid=546%2E8507%2E_-odFy)

I promise you won't regret this,

Wendy Davis

clean_body: | | | Did you see the new ad we released yesterday? Annie and I launched Their Future PAC to ensure that kids have a bright future. The greatest threat to that idea is that no child is safe to go to school, church, a shopping mall, or a bowling alley as long as assault weapons are as easy to buy in our country as a pack of gum. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | | Until the kids are alright, Renee This week, our nation is mourning another tragic mass shooting and once again, the killer used an AR-15. The coming days will be filled with thoughts and prayers from politicians, and perhaps even a half hearted call for policy solutions, with no follow through. While there are MANY common sense gun safety laws that could make our communities safer, right now, in the wake of the Lewiston, Maine shooting, we are doubling down on our call to ban assault weapons now. We need more than thoughts and prayers, we need meaningful policy change NOW. That means we must ban the weapons of war that are killing our kids. Thanks, Their Future PAC Their Future PAC is solely focused on mobilizing resources and support for leaders and lawmakers who pledge to put the needs of children first in policy decisions. subject: We won’t be flippant
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
I’d be the first Black person elected to the Senate from Delaware. Pundits understand that our race is historic and they’ll use our fundraising numbers as a bellwether of our viability. |
#
Hi there, this is Lisa Blunt Rochester from Delaware. May I have just a second of your time, please? In just a few days, campaigns like mine and Tina Smith's will be hustling to close fundraising gaps for our end-of-month deadlines. **This is a big deal for my Senate campaign.** I’d be the first Black person elected to the Senate from Delaware. Pundits understand that our race is historic and they’ll use our fundraising numbers as a bellwether of our viability. With experts predicting a tough cycle for Democrats, it’s _imperative_ that we show strength at every single deadline. This is especially true for a historic campaign like ours. **Here’s why I’m reaching out:[we pulled the numbers and to be blunt, we are a bit behind. We can close the gap, but I do need to ask you to split $10 today between my campaign and Tina Smith before this hole gets worse. body:
New Hampshire Needs Your Help
| | |
---
| | Dear Derek, Now, more than ever, we need strong conservative leaders who will protect our values and guide our state to a prosperous future. Granite Solutions is dedicated to electing Republican candidates who share our commitment to limited government, individual liberty, and fiscal responsibility.
Your past contributions to Granite Solutions have been invaluable. Your support has enabled us to invest in vital campaign activities, including voter outreach, grassroots organizing, and digital advertising.
As we move forward, we must continue to expand our majority in the New Hampshire House and Senate. With your continued support, we can achieve this goal and secure a brighter future for our state.
I invite you to join our cause by making a contribution to Granite Solutions. [Your donation, whether it's $10, $25, $50, or more, will directly contribute to our mission of electing Republican leaders who will champion conservative values.](https://link.emails.granitesolutions.)

name: Tony Evers HQ
subject: we need to make critical investments right now
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tony for Wisconsin
body:
Derek, Tony is
counting on you. Whoever wins Wisconsin in 2024 will likely win the
presidency, and with our democracy and abortion rights on the line, we
need to make critical investments right now.

[ https://go.tonyevers.com/go/2166?amount=10&refcode=EM_NBI_TE_20231029_FR_eom_0_3MO_TonyEversHQ_NA_NA_eom.2.7&t=1001&akid=6462%2E1827488%2EJiDfQI ]Can we count on you to rush a donation to help us close our $26,567
budget gap before Tuesday’s critical end-of-month deadline? Your donations
will go directly toward investing in winning Wisconsin, and every dollar
is a huge help!

Onward,

Team Evers

— Read Tony's Message Below —

Derek,

I hope you’re enjoying your Sunday. My team and I are working hard this
weekend to make sure we hit our October fundraising goal, and that means
we need to raise another $31,836 before Tuesday at midnight.

We’re nearly a year away from Election Day, so we have to keep building up
our grassroots strength across Wisconsin to keep our state blue in the
2024 presidential election.

Races in Wisconsin are always tight — and the road to the White House runs
through Wisconsin — so there is absolutely no margin for error in 2024.

[ https://go.tonyevers.com/go/2166?amount=10&refcode=EM_NBI_TE_20231029_FR_eom_0_3MO_TonyEversHQ_NA_NA_eom.2.7&t=1002&akid=6462%2E1827488%2EJiDfQI ]Please chip in what you can to help us close our $31,836 budget gap so
we have the resources to make critical early investments across Wisconsin.

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation
will process immediately.

Now, she’s running to defeat Republican Senator Rick Scott and win a better, brighter future for Florida.

subject: Crucial

body:
secure.actblue.com/donate/hdfl-email2023?refcode=102923 [secure.actblue.com/donate/hdfl-email2023?refcode=102923]
Friend,
I know you’re getting a lot of fundraising emails from campaigns as we reach the end of the month, so I hope you’ll give me an opportunity to tell you why protecting our House DFL majority is crucial. Our DFL trifecta had a historic session in 2023, enacting legislation to protect reproductive freedom, establish red flag laws to prevent gun violence, and ensure all Minnesotans have access to earned sick and safe time.
We have a narrow majority in the Minnesota House and some races were incredibly close in 2022. Extreme MAGA Republicans are going to be throwing everything at us in order to take the Minnesota House and undo all of our progress. Friend, this important work of protecting our DFL House majority takes a lot of resources. Will you help us have a strong end of month fundraising report and make a contribution today?
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

name: Fetterman HQ
subject: How we support John’s work
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
#
Hey Derek,
Here at Fetterman HQ we are working hard to keep John in the Senate fighting for the working people of Pennsylvania.
John's work in DC is powered by thousands of folks like you, chipping in a few bucks when they can. **But we need to be real: we're behind our fundraising goal for the month.**
To make up the gap, we're hoping to bring in 500 donations of ANY amount from emails like these before our deadline -- which happens to be midnight on Halloween. 🎃
**[That's where you come in. Can you make a contribution today to help us hit our goal + support John's work in the Senate?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20231029-1?refcode=em20231029-1-8643&refcode2=8643_434096_CgQp16&akid=8643%2E434096%2ECgQp16)**

THANK YOU 🙏
💛 Team Fetterman HQ

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20231029-8643-footer&t=1&refcode2=8643_434096_CgQp16&akid=8643%2E434096%2ECgQp16)**

[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.

name: Senator Ted Cruz
subject: I don’t mean to alarm you, but this is a big deal
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
You know me. And you know that I wouldn’t be asking for your help unless there were a sincere need. | [](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=ecc9446d00f347a596d8180ac5e5a684&_e=3SdUFkBoXseg7zZNOPucY88hTU-suSivvj6XFC28Wp5h_CdALpNCqtV96gUQTJbTUDD_zWn1YROiRGzLMg1g1w9L-ZIEq8trZgPCJA6I8-6UhSzCeCnpTxqdAToNQb5IRXZPRTabf6wMzr-z45Lmpg1lT_0Oh2wzszbjgQoxbpJ-mSVRoecH_mld0i9O_nQy_DTRPTFA5e-1vUg7XuqqOEx3wYwCLsjqMVDTwpSyYe3heUuhE4BMMtKsVixBctJLjtuv8M8fk2NBuDkGd8IpG5hy2huDU8mB7cwkBh3W9aiOPHoAlcssuEe5U670mbtv59LVt1Og0NspgZnGnfKmlDyCqEQFj4fKmrSuE_dIX1UUV5VZn3djjUPUiqqIrFVJ0AwlNpjJdH1pE_ru6ZEoRh11Okk-vd1xC_hTi7W_1-G7PxtU63ivvAbTg8yalDai)
Fellow American,

We’ve known one another for a long time, so you know by now that when I ask for favors there is a reason.

I’ll be straight with you: my campaign needs your immediate financial support. A lot of folks around the country don’t think that my seat is at risk, but the truth is that no one knows that for sure.

You know that Democrats HATE ME.

I know that Democrats HATE ME.

But I bet you didn’t know that they hate me to the tune of $52,000 per day, did you?

When my opponent announced his fundraising numbers for the third quarter earlier this month, it shocked me. From July 1st to September 30th, he raised more than $4.7 million from the liberal coasts that he’s going to use to smear my good name ahead of next year’s election.

**Texans know me; Americans know me.** It’s no secret what I stand for. But I’ll tell you this: if Democrats are allowed to vastly outspend us on the airwaves, there is no telling what kind of twisted lies they’ll try to spin to make my supporters flip sides.

**We cannot – WE WILL not allow them to win. I need to know you’re still with me and Senate Republicans.[ If you are, I’m asking for you to send us just $5 right now.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=ecc9446d00f347a596d8180ac5e5a684&_e=3SdUFkBoXseg7zZNOPucY88hTU-suSivvj6XFC28Wp5h_CdALpNCqtV96gUQTJbTUDD_zWn1YROiRGzLMg1g1w9L-ZIEq8trZgPCJA6I8-6UhSzCeCnpTxqdAToNQb5IRXZPRTabf6wMzr-z45Lmpg1lT_0Oh2wzszbjgQoxbpJ-mSVRoecH_mld0i9O_nQy_DTRPTFA5e-1vUg7XuqqOEx3wYwCLsjqMVDTwpSyYe3heUuhE4BMMtKsVixBctJLjtuv8M8fk2NBuDkGd8IpG5hy2huDU8mB7cwkBh3W9ahph_ne5LPvhKxPQ6tLzwBx6E3mc-ZZTYahL4a7nxypXGEAg1RlbIRy675ItSVr1Zx-UC_CuMixSatjAtM_bP3XKkeq9mTQrZGw9FJczId7PdGrtSuAAscCFhFdyLbzkQ8ox9qz0qlOzmd3Oa-bhd5U)**

[**Chip in $5 IMMEDIATELY >>**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=ecc9446d00f347a596d8180ac5e5a684&_e=3SdUFkBoXseg7zZNOPucY88hTU-suSivvj6XFC28Wp5h_CdALpNCqtV96gUQTJbTUDD_zWn1YROiRGzLMg1g1w9L-ZIEq8trZgPCJA6I8-6UhSzCeCnpTxqdAToNQb5IRXZPRTabf6wMzr-z45Lmpg1lT_0Oh2wzszbjgQoxbpJ-mSVRoecH_mld0i9O_nQy_DTRPTFA5e-1vUg7XuqqOEx3wYwCLsjqMVDTwpSyYe3heUuhE4BMMtKsVixBctJLjtuv8M8fk2NBuDkGd8IpG5hy2huDU8mB7cwkBh3W9ajPFe3TyEFADHg157p5Y4KfwhsbDDxoA6jS3ztHuZBSY7hnvZTdRFMJbZGyz-VnqdTSdxdp9eTxQvjLMKCjqw3IVq6tr6ruVUng7pTZX9odjTsuG0PjgrXAwCtAoyVaJKVctmf0Bi7xnlfZfXAZFClz)
By the end of the day, we need 5,000 individuals to donate $5 or more to keep Texas Red and help us flip the Senate. Can I count on you right now?

For Freedom,

[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=ecc9446d00f347a596d8180ac5e5a684&_e=3SdUFkBoXseg7zZNOPucY88hTU-suSivvj6XFC28Wp5h_CdALpNCqtV96gUQTJbTUDD_zWn1YROiRGzLMg1g1w9L-ZIEq8trZgPCJA6I8-6UhSzCeCnpTxqdAToNQb5IRXZPRTabf6wMzr-z45Lmpg1lT_0Oh2wzszbjgQoxbpJ-mSVRoecH_mld0i9O_nQy_DTRPTFA5e-1vUg7XuqqOEx3wYwCLsjqMVDTwpSyYe3heUuhE4BMMtKsVixBctJLjtuv8M8fk2NBuDkGd8IpG5hy2huDU8mB7cwkBh3W9aiKOLa5T2zUVlfvrdsPYaKzhPcGbWrhVvEqQJ0t_eVldWsFVUQ5FuQ2x3rMMGbRaS7EX-ZYP1xFKL0XPunEiz7M0Y6lwdWgcsduzi_aepTIT84rSTYPXFC4kvdZ6wn6ZfDM2hBVikJy5LX6sHBzzCKA)

name: Andrea Salinas
subject: Personally writing to ask for $5 before Tuesday’s deadline
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Andrea Salinas for Oregon
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72428341/435271263/-1808795974?refcode=em_fr_2023.10.29_b1_as_all-nd&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmN2VkNzhiMS1iMTc2LWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kICdZOQbr-pK4g3qTf2cPZEvgRiXLpJ-rf66Yexu0gg=)
---
Hi – I know it’s a Sunday, so I’ll keep this quick.

I worked a lot of jobs to put myself through college – painting houses, stocking shelves, and serving coffee.

I know how far a dollar goes, and I know how hard you work to earn it.

But with a new Speaker of the House who has proudly fought for cuts to Social Security and Medicare, a national abortion ban, and same-sex marriage bans, we need to work harder than ever to take back the Majority from these dangerous extremists. We’re in the fight of our lives now.

I really need you to dig deep – because the future of our country is at stake.

[**Can I count on you to chip in $5 before the month ends on Tuesday to help me secure the resources I need to defend OR-06 and take back the House?** ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72428342/435271264/-1808795974?refcode=em_fr_2023.10.29_b1_as_all-nd&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmN2VkNzhiMS1iMTc2LWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kICdZOQbr-pK4g3qTf2cPZEvgRiXLpJ-rf66Yexu0gg=)

clean_body: = Hi – I know it’s a Sunday, so I’ll keep this quick. I worked a lot of jobs to put myself through college – painting houses, stocking shelves, and serving coffee. I know how far a dollar goes, and I know how hard you work to earn it. But with a new Speaker of the House who has proudly fought for cuts to Social Security and Medicare, a national abortion ban, and same-sex marriage bans, we need to work harder than ever to take back the Majority from these dangerous extremists. We’re in the fight of our lives now. I really need you to dig deep – because the future of our country is at stake. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = = I can’t thank you enough, Andrea | | = Andrea Salinas for Oregon PO Box 230985 Tigard, OR 97281 Paid for by Andrea Salinas for Oregon Andrea is fighting for Oregon, fighting for affordable quality health care, an economy that works for everyone, and clean air, land, and water. Now, Andrea's ready to show Washington what hard work can accomplish – real, meaningful change for all of us. | =

name: Lucas Kunce HQ
subject: Josh Hawley’s entire support base is crumbling

body:
3-term U.S. Senator Jack Danforth: Supporting Hawley was “the worst decision I’ve ever made in my life”
#
Peter — Josh Hawley’s support base started crumbling after his actions on January 6th. So before we ask you to **[add a donation of any amount toward our campaign to defeat him,](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/38760?refcode=em20231029-4079&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=4079%2E614464%2EgUCkmX) please let us explain what happened:**
**[DEFEAT HAWLEY: CHIP IN NOW →](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/38760?refcode=em20231029-4079&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=4079%2E614464%2EgUCkmX)**
**FIRST —** In 2018, Josh Hawley’s mentor — Missouri GOP icon, three-term U.S. Senator Jack Danforth — recruited him to run for U.S. Senate. Danforth even cleared the crowded field of Republican challengers in Hawley’s primary.
**THEN —** On January 6, 2021, Josh Hawley showed the world that he’s a coward and a fraud by raising his fist then running for his life at the U.S. Capitol.
**NOW —** Danforth and a handful of Hawley’s other mentors + mega-donors are refusing to support his 2024 re-election campaign. **Danforth even said supporting Hawley was “the worst decision I’ve ever made in my life.”**
Meanwhile, Hawley’s approval rating is plummeting among Missouri voters and national GOP insiders are bailing him out while he struggles to fundraise.
**Republicans and Democrats across Missouri agree: Our state deserves better than a fraud and a coward like Josh Hawley representing us in the U.S. Senate — and we’re ready to vote him out in 2024.**
**[DEFEAT HAWLEY: CHIP IN NOW →](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/38760?refcode=em20231029-4079&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=4079%2E614464%2EgUCkmX)**
Now here’s why we need your help, Peter. Every dollar we raise gives us an opportunity to put Lucas and his message in front of Missouri voters between now and Election Day. And if we’re going to win this thing, we have to start off strong.
**So we’re asking:[Can you chip in $10 or just whatever you can today so we can put our message in front of Missouri voters and continue to hold Josh Hawley accountable for betraying the American people?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/38760?refcode=em20231029-4079&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=4079%2E614464%2EgUCkmX)**

[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/38761?refcode=em20231029-4079&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=5&akid=4079%2E614464%2EgUCkmX) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/38761?refcode=em20231029-4079&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=6&akid=4079%2E614464%2EgUCkmX) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/38761?refcode=em20231029-4079&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=7&akid=4079%2E614464%2EgUCkmX) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/38761?refcode=em20231029-4079&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=8&akid=4079%2E614464%2EgUCkmX) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/38761?refcode=em20231029-4079&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=9&akid=4079%2E614464%2EgUCkmX) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/38761?refcode=em20231029-4079&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=10&akid=4079%2E614464%2EgUCkmX) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/38760?refcode=em20231029-4079&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=11&akid=4079%2E614464%2EgUCkmX)

Fellow American,

I’m going to be honest with you - I need your help or I will no longer be in Congress. **I’ll cut right to the chase - I’m short on money, and the Democrats are not. ** They smell blood in the water, and are coming after me.

I’m incredibly proud of all of the work we’ve done so far, but our work is just beginning. clean_body: | | | Fellow American, I’m going to be honest with you - I need your help or I will no longer be in Congress. I’ll cut right to the chase - I’m short on money, and the Democrats are not. They smell blood in the water, and are coming after me. I’m incredibly proud of all of the work we’ve done so far, but our work is just beginning. We’ve taken on socialist politicians who threaten your way of life, and we’ve stood strong when Joe Biden tried to infringe on your constitutional rights. I have my foot on the gas, urging those in Congress to undo the disastrous mistakes of the Biden Administration, but if we lose this seat, we’ll lose our opportunity. I have a team like no other, Fellow American, and right now, I’m in need of my team. | | | | | | Thank you, Maria Elvira Salazar | | | | Paid for by Salazar for Congress | | Unsubscribe from future emails

name: Team Slotkin
subject: 7% of Mike Rogers’ fundraising
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
body:
[](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-oct23.ttRNnI&refcode=em231029-2-15&t=1&akid=755%2E135344%2EUM0EfY)
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-oct23.ttRNnI&refcode=em231029-2-15&t=2&akid=755%2E135344%2EUM0EfY)**
Friend,
While the Republican primary in the Michigan Senate race is shaping up to be a messy head-to-head between at least two (or more) credible candidates, the latest reporting on one of our potential opponents’ fundraising efforts is particularly concerning: **Betsy DeVos’ family contributed $46,200 in one day to Mike Rogers right before the FEC fundraising deadline in September.**
Mike Rogers has already started to see a flood of support from deep-pocketed Republican donors like the DeVos family, corporate PACs, and Super PACs who will all spend millions of dollars on his behalf in order to flip Michigan red. In 2020, the DeVos family contributed over $1.6 million to candidates and super PACs to influence races like ours. They’re throwing their full support behind Mike Rogers, because they know he will push their particular policies at the national level.
These contributions are just the beginning of the support Mike Rogers will receive from this powerful family. But this campaign has something Mike Rogers' campaign lacks: lots and lots of regular people giving what they can, when they can.
**Just one peek behind-the-curtain of Mike Rogers' FEC report shows he raised _less than 5%_ of his money from individuals making small-dollar donations.** The DeVos family on their own contributed more money than grassroots donors in total.
By contrast, the majority of the donations we receive come from people contributing significantly smaller donations than the DeVos family made to Mike Rogers: Our average email donation was $26 last quarter.
[**And what you may not know is that the single greatest source of those individual donations to our campaign is the response to emails like this. Your help using this link to make a $3 contribution to Elissa's campaign for United States Senate would be a great rebuke to the DeVos support.](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-oct23.ttRNnI&refcode=em231029-2-15&t=3&akid=755%2E135344%2EUM0EfY)**

subject: Critical Fundraising Goal
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NEBRASKA REPUBLICAN PARTY]( "PAID FOR BY THE NEBRASKA REPUBLICAN PARTY")
body:
Anything helps, just $25, $10, $5 can make a difference | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/ne.gop/n41kepo7ku-12659216?e=25844e23a8)
---
| | [ ](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=0d4d1148bd&e=25844e23a8)
---
| | 🚨**The NEGOP has reached a critical point that only 'We the People' can collectively resolve****Peter.** 🚨
On Friday, Dawn Liphardt, the NEGOP Executive Director sent an email about the financial health of the party.

Let me be direct...she's correct.

We must _**raise $35,000 within the next 45 days to continue state party campaign operations. Our ability to be a resource for Conservative Republicans is at risk and we need your help.**_

We are about 25% of the way there in only THREE days. Change in Nebraska comes through the people and the willingness to sacrifice their _time_ , _talents_ , and **treasures**. You've **called/**_emailed_ /_texted_ _/_**posted on social media**__ for the NEGOP to represent the people and be the voice of Platform Values and to Honor the Constitution...this does not occur WITHOUT the people of the party's (600,000+ Republicans) funding the void.

It is YOUR party now.
---
| [ ](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=2d4b95aaa4&e=25844e23a8)
---
| [DONATE NOW](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=e681507278&e=25844e23a8 "DONATE NOW")
---
| Peter, your dollars are used for operations and resources, NOT direct contributions to elected officials. This is the NEW NEGOP and you are the NEW leaders of change. **For this grassroots movement to continue, for the NEGOP to stand for OUR VALUES, we need you and every person receiving this message to contribute $25 today. **

Remember, this is a _**true grassroots party**_. We are funded by the people of Nebraska and their **generous donations. ** There are many different ways to help **_TODAY:_**
* Contribute $25 ([_CLICK HERE TO SEND YOUR DONATION_](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=31dd6feb41&e=25844e23a8))
* If you’ve already donated, consider doubling or tripling your contribution.
* Become an [NEGOP+](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=256bfa39d4&e=25844e23a8) member or increase your [NEGOP+](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=55521b8adf&e=25844e23a8) member level. Join at the [$50/month Chairman's Club](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=765f4fa855&e=25844e23a8) level and have exclusive access to a VIP Book Signing with Kari Lake on Friday, January 5th in Omaha, Ne!!

* Pray that thousands of Nebraska Republicans (there are 600,000 Nebraska Republicans) provide support to their NEGOP.

_**We can do this if we all work together.**_ **Your NEGOP needs your help now. **
---
| [DONATE NOW](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=514e55fae2&e=25844e23a8 "DONATE NOW")
---
| Blessings,

[Eric Underwood](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=de3774c917&e=25844e23a8)
Chairman
Republican Party of Nebraska

---

---
|

Nebraska Republican Party1610 N StLincoln, NE 68508-1871

name: Kari Lake
subject: Hi, Friend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kari Lake for Senate
body:
I need to talk to you

| [ ](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=b4fa1d8beebc49d89bc250efa514e7e7&_e=HYAxWXskhAf4xmnLpjbD6o8hlQid0ZW8tfAC20ohiM0YEvA6UsyucYyAuzOpoY8j_IJTX65KFN0eekZpDej990GIsoWvsKcHhx0gMbVCLFhVMximGL1-M4ymK7gc9AaerwXvgEaZq9g2Cdpf0mw7V6q-HO96q3AbqJ_Ni4_vS6vjYqrs87fjivYDb2RPpT8EdjffSU37x9Qigy0KevPTFjnYqi6rndJFPFDrxk2PhiJB5VLiDiltpBnBdPe24lkuIdCNKQihpzrF2zBZeWxTNjGNCaOa_-IkuNVYLVEsl0nLwhGhiiKYGZUhdCl6WguD)
---

Friend!

_**This is the most important email you will receive all day. Keep reading.**_

I was going to wait to send this to you, but I'm getting anxious, and we're running out of time.

This is coming directly from me, Kari Lake: **the first fundraising deadline of my campaign is just around the corner.**

name: Debbie Mucarsel-Powell
subject: I couldn't be more grateful
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fight for Progress PAC and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee
body:
Thanks to grassroots Democrats like you who stepped up to help me reach my critical goal last quarter, we OUTRAISED Rick Scott by six figures!

| Peter, I'll start with the good news:

Thanks to grassroots Democrats like you who stepped up to help me reach my critical goal last quarter, **we OUTRAISED Rick Scott by six figures!**

This is a major victory for our movement. **It proves what I’ve always known: This people-powered team has what it takes to defeat my opponent and save our Senate majority. And I couldn't be more grateful to have you alongside me** — _thank you, Peter._

But here's the thing: We can't afford to lose even an _ounce_ of momentum before my end-of-month deadline in just 48 hours.

Rick Scott is one of the wealthiest members of the Senate. He can dip into his multi-million-dollar fortune — or reach out to his far-right megadonors — whenever his campaign account is running low.

**But Scott won't risk a repeat of last quarter, and I'm already up against an onslaught of multi-million dollar attack ads. That's why I've set an ambitious $150,000 end-of-month goal to fight back — and I won't be able to hit it without your help, Peter.**

Rick Scott thinks he can buy this seat — just like he did in 2018. **It's up to us to show him that on Election Day corporate dollars don't decide the winner — people do.**

[_**So please: Will you split $25 or more between my campaign and Fight for Progress to help me meet my $150,000 goal, defeat Rick Scott, and flip Florida Blue?**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/72428633/435272338/-225452087?refcode=BLU-FFP-20231029-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImJhMmM0ZWIyLWI1NzYtZWUxMS1iMDA0LTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=YKbq7ht_tLA3_LTp2itQwouIBZKsegmnGnBqBUllfMI=)

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72428675/435272467/-653452379?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODMxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZGI1MDEzMC1iNjc2LWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=L4RUsCIh84ytYPBap5ip45TuwWNTEFDhhCUatEGL85U=&emci=5ab50130-b676-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&emdi=5db50130-b676-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&ceid=28008880) This is a brazen move by the Republican Party in North Carolina to rob voters of a real voice at the ballot box. name: Team Joe
subject: A very important stretch of this campaign.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
As you read this, we are in a very important stretch of the campaign. | | |
---
Peter -- In 2020, Joe Biden received a groundswell of grassroots support -- including a historic number of individual donations from folks like YOU -- that allowed him to defeat Donald Trump and become the next President of the United States. **People from all communities and corners of the country chipped in what they could, when they could. And in a race as close that one was, each one made a difference.** As you read this, _we are once again counting on grassroots supporters to make the difference._ The MAGA Republican presidential candidates are getting closer and closer to their primaries and caucuses and outside spending against our campaign has ramped up significantly. **President Biden and Vice President Harris are relying on support from people like you to fight back.** We just launched a large ad blitz to fend off some of these attacks, so we're really hoping you can help us refill the campaign's coffers to keep us in a position to win. What do you say? [**Can President Biden and Vice President Harris count on you to contribute $25 (or anything you can afford)?
